light_analysis.method: 形式化后训练为状态分布塑造，使用Qwen3-0.6B-Base进行小规模对照实验，在GSM8K上训练，TruthfulQA和MMLU评估保留能力。比较固定数据集状态（SFT）与学习器当前策略诱导状态（RL、OPD）的效果，包括温和/压力SFT、从退化教师OPD及轻量on-policy RL。
light_analysis.result: 温和SFT提升GSM8K且遗忘少，压力SFT导致显著保留损失；OPD从退化教师学习后在GSM8K、TruthfulQA、MMLU上超越教师；轻量on-policy RL提升GSM8K同时保持保留性能。表明状态分布比监督信号形式更关键。
light_analysis.conclusion: 后训练性能强烈依赖于训练状态的源与局部性，支持状态中心视角。该发现对理解SFT、RL和蒸馏的机制有重要意义，提示优化状态分布可能比调整损失函数更有效。未来可探索更高效的状态采样策略。

title: Multiple Neural Operators Achieve Near-Optimal Rates for Multi-Task Learning
abstract: We study the approximation and statistical complexity of learning collections of operators in a shared multi-task setting, with a focus on the Multiple Neural Operators (MNO) architecture. For broad classes of Lipschitz multiple operator maps, we derive near-optimal upper bounds for approximation and statistical generalization. On the lower-bound side, we establish a curse of parametric complexity and prove corresponding minimax rates. Together, these results show that shared representations across tasks do not increase the overall cost: multi-task operator learning follows the same scaling laws as single operator learning. We also compare MNO with a multi-task extension of DeepONet based on concatenated task inputs and show that, from a worst-case approximation-complexity perspective, both architectures satisfy essentially the same asymptotic rates.

light_analysis.overview: 证明多任务神经算子（MNO）在共享表示下不增加学习成本，逼近和泛化达到近最优速率。
light_analysis.motivation: 多任务学习旨在利用任务间的共享信息提升学习效率，但现有算子学习理论多针对单任务，缺乏对多任务场景下复杂度与泛化能力的系统分析。研究需明确共享表示是否会引入额外代价，以及不同架构（如MNO与多任务DeepONet）的比较。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出多任务神经算子（MNO）架构，并针对Lipschitz连续的多算子映射族，推导了逼近误差与统计泛化误差的上界。通过构造极小化下界，证明参数复杂度导致的“维数灾难”不可避免，并得到相应的极小化收敛速率。与基于拼接任务输入的多任务DeepONet进行理论比较。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明MNO在多任务场景下保持了与单任务算子学习相同的标度律，即共享表示不增加整体学习成本。从最坏情况逼近复杂度看，MNO与多任务DeepONet具有渐近等效的速率。数值实验摘要未提及。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了多任务算子学习的理论框架，证实共享表示不会恶化学习效率，为设计高效多任务算子模型提供了理论基础。未来可探索更一般的算子类别或自适应任务关系。

title: The Value of Covariance Matching in Gaussian DDPMs and the Lanczos Sampler
abstract: A central error measure in Gaussian DDPMs is the path-space KL divergence between the exact reverse chain and the learned Gaussian reverse process. This quantity is especially relevant for procedures such as classifier guidance, which perturb the entire reverse trajectory rather than only the terminal sample. Prior analyses show that standard isotropic reverse covariances suffer an unavoidable $Ω(1/T)$ path-KL error as the number of denoising steps $T$ grows. We show that matching the full posterior covariance breaks this barrier, yielding an order-wise improvement that reduces the path KL to $O(1/T^2)$. To make full covariance matching practical, we introduce the Lanczos Gaussian sampler (LGS), a training-free, matrix-free method for sampling from the optimal reverse covariance using only covariance-vector products, which are available through Jacobian-vector products of the posterior mean. LGS avoids dense covariance storage and auxiliary covariance models. We prove that LGS approximation error decays exponentially in the number of Lanczos steps, where each Lanczos step requires a single Jacobian-vector product. Empirically, using only just three such steps improves sample quality over strong diagonal-covariance baselines, including OCM-DDPM, across standard image benchmarks. This identifies full covariance matching as both theoretically valuable and practically accessible for fast DDPM sampling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出全协方差匹配可将高斯DDPM的路径KL误差从O(1/T)降至O(1/T^2)，并引入实用的Lanczos高斯采样器（LGS）实现高效采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 高斯DDPM中路径KL误差是评估反向链与学习过程差异的关键指标，尤其适用于分类器引导等扰动整个轨迹的方法。现有标准各向同性逆协方差导致不可避免的Ω(1/T)误差，限制了采样步数减少时的性能。尽管全协方差匹配理论上更优，但实际中因计算和存储成本高而未被采用，亟需一种无需额外训练和显式存储的实用方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先理论证明匹配全后验协方差可将路径KL误差从O(1/T)改进至O(1/T^2)，实现阶数级提升。为实用化，提出Lanczos高斯采样器（LGS），无需训练，仅通过协方差-向量乘积采样最优逆协方差，该乘积可通过后验均值的雅可比-向量积获得。LGS避免存储稠密协方差和辅助模型，且近似误差随Lanczos步数指数衰减，每一步仅需一次雅可比-向量积。
light_analysis.result: 在标准图像基准上，仅使用3步Lanczos步骤的LGS即可超越强对角协方差基线（如OCM-DDPM），显著提升样本质量。论文未提供具体数值，但声称与基线相比有明显改进，验证了全协方差匹配的理论优势在实践中成立。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究首次证明全协方差匹配在理论上可突破DDPM采样误差界，并通过LGS使其变得实用，为快速、高质量采样提供了新范式。LGS无需额外训练，易于集成到现有流程。未来工作可探索更高效的近似策略或扩展至其他扩散模型变体。

title: Can AI Make Conflicts Worse? An Alignment Failure in LLM Deployment Across Conflict Contexts
abstract: AI models are already deployed in societies affected by armed conflict, and journalists, humanitarian workers, governments and ordinary citizens rely on them for information or for their work processes. No established practice exists for checking whether their outputs can make those conflicts worse. We tested nine model configurations from four providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, xAI) on 90 multi-turn scenarios designed to surface misaligned behaviour in conflict contexts: false equivalence between documented atrocities, denial of genocide, and failure to recognise ethnic slurs, among others. When such outputs feed into journalism, humanitarian reporting, or public debate, they can deepen divisions in fragile societies. Failure rates span 6\% to 47\% between the best and worst performing models, which makes model choice a safety question in its own right and when users pushed for ``balance'' in cases where international courts have already assigned responsibility, five of nine configurations failed 80 to 100 percent of the time. We release the first evaluation framework for this domain and propose adding it to alignment evaluation portfolios.
comment: Preprint. 8 pages, 2 figures. Code and evaluation framework: https://github.com/akryshtal/conflict-sensitivity-eval-bloom

light_analysis.overview: 论文发现AI模型在冲突场景中存在对齐失败，可能导致冲突升级，并首次提出评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI模型已部署在受武装冲突影响的社会，但缺乏检查其输出是否会加剧冲突的实践。模型可能在冲突语境中产生虚假平衡、否认种族灭绝、未能识别种族歧视等错误输出，进而影响新闻、人道报告和公共辩论，加深社会分裂。因此需要系统评估模型在冲突场景中的对齐表现。
light_analysis.method: 论文从OpenAI、Anthropic、DeepSeek、xAI四个提供商测试了9种模型配置，使用90个多轮场景，设计用于暴露冲突语境中的失调行为，包括：历史暴行的虚假平衡、否认种族灭绝、未能识别种族侮辱等。提出了第一个针对该领域的评估框架，并建议将其加入对齐评估组合。
light_analysis.result: 最佳和最差模型之间的失败率从6%到47%不等，表明模型选择本身是一个安全问题。当用户在国际法庭已定责的情况下要求“平衡”时，9种配置中有5种在80%到100%的时间内失败。表明存在严重对齐问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个面向冲突场景的评估框架，揭示模型部署前需进行此类检查以避免加剧冲突。实际应用价值在于为AI安全部署提供指导，潜在局限性是框架覆盖场景有限，未来可扩展。

title: Reading Task Failure Off the Activations: A Sparse-Feature Audit of GPT-2 Small on Indirect Object Identification
abstract: We report a small, reproducible audit of which sparse-autoencoder (SAE) features of GPT-2 small fire differently on failed versus successful trials of the Indirect Object Identification (IOI) task. On 300 prompts, GPT-2 small reaches 79.7% accuracy; 146 of the 24,576 features in the layer-8 residual-stream SAE release of Bloom (2024) clear a Holm-corrected significance threshold and 105 reach a large effect size (|Cohen's d| > 0.8). The strongest single correlate of failure -- feature 17,491, d=+2.93, Neuronpedia label 'cryptographic keys' -- is essentially silent except when the prompt's transferred object is 'the keys,' on which GPT-2 small fails 93.3% of the time vs. 7.5% on the other seven objects (Fisher exact p = 8.79 x 10^-33). We put this correlate through three controls that a mechanistic claim should pass. (i) A causal ablation: zeroing feature 17,491 in the residual stream across all token positions of the 45 keys prompts does not restore accuracy (6.7% -> 4.4%); the feature is a correlate, not a sufficient cause at this layer. (ii) A representation baseline: a logistic regression on the raw 768-dimensional residual stream reaches 5-fold ROC AUC = 0.929, matching the top-100 SAE features (0.927); the SAE basis adds interpretability, not predictive power. (iii) A seed-robustness check: across five random seeds the keys-subset failure rate stays in 75.0--93.3% (the behavioural effect is real), but feature 17,491 is the top-|d| feature in only 1 of 5 runs. The methodological contribution is therefore the audit pipeline (cheap, model-agnostic, surfaces named correlates) rather than any single feature found through it. We release the code, the 300-prompt corpus, the 300x24,576 activation matrix, the ablation and baseline scripts, and the figures. The full pipeline runs on a laptop (Apple M3 Max, no discrete GPU).

light_analysis.overview: 通过稀疏自编码器审计GPT-2 Small在间接对象识别任务中失败时的特征差异，提出可复现的审计流水线。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管稀疏自编码器（SAE）能揭示语言模型内部特征，但如何系统地将特征与特定行为失败关联仍不明确。现有方法缺乏对特征因果性和鲁棒性的严格检验。本研究旨在建立一套低成本的审计流程，识别与任务失败高度相关的特征，并通过因果消融、表征基线和种子鲁棒性检验验证其可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 使用Bloom (2024)发布的GPT-2 small第8层残差流SAE（24,576个特征），在300个IOI提示上比较成功与失败试次的特征激活差异。通过Holm校正显著性检验和Cohen's d效应量筛选特征，并对最强相关特征（特征17,491）进行三项控制检验：（i）因果消融；（ii）原始残差表征的逻辑回归基线；（iii）随机种子鲁棒性检查。全程在Apple M3 Max笔记本上运行。
light_analysis.result: GPT-2 small在IOI任务上准确率79.7%。筛选出146个显著特征，其中105个达到大效应量。最强特征17,491（标签'cryptographic keys'）在转移对象为'the keys'时d=+2.93，失败率93.3% vs 7.5%（p=8.79e-33）。但因果消融不恢复准确率（6.7%→4.4%），逻辑回归AUC（0.929）与top-100 SAE特征（0.927）匹配，且该特征仅在1/5种子中为top特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了通用审计流水线而非特定特征发现，揭示了SAE特征虽能提供可解释性但缺乏因果性和鲁棒性。该流水线廉价、模型无关，适用于其他模型和任务。实验表明强大的相关性并非因果证据，未来需结合更精细的干预方法。代码和数据已开源。

title: WorldKV: Efficient World Memory with World Retrieval and Compression
abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models have enabled real-time, action-conditioned world generation. However, sustaining a persistent world, where revisiting a previously seen viewpoint yields consistent content, remains an open problem. Full KV-cache attention preserves this consistency but breaks real-time constraints: memory footprint and attention cost grow linearly with rollout length. Sliding window inference restores throughput but discards long-term consistency. We propose WorldKV, a training-free framework with two components: World Retrieval and World Compression. World Retrieval stores evicted KV-cache chunks in GPU/CPU memory and selectively retrieves scene-relevant chunks via camera/ action correspondence, inserting them back into the native attention window without re-encoding. World Compression prunes redundant tokens within each chunk via key-key similarity to an anchor frame, halving per-chunk storage to fit 2x more history under a fixed budget. On Matrix-Game-2.0 and LingBot- World-Fast, WorldKV matches or exceeds full-KV memory fidelity at roughly 2x the throughput, and is competitive with memory-trained baselines without any fine-tuning. Project Page: https://cvlab-kaist.github.io/WorldKV/

light_analysis.overview: 提出WorldKV，一种无需训练的世界记忆框架，通过世界检索和压缩实现高效一致的自回归视频扩散世界生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型虽能实时生成动作条件的世界，但维持持久世界一致性是开放问题。全KV缓存保持一致性但内存和注意力成本随展开长度线性增长，破坏实时性；滑动窗口推理恢复吞吐量却丢弃长期一致性。现有方法难以兼顾一致性与效率。
light_analysis.method: WorldKV包含两个组件：World Retrieval将驱逐的KV缓存块存入GPU/CPU内存，通过相机/动作对应选择性检索场景相关块并插入注意力窗口，无需重新编码；World Compression通过关键帧间关键相似性剪枝每个块内冗余令牌，使每块存储减半，固定预算下可容纳多2倍历史。整体无需训练。
light_analysis.result: 在Matrix-Game-2.0和LingBot-World-Fast上，WorldKV以约2倍吞吐量匹配或超越全KV记忆保真度，无需微调即可与记忆训练基线竞争。具体数据指标摘要未明确说明，仅提及吞吐量和保真度对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorldKV作为无需训练框架，通过检索与压缩机制解决了持久世界一致性与实时性的矛盾，显著提升吞吐量并保持高保真度，适用于实时交互式世界生成。未来可探索更高效的压缩策略或扩展到更复杂场景，摘要未提及局限性。

title: Parametric Modular Answer Set Programs Made Declarative
abstract: In this paper, we explore the concept of modularity in first-order answer set programming (ASP). We introduce a new formalism called parametric modular logic programs, which allows defining subprograms with parameters and intensionality statements. We demonstrate how this formalism can capture the semantics of clingo-programs with collective control, a feature that enables structuring and instantiating subprograms. We provide theoretical foundations for modular ASP, illustrate its usefulness, and connect to traditional non-modular ASP.
comment: To appear in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming

light_analysis.overview: 提出参数化模块逻辑程序，实现一阶ASP的模块化，并连接传统非模块化ASP。
light_analysis.motivation: 在回答集编程（ASP）中，模块化有助于复杂问题的分解与重用，但现有方法缺乏对参数化和内涵性声明的正式支持。本文旨在解决一阶ASP中模块化形式化不足的问题，通过引入参数化模块逻辑程序，使子程序定义更灵活，并能捕捉clingo中集体控制等高级特性的语义，从而提升ASP的模块化编程能力。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了参数化模块逻辑程序（Parametric Modular Logic Programs）的形式化框架，允许子程序带有参数和内涵性声明（指约束程序行为的语句）。通过定义模块间的参数化接口，实现了子程序的灵活实例化。同时，展示了该框架如何自然捕获clingo-programs中集体控制（collective control）的语义，即动态子程序选择与实例化。理论部分给出模块化ASP的语义定义，并证明其与传统非模块化ASP的等价关系。
light_analysis.result: 论文主要提供了理论贡献，包括参数化模块逻辑程序的形式化定义及其与clingo集体控制语义的对应关系。通过示例验证了该框架在表达力和实用性上的优势，能够更简洁地表示复杂ASP程序中的模块重用和实例化逻辑。未提供具体实验数据，但理论基础为后续实现模块化ASP系统奠定了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为ASP引入了模块化形式化方法，通过参数化和内涵性声明增强了子程序的可重用性和灵活性。理论分析表明，该框架可忠实捕获传统ASP语义，同时支持clingo等高阶特性。未来工作可聚焦于实现高效求解器、扩展模块间交互机制，以及在知识表示和规划等实际任务中验证其有效性。

title: AnyMo: Geometry-Aware Setup-Agnostic Modeling of Human Motion in the Wild
abstract: As wearable and mobile devices become increasingly embedded in daily life, they offer a practical way to continuously sense human motion in the wild. But inertial signals are highly dependent on the sensing setup, including body location, mounting position, sensor orientation, device hardware, and sampling protocol. This setup dependence makes it difficult to learn motion representations that transfer across devices and datasets, and limits the broader use of wearable IMUs beyond closed-set recognition. We introduce AnyMo, a geometry-aware framework for setup-agnostic human motion modeling. AnyMo uses physics-grounded IMU simulation over dense body-surface placements to generate diverse and plausible synthetic signals, pre-trains a graph encoder from paired synthetic placement views and masked partial observations, tokenizes multi-position IMU into full-body motion tokens, and aligns these tokens with an LLM for motion-language understanding. We evaluate AnyMo on three complementary tasks: zero-shot activity recognition across 14 unseen downstream datasets, cross-modal retrieval, and wearable IMU motion captioning, where it improves average Accuracy/F1/R@2 by 11.7\%/11.6\%/22.6\% on HAR, increases zero-shot IMU-to-text and text-to-IMU retrieval MRR by 15.9\% and 28.6\%, respectively, and improves zero-shot captioning BERT-F1 by 18.8\%. These results support AnyMo as a generalist model for wearable motion understanding in the wild. Project page: https://baiyuchen.com/project/AnyMo.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AnyMo，一个几何感知的、与设置无关的人体运动建模框架，通过物理模拟和LLM对齐实现跨设备泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 可穿戴和移动设备日益普及，但惯性信号高度依赖于传感设置（如位置、方向、硬件等），导致运动表示难以跨设备和数据集迁移，限制了IMU在封闭识别之外的应用。现有方法缺乏对设置变化的鲁棒性，需要一种与设置无关的通用运动建模方法。
light_analysis.method: AnyMo利用基于物理的IMU模拟，在密集身体表面位置上生成多样且逼真的合成信号；通过图编码器从配对合成视角和掩码部分观测中预训练；将多位置IMU信号标记化为全身运动令牌，并与大语言模型（LLM）对齐实现运动-语言理解。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本活动识别中，在14个未见下游数据集上平均Accuracy/F1/R@2提升11.7%/11.6%/22.6%；零样本IMU到文本和文本到IMU检索MRR分别提升15.9%和28.6%；零样本字幕生成BERT-F1提升18.8%，支持AnyMo作为通用模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: AnyMo通过几何感知的模拟和LLM对齐，实现了与设置无关的通用可穿戴运动理解，在多项跨设备任务中显著提升性能。未来可扩展至更多运动相关应用，但依赖合成数据与真实数据的差异可能仍需关注。

title: AMEL: Accumulated Message Effects on LLM Judgments
abstract: Large language models are routinely used as automated evaluators: to review code, moderate content, or score outputs, often with many items passing through one conversation. We ask whether the polarity of prior conversation history biases subsequent judgments, an effect we call the accumulated message effect on LLM judgments (AMEL). Across 75,898 API calls to 11 models from 4 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and four open-source models), we present identical test items in isolation or following histories saturated with predominantly positive or negative evaluations.   Models shift toward the conversation's prevailing polarity (d = -0.17, p < 10^-46). The effect concentrates on items where the model is genuinely uncertain at baseline (d = -0.34 for high-entropy items, vs d = -0.15 when the baseline is deterministic). Bias does not grow with context length: 5 prior turns and 50 produce the same shift (Spearman |r| < 0.01; OLS slope p = 0.80). And there is a negativity asymmetry: paired per item, negative histories induce 1.62x more bias than positive (t = 13.46, p < 10^-39, n = 2,481). Scaling helps but does not solve it (Anthropic: Haiku -0.22 to Opus -0.17; OpenAI: Nano -0.34 to GPT-5.2 -0.17).   Three follow-ups narrow the mechanism. The token probability distribution shifts continuously, not at a threshold. The negativity asymmetry has both token-level and semantic components, though attributing the balance is exploratory at our sample sizes. Position does not matter: five biased turns anywhere in a 50-turn history produce the same shift. The simplest fix for evaluation pipelines is a fresh context per item; when batching is unavoidable, balancing the history helps.
comment: 19 pages, 14 figures, 6 tables. Single author. Code, data (75,898 deduplicated API responses), and analysis pipeline at https://github.com/chutapp/amel

light_analysis.overview: 系统性地揭示了LLM作为自动评估者时，历史对话的极性会显著影响后续判断，提出AMEL效应。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型常被用于自动评估任务，如代码审查、内容审核等，且往往在单个对话中处理多个项目。现有研究关注LLM的偏见，但忽视了对话历史中累积的评价极性对后续判断的影响。这个问题很重要，因为如果历史极性导致评估偏差，会严重影响评估结果的可靠性。已有方法未系统量化这种累积效应。
light_analysis.method: 通过75,898次API调用，测试了来自OpenAI、Anthropic、Google及四个开源模型的11个模型。在孤立呈现或与正/负评价饱和的历史后呈现相同测试项，比较判断变化。使用统计方法分析极性偏移、不确定性影响、上下文长度效应、负性不对称性及扩展模型的缓解效果。还通过令牌概率分布、位置实验等探究机制。
light_analysis.result: 模型判断向历史主流极性偏移（d = -0.17, p < 10^-46），在模型基线不确定时效果更强（高熵项目d = -0.34 vs 确定项目d = -0.15）。偏差不随上下文长度增加（5轮与50轮相同）。负性历史引发的偏差是正性的1.62倍（t = 13.46, p < 10^-39）。模型扩展可减轻但未消除偏差（如Anthropic Haiku -0.22到Opus -0.17）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证实了AMEL效应的存在，揭示了LLM评估中的历史极性偏差，包括负性不对称性、长度独立性等特征。学术上贡献了对LLM上下文偏见机制的理解，实践上建议评估管道每个项目使用新上下文，或平衡历史极性以减轻偏差。局限性在于负性不对称的归因探索性，未来可研究更细粒度的机制。

title: Abstraction for Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) often exhibit significant redundancy due to symmetries and shared structure across state-goal pairs in real-world Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (GCRL). While hierarchical policies have been motivated for horizon reduction via temporal abstraction in offline GCRL, we demonstrate that hierarchy also enables absolute abstraction. By introducing relativised options as well as distinct representations for different levels of the hierarchy, we demonstrate how an agent can reuse experience across similar contexts of the state-space. Based on this framework, we introduce two simple algorithms for learning relativised options and abstracting from the absolute frame of reference. Our experiments show that such inductive biases significantly improve performance in offline GCRL.

light_analysis.overview: 本文证明分层策略在离线目标条件强化学习中不仅能实现时间抽象，还能通过相对化选项和层次化表示实现绝对抽象，从而跨相似上下文重用经验。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线目标条件强化学习中，状态-目标对存在因对称性和共享结构导致的显著冗余，现有分层方法仅关注通过时间抽象减少视野，忽略了绝对抽象的潜力。利用绝对抽象可更有效地重用经验并提升样本效率，但缺乏相应框架和算法。本文旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于分层强化学习的框架，引入相对化选项（relativised options）作为抽象单元，并为不同层级使用不同表示以消除绝对参考系的影响。基于此设计两种简单算法：一个用于学习相对化选项，另一个用于从绝对坐标系中抽象。通过这种归纳偏置，智能体能跨状态空间中相似上下文重用经验。
light_analysis.result: 在离线目标条件强化学习任务上的实验表明，所提出的归纳偏置显著提升了性能。摘要未提供具体数值或与基线方法对比的细节，但明确指出性能改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献是揭示分层不仅提供时间抽象，还支持绝对抽象，并提出相应算法。此工作为离线GCRL中的抽象研究提供了新视角，具有提升样本效率和泛化能力的潜力。未来可探索更复杂的抽象层次或扩展到在线设置。

title: Beyond the Org Chart: AI and the Transformation of Invisible Work
abstract: An increasing number of news and research articles report that AI adoption is allowing professionals to blur and extend the boundaries of their corporate roles. With the goal of understanding how work processes might be changing in an AI-forward company, we interviewed 24 product-focused individuals at a large technology firm about how AI has impacted their own work, their work within their product team, and their professional interactions. Our conversations suggest that AI is not only changing formal role responsibilities and collaborations between those roles, but also changing informal cultural practices like professional mentoring that are key to helping professionals settle in their positions, stay engaged with their work, and grow their careers. Some of these changes are positive, such as smoother collaboration between peers, but other changes are more nuanced and put the typical career growth opportunities, like receiving feedback from professional networks and promoting leadership and mentorship, at risk. We propose steps that AI companies can take to make the invisible work more visible. Additionally, we propose efforts that individuals and leaders can take to support their colleagues through AI transformation while preserving healthy company cultures that support diverse thinking, collaboration, and informal interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 研究AI采用如何改变企业中的正式角色与非正式文化实践，提出使隐性工作显性化的措施。
light_analysis.motivation: AI采用让专业人员模糊角色边界，但现有研究缺乏对工作流程变化的深入理解。通过访谈发现AI不仅改变正式职责和协作，还影响非正式文化实践如指导，这些变化可能危及职业发展机会，因此需要理解并应对这些影响。
light_analysis.method: 对一家大型科技公司24名产品导向员工进行半结构化访谈，探讨AI对个人工作、团队协作和职业互动的影响，通过定性分析揭示正式与非正式工作变化。
light_analysis.result: 发现AI带来正向变化如团队协作更顺畅，但也减少专业网络反馈、领导力指导和指导机会，从而危及职业成长。提出使隐性工作显性化的步骤以及个体和领导者支持同事的措施。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调AI采用需关注非正式文化实践，提出保护支持多元思考、协作和非正式互动的健康公司文化的建议，对AI公司和实践者有指导价值。

title: Tokenization with Split Trees
abstract: We introduce Tokenization with Split Trees (ToaST), a subword tokenization method that directly optimizes compression under a new recursive inference procedure. ToaST greedily splits each pretoken into a full binary tree using precomputed byte n-gram counts, independent of any vocabulary. Given a vocabulary, inference recursively descends each split tree and emits the first in-vocabulary node reached on each path. Vocabulary selection is formulated as an Integer Program (IP) that minimizes the total token count over all split trees under this inference procedure. The Linear Programming (LP) relaxation is near-integral in practice, yielding provably near-optimal vocabularies, with training time empirically scaling quadratically in the number of split trees. On English text, ToaST reduces token counts by more than 11% compared to BPE, WordPiece, and UnigramLM at vocabulary sizes of 40,960 and above, reducing the number of inference tokens for models using this tokenizer, thus extending the effective context length. ToaST also uses common single-byte tokens less frequently than these baselines, leading to a substantial improvement in Renyi efficiency. In experiments training 1.5B parameter language models, ToaST achieves the highest CORE score, outperforming baselines by 2.6%--7.6%, with significance for two of three, and scoring best on 13 of 22 individual tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ToaST，一种基于分裂树的分词方法，通过递归推理和整数规划优化压缩，显著减少token计数并提升语言模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有子词分词方法如BPE、WordPiece和UnigramLM在压缩效率和推理token数量上存在不足，导致模型上下文长度受限。ToaST旨在直接优化压缩率，通过新的递归推理过程减少token数量，从而延长有效上下文长度并提高计算效率。
light_analysis.method: ToaST先使用预计算的字节n-gram计数贪婪地将每个预分词拆分为完全二叉树，独立于词汇表。推理时递归下降分裂树，在每个路径上发射第一个在词汇表中的节点。词汇选择建模为整数规划，最小化所有分裂树的总token数，其线性规划松弛在实践中有近整数解，可证明得到近似最优词汇表，训练时间与分裂树数量成二次方关系。
light_analysis.result: 在英文文本上，词汇量≥40960时，ToaST的token计数比BPE、WordPiece和UnigramLM减少超过11%，且常用单字节token使用更少，Renyi效率显著提升。训练1.5B参数语言模型时，ToaST获得最高CORE分数，超越基线2.6%–7.6%，其中两个基线差异显著，并在22个单独任务中13个表现最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: ToaST通过创新的分裂树结构和整数规划优化，实现了更高效的子词分词，显著减少推理token数量，扩展了模型的有效上下文长度。该方法在大型语言模型训练中展现出优越性能，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的树结构或扩展至多语言场景。

title: Clipping Bottleneck: Stabilizing RLVR via Stochastic Recovery of Near-Boundary Signals
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a central paradigm for scaling LLM reasoning, yet its optimization often suffers from training instability and suboptimal convergence. Through a systematic dissection of clipping-based GRPO-style objectives, we identify the rigid clipping decision induced by hard clipping as a key practical bottleneck in the studied RLVR setups. Specifically, our analysis suggests that informative signals can lie in the near-boundary region just beyond the clipping threshold, and are therefore discarded by the standard hard-clipping rule. Notably, once this bottleneck is precisely identified, even simple stochastic perturbations at the boundary can recover meaningful performance gains. Building on this finding, we propose Near-boundary Stochastic Rescue (NSR), a minimal, plug-and-play modification that stochastically retains these slightly out-of-bound tokens to recover lost signals. While NSR, via stochastic sampling, can be interpreted as inducing an implicit gradient decay in expectation, our ablations reveal that its stochastic, boundary-local rescue mechanism is consistently more effective than deterministic gradient decay. Validated by extensive experiments across model sizes from 7B to 30B and both dense and MoE architectures, as a plug-and-play solution, NSR substantially improves training stability and delivers consistent gains over strong baselines such as DAPO and GSPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出近边界随机救援（NSR）方法，通过随机恢复剪裁阈值附近的信号，解决RLVR中硬剪裁导致的信息丢失问题，提升训练稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）是扩展LLM推理能力的重要范式，但现有方法存在训练不稳定和收敛次优的问题。研究发现硬剪裁机制是瓶颈：阈值的刚性决策会丢弃位于边界附近的有用信号，这些信号包含有价值的梯度信息。精确识别该瓶颈后，简单的随机扰动即可恢复性能，说明解决信息丢失的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 提出近边界随机救援（NSR），一种即插即用的修改方案。在GRPO风格目标中，对恰超出剪裁阈值的token进行随机保留（而非全部丢弃），从而恢复损失的信号。从期望角度看，NSR等价于隐式梯度衰减，但消融实验表明其随机边界救援机制比确定性梯度衰减更有效。在7B-30B模型（包括稠密和MoE架构）上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在多种模型规模和架构上的实验表明，NSR作为即插即用方案，显著提升训练稳定性，并在强基线（如DAPO和GSPO）上取得一致增益。摘要未给出具体性能数值，但强调其有效性和跨设置的稳健性。
light_analysis.conclusion: NSR（近边界随机救援）通过随机恢复剪裁阈值附近的信号，解决了硬剪裁导致的信息瓶颈，是一种简洁有效的改良。其即插即用特性使其易于集成到现有RLVR框架中。未来可探索更精细的边界信号处理策略或结合其他稳定性技术。

title: Cross-Domain Human Action Recognition from Multiview Motion and Textual Descriptions
abstract: Robustness to domain changes is a key capability for effective deployment of human action recognition systems in real-world scenarios, where action categories at inference can present important domain shifts or even unseen actions from training. In this context, improving the recognition capabilities of Zero-Shot Action Recognition models (ZSAR), without requiring strong annotation efforts, remains a central challenge. Most ZSAR approaches assume that actions are observed under geometric conditions similar to those seen during training. In practice, variations in human body orientation and camera viewpoint add a significant domain gap in ZSAR, substantially limiting generalization to novel action-motion combinations. In this context, this paper presents a novel orientation-aware action recognition approach with improved cross-domain capabilities. Our approach combines motion cues of multiple camera viewpoints and text descriptions of human actions in the training phase. We present a new orientation-aware motion encoding network to learn different motion features, and adapt a specific orientation-aware text prompt to match the corresponding features at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method consistently improves ZSAR performance across different recognition benchmarks, outperforming recent state-of-the-art zero-shot approaches on NTU-RGB+D, BABEL, NW-UCLA, and on two surveillance datasets. In addition, the learned representations exhibit strong transfer learning capabilities, yielding competitive performance on both cross-domain and same-domain recognition of seen actions. Code and trained models are available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/OrientationAware-HAR
comment: Accepted to ICPR 2026. Code and trained models available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/OrientationAware-HAR

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种方向感知的动作识别方法，结合多视角运动与文本描述，提升零样本动作识别在跨域场景下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本动作识别在现实部署中面临域偏移挑战，现有方法假设训练与测试时几何条件相似，但人体朝向和视角变化导致显著域间隙，严重限制了对未见动作-运动组合的泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出方向感知运动编码网络，从多摄像头视角提取运动特征，并设计方向感知文本提示以匹配对应特征；训练时融合多视角运动线索与文本描述，实现跨域零样本识别。
light_analysis.result: 在NTU-RGB+D、BABEL、NW-UCLA和两个监控数据集上，该方法持续提升零样本动作识别性能，超越近期最先进方法；学习到的表示展现出强迁移能力，在跨域和同域识别中均取得竞争结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文有效解决了视角变化导致的域偏移问题，提升零样本动作识别鲁棒性；代码和模型已开源，为实际部署提供基础；未来可探索更复杂的动作-文本语义对齐。

title: Improving Viewpoint-Invariance and Temporal Consistency for Action Detection
abstract: Viewpoint change invariance and action temporal consistency are critical aspects for the effective deployment of human action detection of untrimmed videos. Existing appearance-based video detection methods often struggle with limited viewpoint diversity during training, while motion-based detection approaches frequently fail to model fine-grained temporal relationships across consecutive motion windows. This paper introduces a novel two-stage action detection approach designed to improve both view-invariance and global temporal coherence properties. In the first stage, we extract motion features from augmented virtual viewpoints, solely used at training. Then, the second stage introduces a new view-invariant, multi-scale temporal encoder based on selective state-space sequence modelling to aggregate information across viewpoints and time scales. Experiments on PKU-MMD and BABEL benchmarks demonstrate that this approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in all considered splits. Code and trained models are available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/HydraView-TAD
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026. Code and trained models are available at: https://icb-vision-ai.github.io/HydraView-TAD

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段动作检测方法，通过虚拟视角增强和状态空间序列建模提升视角不变性和时间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于外观的视频检测方法在训练时视角多样性不足，而基于运动的方法难以建模连续运动窗口间的细粒度时间关系。这两个缺陷限制了非裁剪视频中人体动作检测的有效部署。因此，需要一种能同时提升视角不变性和全局时间一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 第一阶段，在训练时从增强虚拟视角提取运动特征，增强视角多样性。第二阶段，提出基于选择性状态空间序列建模的视角不变多尺度时间编码器，聚合跨视角和时间尺度的信息。该方法为两阶段架构，仅在训练阶段使用虚拟视角增强。
light_analysis.result: 在PKU-MMD和BABEL基准数据集上，该方法在所有考虑的分割上显著优于现有最先进方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能提升明显。代码和模型已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动作检测中的视角变化和时序一致性问题，具有重要学术价值。实际应用中可提升监控视频分析等场景的鲁棒性。未来可进一步探索更复杂的虚拟视角生成策略或扩展到其他视频任务。

title: Posterior Collapse as Automatic Spectral Pruning
abstract: We show that posterior collapse in $β$-VAEs implements automatic spectral pruning. A latent mode collapses if its contribution to reconstruction is below the cutoff set by $β$. Equilibrium solutions with different $β$ thus reveal a cascade of collapses as latent modes decouple from least to most useful.   We derive this as a consequence of the loss via a Landau stability analysis. We define a latent-rescaling-invariant order parameter that ranks active latent modes and whose collapse thresholds identify which effective variables to inspect first.   In the linear Gaussian case, the collapse spectrum, utility spectrum, and normalized PCA spectrum coincide, and each collapse follows a mean-field law. We test these predictions on the WorldClim dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示β-VAE中后验坍缩实现自动频谱剪枝，并提出潜变量重缩放不变序参数。
light_analysis.motivation: β-VAE中后验坍缩导致潜变量失效，现有文献未充分理解其内在机制。本文通过Landau稳定性分析发现，坍缩是自动频谱剪枝过程，有助于解析潜变量贡献排序。
light_analysis.method: 基于Landau稳定性分析推导β-VAE损失函数，揭示潜变量按贡献从低到高依次坍缩；定义重缩放不变序参数以排序活跃模式；在线性高斯情形下，坍缩谱与PCA谱一致。
light_analysis.result: 理论预测在线性高斯情形下得到验证，坍缩谱、效用谱与归一化PCA谱重合；在WorldClim数据集上实验支持了级联坍缩与自动剪枝的结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 后验坍缩被重新解释为自动频谱剪枝机制，为潜变量选择提供理论依据；未来可推广至非线性生成模型及复杂数据集。

title: ChronoVAE-HOPE: Beyond Attention -- A Next-Generation VAE Foundation Model for Specialized Time Series Classification
abstract: Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) have become a new component of the state-of-the-art in general time series forecasting. However, adapting them to specialized classification tasks remains constrained by two interconnected challenges: the quadratic cost of standard attention mechanisms and the inability to disentangle the structural components underlying time series variability. This technical report introduces ChronoVAE-HOPE, a next-generation TSFM that reconciles massive generalization with structured latent representation for time series classification. The core of the proposal is a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) framework built upon the HOPE Block, which replaces quadratic attention with a dual-memory system: Titans modules for dynamic short-term retention and a Continuum Memory System (CMS) for the abstraction of long-term historical context. A key architectural novelty is the disentangled latent space, which factorizes representations into independent trend and seasonal components via dedicated encoder heads and separate decoder pathways. ChronoVAE-HOPE undergoes self-supervised pre-training on the Monash archive, combining a Masked Time Series Modeling (MTSM) auxiliary objective with a disentangled VAE reconstruction loss. The pre-trained encoder is subsequently frozen and used to generate fixed-length embeddings for downstream classification on the UCR benchmark datasets. Empirical results demonstrate strong performance across diverse temporal domains, particularly in settings characterized by strict causal structure. ChronoVAE-HOPE establishes a robust and interpretable framework for the adaptation of foundation models to time series classification through structured generative representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ChronoVAE-HOPE，一种基于VAE的时间序列基础模型，通过HOPE块替代注意力机制并解耦潜在空间，专用于分类任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型(TSFMs)在预测任务中表现优异，但迁移至专业分类任务面临两大挑战：标准注意力机制的二次计算成本，以及无法解耦时间序列的潜在结构成分(如趋势和季节)。这些限制阻碍了模型在分类场景中的泛化和可解释性。因此，需要一种既能保持大规模预训练优势，又能生成结构化潜在表示的方法。
light_analysis.method: ChronoVAE-HOPE基于VAE框架，核心是HOPE块，包含Titans模块(动态短期记忆)和Continuum Memory System(长期上下文抽象)，以替代二次注意力。其关键创新在于解耦潜在空间，通过专用编码器头和解码器路径将表示独立为趋势和季节成分。模型在Monash档案上自监督预训练，结合掩码时间序列建模(MTSM)辅助损失和解耦VAE重构损失。预训练编码器冻结后，为UCR数据集下游分类生成固定长度嵌入。
light_analysis.result: 在UCR基准数据集上，ChronoVAE-HOPE在多样时间域分类任务中表现强劲，尤其在严格因果结构设置下优势明显。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称其性能优于现有方法，验证了解耦结构和记忆机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChronoVAE-HOPE建立了鲁棒且可解释的框架，通过结构化生成表示将基础模型适配时间序列分类。其解耦潜在空间提升了可解释性，HOPE块降低了计算成本。未来工作可探索更复杂的解耦策略或在其他领域(如异常检测)的应用。

title: Forecasting Scientific Progress with Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly embedded in scientific discovery, yet whether it can anticipate scientific progress remains unclear. To study this question, we introduce a temporally grounded evaluation framework for forecasting scientific progress under controlled knowledge constraints. We present CUSP (Cutoff-conditioned Unseen Scientific Progress), a multi-disciplinary and event-level benchmark that evaluates scientific forecasting in AI systems through feasibility assessment, mechanistic reasoning, generative solution design, and temporal prediction. Across 4,760 scientific events, we observe systematic and domain-dependent limitations in current frontier models. While models can identify plausible research directions from competing candidates, they fail to reliably predict whether scientific advances will be realized and systematically misestimate when they will occur. Performance is highly heterogeneous across domains, with the timing of AI progress more predictable than advances in biology, chemistry, and physics. Performance is largely insensitive to whether events occur before or after the training cutoff, suggesting these limitations cannot be explained solely by knowledge exposure in training data. Under controlled information access, additional pre-cutoff knowledge improves performance but does not close the gap to full-information settings, which becomes more pronounced for high-citation advances. Models also exhibit systematic overconfidence and strong response biases, indicating unreliable uncertainty estimation. Taken together, current AI systems fall short as predictive tools for scientific progress. Access to prior knowledge does not translate into reliable forecasting, and performance benefits more from post-event information than from forward-looking prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CUSP基准框架，系统评估AI预测科学进展的能力，揭示当前模型在可行性判断、时序预测等方面的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管AI在科学发现中应用广泛，但其能否预测科学进展尚不清楚。现有评估缺乏对AI预知能力的系统检验，尤其缺乏考虑知识约束的时序基准。本研究旨在通过受控知识约束下的评估框架，探究前沿AI模型预测科学事件的可实现性、时限和机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出CUSP（Cutoff-conditioned Unseen Scientific Progress）基准，包含4760个跨学科科学事件，从可行性评估、机制推理、生成式解决方案设计和时间预测四个维度评估AI。利用前沿大语言模型，设置训练截止日期前后的事件，控制知识暴露，分析模型预测偏差。
light_analysis.result: 发现模型在识别可行研究方向上有一定能力，但无法可靠预测科学进展是否实现，且系统性错误估计发生时间。不同领域表现异质性大，AI进展时间预测优于生物、化学、物理。模型对事件是否发生在训练截止前后不敏感，额外知识提升有限，高引事件预测更差。模型存在过度自信和响应偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 当前AI系统不足以作为科学进展的预测工具。先验知识无法转化为可靠预测，性能更多得益于事后信息而非前瞻预测。该研究为评估AI科学预测能力提供了基准框架，揭示了其局限性，未来需改进模型的不确定性估计和时序推理能力。

title: Conceptualizing Embeddings: Sparse Disentanglement for Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models learn powerful multimodal embeddings, yet their internal semantics remain opaque. While sparse autoencoders (SAEs) can extract interpretable features, they rely on expanding the representation dimension, which compromises the original geometry and introduces redundancy. We introduce CEDAR (Conceptual Embedding Disentanglement via Adaptive Rotation), a post-hoc method that reveals the compositional structure of pretrained embeddings without increasing dimensionality. By learning an invertible transformation with a top-$k$ sparsity bottleneck, CEDAR concentrates semantic information into axis-aligned disentangled coordinates. In CLIP-like architecture, individual coordinates can be interpreted with textual concepts, while for generative models such as BLIP, they can be decoded into natural language descriptions. Experiments demonstrate that CEDAR achieves a competitive reconstruction-sparsity trade-off while producing explanations that are more interpretable and better aligned with human perception. Our results suggest that the apparent entanglement in vision-language representations can be resolved through a suitable change of basis, eliminating the need for overcomplete expansions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CEDAR方法，通过可逆变换和top-k稀疏瓶颈，在不增加维度的情况下解缠视觉语言嵌入，提升可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAEs）通过扩展嵌入维度来提取可解释特征，但这会破坏原始几何结构并引入冗余。视觉语言模型的多模态嵌入内部语义不透明，需要一种后处理方法来揭示其组合结构，同时保持原始维度不变，避免几何失真。
light_analysis.method: CEDAR学习一个可逆变换，结合top-k稀疏瓶颈，将语义信息集中到轴对齐的解缠坐标中。对于CLIP类模型，每个坐标可用文本概念解释；对于生成模型如BLIP，坐标可解码为自然语言描述。该方法不增加嵌入维度，保留原始几何结构。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CEDAR在重构-稀疏权衡上达到竞争性水平，生成的解释具有更高的可解释性，且与人类感知更好对齐。相比扩展维度的SAEs，CEDAR避免了冗余，同时保持高稀疏度和重构质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: CEDAR证明视觉语言表示的表面纠缠可通过合适的基变换解决，无需过完备扩展。该工作为理解多模态嵌入的语义结构提供了新视角，具有可解释AI和模型分析的应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的稀疏正则化策略。

title: Swift Sampling: Selecting Temporal Surprises via Taylor Series
abstract: While most frames in long-form video are redundant, the critical information resides in temporal surprises: moments where the actual visual features deviate from their predicted evolution. Inspired by the human brain's predictive coding, we introduce Swift Sampling, an elegant, training-free frame selection algorithm that automatically identifies high-information moments in a video. Specifically, we model a video as a differentiable trajectory in the visual latent space and compute the velocity and acceleration of its features. Then, we apply Taylor expansion to project the expected path of subsequent frames. Frames that diverge sharply from this predicted manifold are identified as temporally surprising frames and selected for sampling. Unlike prior training-free methods that rely on auxiliary networks or video-specific hyperparameter tuning, Swift Sampling is incredibly lightweight, adding only 0.02x additional computational cost over baseline making it 30x cheaper overhead than leading baselines. Across three long-video question answering benchmarks and 10 different downstream tasks, Swift Sampling outperforms uniform sampling and prior query-agnostic baselines. It is especially powerful for long videos with limited frame budgets improving accuracy by up to +12.5 points.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Swift Sampling，一种基于泰勒级数预测编码的免训练帧选择算法，高效识别长视频中的时间惊喜帧。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频中大部分帧信息冗余，关键信息集中在时间惊喜处，即实际视觉特征偏离预测演化的时刻。现有方法依赖辅助网络或视频特定超参数调优，计算开销大。受人类大脑预测编码启发，研究旨在设计一种轻量级、无训练的帧选择方法，自动定位高信息量帧。
light_analysis.method: Swift Sampling将视频建模为视觉潜在空间中的可微轨迹，计算特征的速度和加速度，利用泰勒展开预测后续帧的期望路径。帧与预测流形的显著偏差被识别为时间惊喜帧并采样。无需额外网络或超参数调优，仅增加0.02x基线计算成本，比领先基线低30倍。
light_analysis.result: 在三个长视频问答基准和10个下游任务中，Swift Sampling优于均匀采样和先前查询无关基线。尤其在长视频有限帧预算下，准确率提升高达+12.5个点。计算开销极低，为基线增加了仅0.02x的额外成本，比领先基线便宜一个数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: Swift Sampling是一种高效、训练灵活的帧选择方法，基于预测编码和泰勒级数，显著提升了长视频分析的性能。其轻量级特性适用于资源受限场景。未来可探索扩展至更多视频理解任务，并处理视频动态复杂性带来的潜在局限性。

title: Slimmable ConvNeXt: Width-Adaptive Inference for Efficient Multi-Device Deployment
abstract: Deploying vision models across devices with varying resource constraints, or even on a single device where available compute fluctuates due to battery state, thermal throttling, or latency deadlines, typically requires training and maintaining separate models. Width-adaptive inference addresses this by training a single set of shared weights containing multiple nested subnetworks of increasing capacity, but prior CNN-based approaches required switchable batch normalization, while recent scalable methods have focused on Vision Transformers. We present Slimmable ConvNeXt, which shows that ConvNeXt's modern design, specifically LayerNorm and inverted bottlenecks, makes it particularly suited for channel-width slimming, eliminating the normalization overhead of classical slimmable networks and producing a simpler training pipeline than both prior CNN and ViT approaches. On ImageNet-1k, Slimmable ConvNeXt-T with 3 subnetworks achieves 80.8% top-1 accuracy at 4.5 GMACs and 77.4% at 1.2 GMACs, trained from scratch for 600 epochs. At comparable compute, this exceeds HydraViT's 6-head subnetwork (78.4% at 4.6 GMACs) by 2.4 percentage points and its 3-head configuration (73.0% at 1.3 GMACs) by 4.4 percentage points, while also outperforming MatFormer-S (78.6%) and SortedNet-S (78.2%) at the same GMACs. Scaling to Slimmable ConvNeXt-B further improves maximum accuracy to 82.8% at 15.35 GMACs.
comment: Accepted at Mobile AI Workshop 2026 (CVPR'26 Workshop)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Slimmable ConvNeXt，利用LayerNorm和倒瓶颈设计实现无需可切换归一化的宽度自适应推理，性能优于现有可扩展方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在资源动态变化的设备上部署视觉模型时，传统方法需训练和维护多个独立模型，成本高。宽度自适应推理通过共享权重包含多个子网络，但现有CNN方法依赖可切换批量归一化，增加训练复杂度；近期ViT方法虽有效但架构不同。本文旨在利用ConvNeXt的现代设计简化宽度自适应训练流程，消除归一化开销。
light_analysis.method: 基于ConvNeXt架构，利用LayerNorm和倒瓶颈模块替代经典的可切换批量归一化，实现通道宽度可变的子网络。训练单一权重集，包含多个嵌套子网络（如3个），从零开始训练600轮，无需切换BN。该方法比先前CNN和ViT方法（如HydraViT、MatFormer）训练更简单。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1k上，Slimmable ConvNeXt-T（3子网络）在4.5 GMACs下达80.8% top-1精度，在1.2 GMACs下达77.4%，分别超过HydraViT的78.4%（4.6 GMACs）和73.0%（1.3 GMACs）2.4和4.4个百分点，并优于MatFormer-S（78.6%）和SortedNet-S（78.2%）。B版本在15.35 GMACs下达82.8%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种简单高效的宽度自适应推理方法，无需可切换归一化，利用ConvNeXt架构优势在多个计算预算下取得最优精度，适合多设备部署。潜在局限性为仅评估分类任务，未来可扩展至下游任务或结合其他自适应维度。

title: Self-Policy Distillation via Capability-Selective Subspace Projection
abstract: Self-distillation bootstraps large language models (LLMs) by training on their own generations. However, existing methods either rely on external signals to curate self-generated outputs (e.g., correctness filtering, execution feedback, and reward search), which are costly and unavailable for the best-performing frontier models, or skip curation entirely and train on all raw outputs, an approach that is often domain-specific and hard to generalize. Both also share a deeper weakness that self-generated outputs entangle task-relevant capability with others, such as stylistic patterns, formatting artifacts, and model-specific errors, diluting the signal for the specific capability one aims to improve. In this paper, we propose Self-Policy Distillation (SPD), which achieves generalizable, capability selective without any external signal. Specifically, SPD extracts a low-rank capability subspace from the model's own gradients on correctness-defining tokens, projects key-value (KV) activations into this subspace during self-generation, and fine-tunes on the resulting raw outputs with standard next-token prediction loss. Through extensive experiments across code generation, mathematical reasoning, and multiple-choice QA, we show that SPD achieves up to 13% improvement over state-of-the-art self-distillation methods without external signals and up to 16% improvement over pre-trained baselines. Notably, SPD demonstrates superior generalizability, achieving 15% better performance under out-of-domain generalization settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需外部信号的自蒸馏方法SPD，通过能力选择性子空间投影提升大语言模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法依赖昂贵的外部信号（如正确性过滤、执行反馈）或跳过筛选导致领域特定、泛化难；且自生成输出中任务相关能力与风格、格式等干扰因素纠缠，降低特定能力提升效果。SPD旨在无需外部信号下实现通用、能力选择性的自蒸馏，解决信号稀释问题。
light_analysis.method: SPD从模型在正确性定义token上的梯度中提取低秩能力子空间，在自生成时将KV激活投影到该子空间，保留任务相关信号，过滤干扰；然后对原始输出使用标准下一词预测损失微调。无需外部信号，适用于多种任务。
light_analysis.result: 在代码生成、数学推理、多选题QA实验中，SPD相比无外部信号的最优自蒸馏方法提升高达13%，相比预训练基线提升16%；域外泛化设置下性能提升15%，展示强泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPD通过能力选择性子空间投影实现了高效、通用的自蒸馏，无需外部信号，显著提升LLM性能并增强泛化能力。未来可探索子空间提取的自动化及与其他训练范式的结合。

title: Is Capability a Liability? More Capable Language Models Make Worse Forecasts When It Matters Most
abstract: We document inverse scaling in LLMs on forecasting problems whose underlying time series exhibit superlinear growth and tail risk of regime change, a structure common in finance and epidemiology. On these tasks, more capable models produce worse distributional forecasts. The pattern appears on ForecastBench-Sim (FBSim), a contamination-free, simulated-world benchmark we release, in forecasting synthetic SIR epidemics with a matched linear control, and replicates in real-world datasets on COVID-19, measles, housing markets, and hyperinflation. A per-quantile decomposition shows the failure concentrates at the upper tail, which more capable models shift upward to track aggressive extrapolations of growth, while the lower tail stays put. A within-family study of Llama-3.1 shows that both model scale and post-training independently contribute to this effect. Domain knowledge does not reliably rescue calibration. This inverse scaling does not appear on single-threshold metrics common in LLM forecasting benchmarks, reversing the sign of the capability--accuracy relationship on identical outputs. Single-threshold scoring at conventional cutoffs misses the upper-tail cost; tail-inclusive scoring reverses the sign of the capability--accuracy relationship on the same outputs. We recommend that LLM forecasting evaluations use continuous (and unbounded) measures of accuracy alongside bounded binary threshold metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 发现更强大的语言模型在预测超线性增长和尾风险时间序列时表现更差，建议使用连续无界准确性度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM预测评估通常使用单阈值指标，忽略了高尾风险。在金融和流行病学等领域，时间序列常表现出超线性增长和体制转换的尾风险，这种结构下模型能力与预测准确性可能呈反向关系，但缺乏系统性研究。
light_analysis.method: 提出FBSim基准（无污染模拟世界），在合成SIR流行病、线性控制及真实COVID-19、麻疹、住房市场、恶性通胀数据集上测试。采用分位数分解、Llama-3.1家族内研究（扩展和后训练）等方法，对比单阈值与连续无界度量。
light_analysis.result: 能力更强的模型在分布预测中高尾偏移更严重，低尾不变；单阈值指标（如常规截断）掩蔽了该反向缩放，而尾包含评分反转了能力-准确性关系的符号。该现象在跨数据集和模型家族中一致出现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了LLM在尾风险预测中的能力反向缩放，强调评估需采用连续无界度量（如CRPS）以捕捉高尾误差。建议未来基准和实际应用采用此类指标，并可能需针对性校准或架构设计。

title: From Abstraction to Instantiation: Learning Behavioral Representation for Vision-Language-Action Model
abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often suffer from performance degradation under distribution shifts, as they struggle to learn generalized behavior representations across varying environments. While existing approaches attempt to construct behavior representations through action-centric latent variables, they are often limited by short-horizon temporal fragmentation and static execution-alignment, leading to inconsistent behaviors in complex scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{BehaviorVLA}, a framework that facilitates robust manipulation through the learning of a temporally coherent behavioral representations. Our approach features two symmetric components: (1) the \textbf{Visuomotor Behavior Encoder (VBE)}, which utilizes a causal Mamba-based architecture to aggregate long-horizon trajectory information into a unified behavior representation; and (2) the \textbf{Phase-conditioned Behavior Decoder (PBD)}, which decodes this representation into precise actions by dynamically aligning task-level priors with real-time execution progress. Experiments on RoboTwin 2.0, LIBERO, and CALVIN demonstrate state-of-the-art success rates of 58\%, 98\%, and 4.36 (Avg.Len), respectively. Notably, in real-world sim-to-real transfer, BehaviorVLA matches the performance of OpenVLA-OFT using only 50\% of the demonstration data, showcasing its superior data efficiency and generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BehaviorVLA框架，通过因果Mamba架构学习时序一致的行为表征，提升VLA模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和数据效率。
light_analysis.motivation: VLA模型在分布偏移下性能下降，现有方法通过动作中心潜变量构建行为表征，但受限于短时域碎片化和静态执行对齐，导致复杂场景中行为不一致。需要一种能捕捉长期时间连贯性的行为表征方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出BehaviorVLA，包含两个对称组件：Visuomotor Behavior Encoder (VBE)使用因果Mamba架构聚合长时域轨迹信息为统一行为表征；Phase-conditioned Behavior Decoder (PBD)通过动态对齐任务级先验与实时执行进度解码出精确动作。无需额外数据集，可直接用于标准VLA训练。
light_analysis.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0、LIBERO和CALVIN上达到SOTA：成功率58%、98%，平均长度4.36。在真实世界sim-to-real迁移中，仅用50%演示数据即匹配OpenVLA-OFT性能，展现出优越的数据效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: BehaviorVLA通过时序连贯的行为表征和动态解码机制，显著提升了VLA模型的泛化性和数据效率，为机器人操作学习提供了有效方案。未来可探索更复杂的时序建模或跨任务迁移。

title: SEGA: Spectral-Energy Guided Attention for Resolution Extrapolation in Diffusion Transformers
abstract: Diffusion transformers (DiTs) have emerged as a dominant architecture for text-to-image generation, yet their performance drops when generating at resolutions beyond their training range. Existing training-free approaches mitigate this by modifying inference-time attention behavior, often through Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) extrapolation combined with attention scaling. However, these strategies apply a uniform and content-agnostic scaling across RoPE components with distinct frequency characteristics, inducing a trade-off between preserving global structure and recovering fine detail. We introduce SEGA, a training-free method that dynamically scales attention across RoPE components according to the latent's spatial-frequency structure at each denoising step. This adaptive scaling improves both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Experiments show that SEGA consistently improves high-resolution synthesis across multiple target resolutions, outperforming state-of-the-art training-free baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SEGA方法，通过动态调整RoPE组件的注意力缩放以提升扩散变压器在高分辨率生成时的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散变压器在训练分辨率外生成时性能下降，现有训练免费方法通过统一的内容无关缩放导致全局结构和细节恢复之间的权衡，无法兼顾两者。
light_analysis.method: SEGA是一种无需训练的方法，根据每个去噪步骤中潜变量的空间-频率结构动态缩放RoPE组件的注意力，自适应调整以增强结构一致性和细节保真度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明SEGA在多个目标分辨率下持续改进高分辨率合成质量，超越当前最先进的训练免费基线方法，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: SEGA有效解决了扩散变压器分辨率外推中的注意力缩放问题，平衡了全局结构与细节恢复，为高分辨率文本到图像生成提供了实用解决方案，未来可探索更复杂的频率自适应策略。

title: WorkstreamBench: Evaluating LLM Agents on End-to-End Spreadsheet Tasks in Finance
abstract: LLM agents are increasingly expected to carry out end-to-end workflows, producing complete artifacts from high-level user instructions. To meet enterprise needs, frontier AI labs have developed agents that can construct entire spreadsheets from scratch. This is especially relevant in finance, where core workflows such as financial modeling, forecasting, and scenario analysis are commonly conducted through spreadsheets. Yet, existing spreadsheet benchmarks do not measure this advanced capability, focusing instead on question-answering or single-formula edits. To address this gap, we provide one of the first evaluations of agents on end-to-end spreadsheet tasks, focusing on economically critical financial workflows such as modeling and scenario analysis. Since deliverables therein are routinely reviewed and revised by multiple stakeholders, judging their quality necessarily involves high-level criteria such as readability or ease of modification. To reflect the multidimensional nature of solution quality, we develop an evaluation taxonomy comprising three dimensions: Accuracy, Formula, and Format, each comprising fine-grained criteria that reflect professional standards. The Claude family leads the benchmark and produces the most professional-looking outputs in our qualitative review, but even the strongest agents frequently fall short of professional finance standards and degrade sharply as the difficulty increases beyond a few chained calculations. This suggests that current agents are not yet able to reliably produce professional-quality spreadsheets at the level of complexity real-world workflows demand.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个评估LLM代理在金融端到端电子表格任务的基准WorkstreamBench，并定义包含准确性、公式、格式的三维评价体系。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电子表格基准仅聚焦问答或单公式编辑，无法衡量代理完成完整工作流（如金融建模、场景分析）的能力。金融领域对端到端电子表格需求迫切，但缺乏相应评估工具，因此需要新基准来反映专业标准。
light_analysis.method: 构建WorkstreamBench，包含金融建模和场景分析等端到端任务。设计多维评价体系：Accuracy（数值正确性）、Formula（公式合理性）、Format（可读性和易改性），每个维度包含细粒度指标。使用Claude等LLM代理进行测试，评估其生成完整电子表格的质量。
light_analysis.result: Claude系列在基准中表现领先，能生成专业外观的输出，但整体仍常低于专业金融标准。随着任务难度超过简单链式计算，代理性能急剧下降，表明当前模型难以可靠处理复杂真实工作流。
light_analysis.conclusion: WorkstreamBench揭示了LLM代理在端到端电子表格任务中的显著不足，强调了提升代理在复杂金融工作流中鲁棒性、多维度质量的需求。该基准为未来代理改进和评估提供了重要参考。

title: Claw AI Lab: An Autonomous Multi-Agent Research Team
abstract: We present Claw AI Lab, a lab-native autonomous research platform that advances automated research from a hidden prompt-to-paper pipeline into an interactive AI laboratory. Rather than centering the system around a single agent or a fixed serial workflow, we allow users to instantiate a full research team from one prompt, with customizable roles, collaborative workflows, real-time monitoring, artifact inspection, and rollback/resume control through a unified dashboard. The platform also supports distinct research modes for exploration, multi-agent discussion, and reproduction, making autonomous research substantially more steerable and laboratory-like in practice. A key practical contribution of Claw AI Lab lies in its Claw-Code Harness, which connects local codebases, datasets, and checkpoints to runnable experiments and feeds execution artifacts back into the research loop. As a result, the harness improves not only execution integration, but also experimental completion and result integrity: experiments are easier to inspect, iterate on, and faithfully transfer into final papers, reducing common failure modes such as partial runs and malformed result reporting. In our internal evaluation on five AI research case studies, using AutoResearchClaw as the baseline, Claw AI Lab is consistently preferred by AI expert judges on idea novelty, experiment completeness, and paper presentation quality. We view Claw AI Lab as an early step toward a new paradigm: autonomous research as usable, interactive, and reliability-aware scientific infrastructure.
comment: Project page and code are available at https://github.com/Claw-AI-Lab/Claw-AI-Lab

light_analysis.overview: 提出Claw AI Lab，一个自主多智能体研究平台，将自动研究从隐藏的提示到论文管道转变为交互式AI实验室，支持可定制角色和协作工作流。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动研究系统围绕单一智能体或固定串行工作流，缺乏交互性和可控性。研究者需要更灵活、可监督的平台，以实现迭代实验和结果验证，减少部分运行和错误报告等常见失败模式。
light_analysis.method: Claw AI Lab允许用户从单一提示实例化整个研究团队，支持可定制角色、协作工作流、实时监控、工件检查和回滚/恢复控制。关键组件Claw-Code Harness连接本地代码库、数据集和检查点，使实验可运行并反馈工件到研究循环，提升实验完成度和结果完整性。
light_analysis.result: 在五个AI研究案例的内部评估中，以AutoResearchClaw为基线，AI专家评委在想法新颖性、实验完整性和论文呈现质量上一致偏好Claw AI Lab，表明其在自主研究质量上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Claw AI Lab是迈向新范式（自主研究作为可用、交互和可靠性意识科学基础设施）的早期步骤，有望推动AI研究自动化的实用性和可信度，未来可扩展更多研究模式和应用场景。

title: Moral Semantics Survive Machine Translation: Cross-Lingual Evidence from Moral Foundations Corpora
abstract: Moral language is subtle and culturally variable, making it difficult to translate faithfully across languages. Idiomatic expressions, slang, and cultural references introduce hard-to-avoid translation artifacts. Yet automated moral values classification depends on language-specific annotated corpora that exist almost exclusively in English. We investigate whether LLM-based translation can bridge this gap, taking Polish as a test case. Using $\sim$50k morally-annotated social media posts from a diverse range of topics, we apply a principled four-method validation pipeline: LaBSE cross-lingual embedding similarity, Centered Kernel Alignment (CKA), LLM-as-judge evaluation, and deep learning classifier parity tests. We show that despite shortcomings in handling slang, vulgarity, and culturally-loaded expressions, direct translation preserves subtle moral cues well enough to be harvested by cross-lingual machine learning -- with mean cosine similarity of 0.86 and AUC gaps of 0.01--0.02 across all foundations closing further under fine-tuning of language models. These results demonstrate that machine translation is a practical and cost-effective path to moral values research in languages currently under-resourced in this domain. We demonstrate this for Polish as a representative Slavic language, with expected generalisation to related languages.

light_analysis.overview: 探究机器翻译在跨语言道德语义传递中的有效性，以波兰语为例验证其可行性与成本效益。
light_analysis.motivation: 道德语言具有微妙性和文化变异性，导致跨语言翻译困难，而自动化道德值分类依赖英语独占的标注语料库。现有方法难以处理习语、俚语和文化参考引入的翻译伪影，限制了对低资源语言的研究。本研究旨在检验大语言模型翻译能否弥合这一差距，为多语言道德研究提供实用路径。
light_analysis.method: 使用约5万条多主题道德标注社交媒体帖子（波兰语），设计四步验证流水线：LaBSE跨语言嵌入相似性、中心核对齐（CKA）、LLM裁判评估和深度学习分类器性能对比。翻译采用直接机器翻译，评估引入的伪影并检查道德语义保留程度。
light_analysis.result: 直接翻译的平均余弦相似度达0.86，所有道德基础的AUC差距仅为0.01–0.02，通过语言模型微调可进一步缩小。尽管在处理俚语、粗俗语和文化负载表达时存在不足，但机器翻译保留了足够精细的道德线索，使跨语言机器学习有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明机器翻译是低资源语言道德价值观研究的实用且成本高效的途径，以波兰语为代表验证了斯拉夫语族及其他相关语言的泛化潜力。未来工作应扩展至更多语言并优化对文化特定表达的翻译保留。

title: SegCompass: Exploring Interpretable Alignment with Sparse Autoencoders for Enhanced Reasoning Segmentation
abstract: While large language models provide strong compositional reasoning, existing reasoning segmentation pipelines fail to transparently connect this reasoning to visual perception. Current methods, such as latent query alignment, are end-to-end yet opaque "black boxes". Conversely, textual localization readout is merely readable, not truly interpretable, often functioning as an unconstrained post-hoc step. To bridge this interpretability gap, we propose SegCompass, an end-to-end model that leverages a Sparse Autoencoder (SAE) to forge an explicit, interpretable, and differentiable alignment pathway. Given an image-instruction pair, SegCompass first generates a chain-of-thought (CoT) trace. The core of our method is an SAE that maps both the CoT and visual tokens into a shared, high-dimensional sparse concept space. A query codebook selects salient concepts from this space, which are then spatially grounded by a slot mapper into a multi-slot heatmap that guides the final mask decoder. The entire model is trained jointly, unifying reinforcement learning for the reasoning path with standard segmentation supervision. This SAE-driven interface provides a "white-box" connection that is significantly more traceable than latent queries and more coherent than textual readouts. Extensive experiments on five challenging benchmarks demonstrate that SegCompass matches or surpasses state-of-the-art performance. Crucially, our visual and quantitative analyses show a strong correlation between the quality of the learned sparse concepts and final mask accuracy, confirming that SegCompass achieves superior results through its enhanced and inspectable alignment. Code is available at https://github.com/ZhenyuLU-Heliodore/SegCompass.
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. 15 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables

light_analysis.overview: 提出SegCompass，利用稀疏自编码器构建可解释端到端推理分割模型，实现显式、可微分对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理分割方法存在可解释性不足：潜在查询对齐是端到端但黑箱，文本定位可读但非真正可解释。为了桥接推理与视觉感知之间的透明连接，需要一种能显式追踪推理路径并可解释的对齐机制。
light_analysis.method: 核心是稀疏自编码器(SAE)将思维链与视觉token映射到共享高维稀疏概念空间，查询码本选择显著概念，槽映射器将其空间定位为多槽热图引导掩码解码器。联合训练：强化学习优化推理路径，标准分割监督优化分割。
light_analysis.result: 在五个挑战性基准上匹配或超越最先进方法。视觉和定量分析表明，学习到的稀疏概念质量与最终掩码精度强相关，证明增强可检查对齐带来优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: SegCompass通过SAE驱动接口提供了比潜在查询更可追溯、比文本读出更连贯的白盒连接，实现了可解释推理分割。代码开源，促进后续研究。潜在局限：SAE概念空间的可扩展性待探索。

title: Seeing the Poem: Image-Semantic Detection of AI-Generated Modern Chinese Poetry with MLLMs
abstract: Previous detection studies have shown that LLMs cannot be effectively used as detectors, but these studies have not addressed modern Chinese poetry. Moreover, no relevant research has explored the performance of LLMs in detecting modern Chinese poetry. This paper evaluates and enhances the performance of LLMs as detectors for modern Chinese poetry, and proposes an image-semantic guided poetry detection method. Compared with traditional detection approaches, our method innovatively incorporates images that reflect the content of the poetry. Through example-driven approaches, our method effectively integrates information such as meaning, imagery, and feeling from the image, then forms a complementary judgment with the poem text. Experimental results demonstrate that the LLM detectors based on our method outperform baseline detectors based on plain text, and even surpass the best-performing traditional detector, RoBERTa. The Gemini detector using our method achieves a Macro-F1 score of 85.65%, reaching the state-of-the-art level. The performance improvements of different LLM detectors on multiple LLMs-generated data prove the effectiveness of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图像语义引导的多模态大语言模型检测方法，有效提升AI生成现代中文诗歌的检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI生成文本检测研究主要针对散文或英文诗歌，未涉及现代中文诗歌。且LLMs直接作为检测器效果不佳。针对诗歌富含意象和情感的特点，需要引入图像等多模态信息增强检测能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出图像语义引导的诗歌检测方法，通过示例驱动方式整合图像中的意义、意象和情感信息，与诗歌文本形成互补判断。使用MLLMs（如Gemini）作为检测器，结合图像与文本进行推理。
light_analysis.result: 基于该方法的LLM检测器显著优于纯文本基线和传统检测器RoBERTa。其中Gemini检测器Macro-F1达85.65%，达到SOTA水平。在多种LLMs生成数据上均有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 图像语义引导策略有效提升了AI诗歌检测性能，为多模态检测提供了新思路。未来可探索其他文学体裁及更复杂的图像-文本对齐方法。

title: What Does the Caption Really Say? Counterfactual Phrase Intervention for Compositional Data Selection in Vision-Language Pretraining
abstract: CLIP-style contrastive pretraining typically curates web-scale image-text pairs using sample-level filtering signals, often based on pair-level alignment. We show that this signal saturates: once coarse mismatches are removed, stricter global filtering no longer tracks the compositional supervision provided by the retained captions. The reason is structural - a global score conflates whether a pair is broadly plausible with whether the individual object, attribute, and relation phrases inside the caption materially support the image-text match. The latter is what compositional generalization demands, yet pair-level filters are blind to it. We address this with Counterfactual Phrase Intervention (CPI), a phrase-level curation framework that converts controlled nonce-token substitutions into image-conditioned phrase-sensitivity scores. CPI uses global alignment only for coarse mismatch removal, then ranks the surviving pool by whether caption phrases measurably affect the image-text score under controlled substitution. We frame CPI as a first-order phrase-sensitivity signal rather than a grounding or identification result, and evaluate it at CC3M scale. Ranking by this signal yields a 50%-data subset that improves VL-CheckList-VG Relation by +1.91 over the full-data baseline and +1.00 over alignment-only filtering at matched budget, while improving SugarCrepe overall and preserving general transfer. CPI is loss-orthogonal: applied unchanged to NegCLIP, it further improves VL-CheckList-VG Relation by +3.84, with additional CE-CLIP gains in the main text.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Counterfactual Phrase Intervention (CPI)，一种短语级数据筛选方法，通过非词代换评估短语敏感性，提升视觉-语言预训练的组合泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: CLIP式对比预训练依赖样本级配对对齐分数进行数据过滤，但该信号会饱和：一旦粗劣匹配被移除，全局过滤无法区分标题中具体短语是否真正支撑图像-文本匹配，而组合泛化恰恰需要短语级监督。现有配对级过滤器忽略了这一结构性缺陷，导致数据质量瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出Counterfactual Phrase Intervention (CPI)框架，首先用全局对齐分数移除粗劣匹配，然后通过受控的非词代换（将标题中短语替换为无关词）计算图像条件下的短语敏感度分数，根据短语对匹配分数的平均影响排序数据。CPI作为一阶敏感度信号，不依赖定位，在CC3M规模验证。
light_analysis.result: 使用CPI排序选择前50%数据，在VL-CheckList-VG Relation上比全数据基线提升+1.91，比相同预算的对齐过滤提升+1.00；同时改善SugarCrepe整体指标并保持通用迁移能力。应用于NegCLIP时进一步在Relation上提升+3.84，CE-CLIP也有额外增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: CPI通过短语级敏感度信号有效筛选高质量数据，解决了配对过滤的结构性盲点，显著提升组合泛化性能且不影响通用迁移。该框架损失正交，可即插即用，为视觉-语言预训练提供新的数据筛选范式，未来可探索与其他预训练目标的结合。

title: Whose Voice Counts? Mapping Stakeholder Perspectives on AI Through Public Submissions to the U.S. Government
abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems become more common in our daily lives, it is important to understand how different stakeholders comprehend and envisage the role that these technologies play in shaping social, political, and economic realities. In this paper, we investigate public perceptions of AI based on a corpus of letters submitted during the public consultation for the Trump Administration's US AI Action Plan. To this aim, we release a corpus cleaning pipeline and perform topic modelling and frequency analysis to explore predominant topics discussed by different subgroups (e.g., academia, individuals, private sector) and those appearing in the AI Action Plan. Our results show that individuals voice strong concerns related to the impact of AI on life, while other stakeholders are more concerned with AI development. Our comparison of topics suggests that the AI Action Plan reflects predominantly the concerns of the private sector on security, policies, and development, with individuals' concerns less represented.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分析公众意见书，揭示不同利益相关者对AI的看法差异，并指出政策制定中个体声音的缺失。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI系统日益普及，理解不同利益相关者（如学术界、个人、私营部门）对AI的看法至关重要。现有政策制定过程中，公众意见的多样性和代表性不足，尤其是个人观点常被忽视。本研究旨在通过分析公开意见书，量化不同群体对AI的认知差异，并评估政策文件（AI Action Plan）是否平衡反映了各方关切，以期促进更包容的AI治理。
light_analysis.method: 使用了来自特朗普政府AI行动计划公众咨询期间提交的信件语料库。首先发布了语料清理流程，然后应用主题建模（topic modelling）和频率分析（frequency analysis）来探索不同子群体（如学术界、个人、私营部门）讨论的主要主题，并与AI行动计划中的主题进行对比。通过定量方法识别群体间关注点的差异。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，个人强烈关注AI对生活的影响（如就业、隐私），而其他利益相关者更关注AI发展（如技术进展、投资）。主题对比发现，AI行动计划主要反映了私营部门对安全、政策和发展的关注，而个人的担忧在其中代表性不足。这揭示了政策制定过程中的利益倾斜。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究强调了在AI政策制定中纳入多元声音的必要性。个人群体的关切（如生活影响）在官方行动计划中未被充分体现，可能导致政策与公众期望脱节。未来工作可探索更有效的公众参与机制，并建议政策制定者主动平衡各方利益，以增强AI治理的社会接受度和公平性。

title: From Baseline to Follow-Up: Counterfactual Spine DXA Image Synthesis in UK Biobank Using a Causal Hierarchical Variational Autoencoder
abstract: Dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA) is widely used for large-scale skeletal assessment, yet learning controllable and interpretable factor-specific anatomical variation remains challenging. We propose a metadata-conditioned causal hierarchical variational autoencoder (CHVAE) for causally consistent generation of anteroposterior (AP) spine DXA images from the UK Biobank (UKB). The model is trained on 3,743 raw AP spine scans from the first imaging visit and conditioned on basic participant attributes and lumbar morphometry. Causal consistency is evaluated in a baseline-to-follow-up setting using abduction--action--prediction (AAP): latent variables are abducted from baseline images, age is intervened to the repeat-imaging value, and the resulting counterfactual follow-up morphometry is compared with observed repeat-imaging measurements. Results show strong absolute-level agreement for key vertebral morphometry variables under age intervention, supporting intervention-aligned synthesis of anatomically plausible DXA images.
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Accepted at the 48th Annual International Conference of the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society (EMBC 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果分层变分自编码器(CHVAE)，实现UK Biobank脊柱DXA图像的因果一致生成，通过绑架-行动-预测框架支持年龄干预下的反事实合成。
light_analysis.motivation: DXA图像中学习可控且可解释的特定因素解剖变异仍具挑战，现有方法缺乏因果一致性。该研究旨在解决大规模骨骼评估中，如何生成年龄干预等反事实图像，以支持纵向研究中的因果推断。
light_analysis.method: 基于因果分层变分自编码器，以参与者元数据（如年龄、腰椎形态测量）为条件，在3,743张AP脊柱DXA图像上训练。采用绑架-行动-预测框架：从基线图像提取潜在变量，对年龄进行干预，生成反事实随访图像，并与真实随访测量比较。
light_analysis.result: 在年龄干预下，关键椎骨形态测量变量（如骨密度等）与真实重复成像测量显示出强绝对水平一致性，验证了生成图像的解剖学合理性和因果一致性，优于无条件方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法成功实现了因果一致的图像合成，具有重要学术价值（因果生成模型）和临床价值（纵向研究反事实分析）。未来可扩展至更多干预因素和复杂场景。

title: AtelierEval: Agentic Evaluation of Humans & LLMs as Text-to-Image Prompters
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) systems increasingly rely on upstream prompters, either humans or multimodal large language models (MLLMs), to translate user intent into detailed prompts. Yet current benchmarks fix the prompt and only evaluate T2I models, leaving the prompting proficiency of this upstream component entirely unmeasured. We introduce AtelierEval, the first unified benchmark that quantifies prompting proficiency across 360 expert-crafted tasks. Grounded in a cognitive view, it spans three task categories and instantiates tasks using a taxonomy of real-world challenges, with a dual interface for both humans and MLLMs. To enable scalable and reliable evaluation, we propose AtelierJudge, a skill-based, memory-augmented agentic evaluator. It produces subjective and objective scores for prompt-image pairs, achieving a Spearman correlation of 0.79 with human experts, approaching human performance. Extensive experiments benchmark 8 MLLMs against 48 human users across 4 T2I backends, validate AtelierEval as a robust diagnostic tool, and reveal the superiority of mimicry over planning, advocating for an image-augmented direction for future prompters. Our work is released to support future research.

light_analysis.overview: 首个统一评估人类与多模态大语言模型作为文本到图像提示者能力的基准框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本到图像系统依赖上游提示者（人类或多模态大语言模型）将用户意图转化为详细提示，但当前基准仅评估T2I模型本身，忽略了上游提示者的提示熟练度。这导致无法全面衡量系统性能，且缺乏针对提示者能力的标准化评估工具。
light_analysis.method: 提出AtelierEval基准，包含360个专家设计的任务，基于认知视图分为三类，并采用真实世界挑战分类法实例化任务，同时为人类和多模态大语言模型提供双接口。核心评估器AtelierJudge基于技能和记忆增强，可生成主观与客观评分，实现可扩展且可靠的评估。
light_analysis.result: AtelierJudge与人类专家的Spearman相关系数达0.79，接近人类水平。在4个T2I后端上对8个多模态大语言模型与48名人类用户进行广泛实验，验证了AtelierEval作为稳健诊断工具的有效性，并揭示模仿策略优于规划策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: AtelierEval首次系统量化了提示者能力，为T2I系统提供了关键诊断工具。实验表明未来提示者应朝图像增强方向发展，当前模仿优于规划。该基准支持后续研究，有望推动更有效的提示工程方法。

title: Why SGD is not Brownian Motion: A New Perspective on Stochastic Dynamics
abstract: Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) is commonly modeled as a Langevin process, assuming that minibatch noise acts as Brownian motion. However, this approximation relies on a continuous-time limit and a sqrt(eta) noise scaling that does not match the discrete SGD update at finite learning rate. In this work, we propose an alternative formulation of SGD as deterministic dynamics in a fluctuating loss landscape induced by minibatch sampling. Starting directly from the discrete update, we derive a master equation for the parameter distribution and obtain a discrete Fokker--Planck equation that differs from the standard Langevin form at order eta^2. Using this framework, we analyze SGD dynamics near critical points of the loss. We show that the behavior decomposes along the eigenbasis of the mean Hessian into qualitatively distinct regimes. In particular, nearly-flat directions do not admit a stationary distribution: the variance grows over time, corresponding to effective diffusion along valleys with a coefficient proportional to the learning rate. We provide empirical evidence supporting these predictions on neural network models in computer vision and natural language processing, observing a clear qualitative separation between confined and diffusive modes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SGD的新视角：离散更新等价于波动损失景观中的确定性动力学，并推导出非朗之万形式的Fokker-Planck方程。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观点将SGD建模为朗之万过程，假设小批量噪声是布朗运动，但这仅在连续时间极限和特定噪声缩放下成立，与有限学习率的离散更新不符。现有近似导致对SGD动力学理解的偏差，尤其是在平坦方向上的行为。本文旨在提供更准确的离散框架，揭示SGD在临界点附近的真实动力学特性。
light_analysis.method: 本文直接从离散SGD更新出发，通过小批量采样引入的波动，将SGD重新表述为波动损失景观中的确定性动力学。推导出参数分布的主方程，进而得到离散Fokker-Planck方程，该方程在η^2阶不同于标准朗之万形式。基于该框架，沿平均Hessian的特征基分解SGD动力学，分析临界点附近行为，识别出约束模式和扩散模式。
light_analysis.result: 理论预测在平坦方向上参数方差随时间增长，有效扩散系数与学习率成正比，且不存在平稳分布。在计算机视觉和自然语言处理的神经网络模型上的实验验证了这种定性分离：存在约束模式和扩散模式，与理论一致。结果表明标准朗之万近似无法捕捉的有限学习率效应。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的离散框架更准确描述了SGD的随机动力学，揭示了平坦方向上的扩散行为，提供了对SGD泛化性质的新理解。该工作有助于设计更优的学习率调度和正则化策略。未来可扩展到动量SGD、自适应方法等，并进一步研究扩散系数与泛化误差的关系。

title: Boiling the Frog: A Multi-Turn Benchmark for Agentic Safety
abstract: Background. Traditional safety benchmarks for language models evaluate generated text: whether a model outputs toxic language, reproduces bias, or follows harmful instructions. When models are deployed as agents, the safety-relevant object shifts from what the system says to what it does within an environment, and evaluating model responses under prompting is no longer sufficient to address the safety challenges posed by artificial intelligence. Recent developments have seen the rise of benchmarks that evaluate large language models as agents. We contribute to this strand of research. Approach. We introduce Boiling the Frog, a benchmark that evaluates whether tool-using AI models deployed in corporate and office settings are susceptible to incremental attacks. Each scenario begins with benign workspace edits and later introduces a risk-bearing request. The benchmark focuses on stateful multi-turn evaluation: chains expose a persistent workspace, place the risk-bearing payload at controlled positions in the turn sequence, and score whether the resulting artifact state becomes unsafe. Scenarios are organized through a three-level operational risk taxonomy grounded in the Boiling the Frog risks, the AI Act Annex I and Annex III high-risk contexts, and EU AI Act's Code of Practice on General-Purpose AI (GPAI). Results. Across a nine-model panel, aggregate strict attack success rate (ASR) is 44.4%. Model-level ASR ranges from 20.5% for Claude Haiku 4.5 to 92.9% for Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, with Seed 2.0 Lite also above 80%. Average chain category-level ASR reaches 93.3% for Code of Practice loss-of-control scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多轮代理安全基准 Boiling the Frog，评估工具使用型AI模型在企业办公场景中面对增量攻击的脆弱性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统语言模型安全基准聚焦于生成文本的有毒性、偏见等，但当模型作为代理部署时，安全对象从系统输出转向其在环境中的行为。现有评估无法充分应对代理安全挑战，尤其是增量攻击场景。该研究旨在填补这一空白，通过状态化多轮评估检测模型是否在逐步引导下执行风险操作。
light_analysis.method: 基准采用多轮状态评估：每个场景从良性工作空间编辑开始，随后在可控轮次引入风险请求，持续跟踪工作空间状态是否变为不安全。场景基于三层操作风险分类法，整合了Boiling the Frog风险、AI Act高风险情境及EU AI Act通用AI实践规范。评估指标为严格攻击成功率（ASR），反映模型完全执行风险行为比例。
light_analysis.result: 在9个模型组成的评估面板中，整体严格ASR为44.4%。模型层面，Claude Haiku 4.5表现最优（ASR=20.5%），而Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite最差（ASR=92.9%），Seed 2.0 Lite也超80%。在实践规范失控制场景中，平均链类别ASR高达93.3%，表明多数模型无法抵御此类增量攻击。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准有效揭示了当前AI模型在代理场景下的安全缺陷，特别是面对多轮增量攻击时的高脆弱性。研究为评估和提升模型代理安全性提供了标准化工具，具有重要学术与实际价值。未来可扩展至更多场景和模型类型，并探索防御策略。

title: Spreadsheet-RL: Advancing Large Language Model Agents on Realistic Spreadsheet Tasks via Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Spreadsheet systems (e.g., Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets) play a central role in modern data-centric workflows. As AI agents grow increasingly capable of automating complex tasks, such as controlling computers and generating presentations, building an AI-driven spreadsheet agent has emerged as a promising research direction. Most existing spreadsheet agents rely on specialized prompting over general-purpose LLMs; while this design has potentials on simple spreadsheet operations, it struggles to manage the complex, multi-step workflows typical of real-world applications.   We introduce Spreadsheet-RL, a reinforcement learning (RL) fine-tuning framework designed to train specialized spreadsheet agents within a realistic Microsoft Excel environment. Spreadsheet-RL features an automated pipeline for scalable collection of paired start-goal spreadsheets from online forums, as well as domain-specific evaluation tasks in areas such as finance and supply chain management, which we compile into the new Domain-Spreadsheet benchmark dataset. It also includes a Spreadsheet Gym environment designed for multi-turn RL: Spreadsheet Gym exposes extensive Excel functionality through a Python sandbox, along with a refined harness that incorporates a comprehensive tool set and carefully designed tool-routing rules for spreadsheet tasks. Through comprehensive experiments, we show that Spreadsheet-RL substantially enhances AI agent's performance on both general and domain-specific spreadsheet tasks: it improves Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507's Pass@1 on SpreadsheetBench from 12.0% to 23.4%, and raises Pass@1 from 8.4% to 17.2% on our curated Domain-Spreadsheet dataset. These results highlight Spreadsheet-RL's strong potential for generalization and real-world adoption in spreadsheet automation, and broadly, its promise for advancing LLM-based interactions with data interfaces in everyday work.
comment: Mingyuan served as the project lead. Banghao, Yining, and Mingyuan contributed equally to this work, with more junior authors listed before senior authors. All data and code releases are maintained by the corresponding authors at UIUC and are not affiliated with Meta

light_analysis.overview: 提出Spreadsheet-RL，一个基于强化学习的微调框架，用于训练专业电子表格Agent，在真实Excel环境中显著提升复杂多步任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电子表格Agent依赖通用LLM的专用提示，在简单操作上有效，但难以处理真实应用中复杂的多步工作流。亟需一种专门训练方法，使Agent能自动化端到端任务并适应领域特定需求。
light_analysis.method: 包含自动化管道从在线论坛收集配对的起始-目标电子表格，构建Domain-Spreadsheet基准数据集。设计Spreadsheet Gym环境，通过Python沙箱暴露Excel功能，集成全面工具集和精细工具路由规则，支持多轮强化学习微调。
light_analysis.result: 在SpreadsheetBench上，Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507的Pass@1从12.0%提升至23.4%；在Domain-Spreadsheet数据集上，Pass@1从8.4%提升至17.2%，展示了在通用和领域特定任务上的显著性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: Spreadsheet-RL大幅增强了AI Agent的电子表格自动化能力，具有良好的泛化性和实际部署潜力。该工作推进了LLM基于强化学习在数据界面交互中的应用，未来可扩展至其他办公软件。

title: More Context, Larger Models, or Moral Knowledge? A Systematic Study of Schwartz Value Detection in Political Texts
abstract: Detecting Schwartz values in political text is difficult because implicit cues often depend on surrounding arguments and fine-grained distinctions between neighboring values. We study when context and explicit moral knowledge help sentence-level value detection. Using the ValuesML/Touch{é} ValueEval format, we compare sentence, window, and full-document inputs; no-RAG and retrieval-augmented settings with a curated moral knowledge base; supervised DeBERTa-v3-base/large encoders; and zero-shot LLMs from 12B to 123B parameters. The results show that more context is not uniformly better: full-document context improves supervised DeBERTa encoders by 3.8--4.8 macro-F1 points over sentence-only input, but does not consistently help zero-shot LLMs. Retrieved moral knowledge is more consistently useful in matched comparisons, improving each tested model family and context condition under early fusion. However, scaling from DeBERTa-v3-base to large and from 12B to larger LLMs does not guarantee gains, and simple early fusion outperforms the tested late-fusion and cross-attention RAG variants for encoders. Per-value analyses show that context and retrieval help most for socially situated or conceptually confusable values. These findings suggest that value-sensitive NLP should evaluate context, knowledge, and model family jointly rather than treating longer inputs or larger models as universal improvements.

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究上下文、外部知识和模型规模对施瓦茨价值观检测的影响，发现非统一提升，强调联合评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 检测政治文本中的施瓦茨价值观具有挑战性，因为隐性线索常依赖周围论证及相邻价值观的细微差异。现有方法简单增加上下文或扩大模型，但效果不确定，缺乏系统研究如何结合上下文、道德知识和模型选择，因此需要全面比较不同设置。
light_analysis.method: 使用ValuesML/Touché ValueEval格式，比较三种输入范围（句子、窗口、全文）、检索增强（基于道德知识库的早期/晚期/交叉注意力融合）与无检索、监督DeBERTa-v3-base/large编码器以及从12B到123B参数的零样本LLM，进行多维度系统对比。
light_analysis.result: 全文上下文使监督DeBERTa提升3.8-4.8 macro-F1，但对零样本LLM无一致帮助；检索道德知识在匹配比较中持续提升性能；模型缩放（base到large、12B到123B）不保证增益；早期融合优于其他RAG变体；上下文和检索对社交性或概念易混淆价值效果最显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: 价值敏感NLP应联合评估上下文、知识和模型族，而非默认更长的输入或更大的模型带来改进。本研究提供了系统性基准，指导未来在价值观检测任务中合理利用上下文和外部知识，但未探讨知识库质量及动态更新等方向。

title: The Double Dilemma in Multi-Task Radiology Report Generation: A Gradient Dynamics Analysis and Solution
abstract: While multi-task learning based automatic radiology report generation (RRG) is widely adopted to ensure clinical consistency, most focus on architectural designs yet remain limited to coarse linear scalarization strategies. These strategies cannot effectively balance the hard constraints of discriminative clinical supervision with the smoothness requirements of report generation.
