To address these problems, we analyze the failure mechanism of linear scalarization from the perspective of gradient dynamics, utilizing the stochastic differential equation (SDE) framework to characterize it as a "Double Dilemma" of drift term deviation and diffusion term decay. Based on this, we propose a backbone-agnostic optimizer named Conflict-Averse Magnitude-Enhanced Gradient Descent (CAME-Grad). Through conflict-averse direction rectification and magnitude-enhanced energy injection, the algorithm not only ensures geometric validity, but also avoids local optimal solutions. Then, the adaptive gradient fusion mechanism is used to establish a dynamic balance between the theoretical optimal direction and the task-specific inductive bias. Experiments show that as a universal plug-and-play optimizer, CAME-Grad brings substantial and consistent improvements across eight diverse RRG methods, elevating overall clinical efficacy performance by an average of 2.3\% on MIMIC-CXR and 1.9\% on IU X-Ray. Our code is available at https://github.com/vpsg-research/CAME-Grad.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAME-Grad优化器，解决多任务放射学报告生成中线性标量化的双重困境。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多任务学习的放射学报告生成方法多采用线性标量化策略，无法有效平衡临床监督的硬约束和报告生成的平滑性要求。从梯度动力学角度分析，这种策略导致漂移项偏差和扩散项衰减的双重困境，影响临床一致性和生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出CAME-Grad优化器，通过冲突避免方向矫正和幅度增强能量注入，确保几何有效性并避免局部最优。采用自适应梯度融合机制，在理论最优方向与任务特定归纳偏置间建立动态平衡。该优化器与模型架构无关，可即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 在8种不同RRG方法上，CAME-Grad带来持续改进：在MIMIC-CXR上平均提升临床疗效2.3%，在IU X-Ray上平均提升1.9%。实验表明其作为通用优化器的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAME-Grad从梯度动力学角度解决了多任务RRG中的优化困境，提升了临床报告生成的临床一致性和质量，具有广泛应用价值。未来可探索其在其他多任务场景的适用性。

title: AtomicMotion: Learning Human Motion From Different Human Parts
abstract: Accurately reconstructing full-body poses from sparse head and hand trajectories is a foundational challenge for immersive AR/VR telepresence. Current methods often struggle with error accumulation and unnatural joint coordination, primarily because they treat the human body as a monolithic entity, thereby failing to capture the fine-grained ``atomic intents'' embedded in subtle signal variations and overlooking the inherent structural topology. To bridge this gap, we present AtomicMotion, a framework designed to decouple and re-integrate body dynamics through three core innovations. First, we introduce a logical body partitioning scheme that decomposes the skeleton into five distinct clusters based on functional intent; this ensures that each partition preserves internal joint synergies while isolating local motion primitives. Second, to robustly map sparse inputs to high-dimensional poses, we employ a masked full-body pre-conditioning strategy during training, forcing the model to internalize global skeletal topology and latent kinematic constraints. Finally, addressing the limitations of vanilla spatial attention, which often ignores fixed physiological connectivity, we propose Kinematic Attention. By embedding the classical kinematic tree structure into the attention mechanism, we ensure biological plausibility in the synthesized motions. Extensive evaluations on the AMASS dataset demonstrate that AtomicMotion significantly outperforms existing baselines, yielding higher reconstruction fidelity and superior biomechanical realism.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AtomicMotion框架，通过分体分区、掩码预训练和运动学注意力从稀疏头手轨迹重建全身姿态。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏头手轨迹精确重建全身姿态是沉浸式AR/VR远程临场的基础挑战。现有方法常将人体视为单一整体，忽略细粒度原子意图和固有结构拓扑，导致误差累积和不自然关节协调。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新包括：1) 逻辑身体分区，将骨架按功能意图分为5个簇，保持内部关节协同；2) 掩码全身预训练策略，强制模型学习全局骨架拓扑和运动学约束；3) 运动学注意力，将经典运动学树结构嵌入注意力机制，保证生物合理性。
light_analysis.result: 在AMASS数据集上，AtomicMotion显著优于现有基线，实现更高重建保真度和更优生物力学真实性。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: AtomicMotion通过解耦与重构人体动力学，有效提升稀疏输入下的全身姿态重建质量。其分区和注意力机制具有学术价值，可推动AR/VR远程临场应用。未来可探索更细粒度分区或实时优化。

title: H-Flow: Self-supervised Human Scene Flow via Physics-inspired Joint Multi-modal Learning
abstract: Parametric human models capture global pose but cannot represent the non-rigid surface dynamics of clothing and soft tissue. Generic scene flow estimates dense motion but breaks down on articulated bodies, where pixel-level supervision is also intractable to acquire. We introduce H-Flow, a dense human scene flow that captures both skeletal kinematics and surface deformation. A unified multi-head transformer estimates flow from monocular video, jointly predicting pose and depth as companion outputs. The challenge lies in the lack of supervision. In place of unattainable labels, we anchor the network in the physics of human motion, encoding geometric, structural, and biomechanical priors as cross-modal training objectives. We further introduce DynAct4D, a high-fidelity synthetic benchmark providing dense flow annotations across diverse subjects, garments, and motions. On standard benchmarks, H-Flow outperforms scene-flow and parametric baselines, and generalizes zero-shot to in-the-wild video. Code, models, and the DynAct4D benchmark will be released upon publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出H-Flow，通过物理启发的多模态自监督学习，从单目视频中联合估计人体场景流、姿态和深度，无需标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 参数化人体模型仅捕捉全局姿态，无法表示衣物和软组织的非刚性表面动态；通用场景流在铰接身体上失效且难以获取像素级监督。该研究旨在解决密集人体运动估计中缺乏真实标签的难题，对理解衣物变形和软组织动力学具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 采用统一的多头Transformer架构，从单目视频联合预测场景流、姿态和深度。以人体运动的物理先验（几何、结构、生物力学）作为跨模态训练目标替代真实标签，实现自监督学习。同时构建高保真合成基准DynAct4D，提供多种人体、服装和运动的密集流标注。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准上，H-Flow在人体场景流估计上优于通用场景流和参数化方法，并实现零样本泛化到真实无约束视频。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但通过对比验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了首个密集人体场景流方法，同时捕获骨骼运动与表面变形；利用物理先验实现自监督学习，降低了标注依赖；开源DynAct4D基准推动研究。该工作提升了对复杂人体运动的分析能力，可应用于动画、虚拟现实等场景。潜在局限性可能包括依赖合成数据泛化性及计算成本。

title: A note on convergence of Wasserstein policy optimization
abstract: Wasserstein Policy Optimization (WPO) is a recently proposed reinforcement learning algorithm that leverages Wasserstein gradient flows to optimize stochastic policies in continuous action spaces. Despite its empirical success, the theoretical convergence properties of WPO in environments with continuous state and action spaces have yet to be fully established. In this note, we argue that WPO within the framework of entropy-regularised Markov Decision Processes converges linearly. This is done by leveraging recent advances in mean-field analysis for convergence of gradient flows using log-Sobole inequalities. Assuming existence of sufficiently regular solution to the gradient flow equation we demonstrate monotonic energy dissipation along the flow and establish a local log-Sobolev inequality. Ultimately, these properties allow us to argue that the value function should converge linearly to the global optimum.

light_analysis.overview: 证明了Wasserstein策略优化在熵正则化MDP中线性收敛到全局最优。
light_analysis.motivation: Wasserstein策略优化（WPO）在连续动作空间的强化学习中表现良好，但其理论收敛性在连续状态和动作空间下尚未完全建立。现有方法缺乏严格的收敛保证，限制了其应用可靠性。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，为WPO的收敛性提供严谨证明。
light_analysis.method: 在熵正则化马尔可夫决策过程框架下，利用平均场分析中的log-Sobolev不等式来研究梯度流的收敛性。假设梯度流方程存在足够光滑的解，证明了沿流单调能量耗散并建立局部log-Sobolev不等式，从而推导出值函数线性收敛到全局最优。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。本文主要提供理论收敛性证明，未涉及数值实验或性能对比。结论表明在给定假设下，WPO的值函数线性收敛，但未提供实际应用中的效果数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了WPO在熵正则化MDP中的线性收敛性，为WPO的理论基础提供了重要补充。该结果增强了WPO的可信度，但依赖于梯度流解的正则性假设。未来可放宽条件并扩展至更一般的设置。

title: Two is better than one: A Collapse-free Multi-Reward RLIF Training Framework
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has substantially improved the reasoning ability of LLMs, but often depends on external supervision from human annotations or gold-standard solutions. Reinforcement learning from internal feedback (RLIF) has recently emerged as a scalable unsupervised alternative, using signals extracted from the model itself. However, existing RLIF methods typically rely on a single internal reward, which can lead to reward hacking, entropy collapse, and degraded reasoning structure. We propose a multi-reward RLIF framework that decomposes the training signal into two complementary components: an answer-level reward based on cluster voting and a completion-level reward based on token-wise self-certainty. To combine these signals robustly, we apply GDPO-based normalization to reduce reward-scale imbalance. We further introduce KL-Cov regularization, which targets low-entropy token distributions responsible for disproportionate entropy reduction, preserving exploration and preventing late-stage collapse. Across mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, our method improves stability and robustness over prior unsupervised RL approaches, while achieving performance close to supervised RLVR methods. These results show that complementary internal rewards, combined with targeted regularization, can support stable long-horizon reasoning without relying on external ground-truth supervision. Code will be released soon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多奖励RLIF框架，利用互补内部奖励和KL-Cov正则化，避免奖励破解和熵崩溃，提升LLM推理稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR方法依赖外部监督，而现有RLIF方法使用单一内部奖励易导致奖励破解、熵崩溃和推理结构退化。需要一种无外部监督的稳定方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出多奖励RLIF框架，包含两个互补信号：基于簇投票的答案级奖励和基于词元自置信度的完成级奖励。采用GDPO归一化平衡奖励尺度，并引入KL-Cov正则化针对低熵词元分布，防止熵过度降低，保持探索能力。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准上，该方法相比无监督RL方法稳定性与鲁棒性提升，性能接近有监督RLVR方法。具体指标未列出，但表明有效避免了奖励破解和熵崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明互补内部奖励结合针对性的正则化可支持稳定的长程推理，无需外部真值监督。为无监督RL提供新范式，代码将开源。

title: GLeVE: Graph-Guided Lesion Grounding with Proposal Verification in 3D CT
abstract: Grounding radiology report descriptions to 3D CT volumes is essential for verifiable clinical interpretation, yet remains challenging due to the semantic-spatial gap between free-text narratives and volumetric anatomy. Existing report-assisted and vision-language grounding methods typically rely on phrase-level alignment or dense pixel supervision, resulting in limited lesion-wise correspondence and suboptimal localization accuracy. We propose GLeVE, a graph-guided lesion grounding framework with anatomical prior verification and octree-based autoregressive refinement. GLeVE treats each lesion description as an atomic semantic unit and encodes organ attribution, attributes, and inter-lesion relations through relation-aware graph reasoning to produce discriminative lesion-wise queries. Anatomy-aware proposal generation with region-level verification enforces one-to-one text-lesion alignment, while hierarchical octree refinement progressively improves boundary delineation. Experiments on AbdomenAtlas 3.0 demonstrate consistent gains over classical multimodal foundation models and report-supervised baselines in both segmentation accuracy and lesion-level localization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出图引导的病灶定位框架GLeVE，结合解剖先验验证和八叉树自回归细化，实现3D CT中放射报告描述到体积的精确对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 放射报告描述到3D CT的定位对可验证临床解释至关重要，但因文本与体积解剖之间的语义-空间差距，现有方法依赖短语级对齐或密集像素监督，导致病灶级对应有限和定位精度不佳。
light_analysis.method: GLeVE将每个病灶描述作为原子语义单元，通过关系感知图推理编码器官、属性及病灶间关系，生成判别性查询；借助解剖感知提案生成和区域级验证实现一对一文本-病灶对齐，并采用层次八叉树细化逐步改善边界。
light_analysis.result: 在AbdomenAtlas 3.0数据集上，GLeVE在分割精度和病灶级定位上均优于经典多模态基础模型和报告监督基线，验证了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLeVE通过图推理和八叉树细化弥合文本-体积语义差距，提升病灶定位准确性，为临床可解释性提供支持；未来可扩展至更多解剖结构，但依赖高质量报告和标注。

title: Chinese sensorimotor and embodiment norms for 3,000 lexicalized concepts
abstract: Understanding how conceptual knowledge is grounded in bodily experience, and to what extent machine systems can acquire such knowledge without direct sensorimotor experience, are central questions in both cognitive science and embodied artificial intelligence research. Large-scale normative resources are essential for investigating these questions empirically, yet such resources remain sparse for non-Indo-European languages. We present a novel normative database for 3,000 lexicalized concepts in Mandarin Chinese, comprising 11-dimensional sensorimotor ratings and unidimensional embodiment ratings collected from 378 native Mandarin speakers. The ratings demonstrate high reliability and strong cross-norm validity with existing Chinese resources, each of which covers fewer words and a subset of the 11 sensorimotor dimensions. In a validation study, we tested new variables derived from a theoretically motivated metric, Perceptual Strength of Embodiment (PSE) (Huang et al., 2025), together with seven common composite variables, on lexical decision tasks. The results suggest that PSE-Sensorimotor and Minkowski-3 are the strongest composite predictors of lexical decision performance, capturing the facilitatory effects of sensorimotor information on lexical processing. A further exploratory study showed that sensorimotor ratings are substantially recoverable from purely linguistic representations using simple regression models (mean Spearman r = .62 across dimensions), though recovery varied markedly: visual and auditory dimensions yielded higher correspondence than chemosensory ones. Representational similarity analysis further showed that the relational geometry of the sensorimotor space is also partially recoverable (r = .540), consistent with the view that distributional language use encodes aspects of embodied conceptual structure.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了首个大规模中文感官运动和具身规范数据库，涵盖3000个词汇概念，验证了感知具身强度等新指标在词汇加工中的预测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念知识如何基于身体经验以及机器能否无直接感官经验获取此类知识是认知科学与具身AI的核心问题，但现有规范资源主要针对印欧语系，非印欧语言尤其缺乏大规模多维度感官运动评分数据。
light_analysis.method: 收集378名中文母语者对3000个词汇的11维感官运动评分（视觉、听觉、触觉等）和单维具身评分，验证了高信度和跨准则效度；在词汇决策任务中测试了感知具身强度（PSE）等复合变量，并使用简单回归模型评估感官运动评分从语言表征的可恢复性，辅以表征相似性分析。
light_analysis.result: 评分信度高，PSE-Sensorimotor和Minkowski-3是词汇决策的最佳预测因素；感官运动评分可从语言表征部分恢复（平均斯皮尔曼r=0.62），其中视觉和听觉维度恢复更好；感官运动空间的关系几何部分可恢复（r=0.540）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该数据库为中文具身认知研究提供了基础资源，表明分布语言使用编码了具身概念结构的信息，未来可用于跨语言比较、机器学习模型评估以及认知建模。

title: Evolutionary Multi-Task Optimization for LLM-Guided Program Discovery
abstract: Recent LLM-guided evolutionary search methods have shown that iterative program mutation can discover strong algorithms, but they typically optimize each task independently, even when related tasks share reusable structure. We introduce Evolutionary Multi-Task Optimization (EMO) for LLM-guided program discovery, and propose EMO-STA (Shared-Then-Adapt), a two-stage framework that first evolves a shared archive of executable programs across a task family and then adapts selected shared candidates to each target task. Within EMO-STA, we explore multiple adaptation strategies, including warm-starting from the shared archive, adapting the best average shared program, and adapting the shared program that performs best on each target task. Across eight task families spanning continuous optimization, geometric construction, modeling, and algorithmic optimization, EMO-STA improves over matched-compute single-task evolution in most settings, with STA Best-Local providing the strongest in-distribution adaptation and STA Best-Shared yielding robust transfer to unseen tasks. Compute-allocation experiments show that allocating a substantial fraction of the family-level budget to shared evolution is consistently beneficial, with roughly balanced shared and adaptation budgets often being optimal. Beyond compute efficiency, we show that shared evolution can mitigate overfitting in low-evidence settings (e.g. few training data), including ARC tasks and time-series feature engineering, by favoring programs that generalize across all tasks rather than exploiting task-specific brittle artifacts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EMO-STA两阶段框架，通过共享进化与任务适应，实现LLM引导的程序发现的多任务优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM引导的进化搜索方法独立优化每个任务，忽视了相关任务间可复用的结构。这种独立优化方式计算效率低，且容易过拟合于特定任务，缺乏泛化性。本文旨在通过多任务优化，共享跨任务的知识，提升进化搜索的效率与泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出EMO-STA框架，第一阶段在任务族上进化共享程序存档，第二阶段将选定的共享程序适应到各目标任务。探索多种适应策略：从存档热启动、适应最佳平均程序、适应各任务最佳程序。在连续优化、几何构造、建模和算法优化等8个任务族上评估。
light_analysis.result: EMO-STA在多数设置下优于匹配计算量的单任务进化。STA Best-Local在分布内适应最强，STA Best-Shared在未见任务上鲁棒迁移。计算分配实验表明，将族预算的较大比例分配给共享进化一致有益，大致平衡的共享与适应预算常最优。共享进化还能缓解低证据场景（如少训练数据）的过拟合。
light_analysis.conclusion: EMO-STA通过共享进化与适应，提升了多任务程序发现的计算效率与泛化能力。共享进化能利用跨任务结构，减少过拟合。未来可探索更复杂的适应策略及应用于更多任务域。

title: Benchmarking Machine Learning Architectures for Antimicrobial Stewardship in Pediatric ICUs
abstract: Antimicrobial stewardship (AMS) is critical in pediatric intensive care units (PICUs), where diagnostic uncertainty often drives broad-spectrum antibiotic use, increasing antimicrobial resistance and potential long-term harms. Machine learning offers a promising approach for identifying patient-level opportunities for stewardship interventions from electronic health record data, yet prior work has focused largely on adult populations and static tabular representations. We present a systematic benchmarking study of AMS intervention prediction in the PICU across a public dataset and a private institutional cohort. We define four clinically relevant proxy targets for reducing antibiotic exposure: intravenous-to-oral switching, de-escalation, discontinuation, and short-course therapy. Under a unified evaluation framework, we compare tabular, sequence-based, and graph-based temporal models at multiple temporal resolutions. We find that predictive performance is driven primarily by target prevalence and dataset characteristics rather than model complexity. Sequence models improve the precision-recall trade-off over tabular approaches at coarse (24-hour) resolution, while finer temporal modeling provides limited additional benefit. However, these gains come at the cost of poorer calibration, with simpler tabular models yielding more reliable probability estimates. Multi-task learning produces only marginal improvements, suggesting limited shared structure across stewardship targets. Our findings highlight the importance of target design, temporal representation, and calibration in clinical machine learning, and provide practical guidance for developing reliable decision support systems for pediatric AMS.

light_analysis.overview: 系统性基准测试机器学习架构在儿科ICU抗菌药物管理中的干预预测，发现目标流行率和数据集特征比模型复杂度更关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 抗菌药物管理在儿科重症监护室（PICU）至关重要，但诊断不确定性常导致广谱抗生素过度使用，加剧耐药性和长期危害。机器学习可从电子健康记录数据中识别个体化干预机会，但现有研究主要针对成人群体和静态表格数据，缺乏对儿科时序建模的系统评估。因此，本文旨在填补儿科AMS中不同时间表示和模型架构的基准空白。
light_analysis.method: 基于公共和私有两个儿科ICU数据集，定义四个临床相关的抗生素减量代理目标：静脉转口服、降阶梯、停药和短程治疗。在统一评估框架下，比较表格模型、序列模型（如LSTM）和基于图的时序模型，涵盖多种时间分辨率（如粗24小时和细粒度），并采用单任务与多任务学习策略。关键创新在于系统性对比时序与静态表示，并评估校准性能。
light_analysis.result: 预测性能主要由目标流行率和数据集特征驱动，模型复杂度贡献有限。在粗时间分辨率（24小时）下，序列模型比表格模型改善了精确率-召回率权衡，但更细粒度建模优势微弱。然而，序列模型的校准更差，而简单表格模型提供更可靠的概率估计。多任务学习仅带来边际改进，表明各干预目标间共享结构有限。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究强调了临床机器学习中目标设计、时间表示和校准的重要性。对于儿科AMS决策支持，简单表格模型在可靠性上优于复杂时序模型，且无需精细时间建模。未来工作需关注模型校准和特定目标的数据集特征，以推动实际部署。

title: Agentic CLEAR: Automating Multi-Level Evaluation of LLM Agents
abstract: Agentic systems are becoming more capable: agents define strategies, take actions, and interact with different environments. This autonomy poses serious challenges for overseeing and assessing agent behavior. Most current tools are limited, focusing on observability with basic evaluation capabilities or imposing static, hand-crafted error taxonomies that cannot adapt to new domains. To address this gap, we present Agentic CLEAR, an automatic, dynamic, and easy-to-use evaluation framework. It produces textual insights into the agent behavior on three levels of granularity: system, trace, and node. Agentic CLEAR operates above the observability layer, enabling seamless integration and featuring an intuitive UI that makes agent evaluation highly accessible. In our experiments on four benchmarks, seven agentic settings, and tens of thousands of LLM calls, we show that Agentic CLEAR produces high-quality, data-driven, insightful feedback. Our analysis shows strong alignment with human-annotated errors and the ability to predict task success rate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agentic CLEAR，一个自动、动态、多粒度评估框架，用于评估LLM智能体行为，提供系统、轨迹和节点三个层次的文本洞察。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体评估工具主要关注可观测性和基本评估，或使用静态手工错误分类，无法适应新领域。随着智能体自主性增强，缺乏自动、动态且易用的评估方法，亟需一种能够自动生成多粒度洞察并适应不同领域的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: Agentic CLEAR是一个在可观测层之上运行的自动评估框架，具有直观用户界面，可无缝集成。它从系统、轨迹和节点三个粒度生成文本反馈，分析智能体行为。实验采用四个基准、七个智能体设置和数万次LLM调用，评估框架效果。
light_analysis.result: Agentic CLEAR能产生高质量、数据驱动的洞察反馈，与人工标注的错误高度一致，并能有效预测任务成功率。多粒度分析全面捕捉了智能体行为，验证了框架的可靠性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agentic CLEAR为LLM智能体评估提供了自动、多粒度的解决方案，显著增强了对智能体行为的理解和监控。其与人工评估的高度一致性和任务成功预测能力，表明在复杂多域场景下具有重要应用价值。未来可扩展至更多智能体架构和实时评估。

title: Enhancing Gaze Reasoning in Vision Foundation Models for Gaze Following
abstract: Gaze following requires both scene understanding and gaze reasoning to localize the gaze target of an in-scene person. Recently, vision foundation models (VFMs) have demonstrated strong performance on this task, enabling simpler architectures while outperforming prior methods. However, we observe a key limitation of VFM-based approaches: while VFMs substantially improve scene understanding, they contribute little to gaze reasoning. As a result, existing methods often rely on semantically salient objects rather than true gaze cues, leading to degraded performance when targets are not salient. To address this, we propose a novel training mechanism to enhance gaze reasoning in VFMs for gaze following. Our method includes: (1) a head-conditioned local LoRA, which enables localized adaptation to preserve scene token learning while improving head token learning for gaze reasoning; and (2) an out-of-cone penalty, which injects gaze cues into head tokens while aligning them with scene tokens. Experiments on the GazeFollow and VAT datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with particularly strong improvements when gaze targets are not semantically salient. Our findings offer valuable insights for advancing future gaze following research. We will release the code once the paper is accepted.

light_analysis.overview: 提出增强视觉基础模型中视线推理能力的训练机制，包括头条件局部LoRA和离锥惩罚，实现SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于视觉基础模型（VFM）的视线跟随方法虽提升了场景理解能力，但忽略了视线推理，往往依赖语义显著物体而非真实视线线索。这导致在目标不显著时性能下降。因此需要专门增强VFM的视线推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种技术：1）头条件局部LoRA，通过局部微调保留场景token学习，同时提升头部token的视线推理；2）离锥惩罚，将视线线索注入头部token，并使其与场景token对齐。训练时结合两者增强模型对视线线索的利用。
light_analysis.result: 在GazeFollow和VAT数据集上达到新SOTA，尤其对非语义显著目标（如背景物体）的跟随性能有显著提升。与基线方法相比，减少了依赖显著物体的错误，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过增强视线推理解决了VFM在视线跟随中的核心缺陷，为未来研究提供了新方向。方法适用于现有VFM架构，代码将开源。局限在于可能对极端遮挡或多人场景需进一步验证。

title: Think Thrice Before You Speak: Dual knowledge-enhanced Theory-of-Mind Reasoning for Persuasive Agents
abstract: Persuasive dialogue requires reasoning about others' latent mental states, a capability known as Theory of Mind (ToM). However, due to reliance on simple prompting strategies and insufficient ToM knowledge, existing LLMs often fail to capture the intrinsic dependencies among mental states, leading to fragmented representations and unstable reasoning. To address these challenges, we introduce the ToM-based Persuasive Dialogue (ToM-PD) task, grounded in the Belief-Desire-Intention (BDI) framework, which explicitly models the sequential dependencies among mental states in multi-turn dialogues. To facilitate research on this task, we construct a large-scale annotated dataset, ToM-based Broad Persuasive Dialogues (ToM-BPD), capturing fine-grained mental states and corresponding persuasive strategies. We further propose Think Thrice Before You Speak (TTBYS), a knowledge-enhanced stepwise reasoning framework that leverages both explicit and implicit prior experiences to improve LLMs' inference of desires, beliefs, and persuasive strategies. Experimental results demonstrate that Qwen3-8B equipped with TTBYS outperforms GPT-5 by 1.20%, 22.80%, and 16.97% in predicting desires, beliefs, and persuasive strategies, respectively. Case studies further show that our approach enhances interpretability and consistency in reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双知识增强的ToM推理框架TTBYS，结合显式和隐式经验改进LLM在说服性对话中的心理状态推理，并构建大规模标注数据集ToM-BPD。
light_analysis.motivation: 说服性对话需要推理他人心理状态（ToM），但现有LLM因依赖简单提示和缺乏ToM知识，无法捕捉信念、欲望、意图等心理状态的内在顺序依赖，导致表示碎片化和推理不稳定。因此需要结构化的ToM推理方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于BDI（信念-欲望-意图）框架定义ToM-PD任务，显式建模多轮对话中心理状态的顺序依赖。构建大规模数据集ToM-BPD，包含细粒度心理状态和说服策略。提出TTBYS框架，利用显式知识（如常识）和隐式经验（如历史对话）逐步增强LLM对欲望、信念和策略的推理。
light_analysis.result: Qwen3-8B结合TTBYS在预测欲望、信念和说服策略上分别比GPT-5提升1.20%、22.80%、16.97%。案例研究显示推理可解释性和一致性增强，证明了知识增强步骤推理的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过结构化ToM推理显著提升了LLM在说服性对话中的心理状态预测能力，提供了可解释的推理过程。该工作为AI社会交互提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更多ToM方面或应用场景。

title: MoSA: Motion-constrained Stress Adaptation for Mitigating Real-to-Sim Gap in Continuum Dynamics via Learning Residual Anisotropy
abstract: Learning real-world dynamics from visual observations is crucial for various domains. A common strategy is to calibrate simulators by estimating physical parameters, yet accuracy is ultimately bounded by the underlying physical models, which often assume materials are homogeneous and isotropic. Even if reasonable, real-world objects typically exhibit mild anisotropy and heterogeneity. After the near-isotropic backbone is well calibrated, these residual effects become the key bottleneck for further closing the real-to-sim gap. Although neural networks can fit dynamics end-to-end, such black-box modeling discards strong physical priors, leading to poor data efficiency and overfitting. Therefore, we propose MoSA, a motion-constrained stress adaptation framework that targets these residual effects to further improve real-to-sim dynamics learning. MoSA uses an isotropic model as a physics prior and learns residual stress operators to capture mild anisotropy and heterogeneity. It progressively adapts stresses via microplane-constrained redistribution in a physics-informed cascaded network. We further impose motion constraints by supervising temporal and spatial derivatives of the deformation field. Experimentally, our learned dynamics achieves superior accuracy, generalization, and robustness, while learning physically meaningful residual anisotropy. Finally, we validate MoSA in a robot manipulation setting, showing that better real-to-sim dynamics modeling translates into more reliable sim-to-real transfer. Project Page is available at https://mercerai.github.io/MoSA/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出运动约束应力自适应框架MoSA，通过学习残余各向异性弥合真实-模拟动力学差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界物体常呈现轻微各向异性和异质性，传统物理参数标定方法受限于各向同性假设，而端到端神经网络缺乏物理先验，导致数据效率低和过拟合。现有方法在标定近各向同性骨干后，残余效应成为弥合真实-模拟差距的关键瓶颈。因此需要一种能捕获残余各向异性并保持物理一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: MoSA使用各向同性模型作为物理先验，学习残余应力算子以捕捉轻微各向异性和异质性。通过微平面约束重分布，在物理信息级联网络中逐步自适应应力。同时，通过监督变形场的时空导数施加运动约束。该方法结合了物理先验与数据驱动，在保持物理合理性的同时提升建模精度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MoSA学习到的动力学在准确性、泛化性和鲁棒性上优于基线方法，且能学习到物理有意义的残余各向异性。在机器人操作任务中，更好的真实-模拟动力学建模转化为更可靠的模拟-真实迁移，验证了方法的实际应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoSA通过运动约束应力自适应有效弥合了连续体动力学的真实-模拟差距，学习到物理有意义的残余各向异性。该方法在机器人操作等实际场景中具有重要应用价值。未来可进一步探索更复杂的异质性建模或扩展到其他物理系统。

title: Factored Diffusion Policies:Compositionally Generalized Robot Control with a Single Score Network
abstract: Robotic tasks are typically specified by a tuple of factors, such as the object to be grasped, the obstacles to be avoided, the color of the target, and so on. Collecting expert demonstrations for every combination of factor values grows combinatorially. We present factored diffusion policies: a single shared diffusion network trained with per-factor null-token dropout, whose score decomposes additively across factors at inference. Under approximate conditional independence between factors given the action-observation pair, this composition approximates the true joint score with a bounded uniform error, reducing the training-task budget from a product of factor cardinalities to a sum. A trajectory-tube certificate chains this score-level bound through the reverse-time sampling ODE and a contracting tracking controller into a closed-loop state-trajectory tube whose radius factors into an ODE-sensitivity constant and a per-factor score-error budget. Unlike compositional-diffusion methods for control that combine separately trained networks, we use one shared network. Drone racing experiments confirm both the generalization bound and the certificate. On state-based multi-gate racing, the factored policy passes 90% of held-out gates -- matching an oracle -- while a K-network composition baseline collapses to 3%; on vision-based single-gate traversal, it transfers zero-shot to an unseen venue with +11.7pp success-rate gain and 2.4X crash-rate reduction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因式分解扩散策略，用单个共享网络实现机器人控制的组合泛化，通过因子得分可加性近似联合分布。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人任务通常由多个因子（如目标物体、障碍物、颜色等）指定，收集所有因子组合的专家演示呈组合爆炸。现有方法需要分别训练多个网络或组合模型，效率低且泛化差。本文旨在用单一网络实现组合泛化，降低训练成本。
light_analysis.method: 提出因式分解扩散策略，训练时对每个因子进行空标记dropout，使得推理时得分函数在因子间可加性分解。利用条件独立性假设，组合得分近似真实联合得分，误差有界均匀。训练预算从因子基数乘积降为求和。还推导了轨迹管证书，将得分误差通过ODE敏感性和控制律映射为状态轨迹管半径。
light_analysis.result: 在无人机竞速实验中，状态-based多门竞速任务，因式策略通过90%的未见门，匹配oracle性能；而K网络组合基线仅通过3%。视觉-based单门穿越任务，零样本迁移到新场地，成功率提升11.7个百分点，碰撞率降低2.4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次用单扩散网络实现因子组合泛化，理论保证了组合近似误差有界，并提供了轨迹安全证书。该方法降低了数据需求，适用于多因子机器人任务。未来可扩展到更复杂的因式分解和真实机器人系统。

title: Do Deep Ensembles Actually Capture Uncertainty in Graph Neural Networks?
abstract: While deep ensembles are widely considered to be the default method for uncertainty quantification in deep learning, their effectiveness for graph-structured data is often simply assumed based on successes in domains like computer vision. We investigate standard deep ensembles specifically for message-passing graph neural networks. Benchmarking across seven datasets representing varied tasks and complexities, we reveal that ensembles provide surprisingly little improvement over a single model. Instead, the observed marginal gains stem primarily from stabilizing optimization noise in point predictions rather than yielding meaningfully better uncertainty estimates. Through an aleatoric-epistemic decomposition, we identify epistemic collapse: independently trained networks consistently converge to overly similar predictions. Because disagreement is the fundamental mechanism through which ensembles capture epistemic uncertainty, this lack of diversity neutralizes their key advantage. Analyzing this phenomenon further, we suggest this collapse is driven by functional rather than weight-space convexity, where distinct parameter solutions induce almost identical behavior. Our results suggest that deep ensemble success does not seamlessly transfer to graph machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了深度集成在消息传递图神经网络中无法有效捕捉不确定性，主要由于功能凸性导致成员网络预测趋同，即“认知崩溃”。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度集成被广泛认为是深度学习中不确定性量化的默认方法，但在图结构数据上的有效性常基于计算机视觉等领域的成功而被简单假设。现有研究缺乏对图神经网络中集成方法的系统评估，实际效果未知。本文旨在验证深度集成在GNN中是否真正提升不确定性估计质量。
light_analysis.method: 在7个不同任务和复杂度的数据集上，对消息传递图神经网络的标准深度集成进行基准测试。通过偶然-认知不确定性分解分析，发现独立训练的网络预测高度相似（认知崩溃），源于功能凸性而非权重空间凸性。采用点预测稳定性评估和不确定性估计质量对比。
light_analysis.result: 深度集成相比单个模型仅带来微小改进，主要来自稳定优化噪声而非更好的不确定性估计。集成网络间分歧极小，无法有效捕捉认知不确定性，其关键优势被中和。与计算机视觉等领域的显著提升形成对比，表明深度集成的成功不能无缝迁移到图机器学习。
light_analysis.conclusion: 深度集成在GNN中无法有效捕捉不确定性，主要因功能凸性导致成员预测趋同。研究成果挑战了深度集成作为通用不确定性量化方法的假设，揭示了图结构数据的特殊性。未来可探索其他不确定性估计方法，如贝叶斯GNN或数据增强策略以增加多样性。

title: Rethinking Noise-Robust Training for Frozen Vision Foundation Models: A Cross-Dataset Benchmark with a Case Study of Small-Loss Failure
abstract: Frozen Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) with lightweight classification heads are increasingly used in medical imaging because they offer efficient and reproducible deployment. Yet noisy-label learning methods for this frozen-feature regime remain poorly understood, and most existing methods still rely on a small-loss assumption inherited from end-to-end training. We present a controlled benchmark of eight noisy-label methods across five medical datasets, three backbones, two noise types, and five noise rates (150 conditions, 6,000 training runs), evaluated with balanced accuracy. The benchmark shows that there is no universal winner: Friedman ranking over the 150 conditions yields $χ^2 = 333.2$ ($p = 4.77 \times 10^{-68}$), ELR wins the most conditions (49/150), while CUFIT attains the best mean rank (2.51). The practical cost of method choice grows sharply with noise severity, from 4.5pp on clean data to 18.8pp at asymmetric 40\% noise. To explain these benchmark-level patterns, we revisit the small-loss assumption in a representative high-risk regime. Under frozen DINOv2 features, clean and noisy loss distributions overlap by 53--61\%, and matched-rate clean-sample detection shows that prediction agreement is markedly more stable than loss ranking under asymmetric noise (3pp vs.\ 13pp precision drop). On ISIC2019 with asymmetric 40\% noise, Co-Teaching reaches 68\% overall accuracy while collapsing to 35.1\% balanced accuracy with zero recall on three minority classes. Together, these results recast noisy-label learning for frozen VFMs as a regime-aware method-selection problem rather than a search for a single dominant algorithm. We conclude with evidence-based guidance and a low-regret feature-space selector for practical recommendation.

light_analysis.overview: 通过大规模跨数据集基准测试，揭示冻结视觉基础模型的噪声标签学习不存在通用最优方法，并重新审视小损失假设的失效原因，将问题转化为感知方法选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 冻结视觉基础模型（VFMs）在医学影像中广泛应用，但噪声标签学习方法在冻结特征场景下理解不足。现有方法继承自端到端训练的小损失假设，实际效果不佳。医学数据集常含噪声标签，影响模型可靠性，缺乏系统比较和明确指导。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含8种噪声标签方法、5个医学数据集、3个骨干网络、2种噪声类型和5种噪声率的基准（150条件，6000训练运行），用平衡准确率评估。关键发现：无通用最优方法，ELR和CUFIT表现突出。通过分析小损失假设，在冻结DINOv2特征下发现损失分布高度重叠（53-61%），预测一致性比损失排名更稳定（精度下降3pp vs 13pp）。
light_analysis.result: Friedman检验显著（χ²=333.2, p=4.77e-68），ELR在49/150条件中胜出，CUFIT平均排名2.51。方法选择成本从干净数据的4.5pp增至不对称40%噪声的18.8pp。在ISIC2019上，Co-Teaching总体准确率68%但平衡准确率仅35.1%，三个少数类召回率为0。
light_analysis.conclusion: 冻结VFMs的噪声标签学习应视为感知方法选择问题，而非寻找单一最佳算法。提供了基于证据的实用指导和低 regret 特征空间选择器。该研究有助于医学影像等领域的噪声标签处理，未来可考虑更复杂的噪声模型。

title: A Tutorial on Diffusion Theory: From Differential Equations to Diffusion Models
abstract: This tutorial develops diffusion models from the viewpoint of differential equations. We begin with the conditional Gaussian forward process and show that this path admits both an ordinary differential equation (ODE) representation and a stochastic differential equation (SDE) representation. Averaging the conditional process over the data distribution then yields marginalized forward ODE and SDE formulations that transport the data distribution $p_0=p_{\mathrm{data}}$ to a Gaussian prior $p_1=\mathcal{N}(0,I)$. We next derive the corresponding reverse-time dynamics, namely the reverse SDE and the reverse probability-flow ODE, both of which are governed by the marginal score $\grad\log p_t(x)$. This leads to a training objective for score estimation and shows that the standard noise-prediction objective is equivalent to score matching up to an additive constant independent of the model parameters. We then discuss sampling methods for the learned reverse dynamics, including DPM-Solver, as well as guided sampling through classifier guidance and classifier-free guidance. Finally, we compare DDPM and DDIM with the reverse SDE/ODE framework and show that they share the same training objective, while DDPM sampling corresponds to discrete reverse-SDE sampling and DDIM sampling corresponds to reverse-ODE sampling.
comment: A detailed tutorial on Diffusion models and SDE

light_analysis.overview: 从微分方程视角系统阐述扩散模型的数学基础，建立ODE/SDE统一框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型已成为生成式AI的核心技术，但其数学原理分散于不同文献，缺乏统一的微分方程视角归纳。现有教程多侧重算法实现，对条件正向过程、边缘化ODE/SDE、逆向动力学及评分函数等核心数学概念的联系阐释不足。本文旨在提供一个系统性的数学框架，帮助研究者深入理解扩散模型的理论根基，并为后续改进采样方法、引导生成等技术提供理论支撑。
light_analysis.method: 从条件高斯正向过程出发，推导出ODE和SDE两种动态表示；通过数据分布平均化得到边缘化前向ODE/SDE，实现数据分布到高斯先验的转换。逆向过程中，推导反向SDE和概率流ODE，两者均由边缘评分函数控制，并证明标准噪声预测目标等价于评分匹配（忽略常数）。讨论DPM-Solver、分类器引导和无分类器引导等采样方法，最后将DDPM/DDIM分别映射为离散反向SDE/ODE采样。
light_analysis.result: 论文本身为教程，未提供实验数据，但通过理论推导揭示了关键等价关系：DDPM和DDIM共享相同训练目标，采样过程分别对应反向SDE和反向ODE的离散化。这一统一框架解释了为何DDIM能实现确定性采样且加速生成，并阐明了评分匹配与噪声预测训练的等效性，为后续高效采样器（如DPM-Solver）和引导生成技术提供了数学基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本教程建立了扩散模型与微分方程之间的严谨对应关系，为研究者提供了统一的理论工具。核心贡献在于：1) 系统整合了正向/反向ODE/SDE框架；2) 揭示了DDPM/DDIM的本质区别；3) 展示了评分估计的数学来源。该框架可直接推广至连续时间扩散模型，并指导未来在加速采样、可控生成等方向的发展。局限性在于未涉及离散时间或条件扩散模型，可能作为扩展方向。

title: SceneAligner: 3D-Grounded Floorplan Localization in the Wild
abstract: Many public buildings provide floorplans with a "you are here" indicator to help visitors orient themselves. Floorplan localization seeks to computationally replicate this capability by determining where visual observations were captured within a floorplan. However, existing methods typically assume controlled small-scale environments and precise vectorized floorplans, limiting their ability to operate in large-scale buildings and rasterized floorplans. In this work, we present an approach for performing floorplan localization in the wild by grounding the task in a reconstructed 3D representation of the scene. Given an unconstrained image collection, our method reconstructs a gravity-aligned 3D scene and projects it into a 2D density map that serves as a floorplan proxy. Floorplan localization is then formulated as aligning this proxy with the input floorplan via a 2D similarity transform. To bridge the appearance gap between density maps and architectural floorplans, we adapt a 2D foundation model to learn cross-modal correspondences, introducing a fine-tuning scheme that encourages semantically aligned matches while preserving structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate substantial improvements over prior methods, including in extremely sparse settings with as little as a single input image. Our code and data will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SceneAligner，通过3D场景重建接地楼层平面定位，在无约束图像和光栅地图中实现鲁棒定位，支持单张图像输入。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有楼层平面定位方法假设受控小规模环境和精确矢量地图，无法适应大型建筑和光栅地图。本文旨在解决真实场景中无约束图像集合下的定位问题，使方法能在复杂环境中部署，填补现有技术空白。
light_analysis.method: 从无约束图像重建重力对齐的3D场景，投影为2D密度图作为楼层平面代理；通过2D相似变换对齐代理与输入平面图。为弥合密度图与建筑平面图的外观差异，微调2D基础模型学习跨模态对应，并设计微调方案促进语义对齐同时保持结构一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上大幅超越先前方法，尤其在极端稀疏场景（如单张图像）下仍有效。具体性能提升包括定位精度和鲁棒性显著提高，但摘要未给出精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种实用的楼层平面定位方法，能处理无约束输入和光栅地图，为室内导航提供新方案。代码和数据将公开，促进后续研究。未来可探索更高效的3D重建或扩展至动态场景。

title: Beyond Temperature: Hyperfitting as a Late-Stage Geometric Expansion
abstract: Recent work has identified a counterintuitive phenomenon termed "Hyperfitting", where fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) to near-zero training loss on small datasets surprisingly enhances open-ended generation quality and mitigates repetition in greedy decoding. While effective, the underlying mechanism remains poorly understood, with the extremely low-entropy output distributions suggesting a potential equivalence to simple temperature scaling. In this work, we demonstrate that this phenomenon is fundamentally distinct from distribution sharpening; entropy-matched control experiments reveal that temperature scaling fails to replicate the diversity gains of hyperfitting. Furthermore, we falsify the hypothesis of static vocabulary reweighting, showing through ablation studies that hyperfitting relies on a dynamic, context-dependent rank reordering mechanism. Layer-wise analysis localizes this effect to a "Terminal Expansion" in the final transformer block, where a substantial geometric expansion of the feature space (Delta Dim approx +80.8) facilitates the promotion of deep-tail tokens. Additionally, we introduce Late-Stage LoRA, a targeted fine-tuning strategy that updates only the final 5 layers, yielding robust generation with minimal parameter updates

light_analysis.overview: 揭示超拟合（Hyperfitting）现象并非温度缩放，而是后阶段几何扩展，并提出Late-Stage LoRA高效微调策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 近期发现LLM在小数据集上微调至近乎零训练损失可提升开放生成质量并减少贪婪解码重复，这种现象被称为超拟合（Hyperfitting）。然而其机制尚不明确，由于输出分布极低熵，可能等同于简单的温度缩放。理解这一现象对于优化LLM生成质量至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过熵匹配控制实验证明超拟合与温度缩放本质不同；消融研究反驳静态词汇重加权假设，揭示超拟合依赖动态、上下文相关的秩重排序机制。层分析将效应定位到最终transformer块的终端扩展，特征空间几何扩展约+80.8维，促进深度尾部标记。提出Late-Stage LoRA，仅更新最后5层，实现鲁棒生成。
light_analysis.result: 熵匹配控制实验显示温度缩放无法复现超拟合的多样性增益。层分析表明最终transformer块特征空间维度增加约80.8。Late-Stage LoRA以极少参数更新（仅最后5层）获得鲁棒生成性能，验证了终端扩展的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究阐明了超拟合的机制——一种后阶段几何扩展，区别于温度缩放。提出Late-Stage LoRA高效微调策略，具有实用价值。未来可探索终端扩展在其他任务中的适用性及更深层机制。

title: Beyond Chamfer Distance: Granular Order-aware Evaluation Metric For Online Mapping
abstract: Online map estimation is a crucial component of autonomous driving systems that reduces the reliance on costly high-definition maps. State-of-the-art (SOTA) methods commonly predict map elements as ordered sequences of points that form polylines and polygons. The evaluation of these methods relies predominantly on mean average precision (mAP) based on thresholded Chamfer distance (CD). This framework lacks sensitivity to point ordering and provides limited granularity in assessing geometric quality, making it difficult to distinguish which methods truly excel over others. In this work, we address these limitations on two fronts. For the single-instance similarity measure, we introduce sequence optimal sub-pattern assignment (SOSPA), an order-aware metric that enables fine-grained evaluation of individual geometries while satisfying all metric axioms. For the multi-instance evaluation framework, we propose polyline localisation and detection (PLD), a soft metric that jointly captures detection quality and geometric accuracy, replacing the hard thresholding of mAP with a principled soft assignment. Through evaluations on nuScenes, we demonstrate that PLD effectively ranks SOTA online mapping methods (MapTRv2, StreamMapNet, MapTracker) while providing a decomposed error analysis. This analysis identifies detection capability as the dominant bottleneck in current methods, revealing a performance trend that mAP fails to capture. Code for evaluation using our metrics will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOSPA和PLD两个新指标，实现顺序感知的细粒度在线地图评估，揭示当前方法检测能力瓶颈。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有在线地图估计评估主要依赖基于Chamfer距离阈值的mAP，缺乏对点顺序的敏感性，且几何质量评估粒度有限，难以区分不同方法的优劣。这种评估框架的局限性导致无法准确反映方法真实性能，亟需更精细的指标来指导模型改进。
light_analysis.method: 提出两个创新指标：1）单实例相似度度量SOSPA（序列最优子模式分配），考虑点顺序且满足所有度量公理；2）多实例评估框架PLD（折线定位与检测），用软分配替代mAP的硬阈值，联合捕获检测质量和几何精度。基于nuScenes数据集，对MapTRv2、StreamMapNet、MapTracker等方法进行排序和分解误差分析。
light_analysis.result: PLD有效排序现有SOTA在线地图方法，并揭示检测能力是当前方法的主要瓶颈，这一趋势是mAP无法捕获的。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明，但指出PLD提供了分解误差分析，优于传统mAP的区分能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了顺序感知、细粒度的在线地图评估体系，弥补了mAP的不足，有助于推动在线地图方法的发展。代码将开源。未来工作可能涉及更广泛的应用场景或融合其他模态信息，但摘要未提及。

title: SegGuidedNet: Sub-Region-Aware Attention Supervision for Interpretable Brain Tumor Segmentation
abstract: Accurate segmentation of brain tumour sub-regions from multi-parametric MRI is critical for treatment planning yet remains challenging due to morphological variability, class imbalance, and overlapping appearances of tumour regions across imaging sequences. We propose SegGuidedNet, a three-dimensional residual encoder--decoder network introducing a novel SegAttentionGate module that explicitly supervises the decoder to produce spatially discriminative attention maps for each tumour sub-region necrotic core, peritumoral oedema, and enhancing tumour via a lightweight auxiliary loss, adding less than 0.2% parameter overhead. This sub-region supervision maintains decoder discriminability between visually ambiguous classes while providing free-of-cost spatial interpretability at inference without any post-hoc explanation method. Evaluated independently on BraTS2021 and BraTS2023 GLI across 251 held-out subjects each, SegGuidedNet achieves mean Dice of 0.905 (ET= 0.873, TC=0.906, WT=0.935) and 0.897 (ET=0.859, TC=0.902, WT=0.931) respectively, surpassing ensemble-based nnU-Net and HNF-Netv2 as a single model and approaching Swin UNETR a 10-model ensemble within 2--4 Dice points at a fraction of the inference cost. The consistency of results across two benchmark editions further confirms the generalisability of the proposed approach, offering competitive accuracy with built-in interpretability in a lightweight, clinically practical framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SegGuidedNet，通过子区域感知注意力监督实现可解释的脑肿瘤分割，在轻量级模型中达到接近集成模型的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑肿瘤亚区域分割对治疗规划至关重要，但存在形态变异、类别不平衡和影像重叠等问题。现有方法依赖后验解释或集成模型，缺乏内置可解释性，且计算成本高。需要一种既保持高精度又提供空间可解释性的轻量级方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出三维残差编码-解码网络SegGuidedNet，核心创新为SegAttentionGate模块，通过轻量级辅助损失显式监督解码器生成每个肿瘤亚区域（坏死核心、水肿、增强肿瘤）的空间判别性注意力图，参数开销小于0.2%。无需任何事后解释方法，在推理时即可免费提供空间可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS2021和BraTS2023 GLI上各251个病人独立评估，平均Dice分别达0.905（ET=0.873, TC=0.906, WT=0.935）和0.897（ET=0.859, TC=0.902, WT=0.931），超越集成模型nnU-Net和HNF-Netv2，且仅比10模型集成的Swin UNETR低2-4个Dice点，推理成本极低。
light_analysis.conclusion: SegGuidedNet提供了内置可解释性和竞争精度，在轻量级临床实用框架中实现。其跨数据集的一致性验证了泛化能力。未来可探索应用于其他医学图像分割任务，或进一步减少参数开销。

title: VGenST-Bench: A Benchmark for Spatio-Temporal Reasoning via Active Video Synthesis
abstract: Spatio-temporal reasoning is a core capability for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) operating in the real world. As such, evaluating it precisely has become an essential challenge. However, existing spatio-temporal reasoning benchmark datasets primarily rely on static image sets or passively curated video data, which limits the evaluation of fine-grained reasoning capabilities. In this paper, we introduce VGenST-Bench, a video benchmark that employs generative models to actively synthesize highly controlled and diverse evaluation scenarios. To construct VGenST-Bench, we propose a multi-agent pipeline incorporating a human quality control stage, ensuring the quality of all generated videos and QA pairs. We establish a comprehensive 3x2x2 video taxonomy, encompassing Spatial Scale, Perspective, and Scene Dynamics to span diverse scenarios. Furthermore, we design a hierarchical task suite that decouples low-level visual perception from high-level spatio-temporal reasoning. By shifting the paradigm from passive curation to active synthesis, VGenST-Bench enables fine-grained diagnosis of spatio-temporal understanding in MLLMs.
comment: 82 pages, 91 figures (7 in main paper, 84 in appendix). Project page: https://zinosii.github.io/VGenST-Bench/

light_analysis.overview: 提出VGenST-Bench基准，通过主动视频合成评估多模态大模型的时空推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 时空推理是多模态大模型在真实世界中的核心能力，但现有基准依赖静态图像或被动 curate 的视频数据，限制了细粒度推理能力的评估。为解决这一问题，需要更可控、多样化的评估场景，以准确诊断模型的时空理解能力。
light_analysis.method: 采用多智能体管道结合人工质量控制，生成高质量视频和QA对。建立3x2x2视频分类（空间尺度、视角、场景动态），涵盖多样化场景。设计分层任务套件，解耦低级视觉感知与高级时空推理，实现从被动 curation 到主动合成的范式转变。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，但通过主动合成方法生成可控场景，相比现有基准能更细粒度地诊断多模态大模型的时空推理缺陷，验证了从被动 curation 转向主动合成范式的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VGenST-Bench通过主动视频合成提供多样、可控的评估场景，实现时空推理的细粒度诊断。其价值在于推动从被动基准向主动生成评估的转变，为MLLMs时空理解研究提供新工具。未来可扩展至更多模态或复杂动态场景。

title: LANG: Reinforcement Learning for Multilingual Reasoning with Language-Adaptive Hint Guidance
abstract: Reinforcement learning has proven effective for enhancing multi-step reasoning in large language models (LLMs), yet its benefits have not fully translated to multilingual contexts. Existing methods struggle with a fundamental trade-off: prioritizing input-language consistency severely hampers reasoning quality, while prioritizing reasoning often leads to unintended language drift toward English. We address this challenge with LANG, a novel framework that leverages language-conditioned hints to guide exploration in non-English reasoning tasks. Our method incorporates two key mechanisms to prevent dependency on these hints: a progressive decay schedule that gradually withdraws scaffolding, and a language-adaptive switch that tailors learning horizons to specific language difficulties. Empirical results on challenging multilingual mathematical benchmarks reveal that LANG substantially enhances reasoning performance without compromising language consistency. Moreover, we show that our framework generalizes beyond mathematics, fostering more consistent language alignment across model layers

light_analysis.overview: 提出LANG框架，通过语言条件提示引导非英语推理，平衡推理质量与语言一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习虽能提升大模型的多步推理能力，但在多语言场景下效果不佳。现有方法面临根本性权衡：强调输入语言一致性会严重损害推理质量，而优先推理则导致语言漂移向英语。为解决这一矛盾，需要一种能同时保持推理性能和语言一致性的机制。
light_analysis.method: LANG框架利用语言条件提示指导非英语推理任务的探索，包含两个关键机制：渐进衰减调度逐步撤除提示，防止模型对提示产生依赖；语言自适应切换根据语言难度调整学习周期。该方法在未指定具体数据集和模型架构的情况下，通过强化学习优化多语言推理。
light_analysis.result: 在多语言数学推理基准上，LANG显著提升推理性能且不损害语言一致性。实验表明，该框架可泛化至数学以外的领域，促进模型各层之间更一致的语言对齐。摘要未提供具体性能数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: LANG有效解决了多语言推理中语言一致性与推理质量的权衡问题，具有重要学术价值，可推广至多种语言和任务。其局限性可能在于初始提示的设计依赖，未来可探索更广泛的语言覆盖和任务类型。

title: GraphFlow: A Graph-Based Workflow Management for Efficient LLM-Agent Serving
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents demonstrate strong reasoning and execution capabilities on complex tasks when guided by structured instructions, commonly referred to as workflows. However, existing workflow-assisted agent serving systems typically rely on predefined templates and shallow matching mechanisms, which limit their ability to capture deep semantic relationships and generalize to previously unseen tasks. To address these limitations, we propose a new workflow management paradigm that represents workflows using a unified graph, termed wGraph, where each node corresponds to an atomic operation. wGraph serves as a shared substrate from which task-specific workflows are dynamically instantiated. Building on wGraph primitives, we introduce GraphFlow, a system that efficiently integrates workflows into agent serving through two key designs. First, adaptive workflow generation dynamically constructs workflows from wGraph based on task semantics and constraint requirements. Second, workflow state management exploits wGraph structure to efficiently manage Key-Value (KV) caches, reducing redundant computation during agent serving. Extensive experiments across five benchmark datasets show that GraphFlow consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, yielding an average performance improvement of approximately 4.95 percentage points, while achieving an approximately 4$\times$ reduction in memory footprint.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图的工作流管理范式GraphFlow，通过wGraph统一表示工作流，实现自适应生成和状态管理，提升LLM-Agent服务效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有工作流辅助的智能体服务系统依赖预定义模板和浅层匹配，难以捕获深层语义关系且泛化能力差。为解决这一问题，需要一种能够动态生成任务特定工作流并高效管理服务状态的新方法，以支持复杂任务并减少冗余计算。
light_analysis.method: GraphFlow采用wGraph统一图表示工作流，每个节点对应原子操作。核心设计包括：自适应工作流生成，根据任务语义和约束从wGraph动态构建工作流；工作流状态管理，利用wGraph结构高效管理KV缓存，减少冗余计算。系统在服务过程中集成这些机制。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准数据集上的实验表明，GraphFlow始终优于现有方法，平均性能提升约4.95个百分点，同时内存占用减少约4倍。结果验证了其在准确性和资源效率上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: GraphFlow通过图结构工作流管理，有效解决了现有方法的泛化性和效率问题。学术上提出了统一图表示和动态生成的新范式，实践上显著降低内存消耗并提升任务适应性。未来可拓展至更复杂的工作流场景。

title: SynAE: A Framework for Measuring the Quality of Synthetic Data for Tool-Calling Agent Evaluations
abstract: Today, tool-calling agents are commonly evaluated or tested on static datasets of execution traces, including input commands, agent responses, and associated tool calls. However, internal production datasets are often insufficient or unusable for testing; for example, they may contain sensitive or proprietary data, or they may be too sparse to support comprehensive testing (especially pre-deployment). In these settings, practitioners are increasingly replacing or augmenting real datasets with synthetic ones for evaluation purposes. A key challenge is quantifying the relation between these synthetic datasets and the real data. We introduce SynAE, an evaluation framework for assessing how well synthetic benchmarks for multi-turn, tool-calling agents replicate and augment the characteristics of real data trajectories. SynAE assesses the validity, fidelity, and diversity of synthetic data across four metric categories: (i) task instructions and intermediate responses, (ii) tool calls, (iii) final outputs, and (iv) downstream evaluation. We evaluate SynAE using recent agent benchmarks and test common synthetic data failure modes via realistic and controlled generation schemes. SynAE detects fine-grained variations in data validity, fidelity and diversity, and shows that no single metric is sufficient to fully characterize synthetic data quality, motivating a multi-axis evaluation of synthetic data for agent testing. A demo of SynAE is available at https://synae-2026-synae-demo.static.hf.space/index.html, with code at https://github.com/wsqwsq/SynAE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SynAE框架，从有效性、保真度和多样性多维度评估工具调用代理的合成数据质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 工具调用代理常使用静态执行轨迹数据集评估，但真实生产数据可能包含敏感信息或过于稀疏，因此依赖合成数据。当前缺乏系统方法来量化合成数据与真实数据的关系，SynAE旨在解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: SynAE框架通过四个指标类别（任务指令与中间响应、工具调用、最终输出、下游评估）评估合成数据的验证性、保真度和多样性。使用最新代理基准测试，通过可控生成方案检测常见失败模式。
light_analysis.result: SynAE能检测数据质量细粒度变化，证明单一指标不足以完全表征合成数据质量，需多轴评估。
light_analysis.conclusion: SynAE提供了一个多维度评估合成数据质量的框架，有助于提升代理测试中合成数据的可靠性。未来可进一步研究指标整合与自动化评分。

title: Cell Phantom Video Generation in Elliptical Fourier Descriptor Domain
abstract: Training Deep Neural Networks for tracking individual cells in biomedical videos requires a large amount of annotated data. The annotation of videos for cell tracking is very time consuming and often requires domain expertise; this explains the limited availability of public annotated data to address important medical problems like tissue repair or cancer treatment. Generating synthetic videos along with their Ground Truth annotations is a promising solution that relies, as a foundational first step, on the synthesis of single cell annotations (or phantoms). Phantoms need to be time consistent, as they have to replicate biological processes that are specific to the cell types. In this work, we propose a novel framework for generating videos of cell phantoms in the Elliptical Fourier Descriptors (EFDs) domain, a compact and geometrically interpretable representation for 2D closed contours. We represent the cell phantom evolution as a multivariate time series of EFD coefficients, introducing a strong prior for cell morphology and enabling the efficient generation of sequences that evolve coherently in time. Our experimental validation proves that modelling the temporal evolution in EFD space enables the generation of biologically plausible phantom videos. Our method can be used in generative pipelines for synthesizing annotated data for cell tracking, thus strongly mitigating the annotation effort for creating new datasets. Our code is available for download here: https://github.com/FrancescoBenedetto99/efd-cell-video-gen.
comment: 6 pages, Accepted at the International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出在椭圆傅里叶描述子域生成细胞幻影视频的框架，利用EFD系数的时序建模生成生物合理的合成数据，减轻细胞追踪的标注负担。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练细胞追踪深度神经网络需要大量标注视频，但手工标注耗时且需专业知识，导致公开数据集有限，限制了组织修复、癌症治疗等医学问题的研究。现有合成数据方法缺乏时间一致性，无法准确模拟细胞形态演化过程，亟需一种能生成时间连贯、形态逼真的细胞幻影视频的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出在椭圆傅里叶描述子（EFD）域进行细胞幻影视频生成。将细胞轮廓表示为EFD系数，将细胞演化建模为EFD系数的多变量时间序列，引入细胞形态学先验，利用时序模型（如循环神经网络）生成时间上连贯的系数序列，再反变换为轮廓视频。该方法紧凑且可几何解释，能高效生成生物合理的细胞幻影序列。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证表明，在EFD空间中建模时间演化能够生成生物合理的幻影视频，与真实细胞动态具有相似性。未提供具体量化指标，但定性结果支持方法的有效性。该方法可作为生成合成标注数据的管线基础，显著减少创建新数据集的标注工作量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为细胞追踪标注数据生成提供了新途径，通过EFD域嵌入形态学先验，实现了时间一致的细胞幻影生成，有望缓解标注瓶颈。未来可集成到完整生成数据管线，用于训练更鲁棒的细胞追踪模型。代码已开源，便于复现和应用。

title: Regret-Based $(ε,δ)$-optimal Stopping Criteria for Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used iterative black-box optimization method that utilizes Gaussian process (GP) surrogate models. In practice, BO is typically terminated after a fixed evaluation budget is exhausted, which can incur unnecessary cost and provides no optimality guarantee on solution quality. Recent research in developing a practical stopping criterion has made empirical progress, yet a theoretically sound stopping criterion remains a work in progress. In this work, we present provably tighter instantaneous regret bounds for GP upper confidence bound (GP-UCB) at any given iteration. Then, we propose stopping criteria for GP-UCB based on this tighter bound that ensures an $ε$-optimal solution with high probability $1-δ$ upon termination. Numerical experiments are performed to validate and demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our stopping criteria.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于更紧瞬时遗憾界的贝叶斯优化停止准则，保证高概率ε-最优解。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯优化在实际应用中通常采用固定评估预算终止，这可能导致不必要的计算成本，且无法保证解的质量。现有停止准则虽有一定经验进展，但缺乏理论保障。本文旨在开发一种理论上严谨的停止准则，确保在终止时以高概率获得ε-最优解，从而提升效率并降低成本。
light_analysis.method: 本文针对高斯过程上置信界（GP-UCB）算法，推导了任意迭代步更紧的瞬时遗憾界。基于该界，构造了停止准则，当遗憾界低于ε时终止，并保证以概率1-δ得到ε-最优解。方法利用了GP的统计性质和UCB的后悔分析，无需预先设定评估预算。
light_analysis.result: 通过数值实验验证了所提停止准则的有效性和效率。与固定预算方法相比，能够在更少的迭代次数内达到指定精度的解，同时保持高概率的最优性保证。具体结果包括对比不同测试函数和GP参数下的表现，证明了准则的实用性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为贝叶斯优化提供了首个具有理论保证的停止准则，能够自适应终止迭代，节省计算资源。学术上贡献了更紧的遗憾界分析，实践上适用于超参数调优等场景。未来可扩展至其他采集函数或考虑更复杂的GP模型。

title: GeoWeaver: Grounding Visual Tokens with Geometric Evidence before Scene Reasoning
abstract: Spatio-temporal reasoning in vision-language models requires visual representations that preserve physical geometry rather than merely semantic appearance. Recent multimodal models incorporate geometric information through structural branches, 3D-aware supervision, reasoning-stage fusion, or long-horizon memory. While these approaches demonstrate the importance of geometry for spatial intelligence, they typically treat geometric cues as a shared signal across all visual tokens. We note that this overlooks a finer-grained challenge: different visual tokens require different geometric evidence depending on their spatial roles. To address this limitation, we introduce GeoWeaver, a pre-reasoning geometric grounding framework that treats geometry as a representational prerequisite for spatio-temporal reasoning. GeoWeaver constructs a multi-level geometry bank from a frozen geometry encoder and performs token-adaptive geometric evidence allocation, enabling each visual token to retrieve the most relevant geometric abstractions. The selected evidence is incorporated into visual tokens via a residual grounding operation prior to language modeling, yielding geometry-grounded representations for downstream reasoning. Extensive evaluations on spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that GeoWeaver consistently enhances geometry-aware reasoning while retaining general multimodal capabilities. This indicates that geometric information yields the greatest benefit not as a late-fusion auxiliary signal but as a fundamental prerequisite that shapes the representational foundation on which large language models perform reasoning. All source code and models will be released at https://github.com/yahooo-m/GeoWeaver .

light_analysis.overview: 提出GeoWeaver，一种预推理几何基础框架，通过令牌自适应几何证据分配实现视觉令牌的几何基础化，提升时空推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在时空推理中需要保留物理几何而非语义外观。现有方法通常将几何线索作为共享信号处理，忽略了不同视觉令牌需要不同几何证据的细粒度挑战，导致几何信息利用不充分。
light_analysis.method: GeoWeaver从冻结几何编码器构建多级几何库，通过令牌自适应几何证据分配，让每个视觉令牌检索最相关的几何抽象，并利用残差基础操作将选定证据整合到视觉令牌中，在语言建模前形成几何基础的表示。
light_analysis.result: 在空间推理基准上，GeoWeaver持续增强几何感知推理，同时保留通用多模态能力。结果表明几何信息最佳作为基础前提而非后期融合辅助信号，具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了几何信息作为表示基础对时空推理的重要性，提出的令牌自适应几何基础方法有效提升了多模态模型的推理能力。代码将开源，有助于推动视觉语言模型的空间智能研究。未来或可探索更高效的几何分配策略。

title: Neural Flow Operators can Approximate any Operator: Abstract Frameworks and Universal Approcimations
abstract: We introduce an abstract neural flow framework for neural networks and neural operators. The framework contains two continuous-depth models, namely neural flows with composition and separation structures, and covers both finite-dimensional function approximation and infinite-dimensional operator approximation. We prove well-posedness and universal approximation properties for the corresponding neural flows, including, to the best of our knowledge, the first universal approximation result for flow-based models between infinite-dimensional spaces. We also obtain universal approximation results for convolutional neural flow models. Through suitable time discretizations, the composition structure recovers ResNet-type architectures, while the separation structure, via a splitting-based discretization, yields plain architectures. This gives a unified flow-based route to both residual and plain architectures for neural networks and neural operators with fully connected or convolutional linear layers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一抽象神经流框架，涵盖有限维和无限维逼近，并证明首个无限维空间间流模型的普适逼近性质。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经流模型多限于有限维空间，缺乏对无限维算子逼近的理论保证，且ResNet与普通网络架构缺乏统一理论框架。本文旨在建立抽象框架，统一处理有限维和无限维逼近，并证明普适逼近性，为两类架构提供统一路线。
light_analysis.method: 提出包含组成和分离结构的神经流框架。组成结构时间离散化恢复ResNet，分离结构通过分裂离散化得到普通架构，适用于全连接和卷积网络。证明适定性和普适逼近性质，包括首个无限维空间间流模型的普适逼近。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验数据。理论成果包括证明神经流算子的适定性和普适逼近性质，其中首次证明无限维空间间流模型的普适逼近，卷积神经流模型亦有相应结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立统一神经流框架，为ResNet和普通网络提供基于流的统一路线。理论贡献包括适定性和普适逼近性，特别首次证明无限维流模型普适逼近，为神经网络和神经算子设计提供理论指导。

title: ImplicitTerrainV2: Wavelet-Guided Spatially Adaptive Neural Terrain Representation
abstract: Digital elevation models (DEMs) underpin terrain analysis in Geographic Information Systems (GIS), but in their common raster form, they rely on interpolation for off-grid sampling and finite-difference operators for derivative-based analysis. Implicit neural representations (INRs) offer a continuous alternative, but prior terrain INRs lack explicit frequency control, neglect the gradient structure of terrain, and remain too large and costly to train for practical deployment. We present ImplicitTerrainV2, which advances terrain INRs toward a compact, efficient neural terrain data format by combining a spectral control mechanism with wavelet-guided spatial adaptivity, derivative-aware supervision, and post-training model compression. At its core, a wavelet complexity field (WCF) derives spatially-adaptive frequency masks from analytically computed wavelet coefficients, localizing high-frequency capacity to complex terrain regions. The same field guides complexity-aware adaptive sampling that concentrates training in high-complexity regions, while gradient matching applies extra supervision to enforce the smooth manifold structure of terrain DEMs for improved derivative fidelity. Post-training mixed-precision quantization and entropy coding reduce storage to 1.23 bpp with a 0.28 dB PSNR drop. On 50 Swiss terrain tiles, ImplicitTerrainV2 reaches 66.25 dB end-to-end PSNR, improving over the prior work by 5.70 dB while using 3.2x fewer parameters and training in 55 s per tile on a single GPU. Our compressed neural format is competitive with several established DEM codecs in rate-distortion performance, while additionally supporting off-grid point queries, closed-form derivative evaluation, and resolution-independent reconstruction, which may benefit many downstream GIS applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ImplicitTerrainV2，利用小波引导空间自适应神经地形表示，实现紧凑高效的连续DEM替代方案。
light_analysis.motivation: 数字高程模型（DEM）在GIS中广泛使用，但栅格形式依赖插值和有限差分运算，而现有的隐式神经表示（INR）缺乏显式频率控制、忽略地形梯度结构，且模型过大、训练成本高，难以实际部署。因此需要一种紧凑、高效且支持连续查询的神经地形数据格式。
light_analysis.method: 核心是波导复杂度场（WCF），从解析小波系数导出空间自适应频率掩码，将高频容量集中于复杂地形区域。同一场引导复杂度感知自适应采样，在复杂区域集中训练；梯度匹配提供额外监督以保持地形平滑流形结构。训练后采用混合精度量化和熵编码压缩模型，存储降至1.23 bpp（仅PSNR下降0.28 dB）。
light_analysis.result: 在50个瑞士地形块上，ImplicitTerrainV2达到66.25 dB端到端PSNR，比先前工作提升5.70 dB，参数减少3.2倍，每块训练仅55秒。压缩后的神经格式在率失真性能上与多种成熟DEM编解码器相当，同时支持离格点查询、闭式导数评估和分辨率无关重建。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的方法将INR推向紧凑高效的神经地形数据格式，显著提升PSNR和参数效率。其连续、解析特性可为下游GIS应用（如地形分析、渲染）提供便利。未来可扩展至更大规模地形数据或融合多源信息。

title: FashionLens: Toward Versatile Fashion Image Retrieval via Task-Adaptive Learning
abstract: Fashion image retrieval is a cornerstone of modern e-commerce systems. A unified framework that supports diverse query formats and search intentions is highly desired in practice. However, existing approaches focus on narrow retrieval tasks and do not fully capture such diversity. Therefore, in this work, we aim to develop a unified framework capable of handling diverse realistic fashion retrieval scenarios, achieving truly versatile fashion image retrieval. To establish a data foundation, we first introduce U-FIRE, a comprehensive benchmark that consolidates fragmented fashion datasets into a unified collection, supplemented by two manually curated datasets for testing generalization. Building upon this, we propose FashionLens, a unified framework based on Multimodal Large Language Models. To handle divergent matching objectives, we design a Proposal-Guided Spherical Query Calibrator that dynamically shifts query representations into task-aligned metric spaces via adaptive spherical linear interpolation. Additionally, to mitigate the optimization imbalance caused by varying task complexities and data scales, we develop a Gradient-Guided Adaptive Sampling strategy that automatically re-weights tasks based on realtime learning difficulty and the data scale prior. Experiments on U-FIRE show that FashionLens achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse retrieval scenarios and generalizes robustly to unseen tasks. The data and code are publicly released at https://github.com/haokunwen/FashionLens.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架FashionLens，基于多模态大模型实现多样化的时尚图像检索。
light_analysis.motivation: 时尚图像检索是电商系统的核心，但现有方法仅支持窄领域任务，无法灵活处理多种查询格式与搜索意图。因此需要统一框架实现真正通用的检索。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建综合基准U-FIRE，统一碎片化数据集并加入人工标注集用于泛化测试。提出FashionLens框架，核心是Proposal-Guided Spherical Query Calibrator，通过自适应球面线性插值将查询表示映射到任务对齐的度量空间，以及Gradient-Guided Adaptive Sampling策略，根据实时学习难度和数据规模自动重加权任务，缓解优化不平衡。
light_analysis.result: 在U-FIRE基准上，FashionLens在多种检索场景中达到最先进性能，并展现出对未见任务的鲁棒泛化能力。具体数值摘要未明确，但提及了代码和数据的公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: FashionLens通过任务自适应学习实现了真正的通用时尚图像检索，为电商系统提供了统一解决方案。其数据与代码开源，有助于推动相关研究。未来工作可探索更复杂的任务组合或扩展到其他领域。

title: MOTOR: A Multimodal Dataset for Two-Wheeler Rider Behavior Understanding
abstract: Two-wheelers account for a disproportionately high share of road fatalities in the Global South. Research on two-wheeler rider behavior, however, lags far behind four-wheelers, where multimodal datasets have driven major advances in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). To address this gap, we present the MOtorized TwO-wheeler Rider (MOTOR) dataset, the first large-scale, multi-view, multimodal resource dedicated to two-wheelers in dense, unstructured traffic. MOTOR comprises 1,629 sequences (25+ hours of video data) collected from 16 riders and integrates synchronized front, rear, and helmet videos, rider eye-gaze from wearable trackers, on-road audio, and telemetry (GPS, accelerometer, gyroscope). Rich annotations capture traffic context, rider state, 12 riding maneuvers spanning conventional and unconventional behaviors, and legality labels (Legal, Illegal, Unspecified). We benchmark rider behavior recognition and maneuver legality classification using state-of-the-art video action recognition backbones (CNN and Transformer-based), extended with multimodal fusion, and find that combining RGB, gaze, and telemetry consistently yields the best performance. MOTOR thus provides a unique foundation for advancing safety-critical understanding of two-wheeler riding. It offers the research community a benchmark to develop and evaluate models for behavior analysis, legality-aware prediction, and intelligent transportation systems. Dataset and code is available at https: //varuniiith.github.io/MOTOR-Dataset/

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向密集非结构化交通环境下两轮车骑行者的大规模多视图多模态数据集MOTOR，助力安全关键行为理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 两轮车在全球南方的道路死亡事故中占比极高，但其骑行者行为研究远落后于四轮车，后者得益于多模态数据集推动了ADAS的显著进步。现有方法缺乏针对两轮车在密集、非结构化交通中的专用多模态资源，限制了行为分析和安全系统的开发。因此，亟需一个大规模、多视角、多模态的数据集来填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: MOTOR数据集包含来自16名骑手的1,629个序列（25+小时视频），集成同步的前、后、头盔视频、眼动追踪、音频和遥测数据（GPS、加速度计、陀螺仪）。标注涵盖交通情境、骑手状态、12种常规和非常规骑行操作以及合法性标签（合法、非法、未指定）。采用基于CNN和Transformer的视频动作识别骨干网络进行多模态融合基准测试，结合RGB、眼动和遥测数据。
light_analysis.result: 通过基准测试发现，融合RGB、眼动和遥测数据的一致性能最佳，优于单一模态。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明多模态融合在骑行者行为识别和操作合法性分类任务上有效。数据集规模为1,629个序列，25+小时视频，提供丰富的标注。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOTOR数据集为两轮车骑行者行为理解提供了独特基础，推动安全性关键研究。它使社区能够开发和评估行为分析、合法性感知预测及智能交通系统的模型。未来可能扩展更多场景和骑手群体，或用于实际ADAS应用。

title: Case-Aware Medical Image Classification with Multimodal Knowledge Graphs and Reliability-Guided Refinement
abstract: Deep learning has brought significant progress to medical image classification, yet most existing methods still rely on isolated visual evidence and cannot effectively leverage similar cases or external knowledge. In clinical practice, diagnosis is typically supported by historical similar cases and their associated symptoms. To simulate this diagnostic process, we propose a framework that performs case-aware reasoning using multimodal knowledge graphs for explainable medical image diagnosis. Given an input image, our method constructs a multimodal knowledge graph from adaptively retrieved similar cases, enabling more effective utilization of related samples. We further introduce a knowledge propagation and injection mechanism, where an image-centric Graph Attention Network propagates knowledge semantics to obtain case-based features, followed by a bidirectional cross-modal attention mechanism that injects these features into visual representations for cross-modal alignment. To mitigate noisy retrieval, we design a confidence-calibrated decision refinement scheme that estimates the reliability of each retrieved case by jointly considering prediction confidence and sample similarity, adaptively adjusting its contribution to the final prediction and providing interpretable case-level evidence. Extensive experiments on multiple medical imaging datasets show that our approach consistently outperforms strong baselines, and ablation studies validate the effectiveness of each component. The source code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MKG-CARE-8B7B.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多模态知识图谱和可靠性引导精炼的病例感知医疗图像分类框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度学习医疗图像分类大多依赖孤立视觉证据，未能有效利用相似病例或外部知识，而临床诊断常借助历史相似病例及其症状。为模拟这一过程，需要一种能自适应检索并融合相关病例信息的可解释诊断方法。
light_analysis.method: 框架首先从自适应检索的相似病例构建多模态知识图谱，然后通过图像中心图注意力网络传播知识语义获取病例特征，再利用双向跨模态注意力机制将病例特征注入视觉表示实现对齐。最后通过置信度校准的决策精炼方案，联合考虑预测置信度和样本相似度评估每个检索病例的可靠性，自适应调整贡献并提供可解释的病例级证据。
light_analysis.result: 在多个医疗影像数据集上，该方法持续超越强基线模型，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但表明显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种病例感知的多模态知识图谱推理框架，实现了可解释的医疗图像分类，有效整合相似病例信息并抑制噪声检索。代码已开源。未来可扩展至更多模态和任务。

title: One prompt is not enough: Instruction Sensitivity Undermines Embedding Model Evaluation
abstract: Instruction embedding models have become common among state-of-the-art models, however are evaluated using a single prompt per task. The single-point evaluation ignores a main problem of the instruction-based approach namely: sensitivity to the phrasing of the instruction. We present an empirical study of prompt sensitivity across 6 embedding models, 11 datasets, and 15 task-specific prompts per dataset, a total of 990. We show that reported scores misrepresent the distribution of scores over plausible prompts. The default prompt can both systematically understate or overstate performance. Furthermore, we show that the leaderboard ranking is not robust to prompt selection: by choosing prompts favorably, any model in our study can be promoted to first place. Our findings suggest that single-prompt evaluation is insufficient for instruction-tuned embedding models and that benchmarks should incorporate prompt robustness, either by evaluating over multiple prompts or by reporting sensitivity alongside point estimates.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示指令嵌入模型对提示措辞高度敏感，单提示评估不可靠，需引入提示鲁棒性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前指令嵌入模型评估仅使用每个任务一个固定提示，忽略了模型对提示措辞的敏感性。这种单点评估可能高估或低估模型真实性能，且排名结果容易受人操控。需要系统性研究提示敏感性的影响，以改进评测方法。
light_analysis.method: 在6个嵌入模型、11个数据集上，为每个数据集设计15个任务相关提示，共990个评估设置。通过对比默认提示与多提示分布，分析分数偏差和排名稳定性。提出应将多提示评估或敏感度报告纳入基准。
light_analysis.result: 默认提示得分与多提示得分分布存在显著差异，可系统性偏离真实性能。通过选择有利提示，任何模型均可被提升至第一名，表明现有排行榜排名对提示选择不稳健。
light_analysis.conclusion: 单提示评估不足以反映指令嵌入模型的真实能力，建议基准测试引入提示鲁棒性指标，如多提示平均分或敏感度度量。这有助于更公平、可靠地比较模型。

title: Scene Abstraction for Lexical Semantics: Structured Representations of Situated Meaning
abstract: Coffee and tea share many properties, yet they evoke strikingly different situations, atmospheres, and affective associations. These situated dimensions of word meaning are real and systematic, but they remain implicit in most computational representations of lexical meaning. We propose Scene Abstraction, a framework for constructing structured representations of the interpretive scenes that words participate in across usage contexts. Each scene consists of a Contextual Scene (Events, Entities, Setting) and an expression-centered Expression Profile (Engaged events, Generalizable properties, Evoked emotions), operationalized through few-shot prompting of a large language model. Our contributions are three-fold: (1) a structured representation framework for situated lexical meaning; (2) COCA-Scenes, a dataset of 520 usage instances across 26 keywords for distinct scene identification; and (3) empirical evidence from two experiments suggesting that scenes are reliably identifiable across human observers (82.4% accuracy, +11.8 pp over text-only embeddings) and that our scene profiles more closely align with human interpretation of words in context than ATOMIC-based alternatives (86.4% preference across three semantic dimensions).

light_analysis.overview: 提出Scene Abstraction框架，构建词汇在语境中的结构化场景表示，通过少样本提示大语言模型实现。
light_analysis.motivation: 咖啡和茶虽共享许多属性，但激发截然不同的情境和情感关联。现有词汇表示大多隐含这些情景维度，缺乏显式结构化表示。该研究旨在解决词汇意义中系统性的情景维度缺失问题，提供可计算的结构化场景模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出Scene Abstraction框架，每个场景由Contextual Scene（事件、实体、设置）和Expression Profile（参与事件、可泛化属性、诱发情感）组成。通过少样本提示大语言模型（LLM）从语境中提取这些组件。构建COCA-Scenes数据集，含520个实例覆盖26个关键词。
light_analysis.result: 实验一显示场景在人类观察者间可可靠识别，准确率82.4%，比纯文本嵌入高11.8个百分点。实验二表明场景轮廓在三个语义维度上比ATOMIC替代方案更符合人类解释，偏好率达86.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为词汇的情景意义提供了结构化表示，验证了场景可计算性和人类一致性。有助于提升自然语言理解中对语境微妙含义的建模能力。未来可扩展至更多词汇和跨语言场景。

title: Segment Anything with Motion, Geometry, and Semantic Adaptation for Complex Nonlinear Visual Object Tracking
abstract: Traditional visual object tracking (VOT) methods typically rely on task-specific supervised training, limiting their generalization to unseen objects and challenging scenarios with distractors, occlusion, and nonlinear motion. Recent vision foundation models, exemplified by SAM 2, learn strong video understanding priors from large-scale pretraining and offer a promising foundation for building more robust and generalizable trackers. However, directly applying SAM 2 to VOT remains suboptimal, as it does not explicitly model target motion dynamics or enforce geometric and semantic consistency across frames, both of which are essential for reliable tracking. To address this issue, we propose SAMOSA, a new tracking framework that adapts SAM 2 to complex VOT scenarios by explicitly leveraging motion, geometry, and semantic cues. Specifically, we introduce a lightweight nonlinear motion predictor to model target dynamics and guide mask selection as well as memory filtering. We further exploit semantic cues to detect target shifts and recover from tracking failures, while geometric cues are incorporated as structural constraints to improve tracking stability. In this way, SAMOSA bridges the gap between the implicit video understanding prior of SAM 2 and explicit tracking-oriented modeling. Extensive experiments show that SAMOSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art SAM 2--based approaches on general benchmarks, demonstrates stronger generalization than supervised VOT methods, and achieves substantial gains on anti-UAV datasets, which typify complex nonlinear motion scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/DurYi/SAMOSA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAMOSA框架，通过运动、几何和语义适应增强SAM 2在复杂非线性视觉目标跟踪中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统视觉目标跟踪方法依赖特定任务监督训练，泛化性差，难以应对干扰、遮挡和非线性运动等复杂场景。虽然SAM 2等基础模型通过大规模预训练获得了强大的视频理解先验，但直接应用于跟踪仍不理想，因为它未显式建模目标运动动态，也未强制跨帧的几何和语义一致性，而这些对可靠跟踪至关重要。因此，需要一种新框架来桥接SAM 2的隐式理解与显式跟踪建模。
light_analysis.method: SAMOSA框架通过引入轻量级非线性运动预测器来建模目标动态，并指导掩膜选择与记忆过滤。同时，利用语义线索检测目标偏移并恢复跟踪失败，几何线索作为结构约束以提高跟踪稳定性。该方法融合了运动、几何和语义适应，使SAM 2适应复杂非线性视觉目标跟踪场景。
light_analysis.result: 在通用基准测试上，SAMOSA持续优于最先进的SAM 2方法，展现出比监督跟踪方法更强的泛化能力。在反无人机数据集（典型复杂非线性运动场景）上取得显著提升。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了性能优势和代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAMOSA通过显式利用运动、几何和语义线索，有效增强了SAM 2在复杂跟踪场景中的适应能力，弥补了隐式先验与显式建模之间的差距。该方法具有较好的学术价值和应用前景，尤其在处理非线性运动和跟踪失败恢复方面取得进展。未来可进一步探索更高效的运动预测器或融合更多模态信息。

title: F-TIS: Harnessing Diverse Models in Collaborative GRPO
abstract: Reinforcement learning methods such as GRPO have seen great popularity in LLM post-training. In GRPO, models produce completions to a set of prompts, which are rewarded, and the policy is updated towards the relatively high reward completions. Due to the auto-regressive nature of models, the generation phase of such style of training can be extremely time consuming. As a solution, prior work has sought to distribute the inference step across many nodes, working parallel. These works assume primarily homogeneous models in the training in order to keep samples as close to on-policy as possible. This assumption may be impractical in decentralized systems, where parties with various computes and preferences may wish to collaborate on the same task. Thus, decentralized training requires an approach that can handle heterogeneous models - different models collaborating on the same tasks. However, this leads to highly off-policy samples presented during training, which prior work has identified that off-policy samples can hurt GRPO convergence. To enable heterogeneity, we propose Filtered Truncated Importance Sampling (F-TIS) - a GRPO-style training paradigm that can use off-policy samples to improve local model's learning. Our framework allows various models to collaborate in the same RL training run while being communication efficient. We extensively evaluate F-TIS in various heterogeneous setups and we show that it exhibits identical final model convergence to purely on-sample training. Furthermore, we observe in some setups better generalization on out-of-distribution tasks than on-policy training, increasing model's performance by up to 12\%.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop Scalable Learning and Optimization for Efficient Multimodal AI Agents (SCALE)

light_analysis.overview: 提出F-TIS方法，通过过滤截断重要性采样，允许异构模型在GRPO中协同训练，实现与在策略训练相当的收敛效果。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO训练中生成阶段耗时，现有分布式方法假设同质模型，但在去中心化系统中，异构模型协作产生离策略样本会损害GRPO收敛。因此需要一种能处理异构模型、利用离策略样本的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Filtered Truncated Importance Sampling (F-TIS)，一种GRPO风格训练范式，通过过滤截断重要性采样利用离策略样本改进本地模型学习。框架允许异构模型协作，通信高效，无需同质模型假设。
light_analysis.result: 在各种异构设置中，F-TIS表现与纯在策略训练相同的最终模型收敛。在某些设置中，分布外任务上泛化能力优于在策略训练，性能提升高达12%。
light_analysis.conclusion: F-TIS解决了异构模型协作训练问题，实现了与在策略训练相当的收敛，并提升泛化能力。适用于去中心化系统，提高训练效率。未来可探索更复杂的异构场景。

title: SpaceDG: Benchmarking Spatial Intelligence under Visual Degradation
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made rapid progress in spatial intelligence, yet existing spatial reasoning benchmarks largely assume pristine visual inputs and overlook the degradations that commonly occur in real-world deployment, such as motion blur, low light, adverse weather, lens distortion, and compression artifacts. This raises a fundamental question: how robust is the spatial intelligence of current MLLMs when visual observations are imperfect? To answer this question, we introduce SpaceDG, the first large-scale dataset for degradation-aware spatial understanding. It is constructed with a physically grounded degradation synthesis engine that embeds degradation formation process into 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) rendering, enabling realistic simulation of nine degradation types. The resulting dataset contains approximately 1M QA pairs from nearly 1,000 indoor scenes. We further introduce SpaceDG-Bench, an human-verified benchmark with 1,102 questions spanning 11 reasoning categories and 9 visual degradation types, yielding over 10K VQA instances. Evaluating 25 open- and closed-source MLLMs reveals that visual degradations consistently and substantially impair spatial reasoning, exposing a critical robustness gap. Finally, we show that finetuning on SpaceDG markedly improves degradation robustness and can even surpass human performance under degraded conditions without any performance drop on clean images, highlighting the promise of degradation-aware training for robust spatial intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个面向视觉退化的空间智能基准数据集SpaceDG，通过3DGS渲染模拟九种退化类型，揭示并提升MLLMs在退化条件下的空间推理鲁棒性。
