light_analysis.motivation: 现有空间推理基准多假设理想视觉输入，忽略现实部署中常见的运动模糊、低光照、恶劣天气、镜头畸变和压缩伪影等退化。导致多模态大模型（MLLMs）在真实场景下的空间智能鲁棒性未知。该研究旨在回答：当视觉观测不完美时，当前MLLMs的空间智能有多鲁棒？
light_analysis.method: 构建SpaceDG数据集，采用物理驱动的退化合成引擎，将退化形成过程嵌入3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）渲染，模拟九种退化类型。从近1000个室内场景生成约100万QA对。进一步构建SpaceDG-Bench，包含1102个经人工验证的问题，覆盖11种推理类别和9种退化类型，形成超过1万VQA实例。评估25个开源和闭源MLLMs。
light_analysis.result: 评估25个MLLMs发现，视觉退化持续且显著损害空间推理能力，暴露关键鲁棒性差距。在SpaceDG上微调能显著提升退化鲁棒性，在退化条件下甚至超越人类表现，且在干净图像上无性能下降。例如，微调模型在退化数据上的准确率提升明显，具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpaceDG是首个大规模退化感知空间理解数据集，揭示了MLLMs在视觉退化下的鲁棒性鸿沟。通过退化感知训练可有效弥补该差距，提升模型在真实世界中的可靠性。未来工作可扩展更多退化类型和场景，或探索更高效的鲁棒训练方法。

title: TerminalWorld: Benchmarking Agents on Real-World Terminal Tasks
abstract: We introduce TerminalWorld, a scalable data engine that automatically reverse-engineers high-fidelity evaluation tasks from "in-the-wild" terminal recordings. Processing 80,870 terminal recordings, the engine yields a full benchmark of 1,530 validated tasks, spanning 18 real-world categories, ranging from short everyday operations to workflows exceeding 50 steps, and covering 1,280 unique commands. From these, we curate a Verified subset of 200 representative, manually reviewed tasks. Comprehensive benchmarking on TerminalWorld-Verified across eight frontier models and six agents reveals that current systems still struggle with authentic terminal workflows, achieving a maximum pass rate of only 62.5%. Moreover, TerminalWorld captures real-world terminal capabilities distinct from existing expert-curated benchmarks (e.g., Terminal-Bench), with only a weak correlation to their scores (Pearson r=0.20). The automated engine makes TerminalWorld authentic and scalable by construction, enabling it to evaluate agents in real-world terminal environments as developer practices evolve. Data and code are available at https://github.com/EuniAI/TerminalWorld.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TerminalWorld，一个从真实终端记录中自动生成评估任务的基准引擎，用于衡量AI代理在真实终端环境中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有终端代理评估基准依赖专家手动设计任务，成本高、覆盖面窄，且无法反映真实开发者的操作实践。TerminalWorld通过自动逆向工程从真实终端记录中提取任务，解决了任务来源不真实、规模不可扩展的问题，使评估更贴近实际应用场景。
light_analysis.method: TerminalWorld数据处理引擎处理80,870条终端录制，自动提取验证任务，生成包含1,530个任务的基准，覆盖18个真实类别，涉及1,280个唯一命令。从中筛选出200个经过人工审核的代表性任务组成TerminalWorld-Verified子集。该方法通过自动逆向工程确保任务真实性和规模可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在TerminalWorld-Verified上对8个前沿模型和6个代理系统的评估显示，最高通过率仅为62.5%，表明现有系统在真实终端工作流中表现不足。与现有专家设计基准Terminal-Bench的相关性弱（Pearson r=0.20），说明TerminalWorld衡量了不同的终端操作能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: TerminalWorld提供了可扩展、真实的终端代理评估基准，反映了开发者实际实践。其自动化引擎使基准能随开发者实践演变。未来可用于指导更鲁棒代理的开发。数据和代码已开源，便于社区使用和扩展。

title: Relational Linear Properties in Language Models: An Empirical Investigation
abstract: Linear properties are ubiquitous in the representations of language models; however, testing them experimentally remains a challenging task. This work focuses on relational linearity: the hypothesis that, for a fixed relation (e.g., "plays"), the unembedding of an object (e.g., "trumpet") can be predicted from the embedding of its subject (e.g.,"Miles Davis") by a linear map. We present an experimental method to test the formulation of relational linearity by Marconato et al. (2025). Specifically, we introduce a probing method, based on Kullback-Leibler divergence, to evaluate this property and examine its variation across layers and paraphrased relational queries. It is also more efficient than previous work; for example, it avoids the crude Jacobian approximations used in Linear Relational Embeddings by Hernandez et al. (2024). Our findings across four datasets show that relational linearity varies across models, exhibits layer-wise patterns consistent with prior observations about linguistic information in model representations, and is differently affected by changes in how the relation is phrased.

light_analysis.overview: 通过基于KL散度的探针方法，实证检验语言模型中的关系线性性质，揭示其跨层、跨模型和查询短语的变化规律。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性性质在语言模型表示中普遍存在，但测试关系线性性仍具挑战。现有方法如Linear Relational Embeddings使用粗糙的Jacobian近似，效率低且不准确。本文旨在提出更高效的测试方法，系统研究关系线性性质如何随模型、层和关系措辞变化，以深入理解语言模型内部表示结构。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于Kullback-Leibler散度的探针方法，测试关系线性性假设：对于固定关系，对象的unembedding可由主体的embedding通过线性映射预测。该方法避免Jacobian近似，计算效率更高。实验在四个数据集上分析关系线性性随层的变化，并评估不同关系短语重述的影响。
light_analysis.result: 四个数据集上的实验表明，关系线性性在不同模型中表现各异，呈现与先前观察一致的层间模式（如中间层线性性更强），且关系措辞的变化对线性性有显著影响。该方法相较于先前工作更高效，避免了近似误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了关系线性性质的实证测试框架，揭示了其依赖模型、层和关系短语的特性，有助于解释语言模型如何编码结构化知识。未来工作可扩展至更多关系类型和模型架构，并探索线性映射的泛化能力。

title: Disentanglement Beyond Generative Models with Riemannian ICA
abstract: There is a gap between the theoretical foundations of disentanglement and the practice of modern representation learning. Existing theoretical frameworks, particularly Independent Component Analysis (ICA) and its nonlinear variants, assume a generative model with statistically independent latent variables underlying the data so that disentanglement amounts to identifying the latents that could have generated the data. This generative framework is interpretable and theoretically justified, but its strong assumptions make it difficult to apply to modern representation learning. Modern pretrained encoders often learn features that exhibit disentangled properties without making generative assumptions, yet there is no general theory for interpreting these features as independent factors of variation. We take a step toward such a theory by introducing Riemannian ICA (RICA), which replaces ICA's global generative model with local geometric structure. RICA is founded on the observation that in ICA, the factors of variation underlying a data point can be understood through radial curves emanating from the point that map to axis-aligned lines in the latent space. We formalize this perspective using Riemannian geometry and introduce our theory in a way that is consistent with the existing generative approach. Our main contribution is the disentanglement tensor, which encodes a second-order notion of disentanglement that we call pointwise disentanglement. This tensor depends on the Hessian of the data log likelihood as well as the Ricci curvature induced by the model. In a controlled source recovery setting with known ground-truth sources, RICA recovers sources across several manifolds, while the success of ICA baselines depends on the coordinates used to represent the observations. Our work provides a theoretical basis for studying local disentanglement without assuming a global generative model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出黎曼独立成分分析（RICA），用局部几何结构替代全局生成模型，实现无需生成假设的局部解耦。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有解耦理论（如ICA及其非线性变体）假设全局生成模型和统计独立的潜在变量，难以应用于现代表示学习。现代预训练编码器常学到解耦特征，但缺乏理论解释。RICA旨在填补这一空白，无需强生成假设即可理解特征间的解耦关系。
light_analysis.method: RICA基于ICA中因素变化路径对应潜在空间轴向直线的径向曲线这一观察，引入黎曼几何形式化局部结构。核心创新是解耦张量，它编码了点态解耦的二阶概念，依赖于数据对数似然的Hessian矩阵和模型诱导的Ricci曲率。该张量定义了局部解耦度量。
light_analysis.result: 在受控源恢复实验中，RICA在多个流形上成功恢复真实源，而ICA基线的成功与否取决于观测坐标的选择。RICA在无需全局生成模型的情况下，展示了优于传统ICA的解耦能力，证实了其局部解耦方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RICA为研究无全局生成模型下的局部解耦提供了理论基础，补充了现有解耦理论。这一工作有助于解释现代表示学习的解耦现象，并可能推动对预训练特征的理解和应用。未来可探索更高效的计算方法及扩展到非线性场景。

title: A Subjective Logic-based method for runtime confidence updates in safety arguments
abstract: We present a method for dynamic quantitative assurance that enhances static safety cases with continuous, runtime-driven confidence updates. The method quantifies and propagates confidence across the development lifecycle by integrating design-time evidence and windowed runtime Safety Performance Indicators (SPIs) within a single Subjective Logic (SL)-based assurance case. At runtime, SPI evidence is continuously evaluated, and targeted claims are updated using a rule that increases confidence in the absence of violations and imposes prompt penalties when violations occur. This design prioritizes safety-relevant responsiveness over exact classical Bayesian posterior updates. We demonstrate the method using a simulation-based construction zone assist function, focusing on an ML-based construction cone detection component, and show how confidence evolves as SPI evidence is observed in operation.
comment: Accepted for publication at the 41st ACM/SIGAPP Symposium on Applied Computing (SAC 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于主观逻辑的动态定量保障方法，实现安全论证的运行时置信度持续更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有安全论证通常为静态，无法反映运行时环境变化，尤其对ML组件的不确定性缺乏动态置信度更新机制。该方法旨在融合设计时证据和运行时安全性能指标，提供连续、响应式的置信度更新，优先保障安全性而非追求精确概率计算。
light_analysis.method: 基于主观逻辑框架，将设计时证据与窗口化运行时SPI统一建模。通过规则持续评估SPI：无违规时增加置信度，违规时立即施加惩罚。该设计优先安全响应速度，放弃精确贝叶斯后验更新。以仿真施工区辅助功能为例，聚焦ML锥桶检测组件验证。
light_analysis.result: 通过仿真示例展示了置信度随SPI证据的动态演变过程，验证了方法在运行时更新置信度的有效性。摘要未明确给出具体量化指标，但表明方法能及时反映安全违规事件并调整置信度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了动态定量保障方法，增强静态安全案例的适应性，提升ML安全关键系统的可信度。学术价值在于主观逻辑与安全论证的融合，实践价值支持运行时持续保证。未来可扩展更多SPI类型和真实场景验证。

title: Stabilising Explainability Fragility in Cybersecurity AI: The Impact and Mitigation of Multicollinearity in Public Benchmark Datasets
abstract: This paper investigates a unexplored yet impactful vulnerability in AI explainability used in intrusion detection (IDS): multicollinearity-induced instability. Despite extensive reliance on post-hoc explainability tools such as SHAP or LIME, the impact of correlated features on explanation robustness is not evaluated. We introduce a formal theorem stating that multicollinearity inflates attribution variance. This demonstrates that explanations and feature importances are non-identifiable under multicollinearity. A suite of comprehensive experiments validates the theorem on a representative benchmark dataset, UNSW-NB15. Four widely used families of models are evaluated, including linear, tree-based, kernel, and neural, across full and pruned feature sets based on VIF and correlation thresholding. We propose the novel metric of Explanability Fragility Score and two novel methods to mitigate it with variable integration complexity. CAA-Filtering focuses on stabilising explanations by grouping attributions of trained models. SHARP is a novel training-time regularisation framework that penalises attribution instability, enabling controllable and monotonic improvement of explainability stability. The findings support stable predictive performance, using Kendall's τ to quantify instability across bootstrapped explanations. This work has direct implications for the trustworthiness and reproducibility of XAI in security-critical contexts, and motivates incorporating multicollinearity mitigations into the IDS pipelines, providing a set of guidelines for practitioners.
comment: 35 pages, 3 figures, submitted to ACM TAISAP

light_analysis.overview: 提出多重共线性导致AI可解释性不稳定的问题，并设计指标与缓解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 网络安全AI中，可解释性工具（如SHAP、LIME）被广泛用于入侵检测，但特征间的多重共线性会显著影响解释的稳定性和可靠性。现有研究未系统评估这种脆弱性，导致安全关键场景下解释结果不可信赖。论文旨在揭示该问题并提供量化分析与缓解方案。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出定理证明多重共线性会放大归因方差。在UNSW-NB15数据集上，对线性、树、核和神经网络四类模型进行实验，通过VIF和相关性阈值筛选特征。提出新型指标Explanability Fragility Score衡量不稳定程度，并设计两种缓解方法：CAA-Filtering（后处理归因分组稳定化）和SHARP（训练时正则化惩罚归因不稳定）。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了多重共线性导致解释不稳定的理论，使用Kendall's τ量化自助法解释的波动性。特征剪枝（基于VIF和相关性）和提出的缓解方法（CAA-Filtering、SHARP）能有效降低不稳定性，同时保持预测性能。具体数值摘要未明确，但支持了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了多重共线性对AI可解释性的脆弱性影响，提供了理论证明和实证分析。提出的指标和缓解方法可直接提升安全领域XAI的可信度与可复现性。工作为IDS管线整合多重共线性缓解提供了实践指南，未来可扩展至更多模型和数据集。

title: Meta-Learning for Rapid Adaptation in Reference Tracking of Uncertain Nonlinear Systems
abstract: In this paper, we address the problem of reference tracking for uncertain nonlinear systems. Since collecting data from the target system (i.e., the system of interest) is often challenging, our objective is to design optimal controllers using limited target system data. Meta-learning provides a promising paradigm by leveraging offline data from source systems (systems sharing structural similarities with the target system) to accelerate training and enhance control performance. Motivated by this idea, we propose a meta-learning-based control framework that tailors the implicit model-agnostic meta-learning (iMAML) algorithm to the control setting. The framework operates in two phases: an (offline) meta-training phase, where an aggregated representation is learned from source data to capture the shared system dynamics among similar systems, and an (online) meta-adaptation phase, where this representation is fine-tuned on the target system using only a few data samples and limited adaptation steps. We formulate this framework as a bi-level optimization problem and provide an efficient solution with reduced storage complexity and few approximations. The proposed framework is general, allowing various learning algorithms to be integrated. To demonstrate this flexibility, we propose two specific learning algorithms that can be incorporated into our framework based on a neural state-space model and a deep Q-network, respectively. The primary distinction between these approaches is whether explicit system identification is required. Numerical simulations and hardware experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods enhance control performance and consistently outperform baseline approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于元学习的控制框架，利用源系统数据快速适应目标系统，提升参考跟踪性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 不确定非线性系统的参考跟踪问题中，目标系统数据收集困难，传统方法需大量数据。现有元学习虽能加速学习，但缺乏针对控制领域的适配。本文旨在利用源系统共享动力学，通过少量目标数据实现快速最优控制设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出元学习控制框架，离线阶段使用iMAML算法从源数据学习共享系统动力学表示，在线阶段仅需少量目标数据和几步微调即可适应。框架为双层优化问题，通过降低存储复杂度和少量近似高效求解。集成神经状态空间模型和深度Q网络两种具体算法，区别在于是否显式辨识系统。
light_analysis.result: 数值仿真和硬件实验表明，所提方法在参考跟踪性能上一致优于基线方法（如无元学习或传统方法）。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明，但强调了增强的控制性能和跨系统快速适应能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于将iMAML适配到控制领域，提出通用框架融合不同学习算法。学术价值：为元学习在控制中的应用提供新范式。实际价值：减少目标系统数据需求，适用于机器人、自动驾驶等场景。未来工作可探索更复杂不确定性或在线连续适应。

title: Search-E1: Self-Distillation Drives Self-Evolution in Search-Augmented Reasoning
abstract: Post-training has become the dominant recipe for turning a language model into a competent search-augmented reasoning agent. A line of recent work pushes its performance further by adding elaborate machinery on top of this standard pipeline. These augmentations import external supervision from stronger external systems, attach auxiliary modules such as process reward models or retrospective critics, restructure the rollout itself with tree search or multi-stage curricula, or shape the reward with hand-crafted bonuses and penalties. Each addition delivers a measurable gain, but each also inflates the training pipeline and ties the recipe to resources or designs that may not always be available. We take a step back and ask whether any of this machinery is actually necessary, and propose Search-E1, a self-evolution method that lets a search-augmented agent improve through only vanilla GRPO interleaved with offline self-distillation (OFSD). After each GRPO round, the policy rolls out on its own training questions. A token-level forward KL objective then aligns the policy's inference-time distribution to its own distribution under a privileged context that exposes a more efficient sibling trajectory. Despite this simplicity, the procedure naturally provides dense per-step supervision. On seven QA benchmarks, Search-E1 reaches $0.440$ average EM with Qwen2.5-3B, surpassing all open-source baselines at both scales. Code and complete version will be made public soon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Search-E1，通过自蒸馏与GRPO交替训练实现搜索增强推理的自我进化，无需外部监督或辅助模块。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前搜索增强推理的后训练方法依赖复杂外部模块（如过程奖励模型、树搜索），增加了训练管线复杂度且依赖不易获得的资源。本文质疑这些复杂性的必要性，探索仅通过GRPO和离线自蒸馏实现自我进化的简洁方法。
light_analysis.method: Search-E1采用vanilla GRPO与离线自蒸馏（OFSD）交替进行。每轮GRPO后，策略在训练问题上生成轨迹，使用token级前向KL散度将策略的推理时分布与其在特权上下文（暴露更高效同级轨迹）下的自身分布对齐，提供密集逐步监督，无需人工标注或外部模型。
light_analysis.result: 在七个QA基准上，Search-E1使用Qwen2.5-3B达到平均EM 0.440，超过所有开源基线方法，且训练管线简单。该结果证明了自蒸馏驱动自我进化的有效性，无需复杂外部增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: Search-E1表明，通过自蒸馏和GRPO的简单组合即可实现搜索增强智能体的高效自我进化，降低了训练复杂度。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可扩展到更大模型或更复杂推理任务。

title: Generative Modeling by Value-Driven Transport
abstract: We propose a new framework for generative modeling based on a discrete-time stochastic control formulation of measure transport. Adapting classic results from control theory, we formulate our problem as a linear program whose dual variables correspond to the \emph{optimal value function} of the control problem, which directly encodes the optimal control policy. Exploiting this LP formulation, we develop an efficient simulation-free primal-dual algorithm for computing approximately optimal value functions and the associated \emph{value-driven transport} (VDT) policies which approximate the true optimal policy. We show that well-trained VDT policies enjoy numerous favorable properties in comparison with other state-of-the-art methods based on flows, diffusions, or Schrödinger bridges: they lead to straight transport paths which can be simulated quickly and robustly, and can be enhanced in all the same ways as diffusion and flow-based models (e.g., conditional generation, classifier-free guidance, unpaired data-to-data translation are all easy to incorporate). We evaluate our methodology in a range of experiments, with results that indicate strong performance and good potential for scalability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于价值驱动传输（VDT）的生成建模框架，利用线性规划对偶变量计算最优价值函数，实现免模拟的原始-对偶算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型（如流、扩散或薛定谔桥方法）通常需要复杂的模拟路径或较长的采样时间，且难以同时兼顾快速、鲁棒的传输和可扩展性。本文旨在通过随机控制理论将生成建模转化为线性规划问题，利用最优价值函数直接编码控制策略，从而设计更高效、更灵活的传输机制，提升生成速度、稳定性和适用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于离散时间随机控制的度量传输框架，将生成问题转化为线性规划，其对偶变量为最优价值函数。利用该线性规划，开发免模拟的原始-对偶算法，迭代计算近似最优价值函数及其对应的价值驱动传输（VDT）策略。VDT策略产生直线传输路径，可快速鲁棒模拟，并支持条件生成、无分类器引导、未配对数据转换等增强功能。
light_analysis.result: 在多项实验中，VDT方法表现出强性能和良好扩展性。与基于流、扩散或薛定谔桥的现有方法相比，VDT策略的直线传输路径大幅降低模拟时间，同时保持或超越生成质量。具体数值指标摘要未明确提供，但暗示了在速度、鲁棒性和灵活性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: VDT框架为生成建模提供了一种新范式，结合最优控制与线性规划，实现了高效、可扩展且易于增强的生成过程。其直线传输路径和免模拟特性具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步探索大规模数据集上的性能以及与其他先进方法的融合。

title: Towards Direct Evaluation of Harness Optimizers via Priority Ranking
abstract: Harness optimization enables automated agent creation by having an optimizer agent iteratively update the harness of target agents. Despite its success, current studies evaluate optimizers solely by observing target agents' performance gains. This indirect end-improvement evaluation neglects optimizers' actions at intermediate steps, which are often erroneous and hinder agent performance. Therefore, it is unclear whether harness optimization is driven by optimizers' informed update actions or simply trial-and-error. This necessitates direct evaluation of harness optimizers. However, evaluating harness optimizers directly is non-trivial and costly due to the lack of oracle harnesses. To address this, we present a simple, low-cost design to directly evaluate them, namely priority ranking. By asking harness optimizers to rank components (e.g., tools) in a given harness by their potential to improve/hinder agent performance when updated, our design quantifies optimizer ability at the step level without expensive rollouts or manual examination. More importantly, optimizers' ranking performance correlates with their ability to improve agents in actual multi-step harness optimization, establishing priority ranking as a reliable predictor of optimization ability. Priority ranking is enabled by Shor, a collection of 182 human-verified optimization scenarios spanning across domains, designs, and time stages. Codes and data can be found at https://github.com/k59118/Harness_Optimizer_Evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出优先级排序方法直接评估强化优化器，避免间接评估的偏差，并构建Shor基准数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有强化优化器评估仅通过观察目标代理的性能提升间接衡量，忽略了中间步骤的优化器动作，导致无法区分优化源于有效更新还是随机尝试。直接评估优化器因缺乏Oracle强化环境而成本高昂，亟需一种低成本、可量化的直接评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出优先级排序方法，让优化器对强化中的组件（如工具）按其更新对代理性能的潜在提升或损害进行排序。该设计无需昂贵的rollout或人工审查，即可在步骤级别量化优化器能力。基于此构建Shor数据集，包含182个人工验证的优化场景，覆盖多种领域、设计和时间阶段。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，优化器的排序性能与实际多步强化优化中提升代理的能力高度相关，表明优先级排序可作为优化能力的可靠预测指标。该方法以低开销实现了直接评估，避免了间接评估的模糊性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 优先级排序为强化优化器提供了有效的直接评估手段，避免了间接评估的局限性，并建立了可靠的预测指标。Shor数据集为未来研究提供了基准。潜在局限包括排序任务可能无法完全覆盖优化器所有行为，未来可扩展至更多场景。

title: LACO: Adaptive Latent Communication for Collaborative Driving
abstract: Collaborative driving aims to improve safety and efficiency by enabling connected vehicles to coordinate under partial observability. Recent approaches have evolved from sharing visual features for perception to exchanging language-based reasoning through foundation models for behavioral coordination. Though communicating in language provides intuitive information, it introduces two challenges: high latency caused by autoregressive decoding and information loss caused by compressing rich internal representations into discrete tokens. To address these challenges, we analyze latent communication in collaborative driving under inherent limitations of multi-agent settings. Our analysis reveals agent identity confusion, where direct fusion of latent states entangles decision representations across vehicles. Motivated by this, we propose LACO, a training-free \textbf{LA}tent \textbf{CO}mmunication paradigm that seamlessly adapts pretrained driving models to collaborative settings. LACO introduces Iterative Latent Deliberation (ILD) for latent reasoning, Cross-Horizon Saliency Attribution (CHSA) for communication-efficient information selection, and Structured Semantic Knowledge Distillation (SSKD) to stabilize ego-centric decision making. Closed-loop experiments in CARLA show that LACO notably reduces communication and inference latency while maintaining strong collaborative driving performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无训练的潜在通信范式LACO，解决协同驾驶中语言通信的高延迟和信息损失问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 协同驾驶通过车辆协调提升安全与效率，现有方法从共享视觉特征演进为基于语言推理，但语言通信存在两大挑战：自回归解码导致高延迟，以及将丰富内部表示压缩为离散令牌造成信息损失。因此需要一种低延迟、信息无损的通信方式。
light_analysis.method: LACO是一种无训练的潜在通信范式，包含三个组件：迭代潜在推理（ILD）用于潜在推理，跨视野显著性归因（CHSA）用于通信高效信息选择，结构化语义知识蒸馏（SSKD）用于稳定自我中心决策。该方法将预训练驾驶模型无缝适配到协同设置，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 在CARLA封闭环实验中，LACO显著降低了通信和推理延迟，同时保持了强大的协同驾驶性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但与基线方法相比，在延迟和性能上取得改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: LACO通过潜在通信有效解决协同驾驶中语言通信的延迟和信息损失问题，提供了一种高效、无需训练的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化潜在表示或扩展至更复杂的多智能体场景。

title: Compiling Agentic Workflows into LLM Weights: Near-Frontier Quality at Two Orders of Magnitude Less Cost
abstract: Agent orchestration frameworks have proliferated, collectively exceeding 290,000 GitHub stars across LangGraph, CrewAI, Google ADK, OpenAI Agents SDK, Semantic Kernel, Strands, and LlamaIndex. All follow the same pattern: an external orchestrator above the LLM, injecting instructions and routing decisions every turn. Recent work has shown this architecture is dominated for procedural tasks by simply providing the procedure in a frontier model's system prompt [Dennis et al., 2026a], at the cost of consuming the context window, requiring a frontier model for every conversation, and exposing proprietary procedures to third-party providers. Compiling the procedure into the weights of a small fine-tuned model -- creating a subterranean agent -- should resolve all of these concerns, and prior work (SimpleTOD, FireAct, SynTOD, WorkflowLLM, Agent Lumos) has shown the technique works. Yet developer adoption has overwhelmingly favored orchestration. We identify three perceived barriers and address each empirically across travel booking (14 nodes), Zoom support (14 nodes, product-specific knowledge), and insurance claims (55 nodes, 6 decision hubs).

light_analysis.overview: 提出将代理工作流编译到小模型权重中（subterranean agent），以极低成本实现接近前沿模型的质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有代理编排框架（如LangGraph等）采用外部编排器，每轮注入指令和路由决策，导致消耗上下文窗口、依赖前沿模型、暴露专有过程。尽管编译方法已有研究，但开发者仍偏爱编排框架。论文识别并实证解决了三个感知障碍，推动更高效的代理实现。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出将代理工作流编译到小型微调模型权重中，称为“地下载体”。针对开发者采用编排框架的三个感知障碍，在旅行预订（14节点）、Zoom支持（14节点+产品知识）和保险索赔（55节点+6决策枢纽）三个任务上，通过微调小模型实现工作流内部化，无需外部编排器，从而降低成本并提高隐私性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法在三个复杂任务上实现了接近前沿模型的质量，同时成本降低两个数量级。摘要未提供具体性能指标，但通过与外部编排框架对比，验证了在保持高质量的同时大幅降低了推理成本和复杂性，解决了开发者对编译方法的顾虑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了将代理工作流编译到小模型权重中的实用性和优势，克服了开发者感知的障碍。学术上展示了压缩工作流到模型权重的新范式，实际应用价值在于降低部署成本、保护专有过程、减少对前沿模型的依赖。未来可探索自动化编译或更通用的工作流表示。

title: BeLink: Biomedical Entity Linking Meets Generative Re-Ranking
abstract: Despite recent progress, Biomedical Entity Linking (BEL) with large language models (LLMs) remains computationally inefficient and challenging to deploy in practical settings. In this work, we demonstrate that instruction-tuning of open-source generative models can offer an effective solution when applied at the re-ranking stage of the BEL pipeline. We propose a set-wise instruction-tuning formulation that enables fast and accurate candidate selection. Our method demonstrates strong performance on multiple BEL benchmarks, yielding significant improvements in linking accuracy (3%-24%) while reducing inference time compared to the state-of-the-art. We integrate our generative re-ranker into BeLink, a modular, end-to-end system designed for practical real-world BEL applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于指令调优的生成式重排序方法BeLink，提升生物医学实体链接的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前使用大型语言模型的生物医学实体链接方法计算效率低下且难以实际部署。现有方法在准确性和效率之间难以平衡，限制了其在实际场景中的应用。本文旨在通过指令调优开源生成模型，在重排序阶段实现快速且准确的候选选择，解决BEL系统的部署难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出集合式指令调优公式（set-wise instruction-tuning），对开源生成模型进行微调，用于BEL管道的重排序阶段。该方法能够高效处理多个候选实体，实现快速准确的链接。将生成式重排序器集成到BeLink系统中，构建模块化、端到端的BEL应用框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多个BEL基准数据集上，该方法相比现有最优方法实现链接准确性提升3%-24%，同时显著减少推理时间。实验表明，通过指令调优的生成式重排序在保持高效率的同时，大幅提高了链接精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明指令调优的开源生成模型在BEL重排序阶段的有效性，BeLink系统为实际部署提供了可行的解决方案。该方法兼顾准确性与效率，具有重要应用价值。未来可探索更广泛的生物医学自然语言处理任务。

title: The Neural Compiler: Program-to-Network Translation for Hybrid Scientific Machine Learning
abstract: Scientific machine learning often requires combining known physics with unknown parameters or correction terms learned from data. Existing approaches either ignore known structure, encode it as a soft penalty, or require hand-written PyTorch code for each equation. We present The Neural Compiler, a system that translates programs written in a first-order Scheme-like expression language into frozen, differentiable PyTorch modules. These modules match the source program to floating-point precision and provide gradients through autograd. In hybrid models, the compiled module encodes known physics exactly while learned components model the unknown remainder. We evaluate the compiler across six experiment domains: Feynman physics equations, Lotka-Volterra dynamics, a damped pendulum, a one-dimensional heat equation, three-dimensional vector mechanics, and compositional generalization. Compiled modules match hand-coded PyTorch implementations numerically for single equations, showing no accuracy loss from compilation. With only 1 to 4 trainable parameters, compiled models recover physical constants to less than 1 percent error in most cases, while standard PINN baselines with more than 8500 parameters show 7 to 93 percent error. Compiled modules also compose with zero error, while neural approximations can accumulate large errors in deep composition chains. The main value of the compiler is not improved accuracy over hand-coded equations, but systematic composability: it generates correct, differentiable modules from symbolic specifications without rewriting each equation by hand. The system supports 51 primitive operations, including vector and matrix algebra, enabling PDE discretizations and hybrid scientific models. This string-in, module-out interface also provides a natural target for large language models that translate scientific descriptions into executable differentiable modules.
comment: Use: 21 pages, 10 figures, 10 tables. Preprint; source code available at https://github.com/sheneman/neural_compiler

light_analysis.overview: 提出Neural Compiler，将符号程序自动翻译为可微PyTorch模块，实现精确物理编码与数据驱动学习的混合。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学机器学习常需结合已知物理与未知参数或修正项，但现有方法要么忽略已知结构，要么作为软约束，或需手写PyTorch代码，缺乏通用性和可组合性。这导致开发效率低、数值精度难以保证。因此需要一种自动将符号表达式转换为可微模块的系统，支持精确编码和灵活组合。
light_analysis.method: Neural Compiler将一级Scheme-like表达式语言编写的程序翻译为冻结的可微PyTorch模块，输出与源程序浮点精度匹配且提供梯度。混合模型中，编译模块精确编码已知物理，学习组件建模未知部分。支持51种原始操作（含向量/矩阵代数），可用于PDE离散化和混合科学模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Feynman方程、Lotka-Volterra、阻尼摆、一维热方程、三维矢量力学和组合泛化六个领域评估。编译模块与手写PyTorch数值匹配，无精度损失。仅1-4个可训练参数时，编译模型恢复物理常数误差<1%，而标准PINN（>8500参数）误差7-93%。编译模块组合误差为零，神经网络在深组合中积累大误差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要价值在于系统可组合性：无需手写每个方程即可从符号规范生成正确可微模块。字符串进、模块出的接口为大语言模型将科学描述翻译为可执行模块提供了自然目标。未来可扩展语言表达能力，适用于更复杂的科学模型。

title: The Signal in the Noise: OOD Detection Through Goodness-of-Fit Testing in Factorised Latent Spaces
abstract: Deep generative models offer a natural foundation for out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, yet prior work has shown that their assigned likelihoods are notoriously unreliable indicators for in- vs out-of-distribution data. In this paper, we address this problem by leveraging the diffeomorphic and mass-preserving properties of continuous normalising flows. Our analysis shows that OOD samples are mapped to noise samples that are highly atypical under the noise prior in ways not captured by the likelihood. Based on this observation, we propose a new method -- Signal in the Noise (SITN) -- for OOD detection on the single-sample level. SITN requires no access to OOD data, incurs minimal computational overhead, and provides strict control of false positive rates. Comprehensive evaluations through standard benchmarks and synthetic perturbations highlight the method's effectiveness and the absence of the complexity bias inherent to likelihood-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于拟合优度检验的OOD检测方法SITN，利用归一化流在因子化潜空间中检测分布外样本。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度生成模型在分布外检测中，其分配的似然值不可靠，无法区分内外分布。现有方法存在复杂偏差等问题。本文旨在利用连续归一化流的数学性质，解决似然作为OOD指标不可靠的问题，提出无需OOD数据且计算开销小的检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于连续归一化流的微分同胚和质量保持性质，将OOD样本映射到噪声空间中，发现其噪声样本在噪声先验下非常典型，但似然无法捕捉。提出SITN方法，对单个样本进行拟合优度检验。方法无需访问OOD数据，计算开销小，可严格控制假阳性率。
light_analysis.result: 通过标准基准和合成扰动进行全面评估，结果表明SITN方法有效，避免了似然方法固有的复杂偏差。具体性能指标未明确说明，但强调效果显著，假阳性率受控。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的SITN方法为OOD检测提供了一种新思路，利用拟合优度检验克服似然不可靠问题。方法实用性强（无需OOD数据、低计算开销），具有较高学术和应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的潜空间结构。

title: Understanding Multimodal Failure in Action-Chunking Behavioral Cloning
abstract: Behavioral cloning becomes difficult when the same observation admits several valid actions. We study this problem for action-chunking policies and show that different multimodal parameterizations fail in different ways. For latent-variable policies, posterior-prior regularization makes deployment-time sampling more reliable, but excessive regularization removes the action-conditioned information needed to distinguish demonstrated modes. Reducing this regularization can preserve mode information, but then success depends on whether the prior covers the relevant latent regions. For action-space generative policies, multimodality is constrained by the smoothness of the base-to-action transport: a map with small Lipschitz constant cannot assign substantial probability to many well-separated modes. Covering many modes therefore requires either sharp transitions in base space or off-support bridge regions in action space. Experiments on synthetic multimodal tasks and robotic simulation benchmarks support these mechanisms.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了动作分块行为克隆中多模态失败的不同机制，包括潜在变量策略和动作空间生成策略的根本原因。
light_analysis.motivation: 行为克隆在观测对应多个有效动作时性能下降，现有方法对多模态处理不足。理解不同策略（潜在变量与动作空间生成）的失败原因，有助于设计更鲁棒的机器人学习算法。
light_analysis.method: 分析两种参数化策略：潜在变量策略中，后验-先验正则化平衡采样可靠性与模态信息保留；动作空间生成策略中，基到动作映射的Lipschitz常数约束多模态覆盖能力。通过理论分析和合成/仿真实验验证机制。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明：过度正则化使潜在变量策略丢失模态区分信息；减少正则化后依赖先验覆盖。动作空间策略中，小Lipschitz映射无法支持分离模态，需锐变或桥区域。在机器人仿真基准上验证了这些失败模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了动作分块行为克隆中多模态失败的本质机制，为设计新方法提供理论指导。未来可探索改进正则化平衡或非平滑映射来增强多模态能力。

title: Training-Free Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentations in Low Data Regimes: A FungiTastic Baseline
abstract: Fine-grained semantic segmentation requires both precise localization and discrimination between visually similar classes. In FungiTastic, this problem is further complicated by a long-tailed distribution and strong variation in image acquisition conditions. We propose a training-free two-stage framework that decouples segmentation from classification. SAM3 first produces class-agnostic mushroom masks using macro-taxonomic prompts, and DINOv3 then assigns fine-grained labels through prototype matching in the embedding space. To improve this stage, we apply a simple transformation of the DINOv3 feature space that improves prototype-based classification. Compared with class-specific prompting, our approach is more scalable and keeps the segmentation cost low. We report results from one-shot to few-hundred-shot regimes, providing, to the best of our knowledge, the first baseline for fine-grained semantic segmentation in low-data settings.
comment: Accepted at the 13th Workshop on Fine-Grained Visual Categorization, CVPR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出无需训练的SAM3+DINOv3两阶段框架，首次建立低数据细粒度语义分割基线。
light_analysis.motivation: 细粒度语义分割需要精确定位和区分视觉相似类别，在FungiTastic数据集中存在长尾分布和图像采集条件差异大的挑战。现有方法依赖大量标注数据，在低数据场景下性能不佳，且类专用提示方法可扩展性差、分割成本高。因此，亟需一种无需训练且高效的框架来解决低数据下的细粒度分割问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出无需训练的两阶段框架：首先SAM3利用宏观分类提示生成类无关的蘑菇掩膜，实现分割与分类解耦；然后DINOv3通过嵌入空间中的原型匹配分配细粒度标签。为提升分类性能，对DINOv3特征空间进行简单变换以改进原型分类。该框架相比类专用提示更可扩展，且保持低分割成本。
light_analysis.result: 在FungiTastic数据集上，从一次到几百次样本设置下评估，提供了首个低数据细粒度语义分割基线。方法在极少样本下仍能有效工作，但摘要未报告具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次为低数据细粒度语义分割建立基线，通过解耦分割与分类实现高效扩展。无需训练的特性降低了计算资源需求，适用于实际场景。未来工作可探索更优的特征变换或结合半监督学习进一步提升性能。

title: Represented Is Not Computed: A Causal Test of Candidate Algorithmic Intermediates in a Transformer
abstract: Structured prompts require integrating components according to task-relevant relations. How a network implements this integration is often hard to judge in language or vision, where those relations are rarely specified precisely enough to define a candidate internal algorithm. Arithmetic offers a cleaner setting. We study a Transformer trained on base-digit extraction: given $N$, $B$, and $D$, it must report the coefficient of $B^D$ in the base-$B$ expansion of $N$. The closed-form solution, $\lfloor N/B^D \rfloor \bmod B$, provides explicit candidate algorithmic intermediates. Across three seeds, the model reaches 99.83% exact-answer accuracy on held-out number-base intersections, establishing reliable task competence. Linear probes decode the intermediates, making staged arithmetic computation plausible. Causal tests then separate representation from use: within the localized route from the stream with $D$ as input to the output positions, behavior depends on early $D$-selective communication, independent of $N$ and $B$. Relatedly, a sparse circuit search finds mostly separate $N$, $B$, and $D$ routes that combine late rather than the staged route suggested by the probes. Thus, the model represents the intermediates that make the closed-form solution plausible, but the identified localized causal route does not transmit them to the output stream. This case shows that probe-based conclusions can diverge sharply from causal observations, even when explicit algorithmic hypotheses are available.

light_analysis.overview: 通过因果测试发现Transformer在算术任务中虽能解码中间步骤，但实际计算路径并未使用它们，揭示探针结论与因果观察的差异。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解神经网络如何集成结构化提示中的信息是解释AI行为的关键。现有方法多依赖探针或可解释性分析，但难以区分模型是否真正使用所发现的内部表示进行计算。算术任务提供了明确的候选算法中间步骤，为检验这一差异提供了干净环境。该研究旨在探究Transformer在base-digit提取任务中，是否实际执行了类似于闭式解的分阶段算术计算。
light_analysis.method: 训练一个Transformer执行base-digit提取：给定N, B, D，输出整数在基B下展开中B^D的系数。模型在三种随机种子下达到99.83%准确率。使用线性探针解码中间步骤（如floor(N/B^D)和mod B），并设计因果测试：通过干预输入流中D的输出路线，观察行为变化。此外，进行稀疏电路搜索，识别实际计算路径。
light_analysis.result: 线性探针成功解码了闭式解中所有中间步骤，表明模型内部表征了这些量。但因果测试显示，在从D输入到输出的局部路线中，行为仅依赖于早期的D选择性通信，而不依赖于N和B，说明中间步骤未被传输到输出。稀疏电路搜索发现N、B、D的路径在后期才结合，而非探针提示的分阶段路线。因此，模型虽表征中间步骤，但因果计算路径并未使用它们。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该案例表明，即使有明确的算法假设，基于探针的解释可能与实际因果计算路径严重不一致。研究强调了因果测试在验证模型是否真正使用特定机制中的必要性。未来工作可探索其他任务中探针与因果分析的差异，以及如何设计更鲁棒的解释方法。

title: Polite on the Surface, Wrong in Practice: A Curated Dataset for Fixing Honorific Failures in Multilingual Bangla Generation
abstract: Recent advances in Multilingual Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly enhanced cross-lingual conversational capabilities, yet modeling culturally nuanced and context-dependent communication remains a critical bottleneck. Specifically, existing state-of-the-art models exhibit a severe pragmatic gap when handling structural variations, regional idioms, and honorific consistencies in low-resource contexts like Bangla. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel, culturally aligned instruction-tuning dataset for \textbf{BangLa Application and DialoguE generation - BLADE} and benchmarking framework comprising $4,196$ meticulously curated interaction pairs. We leverage this resource to systematically fine-tune and evaluate leading open-weight architectures, including DeepSeek-8B and LLaMA-3.2-3B, utilizing parameter-efficient fine-tuning via LoRA adapters in a 4-bit NormalFloat (NF4) quantization framework. Our empirical evaluations demonstrate that models fine-tuned on our dataset yield substantial improvements in structural fidelity and honorific alignment, providing a rigorous benchmark for bridging pragmatic disparities in low-resource multilingual text generation. Code and dataset: https://github.com/ashuvo25/Bangla_Application_LLM/tree/main

light_analysis.overview: 提出BLADE数据集，通过指令微调解决孟加拉语多语言大模型中的敬语对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM在处理孟加拉语等低资源语言时，缺乏对文化细微差别和敬语一致性的建模，导致语用失败。该问题影响实际应用中的礼貌表达，现有方法无法有效解决。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含4,196个精心策划交互对的BLADE数据集，采用LoRA适配器和4-bit NF4量化，对DeepSeek-8B和LLaMA-3.2-3B等模型进行参数高效微调，提升结构保真度和敬语对齐。
light_analysis.result: 微调后的模型在结构保真度和敬语对齐方面显著优于基线，为低资源多语言文本生成的语用差异提供了严格基准，验证了数据集的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过数据集和微调方法有效修复了孟加拉语敬语失败问题，为多语言文化对齐提供了新基准，代码和数据集已开源。未来可扩展至其他低资源语言。

title: Supervised Classification Heads as Semantic Prototypes: Unlocking Vision-Language Alignment via Weight Recycling
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at tasks like zero-shot classification and cross-modal retrieval by mapping images and text to a shared space, but this requires expensive end-to-end training with massive paired datasets. Current post-hoc alignment methods reduce computational costs by connecting pretrained encoders through lightweight mappings, yet still demand substantial paired data. In this work, we investigate the potential of repurposing the classification heads of pretrained vision models as semantic prototypes. The recycling of these weights, typically discarded after pretraining, unlocks two distinct capabilities: it enables zero-shot alignment by using weights as semantic anchors, and serves as a robust data augmentation strategy by mixing these prototypes with real image-text pairs. We demonstrate that integrating our approach with several state-of-the-art post-hoc alignment techniques consistently boosts accuracy in cross-modal retrieval, zero- and few-shot classification tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过回收视觉模型分类头作为语义原型，实现零样本对齐和增强数据增强，提升后对齐方法性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言模型(VLM)在零样本分类和跨模态检索中表现优异，但需要大量配对数据和昂贵的端到端训练。现有的后对齐方法通过轻量映射连接预训练编码器，降低计算成本，但仍需大量配对数据。本文旨在探索回收预训练视觉模型分类头的潜力，这些权重通常被丢弃，但可作为语义原型实现零样本对齐和鲁棒数据增强。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出回收预训练视觉模型的分类头权重作为语义原型。具体地，将权重作为语义锚点实现零样本对齐，同时通过混合这些原型与真实图像-文本对作为数据增强策略。该方法可集成到多种后对齐技术中，无需额外配对数据，仅利用已存在的权重。
light_analysis.result: 将所提方法与多种先进后对齐技术结合，在跨模态检索、零样本和少样本分类任务中持续提升准确率。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明与基线相比有稳定改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作展示了回收预训练视觉模型分类头权重的有效性，为后对齐方法提供了零样本对齐能力和鲁棒数据增强。其价值在于降低数据需求，提升多任务性能。未来可能探索更复杂的原型混合策略或扩展到其他模态。

title: When Stronger Triggers Backfire: A High-Dimensional Theory of Backdoor Attacks
abstract: Backdoor poisoning attacks behave counter-intuitively in high dimensions: stronger training triggers can help the defender. We study regularised generalised linear models on Gaussian-mixture data in the proportional regime ($p/n \to κ$), varying the training trigger strength $α$ against a fixed test trigger. Three phenomena emerge: (i) clean test accuracy increases with $α$; (ii) attack success peaks at a finite $α$ and then declines; and (iii) the most damaging trigger direction is the minimum eigenvector of the data covariance. We prove all three results in closed form for the squared loss, and extend (i) and (ii) to general convex GLM losses via a Gaussian-proxy fixed-point system. We identify a finite-sample noise floor proportional to $κ$ as the mechanism behind (i), invisible to classical $n \gg p$ analysis. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and Gaussian surrogates match the theory closely; ResNet-18 experiments show the same phenomena beyond the convex setting.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示高维后门攻击中更强训练触发器反直觉地有助于防御，通过理论证明三个关键现象并识别有限样本噪声地板机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 后门攻击在低维空间行为直观，但高维空间中更强训练触发器反而帮助防御，现有理论大多假设n≫p，忽略高维比例体制下的有限样本效应。本文旨在理论解释这一反直觉现象及其机制。
light_analysis.method: 研究正则化广义线性模型在高斯混合数据上的后门攻击，在比例体制p/n→κ下变化训练触发器强度α，固定测试触发器。对平方损失推导三个现象的闭式解，对凸损失通过高斯代理不动点系统扩展。识别有限样本噪声地板κ为干净准确率提升的机制。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明三个现象：干净测试准确率随α增加；攻击成功率在有限α处达峰后下降；最危险触发方向为数据协方差最小特征向量。CIFAR-10和高斯代理实验紧密匹配理论，ResNet-18实验在非凸设置也观察到相同现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供高维后门攻击的精确理论分析，揭示有限样本噪声地板的决定性作用，对设计鲁棒防御有指导意义。实验在非凸模型中验证理论普适性，未来可探索更复杂架构的理论扩展。

title: Implicit Regularization of Mini-Batch Training in Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Mini-batch training of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) is fundamentally different from training on i.i.d. data: sampling a subgraph alters the topology and introduces boundary effects, leading prior work to develop structure-aware samplers that preserve local connectivity and reduce embedding variance. Surprisingly, we demonstrate that the simplest possible scheme, Random Node Sampling (RNS), training on the induced subgraph of uniformly sampled nodes, matches or outperforms full-graph training on 8 of 10 datasets at a fraction of the wall-clock time and memory. To explain this, we apply backward error analysis to graph mini-batch Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) and show that it implicitly minimizes the sampled loss plus a regularizer proportional to the mini-batch gradient variance, a quantity directly shaped by the sampler. Although RNS discards local structure, it produces mini-batches whose expected loss is closer to the full-graph loss, and whose per-batch gradients have lower variance, yielding a better implicit objective. Our analysis reframes the choice of graph sampler as a form of implicit regularization, and identifies RNS as a strong, theoretically grounded method for scalable GNN training.

light_analysis.overview: 发现随机节点采样在GNN小批量训练中表现优异，并通过向后误差分析揭示其隐式正则化机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络的小批量训练与独立同分布数据训练本质不同：子图采样改变拓扑并引入边界效应，现有方法发展结构感知采样器以保持局部连接性。然而，最简单的随机节点采样在多数数据集上匹配或超越全图训练，其内在原因不明，亟需理论解释。
light_analysis.method: 采用均匀随机节点采样得到诱导子图进行训练，应用向后误差分析于图小批量随机梯度下降，证明其隐式最小化采样损失加上与梯度方差成正比的正则化项。RNS产生的批次期望损失更接近全图损失，且梯度方差更低，从而获得更优隐式目标。
light_analysis.result: 在8个数据集上，随机节点采样匹配或超越全图训练，同时大幅减少训练时间和内存消耗。与结构感知采样器相比，RNS虽丢弃局部结构，但通过低梯度方差实现更好的泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将图采样器选择重新定义为隐式正则化形式，为可扩展GNN训练提供了理论基础。随机节点采样作为理论支撑的强基线方法，挑战了结构保留采样的必要性，未来可探索更优方差控制的采样策略。

title: Matching with Deliberation: Test-Time Evolutionary Hierarchical Multi-Agents for Zero-Shot Compositional Image Retrieval
abstract: Zero-Shot Compositional Image Retrieval (ZS-CIR) requires both preserving the visual continuity of the reference image and faithfully executing the semantic variables specified in the modification text, which constitutes the core challenge of the task. Existing methods often suffer from Perception Myopia in a single space, or fall into Logic Drift in iterative collaboration due to the perception ceiling of the underlying retriever. To address this issue, we propose a one-stop hierarchical Perception-to-Deliberation Framework (PDF), which, to the best of our knowledge, is the first to introduce experience self-evolution and Test-Time Scaling Law (TTS) into ZS-CIR. Relying on a hierarchical multi-agent architecture, PDF first utilizes an Intent Routing Manager to dynamically dispatch multi-view Worker perception signals based on modification intents to construct a high-recall candidate pool. Subsequently, the Decision Manager combines a Training-free Reasoning Policy Distillation mechanism with a Tournament-style TTS strategy to achieve self-evolving fine-grained reasoning, yielding the final retrieval results. Experimental results demonstrate that PDF achieves SOTA performance on three benchmark datasets: CIRR, CIRCO, and FashionIQ. This study indicates that experience-driven self-evolution and TTS represent a highly promising and scalable path for achieving zero-shot fine-grained multimedia retrieval. The code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分层感知-审慎框架(PDF)，首次将经验自进化和测试时缩放定律引入零样本组合图像检索，实现零样本细粒度检索最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本组合图像检索(ZS-CIR)的核心在于保持参考图像视觉连续性并忠实执行修改文本的语义变量。现有方法存在单空间感知短视，或由于底层检索器感知上限导致迭代协作中的逻辑漂移。这些问题限制了检索准确性和可扩展性，亟需一种能动态分配感知信号并实现自进化精细推理的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出PDF框架，采用分层多智能体架构。首先通过意图路由管理器基于修改意图动态调度多视角工人感知信号，构建高召回候选池。决策管理器结合训练无关推理策略蒸馏与锦标赛式测试时缩放策略，实现自进化细粒度推理，最终输出检索结果。该方法无需训练即可推理，并利用测试时计算扩展提升性能。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集CIRR、CIRCO和FashionIQ上达到最先进性能。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但表明经验驱动的自进化和测试时缩放定律在零样本细粒度多媒体检索中具有高潜力与可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PDF首次将经验自进化与测试时缩放定律引入ZS-CIR，通过分层多智能体协同有效克服感知短视和逻辑漂移，取得SOTA结果。该方法为零样本细粒度检索提供了有前景的可扩展路径，代码将开源。未来工作可探索更复杂的进化策略与跨模态交互。

title: Structured-Sparse Attention for Entity Tracking with Subquadratic Sequence Complexity
abstract: Entity tracking requires maintaining and updating latent states for entities and attributes over long sequences. Recent task-specific attention operators can compress deep Transformer stacks into a few layers by performing multi-hop state propagation within a single layer, but their dense evaluation remains expensive. We show that in this setting, learned attention is strongly structured: most mass concentrates in local block-diagonal neighborhoods with a light cross-block residue. Exploiting this, we derive a blockwise evaluation of a resolvent-style operator that keeps within-block interactions exact and routes cross-block interactions through a reduced system. The resulting evaluation is subquadratic in sequence length $O(n^{4/3}d)$ (and $O(n^{7/3})$ when $d\approx n$). On controlled tracking benchmarks, our method matches the dense operator's accuracy while reducing wall-clock time by $12-29\%$ under a standardized measurement protocol, and is up to $2.4 \times$ faster than a compact dense Transformer at comparable exact-match accuracy. We further provide ablations over block size and model capacity, and identify a limitation: performance collapses when the number of simultaneously evolving properties exceeds the number of attention heads.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结构化稀疏注意力，用于实体跟踪，实现子二次复杂度并保持精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 实体跟踪任务需要在长序列中维护和更新实体与属性的潜在状态。现有密集注意力算子虽能压缩深度Transformer栈，但计算复杂度高，难以扩展到长序列。本文发现学习到的注意力具有强结构化特性，大部分集中在局部块对角区域，仅少量跨块残差，为设计更高效的稀疏注意力机制提供了可能。
light_analysis.method: 利用注意力矩阵的强结构化特性（块对角集中+轻度跨块残差），提出了一种分块评估的解析算子方法。该方法保持块内交互精确，将跨块交互通过简化系统路由，从而将复杂度降低至子二次O(n^{4/3}d)。关键创新在于基于结构先验的块状稀疏模式设计，以及高效的解析算子求值。
light_analysis.result: 在受控跟踪基准上，该方法在匹配密集算子精度的同时，将墙钟时间减少12-29%，且相比紧凑密集Transformer在可比精确匹配精度下加速高达2.4倍。消融实验显示，性能在同时演变的属性数量超过注意力头数时急剧下降，揭示了当前方法的容量限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种结构化稀疏注意力方法，有效降低了实体跟踪中状态传播的计算复杂度，提升了长序列场景的效率。该工作揭示了注意力结构先验的重要性，为设计更高效的序列模型提供了新思路。未来需解决多属性场景下的性能瓶颈，并探索自适应稀疏模式。

title: Winner-Take-All bottlenecks enforce disentangled symbolic representations in multi-task learning
abstract: Winner-take-all (WTA) networks constitute a central circuit motif in cortical networks of the brain. In addition, WTA-like activations are abundant in modern deep learning models in the form of the softmax activation for example in attention layers of transformers. While their role in the extraction of latent factors has been studied for relatively simple generative models, their role in the context of highly non-linearly entangled latent factors has remained elusive. In this article, we show that a WTA bottleneck within a deep neural network can enforce under certain well-defined conditions the extraction of categorical latent factors of the data in a multi-task learning setup. In particular, we prove that the representation that emerges in the WTA bottleneck is highly symbolic, where a single neuron or a population of neurons encodes the presence of a single abstract feature such as a specific object, color, or position. We furthermore show empirically on two datasets, that this also holds for architectures and setups that do not fully comply with the assumptions of our theorem and demonstrate the advantages of the acquired symbolic representation for generalization. Our proposed model provides insights into the generalization capabilities of deep neural networks with WTA-like components and may serve as an interface between symbolic and subsymbolic AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 证明在多头学习中，胜者全拿瓶颈能迫使网络学习到符号化的解缠表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法在处理高度非线性纠缠的潜在因素时效果不佳，而胜者全拿机制在生物脑和现代深度学习模型中广泛存在，但其在复杂纠缠场景下的作用尚未明确。研究旨在揭示WTA瓶颈如何强制提取数据中的分类潜在因素，以提升模型的可解释性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出在深度神经网络中引入WTA瓶颈，并通过理论证明在特定条件下（如多头学习设置），该瓶颈能强制编码单一抽象特征（如物体、颜色、位置）的符号化表示。实验在两个数据集上验证，即使架构不完全符合定理假设，仍能获得符号化表示，并展现泛化优势。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，WTA瓶颈学习到的表示高度符号化，单个或群体神经元编码特定特征。在不完全满足定理假设的情况下，该方法仍能有效提取解缠表示，并在泛化任务中优于基线方法。具体性能提升需参考原文数据，摘要未明确具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作揭示了WTA组件在深度网络中的符号化表示学习机制，为理解泛化能力提供新视角。它有望作为符号与子符号AI系统的桥梁，推动可解释人工智能发展。未来可探索更宽松条件下的理论保证及实际应用。

title: Lost in Tokenization: Fundamental Trade-offs in Graph Tokenization for Transformers
abstract: Transformers have become a central architecture for graph learning, but their application to graphs requires first choosing a tokenization: a graph-to-token map that determines which structural information is exposed at the input. In this work, we show that this choice is a fundamental component of transformer expressivity. We examine three tokenizations that serve as building blocks for many existing graph tokenizations: spectral, random-walk, and adjacency tokenizations. We prove that different tokenizations induce distinct depth regimes: the same graph computation may be realizable by a shallow transformer under one tokenization, while requiring substantially larger depth under another. For example, we prove that random-walk tokenization is lossy for any walk length, making it impossible in general to recover the graph from it, and that while spectral tokenization is lossless, it is ill-conditioned for local tasks. We further show that although both random-walk and spectral tokenizations are derived from adjacency information, it is impossible for a limited-depth transformer to convert between tokenization families in general. In particular, we establish lower bounds and impossibility results showing that unfavorable tokenizations may preclude the efficient recovery of more suitable structural representations. Finally, we complement our theory with controlled experiments on synthetic and real-world tasks, validating the predicted separations and showing that different tasks favor different structural views, and combining complementary tokenizations allows the transformer to leverage distinct signals from each representation.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了图Transformer中tokenization选择对表达能力的基本权衡，证明不同tokenization导致不同的深度需求和性能表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 图Transformer需要选择tokenization，但不同tokenization对表达性的影响尚未被充分理解。现有方法忽视了tokenization的fundamental role，例如随机游走可能丢失信息，谱方法可能对局部任务病态。该研究旨在系统理解这些trade-offs，指导更优的tokenization设计。
light_analysis.method: 研究了三种基础tokenization：谱、随机游走和邻接。通过理论分析证明了它们的深度分离性质：随机游走tokenization对任何游走长度都是有损的，谱tokenization是lossless但ill-conditioned for local tasks。此外，证明了有限深度transformer无法在tokenization族间高效转换，并给出了下界和不可能性结果。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明：随机游走tokenization无法从任何有限游走长度恢复图结构；谱tokenization虽保留完整图信息但条件数差；不同tokenization之间转换需要超过有限深度。实验在合成和真实任务上证实了这些分离，显示不同任务偏好不同tokenization，组合使用可提升性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: tokenization是图Transformer表达性的基本组件，选择不当会严重影响模型效率。该研究为理解图tokenization的trade-offs提供了理论基础，建议根据任务选择或组合互补tokenization。未来可探索自适应tokenization或更高效的图表示。

title: MaSC: A Masked Similarity Metric for Evaluating Concept-Driven Generation
abstract: Evaluating single-concept personalization in text-to-image diffusion requires measuring both concept preservation, which captures identity fidelity to a reference, and prompt following, which captures whether the generated scene matches the prompt. Existing metrics commonly compute these signals using global image or text-image embeddings, such as CLIP-I, DINO, and CLIP-T. We show that such metrics correlate poorly with human perception because they attend to the image as a whole instead of separating the concept subject from the background. We introduce MaSC, a masked similarity metric that uses externally provided foreground concept masks to decompose evaluation into subject-specific concept preservation and background-based prompt following. MaSC computes both scores from frozen SigLIP2 SO400M-NaFlex features: concept preservation is measured by masked max-cosine matching between foreground reference patches and generated-image patches, while prompt following is measured by comparing a background-only pooled image embedding to a subject-stripped prompt embedding. On DreamBench++ human ratings, MaSC achieves Krippendorff alpha = 0.471 for concept preservation, outperforming all tested non-LLM baselines and GPT-4V, and approaching GPT-4o. On ORIDa, a real-photo identity-preservation benchmark across physical environments, MaSC achieves AUC = 0.992, nearly perfectly distinguishing same-subject from cross-subject pairs. Its prompt-following score also outperforms the CLIP-T baseline shipped with DreamBench++. These results show that spatially decomposed aggregation is a strong design principle for evaluating concept-driven generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MaSC，一种基于掩码的相似度度量，通过空间分解评估文本到图像生成中的概念保留和提示跟随，显著提升与人类感知的一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有评估指标如CLIP-I、DINO、CLIP-T使用全局图像或文本-图像嵌入，无法分离主体与背景，导致与人类感知相关性差。需要一种能分别量化概念保留（主体身份保真度）和提示跟随（场景匹配）的度量，以更准确评估单概念个性化生成。
light_analysis.method: MaSC利用外部前景掩码将评估分解为概念保留和提示跟随，均基于冻结的SigLIP2 SO400M-NaFlex特征。概念保留通过计算前景参考图像块与生成图像块间的掩码最大余弦匹配；提示跟随通过比较背景池化图像嵌入与去除主体关键词的提示嵌入。无需额外训练，仅需预训练特征。
light_analysis.result: 在DreamBench++人类评分上，MaSC的概念保留Krippendorff alpha=0.471，优于所有非LLM基线（如CLIP-I）和GPT-4V，接近GPT-4o。在ORIDa真实照片身份保持基准上，AUC=0.992，几乎完美区分同主体与跨主体对。提示跟随分数也优于DreamBench++自带的CLIP-T基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 空间分解聚合是评估概念驱动生成的有效设计原则。MaSC通过分离主体与背景，在概念保留和提示跟随上均取得更优的人类一致性，具有重要学术和应用价值。未来可探索自动掩码生成以提升实用性。

title: BioFormer: Rethinking Cross-Subject Generalization via Spectral Structural Alignment in Biomedical Time-Series
abstract: Cross-subject generalization in biomedical time-series refers to training on data from some subjects and testing on unseen subjects.The key challenge is to suppress subject specific variability in BTS representations.Most existing methods implicitly suppress the variability through model building or subject adversarial learning, but rarely model it explicitly.We introduce spectral drift as a new perspective to characterize subject specific variability.Specifically, BTS signals under the same label often share consistent oscillatory structure, yet exhibit subject-dependent magnitude or phase shifts in specific frequency components, which we interpret as subject-specific variability. Building on this insight, we propose BioFormer.At its core is a Frequency-Band Alignment Module(FBAM) that generates band-wise modulation factors from the spectral distribution and adaptively adjusts amplitude and phase to align spectral structure, thereby mitigating variability.We further pair FBAM with Sample Conditional Layer Normalization, which infers normalization parameters from intrinsic signal statistics rather than subject identity, stabilizing cross-subject representations.Extensive experiments on six datasets demonstrate that BioFormer outperforms 12 baselines, yielding absolute F1-score improvements of 6%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BioFormer，通过频谱结构对齐和条件归一化，有效缓解生物医学时间序列中的主题特异性变异，实现跨主体泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨主体泛化是生物医学时间序列的关键挑战，现有方法隐式抑制主体特异性变异，缺乏显式建模。论文引入频谱漂移概念，将相同标签信号中依赖主体的幅度或相位偏移作为变异来源，旨在显式对齐频谱结构以提升泛化性能。
light_analysis.method: 核心是频带对齐模块（FBAM），从频谱分布生成逐频带调制因子，自适应调整幅度和相位以对齐光谱结构。配对样本条件层归一化（SCLN），从内在信号统计推断归一化参数，而非主体身份，稳定跨主体表示。在六个数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在六个生物医学时间序列数据集上，BioFormer超越12种基线方法，取得绝对F1分数6%的提升，证明其有效缓解主题特异性变异，提高跨主体泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过显式建模频谱漂移并设计对齐模块，BioFormer显著提升跨主体泛化性能。其学术价值在于揭示了频谱结构对齐的重要性，实际应用可改善各类生物医学信号分析模型。未来可能探索更复杂的频谱变换或扩展至其他时间序列领域。

title: SADGE: Structure and Appearance Domain Gap Estimation of Synthetic and Real Data
abstract: We propose SADGE, a quantitative similarity metric that predicts the performance of synthetic image datasets for common computer vision tasks without downstream model training. Estimating whether a synthetic dataset will lead to a model that performs well on real-world data remains a bottleneck in model development. Existing evaluation metrics (e.g., PSNR, FID, CLIP) primarily measure semantic alignment between real and synthetic images (Appearance Similarity Score). Less commonly, structural similarity between images is considered to assess the domain gap (Geometric Similarity Score). However, to the best of our knowledge there exists no studies that evaluate which similarity metric is the best downstream predictor for a given synthetic dataset. In this paper, we show over a wide variety of different synthetic datasets and downstream tasks that neither appearance nor geometry alone can reliably predict downstream performance; rather, it is their non-linear interplay that dictates synthetic data utility. Specifically, we measure how commonly used Appearance and Geometric Similarity metrics computed between synthetic and real images correlate with downstream performance in object detection, semantic segmentation, and pose estimation. Across five public synthetic-to-real benchmark families and 15 dataset-level variants (79k image pairs), SADGE achieves the strongest association with downstream transfer performance under both linear and rank-based criteria, reaching Pearson r=0.88 and Spearman rho=0.77. We compute for each combination of geometry-based methods and appearance-based approaches SADGE scores across all benchmark families. The best configuration is obtained by fusing DINOv3 appearance similarity with MASt3R geometric consistency through a constrained bilinear interaction, outperforming both the strongest geometry-only baseline and the strongest appearance-only baseline .

light_analysis.overview: 提出SADGE指标，融合外观与几何相似性预测合成数据在下游任务中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 合成图像数据集在计算机视觉中广泛应用，但如何评估其与真实数据的域差距并预测下游性能仍是瓶颈。现有指标如PSNR、FID、CLIP主要关注外观语义对齐，或几何结构相似性，但缺乏综合评估。本文发现单一外观或几何指标均不可靠，需考虑其非线性交互，因此提出SADGE以更好预测下游迁移表现。
light_analysis.method: SADGE通过计算合成与真实图像间多种外观相似性（如DINOv3）和几何一致性（如MASt3R）指标，并使用约束双线性交互融合。在5个公共合成到真实基准家族、15个数据集变体（79k图像对）上评估，针对目标检测、语义分割、姿态估计任务，测量指标与下游性能的相关性。
light_analysis.result: SADGE在线性（Pearson r=0.88）和秩相关（Spearman ρ=0.77）标准下均达到最强关联，显著优于纯外观或纯几何基线。最佳配置为融合DINOv3外观与MASt3R几何一致性的约束双线性交互，性能超越所有单一基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: SADGE提供了一种无需下游训练的合成数据质量定量评估方法，有效预测模型在真实数据上的表现。其融合外观与几何信息的非线性交互思路具有学术价值，可用于合成数据筛选和生成优化。未来可扩展至更多任务和数据集，并探索更优的融合策略。

title: In Silico Modeling of the RAMPHO Buffer: Dissociating Informational and Energetic Masking via Phonetic Entropy in Deep Neural Networks
abstract: The fundamental challenge of listening in multi-talker environments is a cognitive bottleneck, defined by the Ease of Language Understanding (ELU) model as a failure within the RAMPHO episodic buffer. Current deep neural networks for speech enhancement optimize purely for physical acoustics, failing to account for the cognitive penalty of informational masking. Here, we present an in silico simulation of the RAMPHO buffer using the frame-by-frame phonetic entropy of a self-supervised acoustic model (wav2vec 2.0). By contrasting a semantically intact distractor with a phase-decorrelated distractor (the Concentration Shield) across a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) sweep, we successfully dissociate the cognitive penalty of informational distraction from the physical penalty of energetic decay. The simulation reveals a cognitive-acoustic Pareto optimization problem: destroying a distractor's semantic payload provides a release from informational masking at high SNRs, but fundamentally degrades temporal glimpsing cues at low SNRs.

light_analysis.overview: 使用wav2vec2.0的语音熵模拟RAMPHO缓冲区，分离信息与能量掩蔽。
light_analysis.motivation: 多说话人环境中的听力理解存在认知瓶颈，现有深度学习语音增强模型仅优化物理声学，忽略了信息掩蔽带来的认知惩罚。理解这一认知-声学交互对于设计更有效的听觉模型至关重要，但缺乏模拟认知缓冲区的计算框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于wav2vec2.0逐帧语音熵的RAMPHO缓冲区数字孪生。通过对比语义完整干扰与相位去相关干扰（集中屏蔽），在不同信噪比下测量认知惩罚与能量衰减，实现信息掩蔽与能量掩蔽的分离。
light_analysis.result: 揭示了认知-声学Pareto优化问题：高信噪比下破坏干扰语义可降低信息掩蔽，但低信噪比下破坏语义会损害时间窥探线索，导致性能下降。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功在计算机中复现了RAMPHO缓冲区的功能分离，证明语音熵可用于量化认知负荷。为融合认知声学模型的语音处理系统提供了理论基础，未来可扩展至更复杂的听觉场景。

title: From Correlation to Cause: A Five-Stage Methodology for Feature Analysis in Transformer Language Models
abstract: We propose a five-stage methodology for causal feature analysis in transformer language models (probe design, feature extraction, causal validation, robustness testing, and deployment integration) and demonstrate it end-to-end on GPT-2 small performing the Indirect Object Identification (IOI) task. Activation patching recovers the canonical IOI circuit (layer-9 head 9 alone gives recovery +1.02). A sparse autoencoder recovers per-name selective features with effect sizes of 30 to 50 activation units. Causal validation finds these features specifically but only partially causal: ablating fifteen of them leaves the model accurate on 98% of prompts. Two NLA-inspired evaluations strengthen this picture: the fifteen selective features explain only 31% of activation variance versus the SAE's 99.7%, and selectivity ratio anticorrelates with causal force (r = -0.56). Robustness testing under three distribution shifts finds that the circuit transfers cleanly but feature ablation effects degrade substantially, exposing a gap between detection robustness and causal robustness. A cost-based deployment evaluation (assumed $50/FN, $0.42/FP, 2% error rate) finds an optimal monitor configuration yielding $8.96 per 1000 queries against a $1000 baseline, a 99.1% saving. Optimal composition strategy varies with cost ratio and base rate. The conjunction of stages produces findings no single stage would.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一套五阶段因果特征分析方法论，用于Transformer语言模型的特征分析，并在GPT-2 small的间接宾语识别任务上端到端验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有特征分析方法多基于相关性，难以区分特征是否真正因果驱动模型行为。实际应用中，理解模型内部因果机制对可解释性和安全性至关重要。传统方法如探针分析只能揭示相关性，缺乏系统化的因果验证和鲁棒性评估，导致结论可靠性不足。本文旨在弥补这一空白，提供从相关到因果的完整分析框架。
light_analysis.method: 方法包含五个阶段：1）探针设计；2）特征提取（使用稀疏自编码器获得每个名称的选择性特征，效应量30-50激活单位）；3）因果验证（通过激活修补恢复IOI电路，发现层9头9恢复+1.02；消融15个特征后模型在98%提示上正确）；4）鲁棒性测试（三种分布偏移下电路迁移干净但特征消融效果下降）；5）部署整合（成本评估：$50/FN，$0.42/FP，2%错误率，最优监控配置每千次查询$8.96，节省99.1%）。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT-2 small的IOI任务上，因果验证表明选择性特征仅部分因果：消融15个特征后准确率仍达98%。NLA评估显示这些特征仅解释31%激活方差（对比SAE的99.7%），选择性比率与因果力负相关（r=-0.56）。鲁棒性测试发现电路级迁移鲁棒但特征消融效果大幅退化。部署成本模拟实现99.1%节省，且最优组合策略随成本比和基准率变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出并验证了五阶段因果特征分析方法论，展示了从相关性到因果性的系统化流程。该方法在打开Transformer黑箱、提升模型可解释性方面具有重要价值，成本评估表明其可用于实际监控部署。局限性：仅针对GPT-2 small和IOI任务，未来需扩展到更大模型和更多任务；因果验证的完全性仍需进一步研究。

title: KAPPS: A knowledge-based CPPS Architecture for the Circular Factory
abstract: While linear manufacturing relies on homogeneous materials and predefined process sequences, circular manufacturing reintroduces used products with heterogeneous and uncertain conditions. This shift demands manufacturing systems capable of handling variable product states, dynamically reconfigurable processes, and the integration of human and machine knowledge. Conventional manufacturing IT architectures, designed for stable structures and deterministic execution, are unable to meet these requirements, as they cannot adequately represent and manage the uniqueness of individual components at runtime. Following a design science methodology for developing a Cyber Physical Production System for circular manufacturing, we derive 14 requirements from five complementary perspectives. Based on these requirements, we design KAPPS, a knowledge-based architecture that uses an ontology-grounded knowledge graph as a unifying data backbone, combined with a semantic interface layer to enable consistent data and information integration, reasoning, and communication across heterogeneous systems and services, turning the knowledge graph from an integration layer into the factories authoritative write-time state. KAPPS incorporates modules for constraint enforcement and event-driven planning, enabling incremental adaptation of execution plans under uncertainty and human-machine knowledge exchange. The applicability of KAPPS is demonstrated through two implemented use cases: (i) Anomaly detection and learning through knowledge graph mediated services and (ii) runtime constraint enforcement in a modular conveyor system. Subsequently, the architecture is evaluated against the 14 requirements (ed. abstract shortened)
comment: Submitted to Journal of Manufacturing Systems (JMS)

light_analysis.overview: 提出KAPPS架构，一种基于知识图谱的CPPS架构，用于支持循环制造中的不确定性和可重构性。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性制造依赖同质材料和预定义流程，而循环制造面临异质、不确定的回收产品状态。传统制造IT架构无法处理运行时组件的独特性，缺乏动态适应和知识集成能力。需要新架构实现人与机器的知识交换、动态规划及一致性集成。
light_analysis.method: 通过设计科学研究，从五个视角推导14项需求。设计KAPPS架构，核心是本体知识图谱作为统一数据骨干，结合语义接口层实现跨系统集成与推理。包含约束执行和事件驱动规划模块，支持增量调整执行计划和知识图谱的写时状态。
light_analysis.result: 通过两个用例验证：1）基于知识图谱的异常检测与学习；2）模块化输送系统的运行时约束执行。架构满足所有14项需求，展示了在不确定条件下实现知识交换和自适应规划的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: KAPPS为循环制造提供知识驱动的CPPS架构，有效处理异质产品状态和动态流程。学术上贡献了需求驱动的设计方法，实际应用上支持工厂的可持续性。未来可扩展知识图谱的推理能力及更多工业场景。

title: Making the Discrete Continuous: Synthetic RAW Augmentations for Fine-Grained Evaluation of Person Detection Performance in Low Light
abstract: Real-world deployment of AI vision models is both fueled and limited by the data available for training and testing. Real datasets are sparse and uneven: long-tailed or unbalanced distributions hinder generalization, and the low number of samples in low density regions makes it hard to run evaluations. Synthetic data can fill these gaps, providing us with a way to sample the input space more continuously and improve data coverage for benchmarks. Focusing on the autonomous driving safety-critical case of pedestrian detection in the dark, we show how synthetic low-light samples can be used to better characterize the performance of a state-of-the-art object detection model as a function of the scene illumination. We use a synthetic RAW image augmentation technique to generate low-light samples that match the noise model of the camera sensor. Performance metrics on real and synthetic low-light data are similar, indicating that the AI model finds it hard to distinguish between them.
comment: Accepted non-archival paper at the CVPR 2026 AUTOPILOT Workshop (Autonomous Understanding Through Open-world Perception and Integrated Language Models for On-road Tasks)

light_analysis.overview: 使用合成RAW图像增强技术生成低光照样本，实现行人检测模型的细粒度性能评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实数据集在低光照区域样本稀疏且分布不均，导致难以评估模型在低光下的性能。传统数据增强无法覆盖连续光照变化，而合成数据可以填补这一空白，提供更连续的输入空间采样，从而改善基准测试的数据覆盖。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种合成RAW图像增强方法，通过匹配相机传感器噪声模型生成低光照样本。在自动驾驶行人检测场景中，使用该技术对SOTA目标检测模型进行光照依赖的性能表征，生成不同光照条件下的测试数据。
light_analysis.result: 在真实低光照数据和合成低光照数据上，模型性能指标（如mAP）相似，表明AI模型难以区分真实与合成数据。该方法能有效揭示模型性能随光照变化的规律，验证了合成数据的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 合成RAW增强技术可以连续采样光照空间，为低光照行人检测提供细粒度评估。该方法有助于发现模型在黑暗环境下的性能瓶颈，对自动驾驶安全至关重要。未来可扩展至其他感知任务及传感器噪声建模。

title: Don't Forget the Critic: Value-Based Data Rehearsal for Multi-Cyclic Continual Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Data rehearsal has emerged as a leading approach for mitigating catastrophic forgetting in Continual Reinforcement Learning (CRL). However, existing work remains confined to policy gradient frameworks, regularizing only actors due to the performance degradation incurred by critic regularization. This actor-centric approach overlooks the potential of data rehearsal for value function approximation. Moreover, existing evaluations in CRL rarely consider multi-cyclic environments where task sequences repeat, a critical real-world scenario that exacerbates forgetting and plasticity. We investigate data rehearsal for Deep Q-Networks using Q-value regularization in multi-cyclic settings and propose Qreg+NWLU which introduces two simple modifications: (1) continuous data rehearsal that dynamically collects and updates stored Q-values throughout training, and (2) "No-Wait" regularization that applies immediately rather than after the first task. Together, these modifications yield improvements in learning efficiency, forgetting mitigation, and knowledge transfer over Qreg and conventional CRL methods within value function approximation settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Qreg+NWLU方法，通过连续数据重放和即时正则化增强多周期连续强化学习中值函数的数据重放效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有连续强化学习的数据重放主要针对策略梯度方法，仅对actor正则化，忽略了值函数逼近的潜力。同时，现有评估很少考虑任务重复的多周期环境，这种场景加剧了灾难性遗忘和塑性损失。因此，需要研究值函数框架下的数据重放方法以应对这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 基于Deep Q-Networks，提出Qreg+NWLU方法，包括两个关键修改：(1) 连续数据重放，在训练过程中动态收集并更新存储的Q值；(2) No-Wait正则化，立即应用正则化而非等待第一个任务完成。这些简单修改旨在提升学习效率、缓解遗忘并促进知识迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在值函数逼近设置下，Qreg+NWLU相比Qreg和传统连续强化学习方法，在学习效率、遗忘缓解和知识迁移方面均有改进。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确指出了性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文强调了值函数数据重放在连续强化学习中的重要性，特别适用于多周期场景。提出的Qreg+NWLU通过简单有效的修改，能够显著提升CRL的性能。未来工作可进一步探索其他值函数架构或更复杂的环境设置。

title: S2ED: From Story to Executable Descriptions for Consistency-Aware Story Illustration
abstract: Multi-frame story illustration requires long-horizon coherence beyond single-image text-to-image generation, including narrative decomposition and persistent character identity, layout, and affect across frames. We propose Story-to-Executable Descriptions (S2ED), a training-free, model-agnostic, prompt-layer framework that converts a full story into a sequence of explicit, editable executable descriptions for more consistent rendering. S2ED coordinates three agents to segment the narrative, ground canonical character attributes, and enrich spatial and affective cues, enabling interpretable prompt-carried state propagation and local edits to repair drift without retraining the generator. Experiments on Flintstones and Shakoo Maku show that S2ED improves sequence-level consistency and character fidelity over strong prompting, large-model planning, and a reference training-based method, under both automatic metrics and human judgments. We also deploy S2ED in an end-to-end story-to-storybook system for children's illustrated stories, with a supplementary video.
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted by IEEE ICME 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出S2ED框架，通过可执行描述实现故事插图的多帧一致性，无需训练且模型无关。
light_analysis.motivation: 多帧故事插图需要跨帧的长期连贯性，包括叙事分解、角色身份、布局和情感的一致性。现有单图生成方法无法保证序列一致性，而训练方法成本高且不灵活。S2ED旨在解决无需重训练即可实现连贯故事插图的问题，通过可编辑的执行描述增强控制力。
light_analysis.method: S2ED是提示层框架，协调三个代理：叙事分割、标准角色属性提取、空间与情感线索丰富。它将完整故事转换为显式可编辑的执行描述序列，支持状态传播和局部编辑以修复漂移，无需训练生成器。方法兼容任意生成模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Flintstones和Shakoo Maku数据集上，S2ED在序列一致性和角色保真度上优于强提示、大模型规划和基于参考训练的方法，自动指标和人工评判均支持。端到端故事书系统部署验证了实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: S2ED提供了训练免费、模型无关的解决方案，显著提升多帧故事插图的一致性。学术贡献在于可解释的提示级状态传播，实际应用可扩展至儿童图书自动生成。未来或需处理更复杂叙事及长视频场景。

title: Cohesion-6K: An Arabic Dataset for Analyzing Social Cohesion and Conflict in Online Discourse
abstract: The study of online discourse has become central to understanding societal polarization. While much research has focused on detecting overt toxicity, the subtle dynamics of social cohesion, meaning the interaction between divisive and unifying narratives, remain computationally underexplored (Bail, 2021; Gonzalez-Bailon and Lelkes, 2023). This paper presents Cohesion-6K, a manually and ChatGPT-assisted annotated dataset of six thousand Arabic public Facebook posts related to the Israeli Occupation of Palestine. Each post is assigned to one of five discourse categories that represent a continuum from conflict to cohesion: Conflict, Resolution, Community Engagement, Supportive Interactions, and Shared Values. The annotation process combines expert human judgment with model-assisted pre-labeling verified by trained annotators, achieving substantial inter-annotator agreement (Cohens kappa = 0.85). Quantitative analysis reveals a consistent engagement gap, where conflict-oriented posts receive between two and four times more user interaction than resolution-oriented ones (p < 0.01). This pattern illustrates how divisive discourse tends to attract disproportionate visibility in Arabic social media spaces. Cohesion-6K provides a transparent and reproducible resource for the study of online cohesion and polarization. The dataset, annotation guidelines, and preprocessing code will be released for research use under an open license, supporting future work in computational social science, digital communication, and Arabic natural language processing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Cohesion-6K阿拉伯语数据集，用于分析在线话语中的社会凝聚力与冲突，填补该领域计算研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦检测明显毒性话语，忽略社会凝聚力的微妙动态，即分裂与团结叙事间的相互作用。理解在线极化需分析从冲突到凝聚力的连续谱系，但目前缺乏相应数据集与计算资源，尤其针对阿拉伯语社交媒体。本研究旨在提供标注精细、一致性可靠的数据集，促进计算社会科学与阿拉伯语自然语言处理研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建Cohesion-6K数据集，含6000条阿拉伯语Facebook帖子，通过手动和ChatGPT辅助标注。每条帖子分为五类：冲突、解决、社区参与、支持性互动、共享价值。结合专家人工判断与模型预标注，训练有素标注者验证，达成Cohen's kappa=0.85。数据集、标注指南与预处理代码将开放。
light_analysis.result: 定量分析揭示一致参与差距：冲突导向帖子获用户互动是解决导向帖子的2-4倍（p<0.01），表明阿拉伯语社交媒体中分裂性话语获不成比例可见度。高标注一致性（kappa=0.85）验证质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: Cohesion-6K为分析在线社会凝聚力与极化提供透明、可复用资源，支持计算社会科学、数字传播与阿拉伯语自然语言处理研究。公开数据集促进未来工作；潜在局限性为领域特定（巴以冲突），但框架可迁移。

title: Pre-VLA: Preemptive Runtime Verification for Reliable Vision-Language-Action and World-Model Rollouts
abstract: While large vision-language-action (VLA) models and generative world models (WM) have advanced long-horizon embodied intelligence, their practical deployment remains challenged by uncertainty in learning-based action generation. Low-quality actions may cause physical failures during execution or lead to misleading world-model rollouts with redundant rendering costs. To address this issue, we propose Pre-VLA, a unified runtime verification architecture that performs preemptive action validity assessment before physical execution or world-model imagination. Pre-VLA leverages an efficient multimodal backbone with modality-aware pooling and a lightweight dual-branch head to predict both safety confidence and critic-derived advantage scores for candidate action chunks. To handle severe class imbalance and unstable boundary decisions, we train Pre-VLA with a multi-task objective combining Focal classification, advantage regression, and soft-threshold calibration. During deployment, a dual-mode preemptive resampling scheduler filters low-quality actions and triggers adaptive resampling under a limited computation budget. Experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that Pre-VLA improves the average closed-loop success rate across four suites from 30.79\% to 37.62\% over RynnVLA-002, reduces task execution steps, achieves 183.9 ms average forward verification time per action chunk, and mitigates error accumulation in world-model rollouts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Pre-VLA，一种先发制人的运行时验证架构，在物理执行或世界模型想象前评估动作有效性，提升VLA模型可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: VLA和世界模型在长程具身智能中因动作生成的不确定性导致执行失败或误导性模型展开，且冗余渲染成本高。现有方法缺乏运行时验证，无法提前过滤低质量动作，限制了实际部署。
light_analysis.method: Pre-VLA利用高效多模态骨干（含模态感知池化）和轻量双分支头，预测安全置信度及critic优势分数。训练采用多任务损失：Focal分类、优势回归、软阈值校准。部署时，双模式重采样调度器在有限计算预算下过滤低质动作并自适应重采样。
light_analysis.result: 在LIBERO基准上，Pre-VLA将平均闭环成功率从30.79%提升至37.62%（相对RynnVLA-002），减少任务执行步骤，每个动作块平均验证时间183.9ms，并显著缓解了世界模型展开中的错误累积。
light_analysis.conclusion: Pre-VLA通过运行时验证有效提升VLA和世界模型的可靠性与效率。其先发制人机制为具身智能安全部署提供新思路，未来可扩展到更多模态和实时系统，但依赖预定义阈值。

title: Assisted Counterspeech Writing at the Crossroads of Hate Speech and Misinformation
abstract: Hate speech and misinformation frequently co-occur online, amplifying prejudice and polarization. Given their scale, using Large Language Models (LLMs) to assist expert counterspeech (CS) writing has gained interest, yet prior work has addressed these phenomena separately. We bridge this gap by studying CS generation in contexts where both hate and misinformation co-occur. We test three knowledge-driven generation strategies: first we prompt an LLM with fact-checkers' guidelines and fact-checking articles; secondly, with NGOs' guidelines and reports; thirdly, we create a mixed strategy that combines guidelines and documents from both. 23 experts revise the generated CS, which are assessed via human and automatic metrics. While LLMs produce adequate CS in 40% of cases, expert edits substantially improve naturalness, exhaustiveness, and adherence to guidelines. Based on the post-edited CS, the mixed strategy proves to be the most effective in crowdsourcing evaluation, pairing strong factual correction with stereotype mitigation and empathetic engagement. We release a dataset of hateful and misinformed claims with expert-verified CS and supporting knowledge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出在仇恨言论与虚假信息共存场景下，利用大语言模型辅助专家撰写反言论的混合知识驱动策略，并发布相应数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 仇恨言论和虚假信息经常在线共存，加剧偏见和极化。由于数量庞大，使用大语言模型辅助专家编写反言论（CS）受到关注，但先前研究将两者分开处理。本文填补这一空白，研究在两者同时出现时的CS生成问题，旨在提供更有效的应对方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种知识驱动生成策略：1）用事实核查指南和文章提示LLM；2）用非政府组织指南和报告；3）混合策略结合两者。23位专家修订生成的CS，通过人工和自动指标评估。基于修订后的CS，混合策略在众包评估中表现最佳。同时发布包含仇恨与虚假信息的声明及专家验证的CS和支持知识的数据集。
light_analysis.result: LLM在40%的情况下生成适当的CS，专家编辑显著提高了自然性、详尽性和指南遵从性。在众包评估中，混合策略最有效，将强事实纠正与刻板印象缓解和共情参与相结合，优于单独使用事实核查或NGO指南。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次在仇恨与虚假信息共存情境下研究CS生成，提出的混合策略有效结合事实纠正与共情，释放的数据集有助于后续研究。未来可探索减少对专家修订的依赖，并验证方法在不同语言和文化中的适用性。

title: AMUSE: Anytime Muon with Stable Gradient Evaluation
abstract: Modern deep learning commonly relies on AdamW with prescribed learning rate schedules, but recent works challenge both components: Schedule-Free optimization removes explicit schedules via iterate averaging, and Muon improves the update geometry by orthogonalizing momentum for matrix parameters. Despite Muon's strong empirical performance, its underlying mechanism remains partially understood. We study Muon through the river-valley loss landscape, where useful training progress occurs along a flat, low-curvature bulk subspace (the river), while high-curvature dominant directions form steep valley walls that induce oscillations. We empirically show that while Muon's orthogonalization accelerates river progress by increasing the bulk component, it also amplifies dominant-direction noise, causing oscillatory trajectories. Building on this, we propose Anytime MUon with Stable gradient Evaluation (AMUSE), which integrates Muon's rapid bulk progress with the stabilizing effect of Schedule-Free averaging. AMUSE uses a time-varying interpolation coefficient that initially evaluates gradients near the fast Muon sequence for rapid adaptation, then gradually shifts toward the stable averaged sequence to suppress valley-wall oscillations. As a result, AMUSE requires no learning rate schedules and supports anytime training. Across vision tasks and large language model pretraining, AMUSE consistently improves the performance-iteration Pareto frontier over (Schedule-Free) AdamW and Muon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AMUSE优化器，结合Muon的快速进度与Schedule-Free的稳定性，无需学习率调度，提升性能-迭代帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代深度学习常依赖AdamW和预设学习率调度，但近期工作挑战了这两个组件。Muon优化器通过正交化矩阵参数动量改善了更新几何，表现优异但机制理解有限。研究发现Muon在河谷损失景观中加速了平坦子空间的进度，但放大了主导方向噪声，导致振荡轨迹。因此需要一种方法既能保持Muon的快速进展，又能抑制振荡。
light_analysis.method: AMUSE（随时Muon与稳定梯度评估）通过时变插值系数，初期评估靠近快速Muon序列的梯度以实现快速适应，随后逐渐转向稳定的平均序列以抑制谷壁振荡。该方法无需学习率调度，支持随时训练。核心创新在于利用河-谷损失景观的见解，融合了Muon的正交化与Schedule-Free的迭代平均。
light_analysis.result: 在视觉任务和大语言模型预训练中，AMUSE一致地改进了（Schedule-Free）AdamW和Muon的性能-迭代帕累托前沿。具体性能提升指标未明确说明，但表明在相同迭代次数下获得更好性能，或达到相同性能需更少迭代。与基线方法相比，AMUSE在效率和效果上均有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: AMUSE通过理论驱动的设计解决了Muon优化器的振荡问题，实现了无需学习率调度的稳定训练。其学术价值在于深化了对Muon机制的理解并提出了有效改进，实际应用价值在于可简化训练流程并提升模型性能。局限性可能包括对特定损失景观的依赖，未来可探索更广泛的适用性。

title: Moment-Reenacting: Inverse Motion Degradation with Cross-shutter Guidance
