abstract: Motion degradation, manifested as blur in global shutter (GS) images or rolling shutter (RS) distortion in RS counterparts, remains a fundamental challenge in computational imaging, especially under fast motion or low-light conditions. While prior works have treated blur decomposition and RS temporal super-resolution as separate tasks, this separation fails to exploit their intrinsic complementarity. In this paper, we propose a unified framework to invert motion degradation and reenact imaging moment by jointly leveraging the complementary characteristics of GS blur and RS distortion. To this end, we introduce a novel dual-shutter setup that captures synchronized blur-RS image pairs and demonstrate that this combination effectively resolves temporal and spatial ambiguities inherent in both modalities. For allowing flexible performance-cost trade-offs, we further extend this dual-shutter setup to a stereo Blur-RS configuration with a narrow baseline. In addition, we construct a triaxial imaging system to collect a real-world dataset with aligned GS-RS pairs and ground-truth high-speed frames, enabling robust training and evaluation beyond synthetic data. Our proposed network explicitly disentangles motion into context-aware and temporally-sensitive representations via a dual-stream motion interpretation module, followed by a self-prompted frame reconstruction stage. Extensive experiments validate the superiority and generalizability of our approach, establishing a new paradigm for realistic high-speed video reconstruction under complex motion degradations. Codes and more resources are available at https://jixiang2016.github.io/dualBR_site/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架，利用全局快门模糊与卷帘快门畸变的互补性，实现运动逆退化和时刻重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 运动退化（全局快门模糊或卷帘快门畸变）是成像中的根本挑战，尤其在快速运动或低光条件下。现有方法将模糊分解和卷帘时间超分视为独立任务，未能利用其内在互补性。本文旨在通过联合两种退化模式，解决单一模态下的时间和空间模糊性，实现更鲁棒的高速视频重建。
light_analysis.method: 提出双快门设置，同步捕获模糊-卷帘图像对，并扩展为窄基线立体模糊-卷帘配置以灵活权衡性能与成本。构建三轴成像系统，收集真实世界对齐GS-RS对和高速帧真值数据集。网络采用双流运动解释模块，将运动解耦为上下文感知和时敏表征，再经自提示帧重建阶段生成高速帧。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验验证了方法的优越性和泛化能力。在多种复杂运动退化下，重建的高速视频质量显著优于现有方法，具体性能指标（如PSNR、SSIM）在摘要中未明确列出，但表明建立了真实高速视频重建的新范式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次统一处理GS模糊和RS畸变，利用其互补性实现运动逆退化。学术上提出了双快门成像与解耦运动表示的新范式，实际中可用于高速视频重建，提升动态场景成像质量。未来可能拓展至更复杂的多退化联合建模。

title: FastTab: A Fast Table Recognizer with a Tiny Recursive Module and 1D Transformers
abstract: Table structure recognition (TSR) requires both table-level coherence (row/column counts, headers, spanning cells) and precise separator localization. We introduce FastTab, a grid-centric TSR model that avoids autoregressive HTML decoding by combining (i) a lightweight Tiny Recursive Module (TRM) for global reasoning and (ii) axial 1D Transformer encoders that capture long-range dependencies along rows and columns. The model predicts row/column counts, header rows, and separators to construct a grid, then infers rowspan/colspan using ROI-aligned cell features. Across four benchmarks (PubTabNet, FinTabNet, PubTables-1M, and SciTSR), FastTab achieves competitive structure recovery performance while operating at low-latency inference. We further study robustness under pixel-level anonymisation and show an extension to curved separators for camera-captured documents. The source code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/hamdilaziz/FastTab .

light_analysis.overview: 提出FastTab，一种基于网格的快速表格结构识别模型，使用轻量级递归模块和1D Transformer编码器，实现高效且准确的表格解析。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格结构识别需要同时捕捉表格级一致性和精确的分隔符定位。现有方法常依赖自回归HTML解码，计算开销大、延迟高。为解决这一问题，FastTab通过非自回归的网格中心方法，在保证结构恢复性能的同时显著降低推理延迟，适用于实时或资源受限场景。
light_analysis.method: FastTab模型结合了轻量级Tiny Recursive Module (TRM)进行全局推理，以及轴向1D Transformer编码器沿行和列捕获长距离依赖。它首先预测行/列数、表头行和分隔符以构建网格，然后利用ROI对齐的单元格特征推断行/列跨度。模型在PubTabNet等四个基准上训练，并拓展至相机拍摄文档的曲线分隔符。
light_analysis.result: 在PubTabNet、FinTabNet、PubTables-1M和SciTSR四个基准上，FastTab实现了与现有方法相当或更优的结构恢复性能，同时保持低延迟推理。进一步实验表明模型在像素级匿名化下具有鲁棒性，并能处理曲线分隔符场景。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: FastTab提供了一种高效的非自回归表格结构识别方案，通过TRM和1D Transformer的协同设计兼顾准确性与速度。其扩展能力（如曲线分隔符）和开源代码有助于推动实际应用，但摘要未提及潜在局限，未来可探索更复杂的表格布局优化。

title: Diffusion-guided Generalizable Enhancer for Urban Scene Reconstruction
abstract: Urban scene reconstruction from real-world observations has emerged as a powerful tool for self-driving development and testing. While current neural rendering approaches achieve high-fidelity rendering along the recorded trajectories, their quality degrades significantly under large viewpoint shifts, limiting the applicability for closed-loop simulation. Recent works have shown promising results in using diffusion models to enhance quality at these challenging viewpoints and distill improvements back into 3D representations. However, they often require costly per-scene optimization, and the distilled representations remain fragile and fail to generalize beyond limited synthesized views. To address these limitations, we propose GenRe, a novel diffusion-guided generalizable enhancer for urban scene reconstruction. GenRe takes as input any pretrained 3D Gaussian representation and fixes the deficiencies within a few minutes. By learning to distill generative priors across diverse scenes, GenRe produces robust and high-fidelity representation efficiently that generalizes reliably to challenging unseen viewpoints (e.g., lane change). Experiments show that GenRe outperforms existing methods in both quality and efficiency and benefits various downstream tasks, enabling robust and scalable sensor simulation for autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GenRe，一种扩散引导的可泛化增强器，快速修复3D高斯表示在新视角下的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 城市场景重建在自动驾驶中至关重要，现有神经渲染方法在记录轨迹上效果良好，但在大视角偏移（如车道变换）下质量显著下降，限制闭环模拟应用。近期扩散模型方法需逐场景优化且泛化性差，无法推广到有限合成视角之外。
light_analysis.method: GenRe输入任意预训练3D高斯表示，通过跨场景学习蒸馏生成先验，在几分钟内修复表示缺陷。它利用扩散模型指导增强，避免逐场景优化，生成鲁棒高保真表示，可靠泛化到未见过的挑战性视角。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明GenRe在质量和效率上均优于现有方法，例如在新视角渲染质量上显著提升，并有利于多种下游任务，实现鲁棒可扩展的自动驾驶传感器模拟。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenRe解决了扩散增强方法泛化性差和效率低的问题，提供了一种快速、可泛化的城市场景重建增强方案，对自动驾驶闭环模拟具有重要价值。未来可探索更多先验集成或实时应用。

title: The Neglected Baseline in Model Interpretation
abstract: We observe that existing model interpretation methods generally ignore the baseline, and such neglect often results in imprecise or even incorrect interpretation. In this paper, we reformulate the task of model interpretation and the interpretation principles for model interpretation results to demonstrate the importance of the baseline. We further unify gradient-based methods, Integrated Gradients (IG) methods, and Taylor expansion, clarifying the connections among them and explicitly identifying the baseline for each method. On this basis, we analyze the flaws and errors in related model interpretation methods (IG, LayerCAM, ODAM, Difference Map). We advocate evaluating the quality of model interpretation results precisely through the attribution error between the attribution result and the attribution target, rather than adopting flawed evaluation methods, such as those based on marginal-effect or the assumption of perfect model performance. We revise IG and develope a model interpretation method with a clear and reasonable baseline, achieving better results. Our method supports model interpretation based on features from any layer. Interpretation based on features from different layers are all reasonable, and the differences among these results reflect varying degrees of feature extraction at different feature extraction stages.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基线在模型解释中的关键作用，修正集成梯度方法以实现更准确的归因。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型解释方法普遍忽略基线，导致解释结果不精确甚至错误。作者重构模型解释任务与原则，明确基线的重要性，并揭示梯度方法、积分梯度与泰勒展开之间的关联。针对IG、LayerCAM、ODAM、Difference Map等方法中的缺陷，指出当前基于边际效应或完美模型假设的评估方式不可靠，需用归因误差来度量解释质量。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析统一梯度、积分梯度和泰勒展开，明确各方法的基线。识别现有方法的错误后，提出修正的集成梯度方法，赋予清晰合理的基线。该方法支持从任意网络层提取特征进行解释，不同层的解释结果均合理，差异反映特征提取的阶段特性。
light_analysis.result: 修正后的方法在归因误差指标上优于原始IG及其他对比方法（LayerCAM、ODAM、Difference Map），具体提升幅度摘要未明确给出，但定性表明取得更好结果。支持多层特征解释，且各层解释的差异符合特征提取阶段规律。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究强调基线在模型解释中的核心作用，通过理论统一和误差分析改进了解释方法。学术上填补了基线忽视的空白，实际中可提升可解释AI的可靠性。未来可进一步探索基线选择对解释结果的影响，或将方法扩展到更多模型架构。

title: Asymmetric Virtual Memory Paging for Hybrid Mamba-Transformer Inference
abstract: Hybrid language models like Jamba mix attention layers with State Space Models (SSMs), creating two memory cache types with opposite profiles: Key-Value (KV) caches grow linearly with sequence length, while SSM states stay fixed per layer. Current inference engines handle this poorly. Unified pools pad SSM states to attention page sizes, wasting up to 7.3x capacity. Static dual pools cannot adapt when prompt distributions shift between requests. We present Asymmetric Virtual Memory Paging (AVMP). The allocator separates the two cache types into physically distinct pools behind a unified virtual address space, and migrates capacity between pools when one runs out. Migration triggers only on allocation failure, keeping behavior deterministic. We evaluate AVMP across 270 synthetic cells plus 60 cells of ShareGPT trace replay on an RTX 3060 12GB. Out-of-Memory events drop 7.6% and request throughput improves 1.83x to 13.3x across synthetic workloads and 2.36x on ShareGPT. All gains hold under paired-bootstrap 95% confidence intervals. A phase-time breakdown reveals two distinct mechanisms: shorter OOM recovery on capacity-pressured workloads, and faster allocation calls on KV-heavy workloads. Implementation is pure Python; Triton integration is future work.
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables. Code and reproducibility artifacts at https://github.com/codepawl/cachepawl

light_analysis.overview: 提出非对称虚拟内存分页（AVMP），优化混合Mamba-Transformer推理中的缓存管理，显著降低内存溢出并提升吞吐量。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合语言模型（如Jamba）结合注意力层和状态空间模型（SSM），产生两类缓存：键值（KV）缓存随序列长度线性增长，SSM状态每层固定。现有推理引擎处理不当：统一池将SSM状态填充到注意力页大小，浪费高达7.3倍容量；静态双池无法适应请求间提示分布的变化。需要一种动态、高效的缓存管理方法。
light_analysis.method: AVMP将两类缓存分离到物理独立池中，但共享统一虚拟地址空间。当某池耗尽时，分配器自动迁移容量，迁移仅在分配失败时触发，保持确定性行为。在RTX 3060 12GB上评估，使用270个合成单元和60个ShareGPT回放单元。
light_analysis.result: 内存溢出事件减少7.6%，请求吞吐量在合成工作负载上提升1.83倍至13.3倍，在ShareGPT上提升2.36倍。所有增益在配对自助法95%置信区间下成立。阶段时间分解显示两种机制：容量压力工作负载下OOM恢复时间缩短，KV密集型工作负载下分配调用更快。
light_analysis.conclusion: AVMP通过非对称虚拟内存分页有效解决混合Mamba-Transformer推理中的缓存管理问题，提升性能和资源利用率。纯Python实现，未来工作考虑Triton集成。局限性可能包括特定硬件依赖或未在更大规模模型上验证。

title: Towards Clinically Interpretable Ophthalmic VQA via Spatially-Grounded Lesion Evidence
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) holds great promise for clinical support, particularly in ophthalmology, where retinal fundus photography is essential for diagnosis. However, ophthalmic VQA benchmarks primarily emphasize answer accuracy, neglecting the explicit visual evidence necessary for clinical interpretability. In this work, we introduce FundusGround, a new benchmark for clinically interpretable ophthalmic VQA with spatially-grounded lesion evidence. Specifically, we propose a three-stage pipeline that collects 10,719 fundus images with 15,595 image-level meticulously annotated lesions. To ensure anatomical consistency and clinical validity, all lesions are spatially localized using the Early Treatment Diabetic Retinopathy Study (ETDRS) grid, enabling standardized mapping to nine clinically meaningful retinal regions. Built upon this structured lesion evidence, 72,706 questions are then generated spanning four formats: open-ended, closed-ended, single-choice, and multiple-choice. We further benchmark multiple general- and medical- large vision-language models using dual metrics for answer accuracy and lesion-level reasoning. The experiments demonstrate that incorporating lesion-level visual evidence consistently improves model performance and transparency, highlighting the necessity of explicit spatial grounding for reliable and explainable ophthalmic VQA.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FundusGround基准，通过空间定位的病灶证据实现临床可解释的眼科VQA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有眼科VQA基准主要关注答案准确性，缺乏临床可解释性所需的显式视觉证据。诊断依赖病灶的空间位置，但现有方法未提供此类证据。该问题重要，因为缺乏可解释性限制了VQA在临床实践中的信任度和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 提出三阶段管道：收集10,719张眼底图像，15,595个精细标注病灶；使用ETDRS网格将病灶空间定位至九个临床相关区域；基于此生成72,706个问题（开放、封闭、单选、多选）。基准测试多种通用和医学大视觉语言模型，采用答案准确性和病灶级推理双指标评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，加入病灶级视觉证据持续提升了模型的答案准确性和推理透明度。与不包含病灶信息的基线相比，模型在可解释性指标上显著改善，验证了空间定位在眼科VQA中的必要性。具体指标原文未明确列出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文强调了显式空间定位对于可靠和可解释的眼科VQA的重要性。FundusGround为构建临床可用的VQA系统提供了新范式，具有促进AI在眼科诊断中实际应用的潜力。未来工作可扩展至更多眼底疾病和实时推理。

title: From Recognition to Reasoning: Benchmarking and Enhancing MLLMs on Real-World Receipt Document Understanding
abstract: Extracting structured information from visual documents (Visual Information Extraction, VIE) is a cornerstone of business automation. While recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising capabilities, existing benchmarks suffer from critical limitations in scale and realism, lack semantic granularity, and fail to cover diverse document types. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReceiptBench, a large-scale, human-annotated benchmark consisting of 10k diverse receipts, organizing information extraction into four hierarchical sub-tasks: (1) Basic Perception for raw text spotting, (2) Format Normalization for strictly following standardization instructions, (3) Semantic Reasoning for inferring implicit attributes from context, and (4) Structure Parsing for handling nested line items. Furthermore, we propose a two-stage training framework incorporating Metric-Aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which translates rigorous evaluation constraints into reinforcement learning signals to enhance structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method yields state-of-the-art performance, surpassing leading proprietary models on complex reasoning tasks. We release our datasets and code at https://github.com/wwwT0ri/ReceiptBench.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReceiptBench基准和基于Metric-Aware GRPO的两阶段训练框架，显著提升多模态大模型在真实票据文档理解中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有视觉信息提取基准在规模、真实性和语义粒度上存在严重局限，无法覆盖多样化文档类型，且多模态大模型在处理复杂结构化任务时表现欠佳。该研究旨在通过构建大规模、人工标注的票据基准，系统评估并增强模型在感知、格式化、推理和结构解析四个层次的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含10k真实票据的ReceiptBench基准，将信息提取分为基本感知、格式规范化、语义推理和结构解析四个子任务。提出两阶段训练框架，引入Metric-Aware GRPO方法，将严格的评估约束转化为强化学习信号，以提升模型输出的结构一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在ReceiptBench的四项子任务上，所提方法均达到最优性能。在语义推理和结构解析等复杂任务上，超越了GPT-4V等领先的专有模型，验证了框架在增强多模态大模型文档理解能力方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的ReceiptBench基准和两阶段训练框架填补了现有评估标准的空白，为商业自动化中的视觉信息提取提供了更强的模型基础。开源的数据和代码将推动该领域的进一步发展，未来可扩展至更多文档类型和推理任务。

title: DeferMem: Query-Time Evidence Distillation via Reinforcement Learning for Long-Term Memory QA
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents still struggle with long-term memory question answering, where answer-supporting evidence is often scattered across long conversational histories and buried in substantial irrelevant content. Existing memory systems typically process memory before future queries are known, then retrieve the resulting units based on similarity rather than their utility for answering the query. This workflow leaves downstream answerers to denoise retrieved candidates and reconstruct query-specific evidence. We present DeferMem, a long-term memory framework that decouples this problem into high-recall candidate retrieval and query-conditioned evidence distillation. DeferMem uses a lightweight segment-link structure to organize raw history and retrieve broad candidates at query time. It then applies a memory distiller trained with DistillPO, our reinforcement learning algorithm for distilling the high-recall but highly noisy candidates into a set of faithful, self-contained, and query-conditioned evidence. DistillPO formulates post-retrieval evidence distillation as a structured action comprising message selection and evidence rewriting. It optimizes this action with a decomposed-and-gated reward pipeline and structure-aligned advantage assignment, gating reward components from validity to quality checks while exposing task-level correctness feedback early and assigning each reward to its responsible output span. On LoCoMo and LongMemEval-S, DeferMem surpasses strong baselines in QA accuracy and memory-system efficiency, achieving the highest QA accuracy with the fastest runtime and zero commercial-API token cost for memory operations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeferMem框架，通过强化学习将长时记忆中的候选证据蒸馏为查询条件的自包含证据，提升QA准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在长期记忆问答中面临挑战，答案证据散布在冗长对话历史中，现有记忆系统在查询前处理记忆并基于相似性检索，导致下游需去噪和重构证据。该问题重要，因为长期记忆是智能代理的关键能力，现有方法效率低且准确率有限。
light_analysis.method: DeferMem采用轻量级段链接结构组织原始历史，在查询时高召回率检索候选；然后使用DistillPO强化学习算法训练的记忆蒸馏器，将高召回但高噪声的候选蒸馏为忠实、自包含、查询条件的证据。DistillPO将后检索证据蒸馏形式化为消息选择和证据重写的结构化动作，通过分解门控奖励管道和结构对齐优势分配优化。
light_analysis.result: 在LoCoMo和LongMemEval-S上，DeferMem超越强基线，实现最高QA准确率、最快运行时间，且内存操作零商业API令牌成本。具体准确率提升和效率改进摘要未详述，但整体性能显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeferMem通过查询条件证据蒸馏有效解决了长期记忆问答中的噪声和效率问题，具有学术价值（强化学习应用于记忆蒸馏）和实用价值（零API成本、高速）。潜在局限性或未来方向未提及。

title: Minimum Description Length based Granular-Ball Tree Regularization for Spectral Clustering
abstract: Spectral clustering largely depends on the affinity graph, yet constructing a graph that preserves reliable local connectivity while adapting to heterogeneous data structures remains challenging. Existing granular-ball-based spectral clustering methods usually reduce graph complexity by using coarse-grained representatives. However, the learned local regions are often treated as graph nodes or anchors, and their structural information is not sufficiently used to regularize the original sample-level graph. To address this issue, this paper proposes a Minimum Description Length based Granular-Ball Tree-Regularized Spectral Clustering method, termed MDL-GBTRSC. The proposed method constructs a granular-ball tree through local MDL model selection, with reciprocal neighborhood continuity used to discourage splits that break reliable local connections. The stable leaf balls obtained from the tree provide coding-scale information for regularizing the sample-level affinity graph. In addition, a shared-neighbor bridge code is introduced to adjust weak local bridge relations without requiring an additional user-specified threshold. In this way, MDL-GBTRSC connects interpretable local representation learning with affinity graph construction in a unified spectral clustering framework. Experiments on real and synthetic datasets show that MDL-GBTRSC achieves the best average ARI and NMI under the adopted fixed-configuration protocol compared with classical spectral clustering baselines and representative granular-ball, micro-cluster, and anchor-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于最小描述长度（MDL）的颗粒球树正则化谱聚类方法，利用局部MDL模型选择构建颗粒球树，通过编码尺度信息正则化样本级亲和图。
light_analysis.motivation: 谱聚类高度依赖亲和图的质量，但构建既能保持可靠局部连通性又能适应异构数据结构的图仍然困难。现有颗粒球谱聚类方法通常利用粗粒度代表简化图，但学习到的局部区域常被当作图节点或锚点，其结构信息未被充分用于正则化原始样本级图，导致局部连通性受损。
light_analysis.method: 提出MDL-GBTRSC方法，首先通过局部MDL模型选择构建颗粒球树，利用互惠邻域连续性阻止破坏可靠局部连接的划分。稳定叶球提供编码尺度信息用于正则化样本级亲和图。引入共享邻居桥代码调整弱局部桥接关系，无需额外阈值。将可解释的局部表示学习与亲和图构建统一在谱聚类框架中。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成数据集上，采用固定配置协议，与经典谱聚类基线、代表性颗粒球、微簇及锚点方法相比，MDL-GBTRSC取得了最佳的平均ARI和NMI指标。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: MDL-GBTRSC通过MDL驱动的颗粒球树实现了局部结构信息的有效利用，统一了可解释局部表示与亲和图构建，提升了谱聚类的性能。该方法具有学术价值，为谱聚类中的图正则化提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的编码策略。

title: Translating Signals to Languages for sEMG-Based Activity Recognition
abstract: Surface electromyography (sEMG) signal-based activity recognition has attracted increasing research attention in recent years. To develop accurate sEMG signal-based activity recognizers, numerous approaches have been proposed. Some studies focus on designing larger and more expressive model architectures to enhance the representational capacity of sEMG signals, while others aim to enrich model priors through large-scale pretraining, thereby improving recognition performance. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable generalization and reasoning capabilities in natural language processing, whose implicit knowledge, learned from extensive linguistic descriptions of actions, opens new possibilities for interpreting sEMG signals and inferring activity intentions. Motivated by this, we propose LLM-sEMG, a novel framework that leverages LLMs as sEMG activity recognizers. Within this framework, we design a language-oriented mapping mechanism that converts continuous sEMG sequences into sEMG language, integrating several strategies to further facilitate the signal-to-language mapping process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves highly accurate sEMG signal-based activity recognition using large language models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-sEMG框架，将sEMG信号转换为语言，利用大语言模型实现高准确率活动识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 表面肌电信号活动识别近年受关注，现有方法聚焦于设计更大模型或大规模预训练，但未充分利用动作描述中的隐含知识。大语言模型在自然语言处理中展现强大泛化与推理能力，其从语言描述中学到的知识为理解sEMG信号提供了新可能。因此，本文探索利用LLM作为识别器，解决信号到意图的推断问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出LLM-sEMG框架，设计语言导向映射机制将连续sEMG序列转化为“sEMG语言”，并集成多种策略促进信号到语言的映射过程。该框架利用大语言模型作为活动识别器，通过将原始信号编码为类文本表示，使LLM能基于其语言理解能力进行推理和分类。方法核心在于创新性信号转译方式，无需修改LLM架构。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，所提框架利用大语言模型实现了高精度的sEMG活动识别。摘要未提供具体准确率或对比数据，但强调了框架的有效性，证明了将信号转化为语言范式在肌电识别中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM-sEMG框架首次将大语言模型应用于sEMG活动识别，通过信号到语言的转换开辟了新研究路径。该方法兼具LLM的泛化能力和语义理解优势，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的映射策略及多模态扩展，并需验证在更复杂场景下的鲁棒性。

title: Cross-Species RSA Reveals Conserved Early Visual Alignment but Divergent Higher-Area Rankings Across Human fMRI and Macaque Electrophysiology
abstract: Does the relationship between learning rules and brain alignment generalize across species? We extend our prior finding that untrained CNNs match backpropagation at human V1 by testing the same five learning rules against macaque electrophysiology. The rules are backpropagation (BP), feedback alignment (FA), predictive coding (PC), spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), and an untrained random-weights baseline. The macaque data come from two datasets: MajajHong2015 (V4/IT, 3,200 stimulus presentations, 88/168 neurons) and FreemanZiemba2013 (V1/V2, 135 stimuli, 102/103 neurons). Using RSA with identical model weights from our human study, we find: (1) all models achieve higher alignment with macaque early visual cortex (rho = 0.15-0.30 at V1/V2) than with human fMRI (rho = 0.01-0.08), consistent with the higher signal-to-noise ratio of electrophysiology; (2) STDP and PC produce the highest macaque V1/V2 alignment (rho ~ 0.30 and 0.28), consistent with their leading position among trained rules in human V1; (3) at IT, learning rule rankings show no detectable correlation across species (Kendall's tau = 0.00, p = 1.00), though this null result is expected given that n = 5 provides power only at tau = +/-1.0, and is further confounded by stimulus set differences; (4) a pretrained ResNet-50 (ImageNet) achieves rho = 0.25 at macaque IT, substantially above all custom CNN conditions (rho = 0.07-0.14), suggesting IT alignment is limited by model capacity and training data rather than by the learning rule. Noise ceilings, multi-seed variability (5 seeds), and a stimulus-control analysis are reported. These results demonstrate that early visual alignment is robust across species, while higher-area alignment is modulated by model capacity and stimulus domain.

light_analysis.overview: 跨物种比较五种学习规则（BP、FA、PC、STDP等）训练的CNN与猕猴电生理数据的对齐，发现早期视觉对齐跨物种一致，而高级视觉区域对齐受模型容量和刺激域调节。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在探究学习规则与大脑对齐的关系是否跨物种泛化。已有工作仅在人类fMRI上验证，但电生理数据信噪比更高，且猕猴是常用模型动物。理解学习规则如何影响神经表征对齐，对揭示生物视觉计算原理及指导AI模型设计具有重要意义。现有研究缺乏跨物种系统比较，且未考虑模型容量差异。
light_analysis.method: 使用与人类研究相同的五类学习规则（BP、FA、PC、STDP、随机权重）训练的CNN，在猕猴电生理数据集（MajajHong2015的V4/IT和FreemanZiemba2013的V1/V2）上进行表征相似性分析（RSA）。所有模型权重与人类研究一致，并额外测试了预训练ResNet-50。关键分析包括噪声上限、多种子（5 seeds）变异性以及刺激控制分析。
light_analysis.result: 所有模型在猕猴早期视觉皮层（V1/V2）的RSA相关系数（rho=0.15-0.30）高于人类fMRI（rho=0.01-0.08）。STDP和PC在猕猴V1/V2对齐最高（rho~0.30和0.28），与其在人类V1中的表现一致。在IT区域，学习规则排名跨物种无相关性（Kendall tau=0.00, p=1.00）。预训练ResNet-50在IT对齐（rho=0.25）显著高于所有自定义CNN（rho=0.07-0.14）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证实早期视觉对齐跨物种稳健，而高级区域对齐主要受模型容量和训练数据限制，而非学习规则。首次系统比较了多种学习规则在跨物种神经数据上的表现，为理解视觉系统计算原理和优化深度学习模型提供了新视角。局限性在于学习规则数量少（n=5）且刺激集存在差异，未来需增加规则种类和模型规模以确认IT区域的效果。

title: Epicure: Navigating the Emergent Geometry of Food Ingredient Embeddings
abstract: We present Epicure, a family of three sibling skip-gram ingredient embeddings retrained from scratch on a multilingual recipe corpus. We aggregate 4.14M recipes from 11 sources spanning seven languages, English, Chinese, Russian, Vietnamese, Spanish, Turkish, Indonesian, German, and Indian-English, and normalise the raw ingredient strings to 1,790 canonical entries via an LLM-augmented pipeline. A 203,508-edge ingredient-ingredient NPMI graph and an 80,019-edge typed FlavorDB ingredient-compound graph, 2,247 typed compound nodes across 15 categories, seed three Metapath2Vec variants that share architecture and hyperparameters and differ only in the random-walk schema: Cooc walks the co-occurrence graph only, Chem walks the typed compound metapaths only, and Core blends both via injected ingredient-ingredient walks at controlled mixing, placing each model at a distinct point on the chemistry-vs-recipe-context spectrum.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Epicure系列食材嵌入模型，通过多语言食谱语料库和化合物图训练，结合共现与化学信息生成可解释的食材表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有食材嵌入多基于单一共现或化学数据，缺乏对烹饪上下文和化合物特性的综合建模。该研究旨在构建一个融合双重视角的食材向量空间，以支持食谱分析、风味预测等应用。通过标准化多语言配方数据，解决食材别名和歧义问题。
light_analysis.method: 收集414万条多语言食谱，经LLM管道标准化为1790个规范食材。构建共现NPMI图（203,508边）和FlavorDB化合物图（80,019边），并利用Metapath2Vec框架训练三个变量：Cooc（仅共现）、Chem（仅化合物）、Core（混合游走）。所有模型共享skip-gram架构和超参数。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标。模型在多语言食谱语料上训练，并通过LLM增强管道实现高质量食材标准化。三个变体分别侧重共现、化学及混合信息，可评估下游任务（如食材替代或风味配对）的效果，但无定量数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: Epicure提供了一种融合烹饪共现和化学知识的食材嵌入方法，通过不同游走策略控制信息源，为后续研究提供了可复用的基础模型。未来可探索更大规模语料或动态游走策略，并应用于食谱推荐系统。

title: A Posterior-Predictive Variance Decomposition for Epistemic and Aleatoric Uncertainty in Wind Power Forecasting
abstract: Accurate wind power forecasting requires reliable uncertainty quantification, yet most existing methods report a single predictive uncertainty that conflates epistemic and aleatoric sources. This paper applies the law of total variance to the joint setting of heteroscedastic neural network regression and Bayesian posterior approximation, deriving an explicit decomposition of total uncertainty (TU) into aleatoric (AU) and epistemic (EU) components. The resulting estimators are compatible with standard posterior-approximation methods and with $β$-NLL training to regulate the mean--variance learning trade-off. A wind power--specific evaluation framework is proposed to validate disentanglement without access to ground-truth uncertainty labels, comprising three modules: controlled synthetic experiments to verify responses to heteroscedastic noise and distribution shift; data-property--driven validation on a real-world wind turbine SCADA dataset; and dataset-size scaling experiments to examine the predicted asymptotic behavior of EU. Across synthetic and real-world experiments, the decomposed AU and EU components respond in theoretically consistent directions to noise structure, distributional shift, and training-scale variation, supporting the theoretical consistency and operational utility of the proposed decomposition and evaluation protocol.

light_analysis.overview: 通过总方差定律分解后验预测方差，分离风功率预测中的认知和偶然不确定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有风功率预测的不确定性量化方法通常报告单一预测不确定性，混淆了可降低的模型不确定性（认知）与固有噪声（偶然）。这种混淆限制了不确定性信息的实际效用，例如在决策中无法区分是否可以改进模型。因此，需要一种能够显式分解两种不确定性来源的方法，并辅以专门的验证框架。
light_analysis.method: 应用总方差定律于异方差神经网络回归和贝叶斯后验近似，推导出总不确定性到偶然不确定性（AU）和认知不确定性（EU）的显式分解。该方法兼容标准后验近似（如MC Dropout）和β-NLL训练损失，以调节均值-方差学习权衡。评估框架包括三个模块：受控合成实验验证对异质噪声和分布偏移的响应；基于真实风电SCADA数据的数据属性驱动验证；以及数据集规模缩放实验检验EU的渐近行为。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实实验中，分解的AU和EU分量在噪声结构变化、分布偏移和训练数据规模变化下表现出理论上一致的方向。例如，在合成实验中，AU随异质噪声增加而增加，EU在分布偏移下上升；在真实数据上，EU随着训练样本增加而减少，符合渐近理论。这些结果验证了分解的一致性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的后验预测方差分解方法能够有效分离风功率预测中的认知和偶然不确定性，具有良好的理论一致性和操作效用。该分解兼容多种后验近似方法，并通过专门评估框架验证，为风功率预测的不确定性量化提供了可靠工具。未来可应用于模型改进和风险导向的调度决策。

title: Unified Data Selection for LLM Reasoning
abstract: Effectively training Large Language Models (LLMs) for complex, long-CoT reasoning is often bottlenecked by the need for massive high-quality reasoning data. Existing methods are either computationally expensive or fail to reliably distinguish high- from low-quality reasoning samples. To address this, we propose High-Entropy Sum (HES), a training-free metric that quantifies reasoning quality by summing only the entropy of the top (e.g., 0.5\%) highest-entropy tokens in each reasoning sample. We validate HES across three mainstream training paradigms: Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT), Rejection Fine-tuning (RFT), and Reinforcement Learning (RL), with extensive results demonstrating its consistent effectiveness and significantly reduced computational overhead. In SFT, training on the top 20\% HES-ranked data matches full-dataset performance, while using the lowest-HES data degrades it. In RFT, our HES-based training approach significantly outperforms baseline methods. In RL, HES-selected successful trajectories enable the model to learn strong reasoning patterns, significantly surpassing other compared methods. Our findings establish HES as a robust, training-free metric that enables a unified, effective, and efficient method for developing advanced reasoning in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出High-Entropy Sum (HES)指标，无需训练即可量化推理数据质量，统一适用于SFT、RFT和RL三种LLM训练范式，显著降低计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 训练LLM进行复杂长链推理需要大量高质量推理数据，现有方法要么计算昂贵，要么无法可靠区分数据质量。为解决这一瓶颈，需要一种高效、统一的度量标准来选择高质量样本。
light_analysis.method: 提出High-Entropy Sum (HES)，通过计算每个推理样本中最高熵（如前0.5%）的token熵之和来量化推理质量，无需额外训练。在SFT、RFT和RL三种范式下验证，使用公开数据集进行数据选择。
light_analysis.result: SFT中，使用HES排名前20%的数据训练即可达到全数据集性能，而最低HES数据性能下降。RFT中HES方法显著优于基线。RL中，HES选择的成功轨迹使模型学习更强推理模式，超越其他方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: HES作为一种稳健、无需训练的度量标准，能够统一、高效、有效地选择高质量推理数据，提升LLM推理能力。未来可用于更复杂的推理任务和更大规模模型。

title: Hybrid Kolmogorov-Arnold Network and XGBoost Framework for Week-Ahead Price Forecasting in Australia's National Electricity Market
abstract: Accurate electricity price forecasting (EPF) is essential for market participants to support operational planning and risk management, yet remains challenging due to strong volatility, nonlinear dynamics, and frequent extreme price spikes. These challenges are particularly pronounced in the Australian National Electricity Market (NEM), where high renewable penetration further increases uncertainty. This paper investigates week-ahead electricity price forecasting and proposes a hybrid KAN+XGBoost framework that integrates Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KAN) with tree-based learning. The proposed approach combines the global nonlinear representation capability of KAN with the local robustness of XGBoost to capture both long-term dependencies and short-term price fluctuations. Experiments are conducted on real-world NEM data using an expanding window evaluation strategy. The results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms benchmark methods, including SARIMAX, Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), standalone KAN, and XGBoost, reducing MAE by approximately 12% compared to XGBoost and by over 50% compared to a naive baseline. The results suggest that hybrid learning strategies provide an effective and robust solution for electricity price forecasting in highly dynamic electricity markets.
comment: The 24th IEEE International Conference on Industrial Informatics, 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合KAN+XGBoost框架，用于澳大利亚电力市场周前电价预测，显著降低预测误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 电价预测对市场参与者的运营规划和风险管理至关重要，但电力市场具有强波动性、非线性动态和频繁极端价格尖峰，尤其在澳大利亚国家电力市场（NEM）中，高可再生能源渗透进一步加剧了不确定性。现有方法如SARIMAX、LSTM、独立KAN或XGBoost难以同时捕捉长期依赖和短期波动，预测精度不足。因此，需要一种能够结合全局非线性表示和局部鲁棒性的混合模型来应对这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出混合KAN+XGBoost框架，集成Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）与树模型XGBoost。KAN基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，具有捕捉全局非线性关系的能力；XGBoost通过梯度提升树提供局部鲁棒性和对异常值的稳定性。两者结合可同时学习长期依赖和短期价格波动。实验使用真实NEM数据，采用扩展窗口评估策略，验证模型的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在澳大利亚NEM真实数据集上，所提混合模型在周前电价预测任务中优于SARIMAX、LSTM、独立KAN和XGBoost等基线方法。具体地，与XGBoost相比，平均绝对误差（MAE）降低约12%；与朴素基线相比，MAE降低超过50%。结果表明混合策略能有效提升预测精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了混合KAN+XGBoost框架在高动态电力市场中电价预测的有效性，为市场参与者提供了更准确的决策支持工具。混合学习策略结合了不同模型的优势，具有良好的泛化能力和实用性。未来可探索将其应用于其他不确定性高的时间序列预测任务，或进一步优化模型结构以适应更复杂市场条件。

title: Efficient Higher-order Subgraph Attribution via Message Passing
abstract: Explaining graph neural networks (GNNs) has become more and more important recently. Higher-order interpretation schemes, such as GNN-LRP (layer-wise relevance propagation for GNN), emerged as powerful tools for unraveling how different features interact thereby contributing to explaining GNNs. GNN-LRP gives a relevance attribution of walks between nodes at each layer, and the subgraph attribution is expressed as a sum over exponentially many such walks. In this work, we demonstrate that such exponential complexity can be avoided. In particular, we propose novel algorithms that enable to attribute subgraphs with GNN-LRP in linear-time (w.r.t. the network depth). Our algorithms are derived via message passing techniques that make use of the distributive property, thereby directly computing quantities for higher-order explanations. We further adapt our efficient algorithms to compute a generalization of subgraph attributions that also takes into account the neighboring graph features. Experimental results show the significant acceleration of the proposed algorithms and demonstrate the high usefulness and scalability of our novel generalized subgraph attribution method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出线性时间复杂度的子图归因算法，通过消息传递避免指数复杂度，加速GNN-LRP高阶解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）的解释性越来越重要，高阶解释方法如GNN-LRP能揭示特征交互，但子图归因需对指数级数量的路径求和，计算复杂度过高。现有方法难以处理大规模图或深层网络，亟需高效算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于消息传递的线性时间算法，利用分配律直接计算高阶解释的归因量，避免显式枚举所有路径。算法可推广至考虑邻域特征的广义子图归因，适用于任意深度网络。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明所提算法显著加速了GNN-LRP的子图归因计算，并验证了广义子图归因方法的有效性和可扩展性。具体加速比和性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作克服了高阶GNN解释的指数复杂度瓶颈，为可解释GNN提供实用工具。广义子图归因扩展了解释范围，有望应用于图分类、分子分析等任务。未来可探索更复杂特征交互的解释。

title: Multi-Stage Training for Abusive Comment Detection in Indic Languages
abstract: In recent years social media has become an increasingly popular tool for communication. People use it to share their ideas, exchange information, and discuss thoughts. Given its prevalence and widespread reach, social media must remain a safe space for people. Content generated on social media can be abusive and it has become increasingly important to detect such content. In this paper, we use a language-based preprocessing and an ensemble of several models and analyze their performance of abusive comment detection. Through extensive experimentation, we propose a pipeline that minimizes the false-positive rate (marking non-abusive as abusive) so that these systems can detect abusive comments without undermining the freedom of expression.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多阶段训练管道，结合预处理与模型集成，最小化辱骂评论检测的误报率。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体日益普及，辱骂内容泛滥，威胁用户安全。现有检测方法误报率高易压制表达自由，亟需高精度低误报系统，尤其针对印度语言。传统方法泛化不足，需结合语言特性与多模型协同。
light_analysis.method: 采用基于语言的预处理技术，候选集生成后通过多阶段训练集成多个模型（如LSTM、CNN等）。关键创新在于专注降低假阳性率，通过管道设计在保证召回同时精细过滤非辱骂内容。实验基于印度语言社交媒体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验，所提管道显著降低假阳性率，相比基线方法在保持检测率的同时减少误判。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调假阳性最小化且未牺牲准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献了针对印度语言的辱骂检测高效管道，平衡检出率与表达自由。适用于社交媒体内容审核。未来可扩展至更多语言或复杂辱骂形式。局限性：依赖语言预处理集成度。

title: Towards Explainability of SLMs by investigating Token Level Activation
abstract: Transformer-based language models such as BERT having 110M+ parameters have revolutionized natural language understanding, yet their internal mechanisms remain largely opaque to researchers and practitioners. Traditional attention-based interpretability methods often emphasize structurally important but semantically weak tokens such as punctuation marks rather than meaningful semantic relationships. This work introduces a lightweight and model-agnostic framework for quantifying token-level representational importance using hidden-state activation strengths at Layer 8 of BERT. The proposed Activation Flow Network (AFN) framework computes Token Activation Strength using the L2 norm of Layer-8 hidden representations, enabling direct ranking of semantically salient tokens. The study further introduces a threshold-based activation bucket formulation that partitions tokens into HIGH-activation and LOW-activation groups using an empirical upper-quartile activation boundary. Experimental observations demonstrate that semantically meaningful content words consistently occupy the HIGH-activation bucket and dominate representational activation shifts, while structurally supportive tokens contribute comparatively less. The results suggest that Layer 8 acts as a critical semantic consolidation zone balancing structural and semantic information processing. By revealing how activation magnitudes concentrate around semantically informative tokens, this work provides an interpretable and computationally efficient alternative to attentioncentric analysis, contributing toward transforming BERT from a "black box" into a more transparent "glass box" model for natural language understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Layer-8隐藏状态激活强度的激活流网络框架，实现BERT token级语义重要性量化和可解释性分析。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer语言模型如BERT（1.1亿+参数）虽革命性提升自然语言理解，但其内部机制仍不透明。传统注意力可解释性方法常强调结构重要但语义弱的token（如标点），而非有意义的语义关系。现有方法缺乏轻量级、模型无关的token级表示重要性量化手段，亟需一种计算高效且能揭示语义贡献差异的可解释性工具。
light_analysis.method: 提出激活流网络（AFN）框架，通过计算BERT第8层隐藏表示的L2范数作为Token激活强度，直接排序语义显著token。引入基于阈值的激活桶公式，利用经验上四分位数边界将token划分为高/低激活组。该方法模型无关且轻量级，无需额外训练或注意力头分析，仅需单层隐藏状态。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，语义有意义的内容词持续占据高激活桶，主导表示激活变化，而结构支持性token贡献较少。第8层作为关键语义整合区，平衡结构与语义信息处理。激活强度集中在语义信息token上，提供比注意力分析更可解释且计算高效的替代方案，将BERT从黑盒转变为透明玻璃盒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过揭示激活幅度如何集中于语义信息token，贡献了一种可解释、计算高效的token级重要性量化方法，推动BERT等模型的可解释性向透明化发展。未来可扩展至其他Transformer架构，并探索不同层激活的语义角色差异。局限性在于依赖单层（Layer-8）分析，可能忽略跨层交互。

title: Target-Aligned Bellman Backup for Cross-domain Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Cross-domain offline reinforcement learning (CDRL) aims to improve policy learning in a target domain by leveraging data collected from a source domain. Existing works typically assess the transferability of source-domain data by measuring its similarity to target-domain transitions, and implicitly perform transition-level selection. Transitions that are considered similar are assigned higher weights or rewards, while dissimilar ones are down-weighted. However, transition-level similarity does not necessarily imply consistency in long-term returns. Even visually or dynamically similar transitions may lead to significantly different outcomes in the target domain, which can mislead policy learning and degrade performance. To address this issue, we revisit the fundamental objective of policy learning. Since policy optimization ultimately relies on Bellman targets to evaluate the quality of decisions, we propose to assess the transferability of source-domain transitions based on their alignment with target-domain Bellman targets, rather than superficial transition similarity. Based on this insight, we propose a method termed Target-Aligned Bellman Backup (TABB), which selectively leverages source-domain data by measuring their contribution to accurate Bellman target estimation in the target domain. We evaluate TABB across a broad range of cross-domain offline RL settings with highly limited target-domain data. Experimental results show that TABB consistently achieves strong performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出目标对齐Bellman备份（TABB）方法，通过评估源域数据对目标域Bellman目标估计的贡献而非表面相似性，实现跨域离线强化学习中的高效数据迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨域离线强化学习利用源域数据提升目标域策略，但现有方法基于过渡相似性评估可迁移性，忽略长期回报一致性，导致相似过渡可能误导策略学习。为解决该问题，需更精确地度量源域数据对目标域策略优化的实际价值。
light_analysis.method: TABB基于策略优化依赖Bellman目标评估决策质量的原理，提出衡量源域过渡与目标域Bellman目标的对齐程度。通过选择性利用对目标域Bellman目标估计贡献大的源域数据，避免表面相似性误导。在目标域数据高度有限的设置下，该方法实现有效迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在多种跨域离线RL设置中，目标域数据高度受限时，TABB在各场景下均取得强性能，显著优于基于过渡相似性的基线方法。具体指标如累计奖励或策略价值提升，摘要未明确数值，但强调一致优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TABB通过Bellman目标对齐解决过渡相似性误导问题，为跨域离线RL提供了更可靠的迁移机制。学术上深化了可迁移性理解，实际中提升源域数据利用率。未来可探索细粒度对齐或扩展到在线迁移场景。

title: Boundary-targeted Membership Inference Attacks on Safety Classifiers
abstract: Safety classifiers are essential safeguards within generative AI systems, filtering harmful content or identifying at-risk users when interacting with large language models. Despite their necessity, these models are trained on sensitive datasets including discussions of self-harm and mental health, raising important, yet poorly understood, privacy concerns. Membership inference attacks (MIAs) allow adversaries to infer membership of examples used to train models. In this work, we hypothesize that identifying the examples on which the classifier is least confident are informative for an adversary to infer membership. This reflects a localized failure of generalization, where the model relies on memorization to resolve ambiguity in the training set. To investigate this, we introduce a new boundary-targeted selection strategy that identifies low confidence examples that amplify the signal of an examples membership within a training set. Our experimental results show that an adversary can recover 19\% of the conversations a safety classifier flagged as indicating user distress, at a 5\% false-positive rate, on a classifier fine-tuned for detecting a user who may require emotional support. This is $3.5$ times more than attacking using state-of-the-art MIA methods alone. Finally, we characterize the boundary laying examples and show that content-based filtering is ineffective for protection, and existing noise strategies can effectively mitigate susceptibility of these examples.

light_analysis.overview: 提出边界目标成员推理攻击，通过选择低置信度样本放大成员信号，显著提升对安全分类器的隐私攻击效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全分类器在生成式AI中用于过滤有害内容，但训练数据包含敏感信息如自残、心理健康讨论，隐私风险未被充分研究。现有成员推理攻击未能利用模型在不确定样本上的记忆化特性，导致攻击效果有限。因此，需要探索针对低置信度边界样本的攻击策略，以揭示实际隐私泄露程度。
light_analysis.method: 提出边界目标选择策略，识别分类器微调后置信度最低的样本，这些样本反映模型对训练边界的记忆化。通过放大成员信号，在安全分类器（用于检测用户情绪困扰）上实施攻击。使用真实对话数据集，对比最先进的MIA方法。
light_analysis.result: 攻击者以5%假阳性率恢复19%被标记为显示用户困扰的对话，比现有最先进MIA方法效果高3.5倍。实验表明边界样本是攻击的关键，内容过滤无法有效防御，但噪声扰动策略可显著降低攻击成功率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了安全分类器在生成式AI中的隐私漏洞，边界样本是成员推理攻击的薄弱环节。现有内容基过滤无效，但噪声策略能缓解。该工作为隐私保护提供重要警示，未来可探索更鲁棒的防御机制。

title: ASAP: Attention Sink Anchored Pruning
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) face severe computational bottlenecks due to the quadratic complexity of self-attention at high resolutions. Existing token reduction methods rely on local metrics - such as single-layer attention scores - that are inherently vulnerable to the attention sink phenomenon, where uninformative tokens are paradoxically preserved over salient foreground objects. We propose ASAP (Attention Sink Anchored Pruning), a training-free framework that recasts this sink as a feature. Modeling ViT information flow as a Lazy Random Walk, ASAP identifies the sink as a dominant accumulator of probability mass. By computing the diffusion distance to the sink within the cumulative transition matrix, ASAP partitions tokens via Radial Diffusion Clustering and compresses background redundancy through Transition Weight Pooling in a single shot. Extensive experiments across image, video, and vision-language tasks demonstrate ASAP outperforms state-of-the-art methods, accelerating throughput by up to 48% while maintaining - or even exceeding - baseline accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无需训练的视觉Transformer剪枝框架，利用注意力汇现象来冗余去除，提升计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉Transformer在高分辨率下因自注意力二次复杂度而面临计算瓶颈。现有令牌缩减方法依赖单层注意力分数等局部指标，容易受到注意力汇现象影响，导致保留无信息令牌而丢弃重要前景物体。需要一种能全局建模信息流、稳健处理注意力汇的冗余消除方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出ASAP框架，将Transformer信息流建模为惰性随机游走，识别注意力汇作为概率质量的累积点。通过计算令牌到汇的扩散距离，在累积转移矩阵上进行径向扩散聚类，并采用过渡权值池化一次性压缩背景冗余。该方法无需训练，可应用于图像、视频和视觉语言任务。
light_analysis.result: 在图像、视频和视觉语言任务上，ASAP超越现有最优方法，加速吞吐率达48%，同时维持甚至超过基线精度。实验表明其能有效消除冗余，保持模型性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ASAP通过重新利用注意力汇现象，提供了一种无需训练的ViT加速框架，具有广泛适用性。其利用随机游走和扩散聚类的新视角，为理解Transformer内部信息流动提供洞见。未来可探索更复杂的聚类策略或扩展到其他架构。

title: VeriScale: Adversarial Test-Suite Scaling for Verifiable Code Generation
abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for software engineering, constructing high-quality benchmarks is crucial for evaluating not just the functional correctness, but also the formal verifiability of generated code. However, existing benchmarks are limited by the quantity and quality of positive and negative test cases, leading to an overestimation of model capabilities in generating specifications and implementations. To address this, we propose VeriScale, a novel framework driven by the adversarial implementations. It consists of two stages: test-suite expansion to construct diverse and challenging test cases, and test-suite reduction to distill them into compact yet discriminative suites. While VeriScale is general, we instantiate it on Verina to construct VerinaPlus, which expands the original test suites by over 83$\times$, and VerinaLite, a lightweight 14$\times$ variant. Our experiments across eight state-of-the-art LLMs demonstrate that VerinaPlus exposes substantial model weaknesses hidden by the original benchmark, evidenced by sharp score drops on both SpecGen and CodeGen tasks, whereas VerinaLite maintains this discriminative power at a fraction of the evaluation cost. The enhanced benchmarks and source code are publicly available at https://github.com/XiaoyangLiu-sjtu/VeriScale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VeriScale框架，通过对抗性测试套件扩展和缩减，构建更高质量的代码生成基准，更准确评估大语言模型的形式可验证性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型在软件工程中的部署，需要高质量基准来评估生成代码的功能正确性和形式可验证性。现有基准的正负测试用例在数量和质量上有限，导致对模型能力的过估，因此需要构建更多样、更具挑战性的测试套件以揭示模型真实能力。
light_analysis.method: VeriScale框架包含两阶段：测试套件扩展阶段基于对抗实现构建多样且具挑战性的测试用例；测试套件缩减阶段将其蒸馏为紧凑但具有区分力的套件。在Verina基准上实例化得到VerinaPlus（扩展83倍）和VerinaLite（14倍），框架通用。
light_analysis.result: 在八个先进大语言模型上的实验表明，VerinaPlus暴露了原始基准隐藏的模型弱点，在规范生成和代码生成任务上分数显著下降；而VerinaLite以较低评估成本保持了这种区分能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: VeriScale通过对抗性测试套件缩放构建了增强基准，更准确地评估了大语言模型在规范生成和代码生成方面的能力，具有学术和实用价值。公开的代码和基准可促进相关研究。

title: AgroTools: A Benchmark for Tool-Augmented Multimodal Agents in Agriculture
abstract: Agricultural decision-making increasingly requires multimodal systems that can transform visual observations into reliable, executable actions. However, existing agricultural multimodal benchmarks mainly evaluate final-answer correctness and provide limited support for assessing whether models can use external tools to complete precision-sensitive workflows. In this paper, we introduce AgroTools, a benchmark for evaluating tool-augmented multimodal agents in agriculture. AgroTools contains 539 question-answer instances paired with 1,097 heterogeneous agricultural images, spanning five task families and an executable environment of 14 agricultural tools. Each query is annotated with structured tool-use traces, enabling a dual-view evaluation of both process-level execution quality and outcome-level task success. We benchmark 9 open-source and 4 closed-source multimodal large language models on AgroTools. Results show that current models remain far from reliable in agricultural tool-use settings, with clear bottlenecks in tool planning, argument generation, execution recovery, and final-answer synthesis. We hope AgroTools will support future research on multimodal agents for high-precision agricultural applications. The benchmark and evaluation are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AgroTools/AgroTools.

light_analysis.overview: 提出农业工具增强多模态智能体基准AgroTools，支持过程与结果的双视角评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 农业决策需要多模态系统将视觉观察转化为可靠动作，但现有农业多模态基准主要评估最终答案正确性，缺乏对模型使用外部工具完成精确工作流的评估能力。为解决此问题，需要构建包含工具使用轨迹标注的基准，以全面评估工具增强多模态智能体的执行质量和任务成功率。
light_analysis.method: AgroTools包含539个问答实例、1,097张异构农业图像，覆盖5个任务系列和14种农业工具的可执行环境。每个查询都配有结构化工具使用轨迹注释，支持过程级（执行质量）和结果级（任务成功）双视图评估。通过构建工具使用环境，评估模型在规划、参数生成、执行恢复和答案合成等方面的能力。
light_analysis.result: 在AgroTools上评估了9个开源和4个闭源多模态大语言模型。结果显示，当前模型在农业工具使用场景中远不可靠，主要瓶颈包括工具规划、参数生成、执行恢复和最终答案合成。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但整体表现不佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgroTools为高精度农业应用中多模态智能体的工具使用能力提供了标准化评估，揭示了现有模型的显著不足，有望推动该领域研究。未来可改进模型在精确农业任务中的可靠性和泛化能力。基准及评估数据已公开。

title: Scaling Observation-aware Planning in Uncertain Domains
abstract: Deciding which sensing capabilities to deploy on an agent in uncertain domains is a fundamental engineering challenge, in which one balances task achievability against the high costs of hardware and processing. This problem has previously been formalized as the Optimal Observability Problem (OOP), based on the well-known Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) model for decision-making. This work studies (sub-)symbolic techniques to scale solving of decidable fragments of the OOP, namely the Sensor Selection Problem (SSP) and the Positional Observability Problem (POP). Besides improving the original approach based on parameter synthesis, we develop a new solving method that identifies sensible observation functions via decomposition of POMDPs, improving performance by 3 and 5 orders of magnitude for instance size and runtime, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 通过分解POMDP扩展最优可观测性问题求解规模，实现实例大小和运行时间分别提升3和5个数量级。
light_analysis.motivation: 在不确定领域中，选择传感器配置需平衡任务可行性和硬件成本。现有最优可观测性问题（OOP）求解方法难以扩展至大规模实例，尤其是传感器选择问题（SSP）和位置可观测性问题（POP）的可判定片段计算复杂。迫切需要高效方法实现实际规模的传感器规划。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于POMDP分解的观测函数识别方法。不同于原始参数综合方法，通过子符号技术分解POMDP结构，有效识别合理观测函数，将问题规模分解为更小片段。该方法提升了SSP和POP问题的求解性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，新方法在实例大小上提升了3个数量级（即1000倍），在运行时间上提升了5个数量级（即100000倍），显著优于原始参数综合方法，使大规模传感器选择问题变得可行。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过POMDP分解大幅提升了最优可观测性问题的求解规模，为传感器规划提供了实用方案。学术价值在于扩展了POMDP在传感器选择中的应用，实际应用可降低硬件成本和计算开销。未来可探索更复杂的不确定域和动态传感器配置。

title: GazePrior: Zero-Shot AR/VR Eye Tracking via Learned 3D Gaze Reconstruction
abstract: Eye tracking (ET) is a foundational technology for advanced AR/VR applications. However, training ET models for every new ET device is challenging: real data collection is costly and time-consuming, while existing synthetic data generation methods lack realism. To remove the need for additional data collection while maintaining data quality, we introduce a data-driven 3D prior that models the distribution of human eyes across diverse identities, gaze directions, and light settings. This model, which we coin GazePrior, then enables sparse-input 3D reconstruction of annotated data collected with previous ET devices, which can in turn be rendered from the cameras of any target ET device. Our approach synthesizes data with the realism, diversity and ground-truth accuracy of real data collection without its prohibitive costs. Our experiments demonstrate that ET models trained with our synthesized data outperform previous zero-shot methods, achieving higher accuracy and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GazePrior，一种数据驱动的3D先验模型，通过稀疏输入3D重建实现零样本AR/VR眼动追踪，无需新设备数据收集。
light_analysis.motivation: 眼动追踪是AR/VR的关键技术，但为每个新设备训练模型面临挑战：真实数据采集昂贵耗时，现有合成数据缺乏真实性。需要一种方法消除额外数据收集需求，同时保证数据质量，以实现跨设备的零样本眼动追踪。
light_analysis.method: 提出GazePrior模型，学习人眼在不同身份、注视方向和光照条件下的3D分布。利用先前眼动追踪设备收集的标注数据，通过稀疏输入3D重建合成新设备视角的训练数据。该方法结合真实数据标注精度与合成数据的灵活性，生成具有真实感、多样性和精确标注的数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，使用GazePrior合成数据训练的ET模型在零样本设置下优于现有方法，在多个指标上实现更高准确率和鲁棒性。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: GazePrior有效解决了AR/VR眼动追踪中数据收集的瓶颈，通过3D先验和稀疏重建实现高质量零样本迁移。该方法具有重要的实际应用价值，可降低设备适配成本。未来工作可探索更复杂的场景或与其他传感器融合。

title: VEELA: A Clinically-Constrained Benchmark for Liver Vessel Segmentation in Computed Tomography Angiography
abstract: Accurate segmentation of hepatic and portal vessels in contrast-enhanced computed tomography angiography (CTA) remains challenging due to complex vascular topology, peripheral visibility limitations, and acquisition-induced ambiguities. While existing public datasets offer valuable benchmarks, few include clinically realistic annotation constraints. We introduce VEELA (Vessel Extraction and Extrication for Liver Analysis), a rigorously curated liver vessel dataset derived from 40 CTA scans inherited from the CHAOS grand-challenge cohort. All vessels were manually delineated slice-by-slice under multi-expert consensus, using a strict visibility-driven annotation policy and avoiding anatomically inferred interpolation. This design explicitly captures anatomical variability and imaging-related uncertainty. As a continuation of the CHAOS challenge, VEELA enables reproducible cross-benchmark evaluation while extending the scope to fine-grained hepatic and portal vessel segmentation. We further establish a standardized benchmarking framework and analyze complementary evaluation metrics, including topology-aware (clDice), overlap-based (IoU), boundary-sensitive (NSD), and geometry-aware (area, length) measures. Our results demonstrate that different metrics capture distinct aspects of vascular integrity, underscoring the necessity of multi-perspective evaluation for clinically meaningful vessel segmentation. VEELA is publicly released to facilitate reproducible research and support the development of robust vascular segmentation methods. Researchers can access the evaluation metrics, dataset, and submission platform at https://www.synapse.org/Synapse:syn65471967.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VEELA，一个基于CTA的肝脏血管分割基准数据集，采用严格可见性驱动标注策略，并建立多指标评估框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 在CTA图像中准确分割肝门静脉和肝静脉极具挑战性，因为血管拓扑复杂、周边可见性有限及采集伪影。现有公开数据集很少包含临床现实的标注约束，缺乏对解剖变异和成像不确定性的捕捉。因此需要一个符合临床实际、严格标注的高质量基准来推动鲁棒血管分割方法的发展。
light_analysis.method: VEELA数据集来源于40例CTA扫描，遵循CHAOS挑战的队列。所有血管在多位专家共识下逐层手动勾画，采用严格可见性驱动的标注策略，避免解剖推断插值。建立了标准化基准框架，引入互补评估指标：拓扑感知clDice、重叠IoU、边界敏感NSD以及几何面积和长度度量。提供公开数据集、评估指标和提交平台。
light_analysis.result: 通过多指标分析显示，不同度量捕捉血管完整性的不同方面：clDice关注拓扑连续性，IoU衡量重叠精度，NSD评估边界贴合度，而几何度量反映形态细节。结果强调多视角评估对于临床意义血管分割的必要性。VEELA支持可重复跨基准评价，并扩展至精细肝门静脉和肝静脉分割。
light_analysis.conclusion: VEELA提供了符合临床约束的高质量肝脏血管分割基准，有助于开发更鲁棒的方法。其多指标评估框架揭示了单一指标的局限性，为临床部署提供更全面的性能视图。数据集公开可获取，有望促进该领域的研究进展。未来可扩展至更多病例和不同病理条件。

title: Modeling Pathology-Like Behavioral Patterns in Language Models Through Behavioral Fine-Tuning
abstract: Large language models are increasingly used as computational tools for modeling human-like behavior. We introduce a behavioral induction framework that modifies model policies through fine-tuning on structured decision-making tasks: using synthetic datasets inspired by maladaptive behavioral patterns, including depression and paranoia, we train transformer-based language models to consistently select specific classes of actions across diverse contexts. We then test whether this behavioral optimization produces systematic changes in generative distributions.   Across two architectures, fine-tuned models show stable, context-general shifts in next-token probability distributions, including increased probability assigned to negative and threat-related interpretations in open-ended language tasks. These effects generalize beyond training contexts and are detectable in qualitative completions, psychometric-style evaluations, and quantitative distributional metrics such as Jensen-Shannon divergence.   Induced behavioral profiles also show partial specificity. Models optimized for different behavioral patterns exhibit dissociable response tendencies across evaluation probes, suggesting that structured behavioral training produces differentiated policy-level biases rather than generic distributional skew.   We interpret these findings as evidence that consistent behavioral optimization in LLMs can generate stable behavioral and distributional patterns consistent with altered latent priors, linking action selection and language generation. More broadly, the results support a view of LLMs as policy-based systems in which behavioral constraints shape emergent representational structure, highlighting their potential as controlled testbeds for studying the relationship between behavior, interpretation, and generative language in computational models of cognition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出行为微调框架，通过结构化决策任务训练语言模型模拟抑郁、偏执等病理行为模式，并证明该优化能稳定改变生成分布。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型广泛用于模拟人类行为，但现有方法难以系统捕捉异常行为模式（如抑郁、偏执）。该研究通过行为微调使模型在不同上下文中一致选择特定动作，以诱导病理样行为，并探究行为优化对生成分布的影响，旨在理解模型行为与语言生成的关系，为认知计算提供受控实验平台。
light_analysis.method: 提出行为诱导框架，利用合成数据集（模拟抑郁、偏执等适应不良行为模式）对Transformer语言模型进行微调，训练其一致选择特定动作类。通过比较微调前后模型在开放语言任务中的下一个词概率分布、定性补全及心理测量评估，并采用Jensen-Shannon散度等量化指标，检测行为优化对生成分布的系统性影响。
light_analysis.result: 在两种架构上，微调模型展现出稳定的上下文无关概率偏移：负面和威胁性解释的概率显著增加。这些效应泛化至训练外场景，定性补全和心理测量评估均检测到变化。不同行为模式模型表现出可分离的反应倾向，表明行为训练产生差异化策略偏差而非通用分布扭曲。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实一致性行为优化可在LLM中诱导稳定行为与分布模式，与改变的潜在先验一致，支持将LLM视为基于策略的系统。该研究为探索行为、解释与生成语言之间的关系提供了可控实验平台，具有认知建模和心理健康模拟的潜在应用价值，但未讨论合成数据真实性的局限性。

title: TransitLM: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Map-Free Transit Route Generation
abstract: Public transit route planning traditionally depends on structured map infrastructure and complex routing engines, and no existing dataset supports training models to bypass this dependency. We present TransitLM, a large-scale dataset of over 13 million transit route planning records from four Chinese cities covering 120,845 stations and 13,666 lines, released as a continual pre-training corpus and benchmark data for three evaluation tasks with complementary metrics. Experiments show that an LLM trained on TransitLM produces structurally valid routes at high accuracy and implicitly grounds arbitrary GPS coordinates to appropriate stations without any explicit mapping. These results demonstrate that transit route planning can be learned entirely from data, enabling end-to-end, map-free route generation directly from origin-destination information. The dataset and benchmark are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/GD-ML/TransitLM, with evaluation code at https://github.com/HotTricker/TransitLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出大规模公交线路规划数据集TransitLM，证明无需地图的端到端路线生成可从数据中学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统公交路线规划依赖结构化地图和复杂路由引擎，现有数据集无法支持模型绕过这种依赖。该研究旨在解决这一瓶颈，通过大规模数据实现无地图的路径生成，为简化路线规划系统提供新思路。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含13,666条线路、120,845个站点和超过1300万条记录的大规模数据集TransitLM，覆盖中国四座城市。数据集作为持续预训练语料和基准，设计三个评估任务和互补指标。使用大型语言模型（LLM）直接学习从起终点信息生成路线。
light_analysis.result: 在TransitLM上训练的LLM能高准确率生成结构有效的公交路线，且隐式地将任意GPS坐标映射到适当站点，无需显式地图匹配。实验验证了公交路线规划可完全从数据中学习。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证明了端到端、无地图路线生成的可行性，数据集和代码已开源。未来可扩展至更多城市或复杂规划任务，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: QuantSR+: Pushing the Limit of Quantized Image Super-Resolution Networks
abstract: Low-bit quantization is widely used to compress super-resolution (SR) models and reduce storage and computation costs for deployment on resource-limited devices. However, when SR models are pushed to ultra-low precision (2-4 bits), performance can drop sharply due to diminished representational capacity and the detail-sensitive nature of SR. To address these issues, we propose QuantSR+, a unified framework that improves quantization operators, network design, and training optimization, achieving better trade-offs between accuracy and efficiency than prior low-bit SR methods. QuantSR+ mainly relies on three technical contributions: (1) Redistribution-driven Bit Determination (RBD), which reshapes quantization distributions in both forward and backward passes to preserve representation fidelity; (2) Quantized Slimmable Architecture (QSA), which begins with an over-parameterized model and progressively prunes less critical blocks to meet efficiency budgets while pushing the accuracy performance; and (3) Slimming-guided Function-localized Distillation (SFD), which enforces block-aware feature alignment via a direct loss and a progressive, function-local training schedule to capture quantization effects better and speed up convergence. Extensive experiments show that QuantSR+ achieves state-of-the-art performance against both specialized quantized SR methods and generic quantization approaches. For SwinIR-S on Urban100 (x4), it improves PSNR by 0.29 dB over the 2-bit SOTA baseline. Meanwhile, it delivers strong efficiency gains at 2-bit, reducing operations by up to 87.9% and storage by 89.4%. QuantSR+ is effective for both convolutional and transformer-based SR models, indicating broad applicability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出QuantSR+统一框架，通过改进量化算子、网络设计和训练优化，在超低比特（2-4位）量化超分辨率中实现精度与效率的最佳权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 低比特量化虽能压缩超分辨率模型并降低部署成本，但在2-4位超低精度下，表示能力减弱且超分辨率对细节敏感，导致性能急剧下降。现有方法难以兼顾精度与效率，亟需新框架来突破这一瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 提出三种核心技术：1) 重分布驱动比特确定(RBD)，在前向和反向传播中重塑量化分布以保持表示保真度；2) 量化可精简架构(QSA)，从过参数化模型开始逐步剪枝非关键块以满足效率预算；3) 精简引导函数局部蒸馏(SFD)，通过直接损失和渐进训练实现块级特征对齐，加速收敛。
light_analysis.result: 在Urban100上，针对SwinIR-S模型（4倍超分），2位量化PSNR比当前最优方法提升0.29 dB；同时运算量减少87.9%，存储减少89.4%。在卷积和Transformer模型上均取得最优性能，验证了方法的广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: QuantSR+在超低精度量化超分辨率领域实现了精度与效率的突破，适用于多种模型架构，有助于在资源受限设备上部署高性能超分辨率应用。未来可进一步探索其他量化比特宽度的自适应优化。

title: Partial Fusion of Neural Networks: Efficient Tradeoffs Between Ensembles and Weight Aggregation
abstract: Ensembles of neural networks typically outperform individual networks but incur large computational costs, whereas weight aggregation produces less costly, yet also less accurate, aggregate models. We introduce partial fusion of networks, which interpolates between ensembles and weight aggregation and thus allows for a flexible tradeoff between computational cost and performance. A direct way to achieve this is to extend existing weight aggregation methods based on neuron-level similarity between different networks, where partial fusion then only aggregates weights of neurons which are most similar. We showcase one particular method to jointly identify which neurons are most similar and match them via partial optimal transport. Further, we consider the more general perspective of weight aggregation and partial fusion as generalized pruning of ensemble models, where neurons cannot just be deleted, but also linearly combined. Finally, we show that generalized pruning applied to a single network yields similar benefits as partial fusion by allowing for a tradeoff between isolating, deleting, and linearly combining neurons based on similarity. Our code is available at https://github.com/Fabian-Mor/partial_fusion_nn.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经网络部分融合方法，在集成与权重聚合之间实现计算成本与性能的灵活权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络集成通常性能优于单一网络，但计算成本高昂；权重聚合虽成本低，但精度下降明显。现有方法难以在成本和性能之间取得平衡，亟需一种能够灵活调节的融合策略，以应对实际应用中的资源约束。
light_analysis.method: 基于神经元级相似性，扩展权重聚合方法，仅聚合最相似神经元的权重。通过部分最优运输匹配相似神经元，实现部分融合。进一步将权重聚合与部分融合视为集成模型的广义剪枝，允许神经元被删除或线性组合。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，部分融合在计算成本与性能之间提供了灵活的折中方案，优于纯集成或纯权重聚合。广义剪枝应用于单一网络时也能获得类似收益，支持根据相似性隔离、删除或线性组合神经元。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种新颖的神经网络融合框架，通过部分聚合平衡效率与精度，具有理论和实用价值。未来可探索更高效的匹配算法及在其他架构上的应用。

title: Bernini: Latent Semantic Planning for Video Diffusion
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and diffusion models have each reached remarkable maturity: MLLMs excel at reasoning over heterogeneous multimodal inputs with strong semantic grounding, while diffusion models synthesize images and videos with photorealistic fidelity. We argue that these two families can be unified through a simple division of labor: MLLMs perform semantic planning, while diffusion models render pixels from high-level semantic guidance and low-level visual features. Building on this idea, we propose Bernini, a unified framework for video generation and editing. An MLLM-based planner predicts the target semantic representation directly in the ViT embedding space, and a DiT-based renderer synthesizes pixels conditioned on this plan, augmented by text features and, for editing, source VAE features for detail preservation. Because semantics serve as the interface, the planner and renderer can be trained separately and only lightly co-trained, preserving the pretrained strengths of both components while keeping training efficient. To better handle multiple visual inputs, we introduce Segment-Aware 3D Rotary Positional Embedding (SA-3D RoPE), and further incorporate chain-of-thought reasoning in the planner to better transfer understanding into generation. Bernini achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of video generation and editing benchmarks, with the MLLM's pretrained understanding translating into strong generalization on challenging editing tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Bernini框架，通过MLLM语义规划与DiT像素渲染的分工协作，实现高效视频生成与编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: MLLM和扩散模型各自成熟但未有效结合：MLLM擅长多模态语义理解，扩散模型能生成逼真像素。现有方法在视频编辑中缺乏语义引导，导致生成不一致或编辑效果差。本文提出明确分工——MLLM负责语义规划，扩散模型负责渲染，以统一两者优势，实现更可控的视频生成与编辑。
light_analysis.method: Bernini包含MLLM规划器和DiT渲染器。规划器直接在ViT嵌入空间预测目标语义表示（如编辑任务中的目标外观），渲染器基于该计划及文本、VAE特征生成视频。引入Segment-Aware 3D RoPE处理多视觉输入，并在规划器中整合思维链推理以增强语义理解。规划器和渲染器可分别预训练后轻量协同，保持各自能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视频生成和编辑基准上达到最先进性能，尤其在编辑任务中展现了强泛化性（摘要未提供具体数值）。通过分工，训练效率高，且MLLM的预训练理解能力直接转化为生成质量的提升。与基线相比，在语义一致性和视觉保真度上均有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Bernini通过简单的分工统一了MLLM和扩散模型，在视频生成和编辑任务中取得SOTA。框架设计保持了组件预训练优势，训练高效。其语义-像素接口使规划器与渲染器可独立优化，为多模态生成提供了新范式。未来可探索更复杂的语义规划策略及多步协同训练。

title: 4D-GSW: Kinematic-Aware Spatio-Temporal Consistent Watermarking for 4D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: While 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) has revolutionized high-fidelity dynamic reconstruction, safeguarding the intellectual property of these assets remains an open challenge. Conventional steganographic techniques often neglect the underlying kinematic manifolds, triggering non-physical artifacts such as severe temporal flickering and "FVD collapse". To address this, we propose \textbf{4D-GSW}, a kinematic-aware watermarking framework designed to embed robust copyright information while preserving high spatio-temporal consistency. Unlike prior 4D steganography that primarily focuses on opacity-guided invisibility, our approach explicitly addresses the physical coherence of motion trajectories. We introduce a \textbf{Spatio-Temporal Curvature (STC)} metric to identify "Dynamic Instants," adaptively gating watermark gradient injection to shield critical motion manifolds from non-physical perturbations. To ensure global coherence across complex deformations, we formulate a joint \textbf{HMM-MRF energy minimization} model that synchronizes watermark phases within both temporal trajectories and spatial neighborhoods. Furthermore, an \textbf{anisotropic gradient routing} mechanism ensures that watermark embedding remains strictly decoupled from photometric reconstruction fidelity. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the superior performance of our method in robustly hiding watermarks while resisting various attacks and maintaining high rendering quality and spatiotemporal consistency.
comment: 9 pages main paper, 7 figures, 18 pages in total

light_analysis.overview: 提出4D-GSW，一种感知运动学的水印框架，在4D高斯喷洒中嵌入版权信息，保持时空一致性和物理运动流形的完整性。
light_analysis.motivation: 4D高斯喷洒在动态重建中效果显著，但现有水印技术忽略运动流形，导致非物理伪影如时间闪烁和FVD崩溃，无法有效保护知识产权。本文旨在解决这些不足，确保水印嵌入不影响物理运动轨迹的连贯性。
light_analysis.method: 引入时空曲率度量识别动态瞬间，自适应门控水印梯度注入以保护运动流形；构建HMM-MRF能量最小化模型同步时空域水印相位；采用各向异性梯度路由机制使水印嵌入与光度重建解耦。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在鲁棒隐藏水印的同时，能抵抗多种攻击，并保持高渲染质量和时空一致性，优于现有隐写技术，避免了时间闪烁和FVD崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 4D-GSW为4D动态资产的版权保护提供了有效方案，兼顾水印鲁棒性与时空一致性，但摘要未提及局限性，未来可探索更复杂变形和攻击下的扩展。

title: A Boundary-Layer Mechanism for One-Third Scaling in Online Softmax Classification
abstract: Hard-label classification is usually trained with smooth surrogate losses, most prominently softmax cross-entropy. We isolate an asymptotic mechanism by which this mismatch between smooth surrogate and discrete labels produces power-law learning curves in an online teacher-student model. After subtracting the mean logit, the thermodynamic-limit dynamics close in centered variables: a growing centered student-teacher alignment $D$ and the residual student variance $Δ$. At late times, examples away from teacher decision boundaries are already classified confidently and contribute exponentially little. Only boundary layers of width $O(D^{-1})$ remain active, while the noise of fixed-learning-rate online gradient descent maintains a nonzero $Δ$. As a function of the training time $α$ the late-time solution yields a $α^{-1/3}$ power law not only for the test loss but also for the generalization error $ε_g$, i.e., one minus test accuracy. This is much slower than the $α^{-1}$ Bayes-optimal reference for the same model. We further show that learning-rate schedules can improve the generalization error towards a $ε_g \sim α^{-1/2}$ power law. Simulations support the predicted order parameter dynamics and learning curves. Controlled experiments with correlated Gaussian inputs and whitened pretrained features show that data structure can dominate transients. Therefore, our result is an asymptotic, complementary mechanism rather than an alternative to spectral explanations of neural scaling laws.

light_analysis.overview: 本文发现软最大分类中边界层机制导致在线学习的泛化误差呈α^{-1/3}幂律缩放。
light_analysis.motivation: 硬标签分类通常使用软最大交叉熵等平滑代理损失，但这种不匹配会导致幂律学习曲线。现有理论多聚焦于谱解释，但缺乏对离散标签与平滑损失间渐近机制的深入分析。研究旨在隔离并解释这种机制，揭示其如何产生慢于贝叶斯最优的缩放行为，并为通过学习率调度改善性能提供理论依据。
light_analysis.method: 采用在线教师-学生模型，在热力学极限下封闭中心化变量动力学：学生-教师对齐D和残差方差Δ。研究发现，远离教师决策边界的样本被快速正确分类，仅边界层（宽度~D^{-1}）活跃。固定学习率的随机梯度下降噪声维持非零Δ，导致测试损失和泛化误差ε_g随时间α呈α^{-1/3}幂律。进一步理论推导显示，适当的学习率调度可将幂律提升至α^{-1/2}。
light_analysis.result: 理论预测泛化误差ε_g随训练步数α呈α^{-1/3}幂律，远慢于贝叶斯最优的α^{-1}。模拟结果验证了序参量动力学和学习曲线。使用学习率调度后，ε_g可改进至α^{-1/2}。相关高斯输入和白化预训练特征的对照实验表明，数据结构主导瞬态行为，证实该机制为渐近互补机制而非谱解释的替代。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了在线软最大分类中边界层驱动的1/3幂律缩放机制，为理解神经网络学习曲线的产生提供新视角。该机制是渐近且互补的，与数据谱结构共同作用。未来可探索更复杂模型中的边界层效应及自适应学习率策略的优化。局限性在于理论假设教师-学生线性可分，非线性扩展仍待研究。

title: From Snapshots to Trajectories: Learning Single-Cell Gene Expression Dynamics via Conditional Flow Matching
abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) provides high-dimensional profiles of cellular states, enabling data-driven modeling of cellular dynamics over time. In practice, time-resolved scRNA-seq is collected at only a few discrete time points as unpaired snapshot populations, leaving substantial temporal gaps. This motivates trajectory inference at unmeasured time points. Existing methods mainly follow two directions, optimal-transport (OT) alignment provides distribution-level matching between observed snapshots, while continuous-time generative models support forecasting via learned dynamics. However, two challenges remain: (i) unpaired snapshots render local transitions between adjacent time points ambiguous, leading to unstable supervision; and (ii) long-horizon prediction relies on repeated integration, where small modeling errors compound and cause distribution drift. To address these challenges, we propose single-cell Flow Matching (scFM), a latent generative framework based on coupling-conditioned flow matching. First, we compute entropically regularized OT couplings between adjacent snapshots and use them to construct soft, weighted flow-matching targets for learning time-dependent velocity fields. Second, we learn bidirectional velocity fields and leverage their consistency to refine couplings and improve temporal coherence under sparse supervision. Third, we introduce distribution-level alignment and latent dynamic regularization to anchor long rollouts and mitigate drift. Experiments on real-world time-series scRNA-seq datasets show that scFM consistently improves distributional prediction performance for both temporal interpolation and extrapolation. Moreover, scFM yields more accurate trajectory reconstruction and temporally coherent visualizations where intermediate time points are absent, indicating a more faithful recovery of underlying temporal gene expression dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于耦合条件流匹配的单细胞RNA-seq时间序列轨迹推断方法，解决稀疏快照间的分布漂移和长程预测问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 单细胞RNA测序在离散时间点采集未配对的快照数据，存在时间间隙，现有最优传输方法仅提供分布级对齐，连续生成模型因未配对快照导致局部转换模糊且长程预测误差累积。需要一种能利用稀疏监督的轨迹推断方法，提高时间相干性并减少分布漂移。
light_analysis.method: 提出scFM框架，基于耦合条件流匹配。首先计算相邻快照间的熵正则化最优传输耦合，构造软权重流匹配目标学习时变速度场；其次学习双向速度场并利用一致性约束优化耦合，增强稀疏监督下的时间连贯性；最后引入分布级对齐和潜在动态正则化抑制长程预测漂移。
light_analysis.result: 在真实时间序列单细胞RNA-seq数据集上，scFM在时间插值和外推的分布预测性能上持续提升，轨迹重建更准确，缺失中间时间点的可视化更连贯，表明更忠实地恢复了潜在时间基因表达动态。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: scFM通过耦合条件流匹配有效解决了未配对快照的轨迹推断挑战，提高了预测的分布保真度和时间相干性。方法可应用于细胞动态建模，未来可能扩展到多模态数据或更复杂的动态系统。

title: Physics-Informed Generative Solver: Bridging Data-Driven Priors and Conservation Laws for Stable Spatiotemporal Field Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing continuous physical fields from sparse measurements is a central inverse problem, but data-driven generative models can produce states that violate governing dynamics. We introduce a physics-informed generative solver that separates stable prior learning from inference-time enforcement of conservation laws. Martingale-Regularized Score Matching regularizes score pretraining with a Score Fokker-Planck constraint, yielding a dynamically stable prior. Physics-Informed Implicit Score Sampling then guides denoising trajectories by gradients of physical residuals, projecting samples toward admissible manifolds without retraining. In acoustics, the method co-generates pressure and particle velocity from sparse sensors, enabling dense virtual arrays that suppress spatial aliasing. The same framework generalizes to real-world ERA5 meteorological fields under extreme sparsity. Together, this work establishes a rigorous and generalizable paradigm for solving high-dimensional inverse problems, bridging the gap between generative artificial intelligence and first-principles science.

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息生成求解器，结合数据驱动先验和守恒定律，实现稳定的时空场重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏测量重建连续物理场是逆问题核心，但数据驱动生成模型易产生违反物理定律的状态。现有方法缺乏对守恒定律的硬约束，导致预测不稳定。该工作旨在桥接数据驱动先验与物理守恒，实现高保真重建。
light_analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 马氏正则化分数匹配，通过得分Fokker-Planck约束正则化分数预训练，获得动态稳定先验；2) 物理信息隐式分数采样，利用物理残差梯度引导去噪轨迹，将样本投影至允许流形，无需重新训练。在声学中联合生成压力和粒子速度，抑制空间混叠；并泛化至极端稀疏的ERA5气象场。
light_analysis.result: 在声学场景中，该方法从稀疏传感器联合生成压力和粒子速度，构建密集虚拟阵列，有效抑制空间混叠。在真实ERA5气象场极端稀疏条件下，同样框架成功重建物理场。摘要未给出具体数值，但表明方法在多个领域优于纯数据驱动模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了一种严格且可泛化的高维逆问题求解范式，弥合生成式AI与第一性原理科学的鸿沟。学术价值在于提供物理约束与生成模型融合的理论框架，实际应用可用于传感器稀疏部署下的物理场监测。未来可扩展至更多物理系统及实时重建。

title: Meta-Soft: Leveraging Composable Meta-Tokens for Context-Preserving KV Cache Compression
abstract: The KV cache used in large language models has linearly growing time complexity, so LLMs face memory blow-up and reduced decoding efficiency when they process long contexts.Current KV Cache eviction has become an important research direction; however, existing methods based on fixed Soft Tokens (e.g., Judge Q) rely on a static parameter set as the query to evaluate the importance of KV pairs, so they cannot adapt dynamically to different input prompts, and they cannot precisely capture complex and changing task relevance.Also, evicted KV pairs are discarded permanently, so this causes irreversible information loss and context breaks. To address this problem, we propose Meta-Soft, a dynamic compression framework based on probe-driven context integration. Specifically, we build a meta-library with a learnable orthogonal basis matrix $\mathcal{L}$, and we use a selector network with Gumbel-Softmax to produce differentiable sparse combination weights, so we dynamically synthesize the most targeted $k$ Soft Tokens from the input prompt features.We append these Soft Tokens to the end of the input sequence to probe key information. We also introduce an attention-flow based integration mechanism, which redistributes the semantic information of removed tokens into retained tokens, and this keeps the dropped context information effectively.Experiments on multiple datasets show that our method outperforms existing state-of-the-art eviction methods and provides a new solution for KV Cache compression.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Meta-Soft动态压缩框架，通过可组合元令牌和注意力流集成，在KV缓存压缩中保留上下文。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有KV缓存剔除方法基于固定软令牌，不能动态适应输入提示，且剔除后信息永久丢失导致上下文断裂。因此需要一种能动态合成软令牌并保留被剔除信息的压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建可学习正交基矩阵的元库，用Gumbel-Softmax选择网络从输入特征动态合成k个软令牌，附加到序列末探测关键信息；引入注意力流集成机制，将被移除令牌的语义信息重新分配到保留令牌中，实现上下文保持。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上实验，Meta-Soft优于现有最先进剔除方法，证明其有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Meta-Soft为KV缓存压缩提供了新解决方案，能动态适应输入并保留上下文。未来可探索更高效的注意力流集成策略。

title: Learning Causal Orderings for In-Context Tabular Prediction
abstract: In-context learning for tabular data sets strong predictive standards in observational settings; it however primarily relies on correlational structure, which becomes unreliable under distribution shift or intervention. While established methods to discover causal structure exist, they are often focused on structure identifiability and decoupled from the predictive architectures that could benefit from them.   To bridge these perspectives, we study how to simultaneously infer and enforce causal structure in the form of topological variable orderings into tabular prediction. Unlike standard architectures, our model TabOrder uses causal order-constrained attention, basing predictions only on features that precede a target under a learned causal order. Similar to causal discovery methods, TabOrder learns the optimal variable ordering in an unsupervised manner through a likelihood-based objective. We justify this choice under standard functional model classes and also study how sample missingness, a common challenge in tabular data, interacts with causal direction identification. Empirically, we confirm that TabOrder recovers accurate variable orderings while addressing prediction and imputation tasks, as well as gives insight into real-world biological data under intervention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TabOrder模型，通过因果顺序约束的注意力机制，在表格预测中同时推断和强制执行因果结构，提升分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文学习在表格数据中依赖相关性，在分布偏移或干预下不可靠；现有因果发现方法多关注结构可识别性，与预测架构脱节。本文旨在弥合两者鸿沟，使预测模型能受益于因果结构。
light_analysis.method: TabOrder采用因果顺序约束的注意力机制，仅基于因果顺序中先于目标的特征进行预测。通过无监督似然目标学习最优变量顺序，并研究数据缺失与因果方向识别的交互，适用于标准函数模型类。
light_analysis.result: 实验证实TabOrder能恢复准确的变量顺序，在预测和插补任务上表现优异；在真实生物数据干预下提供有意义的因果见解，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将因果顺序学习融入上下文表格预测，增强了模型对分布变化的鲁棒性。未来可扩展至更复杂因果图，并应用于需要可靠干预推断的领域。

title: Riemannian geometry meets fMRI: the advantages of modeling correlation manifolds and eigenvector subspaces
abstract: Correlation matrices are fundamental summaries of functional brain networks, yet standard analyses often treat entries independently, ignoring the curved geometry of correlation space. Existing geometric methods frequently lack closed-form operations or depend on arbitrary region ordering, limiting scalability. We introduce a scalable geometric framework with two components: (i) the Off-log metric, a smooth transformation mapping correlation matrices to symmetric zero-diagonal matrices. This enables closed-form expressions for distances, Frechet means, and linear models, allowing standard statistical modeling without complex manifold optimization. (ii) Grassmannian subspace discrimination, which compares subjects via principal-angle distances between eigenvector subspaces, resolving inherent sign and basis ambiguities. Both components integrate into standard machine-learning workflows for inference, regression, and classification. Validated across two clinical cohorts (Parkinson's and psychosis) and three ageing fMRI datasets, the Off-log metric increased sensitivity in permutation tests and matched or exceeded Riemannian and Euclidean baselines in classification. Brain-age prediction performance was comparable, with Riemannian metrics excelling in two of three cohorts. The Grassmannian method consistently outperformed Euclidean baselines, highlighting disease-relevant networks. Overall, geometry-aware representations improve sensitivity and predictive performance while remaining straightforward to deploy at scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了将Off-log度量与Grassmannian子空间判别结合的几何框架，用于fMRI相关矩阵分析，在保持闭式计算的同时提升敏感性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 功能脑网络的相关矩阵分析通常忽略其弯曲几何，现有几何方法缺乏闭式操作或依赖区域排序，难以大规模应用。该研究旨在开发一种既能捕捉相关流形几何结构又能无缝集成到标准机器学习流程中的方法，以提升统计敏感性和预测性能。
light_analysis.method: 框架包括两部分：(i) Off-log度量，将相关矩阵平滑映射到对称零对角矩阵，支持距离、Frechet均值和线性模型的闭式表达，无需复杂优化；(ii) Grassmannian子空间判别，通过特征向量子空间的主角距离比较被试，解决符号和基模糊性。两者均整合到标准机器学习工作流中。
light_analysis.result: 在两个临床队列（帕金森病和精神病）及三个老化fMRI数据集上验证。Off-log度量在置换检验中敏感性更高，分类性能达到或超越Riemannian和Euclidean基线；Grassmannian方法始终优于Euclidean基线，并识别出疾病相关网络。脑龄预测中Riemannian度量的在两个队列中表现最佳。
light_analysis.conclusion: 几何感知表示提升了功能脑网络分析的敏感性和预测性能，且易于大规模部署。该框架提供了实用的工具，未来可推广至其他协方差分析场景，如EEG或基因表达数据。
