title: SepsisAI Orchestrator: A Containerized and Scalable Platform for Deploying AI Models and Real-Time Monitoring in Early Sepsis Detection
abstract: Despite strong predictive results in the clinical machine learning literature, the translation of these models into bedside use remains limited by systems-level barriers: heterogeneous data representations, the absence of standardized deployment workflows, and a mismatch between research prototypes and the concurrency and latency requirements of hospital environments. We present the SepsisAI-Orchestrator, an open-source modular platform that addresses this deployment gap for early sepsis detection. The platform integrates HL7 FHIR-inspired Clinical Document Architecture (CDA) preprocessing, NoSQL storage, a containerized LightGBM classifier served via REST APIs, and a Streamlit clinical dashboard, orchestrated with Docker and Kubernetes. A previously validated LightGBM model (F1 0.87-0.94 on PhysioNet 2019) is reused without modification; the contribution lies in the surrounding infrastructure and its empirical characterization under load. Using k6 with 50-1000 concurrent virtual users, we find that replica count must be matched to the physical CPU thread count of the host: scaling from 3 to 12 replicas on a 12-thread CPU reduces p95 latency from 3.3s to 1.41s (57.3% reduction) and eliminates all request failures, while over-provisioning to 24 or 48 replicas degrades performance due to scheduler contention. To our knowledge this U-shaped scaling behavior has not been quantified previously for clinical AI inference workloads. We do not claim prospective clinical validation. Source code and deployment manifests are available at https://github.com/nucleusai/sepsisai-orchestrator.
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to BioCARLA 2025 Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 提出SepsisAI-Orchestrator，一个容器化可扩展平台，解决早期败血症检测AI模型的部署障碍，并实证发现临床AI推理工作负载的U形缩放行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管临床机器学习模型在预测上表现优异，但模型向病床应用的转化仍受限于系统级障碍：异构数据表示、缺乏标准化部署工作流、研究原型与医院环境的并发和延迟需求不匹配。现有方法未充分解决这些部署问题，导致研究成果难以实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 构建开源模块化平台，集成HL7 FHIR启发的CDA预处理、NoSQL存储、容器化LightGBM分类器（通过REST API服务）和Streamlit临床仪表盘，使用Docker和Kubernetes编排。重用先前验证的LightGBM模型（PhysioNet 2019上F1 0.87-0.94），贡献在于基础设施及负载特征分析。
light_analysis.result: 使用k6模拟50-1000并发虚拟用户测试，发现副本数需匹配主机CPU物理线程数：12线程CPU上，从3个副本扩至12个，p95延迟从3.3s降至1.41s（减少57.3%），消除所有请求失败；过度扩展到24或48副本因调度竞争导致性能下降。首次量化临床AI推理工作负载的U形缩放行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: SepsisAI-Orchestrator为临床AI模型部署提供了标准化、可扩展的解决方案，并通过负载测试揭示了关键缩放规律。代码和部署清单已开源。未进行前瞻性临床验证，未来可进一步优化调度策略并开展临床研究。

title: 3D LULC classification using multispectral LiDAR and deep learning: current and prospective schemes
abstract: Land Use Land Cover (LULC) classification is essential for national 3D mapping, geospatial analysis, and sustainable planning. Multispectral (MS) LiDAR provides synchronized spatial-spectral information, and deep learning (DL) enables 3D point cloud semantic segmentation; however, adoption is limited by the lack of publicly available urban and suburban MS LiDAR datasets aligned with National Mapping and Cadastral Agencies (NMCAs) classification schemes. This study addresses these gaps by introducing L1 and L2 NMCA-aligned LULC classification schemes and a new benchmark MS LiDAR dataset. We evaluate seven state-of-the-art DL models and perform spectral ablation studies at both levels of detail. Results show that Point Transformer V3 achieves the best performance, with mIoU of 79.4% (L1, 8 classes) and 58.9% (L2, 20 classes) using a dual-wavelength LiDAR system (532 nm and 1064 nm). Ablation results show that multispectral information improves performance over geometry-only inputs, with gains of 1.1 percentage points at L1 and 7.8 points at L2. These results highlight the value of LiDAR reflectance for fine-grained material discrimination and support the evolution of NMCA LULC schemes toward higher semantic detail. The Loosdorf-MSL dataset contributes a new benchmark for consistent national and international LULC mapping.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NMCA对齐的LULC分类方案和新基准数据集，评估深度学习模型，Point Transformer V3最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 土地利用土地覆盖分类对3D制图和可持续发展至关重要，但多光谱LiDAR和深度学习的结合受限于公开的城市/郊区多光谱LiDAR数据集缺乏，且未与国家测绘机构分类方案对齐。现有方法无法充分利用光谱信息进行细粒度语义分割。
light_analysis.method: 引入L1（8类）和L2（20类）两个NMCA对齐的分类方案，并发布Loosdorf-MSL基准数据集。评估七个深度学习方法，包括Point Transformer V3等，使用双波长LiDAR系统（532nm和1064nm）。通过光谱消融实验分析多光谱信息贡献。
light_analysis.result: Point Transformer V3性能最佳，L1 mIoU 79.4%，L2 mIoU 58.9%。光谱消融表明，多光谱输入相比仅几何输入在L1和L2分别提升1.1和7.8个百分点，证明多光谱信息对细粒度材料判别有价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提供了NMCA对齐的分类方案和基准数据集，验证了多光谱LiDAR结合深度学习的有效性。Point Transformer V3表现优越，多光谱信息显著提升细粒度分类。未来可扩展更多波长和场景，推动国家与国际LULC制图标准化。

title: Robustness of breast lesion segmentation under MRI undersampling improves with k-space-aware deep learning
abstract: Purpose: To assess whether breast lesion segmentation can be learned directly from acquired MRI k-space, and whether doing so improves robustness when data are accelerated or noisy.   Materials and Methods: This retrospective study used public breast dynamic contrast-enhanced MRI (DCE-MRI) datasets with acquired and synthetic k-space, together with a within-dataset synthetic control. We compared four 3D U-Net variants: a hybrid k-space-to-image model, a native k-space model, and magnitude and complex image-space baselines. Models were evaluated under increasing undersampling and added complex Gaussian k-space noise. The primary outcome was patient-level Dice similarity coefficient under cross-validation, with the hybrid model prespecified as the main comparison against the magnitude image-space baseline.   Results: At full sampling, the hybrid and image-space models performed similarly. As acceleration increased, the hybrid model retained substantially more segmentation accuracy and significantly outperformed the magnitude image-space baseline across moderate to high undersampling levels. The same pattern was observed when noise was added directly to k-space: the hybrid model degraded more slowly, whereas the image-space baseline failed under heavier noise. This advantage was reproduced in the within-dataset synthetic control. Feature analysis suggested that the k-space stage and image-space stage played complementary roles, with frequency-domain filtering concentrated before image-domain lesion localization.   Conclusion: K-space-aware deep learning improves the robustness of breast lesion segmentation under MRI undersampling and k-space noise, while matching image-space methods at full sampling.

light_analysis.overview: 提出k-space感知的深度学习模型，提高乳腺病变分割在MRI欠采样和噪声下的鲁棒性，且在全采样时性能与图像空间方法相当。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于图像空间的乳腺病变分割方法在MRI加速或添加噪声时性能显著下降。该研究探讨是否可以直接从采集的k-space学习分割，以提高对欠采样和噪声的鲁棒性。这一问题对于临床MRI加速和图像质量保证具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 采用公开乳腺DCE-MRI数据集，比较四种3D U-Net变体：混合k-space-to-image模型、原生k-space模型、幅度和复数图像空间基线。在递增欠采样和加性高斯k-space噪声下评估，使用患者级Dice相似系数作为主要指标，并设置合成控制。
light_analysis.result: 全采样时混合模型与图像空间基线性能相似。随加速增加，混合模型保留更多分割精度，在中高欠采样水平显著优于幅度图像空间基线。添加k-space噪声时混合模型退化更慢，而图像空间基线在重噪声下失效。特征分析显示频域滤波与图像域定位互补。
light_analysis.conclusion: K-space感知深度学习可提升乳腺病变分割在欠采样和噪声下的鲁棒性，同时在全采样时与图像空间方法匹配。该技术有望在加速MRI扫描中保持分割准确性，具有临床实用价值，但可能依赖特定k-space轨迹。

title: PIU: Proximity-guided Identity Unlearning in ID-Conditioned Diffusion Models
abstract: Identity-conditioned diffusion models enable high-quality and identity-consistent face generation, but they also raise severe privacy concerns, as models may continue to synthesize individuals despite their right to be forgotten. While machine unlearning has been extensively studied for concept and data removal, identity unlearning remains largely unexplored, particularly in models conditioned directly on identity embeddings rather than text prompts. In this work, we study identity unlearning in Arc2Face, a state-of-the-art identity-conditioned latent diffusion model for face generation, and introduce Proximity-guided Identity Unlearning (PIU), an anchor-guided framework for identity unlearning. Specifically, we formulate identity removal as an identity replacement objective that reassigns the source identity to a selected anchor identity in the learned identity space, and we complement it with a proximity-based anchor selection strategy motivated by the geometry of ArcFace representations. We further show that effective unlearning can be achieved through localized fine-tuning of a small subset of identity-sensitive cross-attention layers. Experiments across many target identities show that our framework effectively suppresses generation of the target identity while preserving realism and identity consistency for retained identities, as validated by improved performance on unlearning and image-quality metrics, together with qualitative evaluation. The source code for the PIU framework is publicly available at https://github.com/edgarcancinoe/piu_unlearning .

light_analysis.overview: 提出邻近引导的身份遗忘（PIU）框架，首次研究身份条件扩散模型中的身份遗忘，通过锚点重分配和局部微调实现有效遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 身份条件扩散模型能生成高质量、身份一致的人脸图像，但存在隐私风险，模型可能在被要求遗忘后仍能生成特定个体的图像。现有机器遗忘研究主要针对概念或数据删除，缺乏对身份遗忘的探索，尤其是在直接使用身份嵌入而非文本提示的模型中。因此，需要一种方法能在保持生成质量的同时有效删除特定身份信息。
light_analysis.method: 提出邻近引导身份遗忘（PIU）框架，基于Arc2Face模型。核心创新：将身份移除定义为在身份空间中用选定的锚点身份替换源身份的目标，并利用ArcFace表示的几何特性提出基于邻近性的锚点选择策略。通过局部微调少量身份敏感的交叉注意力层实现有效遗忘，无需全面训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个目标身份上的实验表明，PIU框架能有效抑制目标身份的生成，同时保持其他身份的真实性和一致性。通过遗忘和图像质量指标的改进以及定性评估验证了性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: PIU框架解决了身份条件扩散模型中的隐私问题，通过锚点引导和局部微调实现了高效的身份遗忘。该工作具有学术价值，为模型隐私保护提供了新思路；实际应用中可赋予用户删除个人面部数据的权利。未来可扩展至其他身份条件模型，或探索更多遗忘策略。

title: Pattern-and-root inflectional morphology: the Arabic broken plural
abstract: We present a substantially implemented model of description of the inflectional morphology of Arabic nouns, with special attention to the management of dictionaries and other language resources by Arabic-speaking linguists. The breakthrough lies in the reversal of the traditional root-and-pattern Semitic model into pattern-and-root, giving precedence to patterns over roots. Our model includes broken plurals (BPs), i.e. plurals formed by modifying the stem. It is based on the traditional notions of root and pattern of Semitic morphology. However, as compared to traditional Arabic morphology, it keeps the formal description of inflection separate from that of derivation and semantics. As traditional Arabic dictionaries, the updatable dictionary is structured in lexical entries for lemmas, and the reference spelling is fully diacritized. In our model, morphological analysis of Arabic text is performed directly with a dictionary of words and without morphophonological rules. Our taxonomy for noun inflection is simple, orderly and detailed. We simplify the taxonomy of singular patterns by specifying vowel quantity as v or vv, and ignoring vowel quality. Root alternations and orthographical variations are encoded independently from patterns and in a factual way, without deep roots or morphophonological or orthographical rules. Nouns with a triliteral BP are classified according to 22 patterns subdivided into 90 classes, and nouns with a quadriliteral BP according to 3 patterns subdivided into 70 classes. These 160 classes become 300 inflectional classes when we take into account inflectional variations that affect only the singular. We provide a straightforward encoding scheme that we applied to 3 200 entries of BP nouns.

light_analysis.overview: 提出模式-根模型反转传统根-模式，用于阿拉伯语名词屈折形态，特别是破碎复数的系统描述。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统阿拉伯语形态学基于根-模式，但将屈折与派生、语义混在一起，且词典管理复杂。现有方法依赖形态音位规则，导致描述繁琐。本研究旨在为讲阿拉伯语的 linguists 提供简单、有序的屈折形态分类模型，便于词典构建和语言资源管理，并有效处理破碎复数这一复杂现象。
light_analysis.method: 采用模式-根模型，优先模式而非根，保持屈折与派生分离。名词分类基于元音数量（v/vv）忽略元音质量，词根交替和拼写变异独立编码。将三字母和四字母破碎复数分别分类为22/3个模式，细分为90/70类，考虑单数变化后共300个屈折类。使用3,200个条目验证编码方案，直接通过词典进行形态分析。
light_analysis.result: 建立了包含300个屈折类的详细分类体系，覆盖3,200个破碎复数名词条目。实现了形态分析无需形态音位规则，直接基于词典进行。分类简单有序：三字母复数22模式（90子类），四字母复数3模式（70子类），单数变化引入额外140类。编码方案已实际应用于大量词汇，验证了可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本模型为阿拉伯语名词屈折形态提供了系统化描述框架，简化了词典管理和语言处理。学术上，反转根-模式视角丰富了闪米特形态学理论。实际应用有助于阿拉伯语计算语言学、电子词典开发和语言教学。未来可扩展至动词等其他词类，并评估自动分析性能。

title: Chebyshev Policies and the Mountain Car Problem: Reinforcement Learning for Low-Dimensional Control Tasks
abstract: We analytically solve the Mountain Car problem, a canonical benchmark in RL, and derive an optimal control solution, closing a gap after 36 years. This enables us to reveal two surprising insights: The optimal control is quite simple, yet modern RL agents display a large gap to optimality. Motivated by the analysis of the optimal control, we introduce Chebyshev policies as a universal (i.e. dense) class of RL policies from first principles. They can be trained as drop-in replacements of neural nets, reducing the regret by a factor of 4.18, while requiring 277 times fewer parameters, fostering sample efficiency, explainability and realtime capability. Chebyshev policies are evaluated on further RL tasks, including a real-world nonlinear motion control testbed. They consistently improve performance over neural nets with PPO, ARS and REINFORCE. Our results demonstrate how Chebyshev policies offer a compelling and lightweight alternative or addition to neural nets for low-dimensional control tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 解析Mountain Car问题的最优控制，提出Chebyshev策略作为轻量级替代神经网络。
light_analysis.motivation: Mountain Car问题作为强化学习基准已有36年，但最优控制解未知，现代RL代理与最优解差距大。现有方法依赖神经网络，参数多、样本效率低、可解释性差。需要一种简单高效的政策表示方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先解析求解Mountain Car问题得到最优控制解，揭示其简单结构。基于此，从第一性原理提出Chebyshev策略，用Chebyshev多项式逼近政策函数，作为神经网络的即插即用替代。在多个任务上使用PPO、ARS和REINFORCE算法训练。
light_analysis.result: Chebyshev策略在Mountain Car上遗憾降低4.18倍，参数减少277倍。在真实世界非线性运动控制测试台及其他RL任务中，一致优于神经网络。提高了样本效率、可解释性和实时性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Chebyshev策略为低维控制任务提供了轻量级替代，显著减少参数并提升性能。未来可扩展到更高维任务或结合神经网络。局限性可能在于高维空间下的表示能力。

title: Evaluation of Pipelines for Data Integration into Knowledge Graphs
abstract: Integrating new data into knowledge graphs (KG) typically involves different tasks that are executed within workflows or pipelines There are many possible pipelines for a specific integration problem but there is not yet a general approach to evaluate the overall quality and performance of such pipelines to be able to determine the best choices. We therefore propose a new benchmark KGI-Bench to evaluate integration pipelines that ingest different kinds of input data into an existing KG. We evaluate pipelines by analyzing their output, i.e., the updated KG, with the three complementary quality metrics coverage, correctness and consistency. We also provide benchmark datasets (seed KG, overlapping input data of three formats, reference KG as a ground truth) for the movie domain. To demonstrate the applicability and usefulness of the proposed benchmark, we comparatively evaluate 12 pipelines and analyze their behavior across different input data formats and design choices.

light_analysis.overview: 提出KGI-Bench基准，用于评估数据集成到知识图谱的管道质量，通过三个互补指标衡量。
light_analysis.motivation: 将新数据集成到知识图谱通常涉及工作流或管道中的不同任务，但针对特定集成问题存在多种可能的管道，缺乏通用的评估方法来衡量管道的整体质量和性能，以确定最佳选择。因此，需要一种系统的方法来评估集成管道，以便用户能够做出明智的决策。
light_analysis.method: 提出KGI-Bench基准，通过分析集成管道的输出（即更新后的知识图谱），使用三个互补的质量指标：覆盖度、正确性和一致性。提供基准数据集，包括种子知识图谱、三种格式的重叠输入数据、作为真实参考的知识图谱，针对电影领域。通过比较评估12个管道，分析不同输入数据格式和设计选择下的行为。
light_analysis.result: 通过KGI-Bench基准，对12个数据集成管道进行了比较评估，分析了它们在不同输入数据格式和设计选择下的表现。实验结果显示了各管道在覆盖度、正确性和一致性方面的差异，验证了基准的有效性和实用性，能够帮助确定最佳管道选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: KGI-Bench为评估知识图谱数据集成管道提供了系统化的基准，通过三个质量指标全面衡量管道性能。该基准有助于用户选择最佳集成策略，提升知识图谱构建的可靠性和效率。未来可扩展到其他领域，并考虑更多质量维度。

title: Cross-domain benchmarks reveal when coordinated AI agents improve scientific inference from partial evidence
abstract: Scientific evidence often spans instruments, databases, and disciplines, so no single source records the full phenomenon. This makes it difficult to determine when coordinated AI agents add value over simpler scientific workflows. We evaluate this question with a cross-domain benchmark spanning four scientific tasks: mapping molecular structure into musical representations, detecting historical paradigm shifts in science, identifying vector-borne disease emergence, and vetting transiting-exoplanet candidates. Each case uses a frozen evaluation panel, predefined scoring protocols, explicit baselines, ablations or null controls, and stated limitations. The results define three operating regimes. When different disciplines each capture only part of the phenomenon, cross-channel composites improve over single-channel baselines: climate-vector emergence reaches AUROC 0.944 and exoplanet vetting reaches AUROC 0.955. However, the exoplanet workflow is effectively tied with a strong combined-summary baseline, showing that decomposition does not always improve top-line performance. When one signal dominates, as in paradigm-shift detection, coordination mainly improves interpretation and traceability. For molecular sonification, the gain is representational rather than predictive. ScienceClaw x Infinite provides the auditable artifact and provenance layer for this evaluation. The benchmark therefore assigns value to coordination only when the corresponding performance, provenance, or representation claim is supported by explicit comparators.

light_analysis.overview: 通过跨领域基准测试，系统评估了协调AI agent在部分证据下改善科学推理的适用条件，定义了三个操作机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学证据常分散于不同仪器、数据库和学科，单一源无法记录完整现象。现有方法缺乏系统性评估，难以确定何时协调AI agent比简单工作流更有价值。本研究旨在通过跨领域基准明确其适用条件。
light_analysis.method: 构建跨领域基准，涵盖四个科学任务：分子结构到音乐表示、科学范式转移检测、病媒传播疾病涌现、系外行星候选筛选。每个任务使用固定评估面板、预定义评分协议、显式基线、消融或空对照，并说明局限性。定义三个操作机制，通过ScienceClaw x Infinite提供审计层。
light_analysis.result: 定义了三个机制：不同学科各捕获部分现象时，跨通道复合优于单通道基线（气候向量AUROC 0.944，系外行星AUROC 0.955）；但系外行星工作流与强组合基线持平。单信号主导时协调主要改善解释性；分子声化增益为表征性。基准要求明确比较器支持性能、来源或表征声明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该基准明确了协调AI agent仅当有明确比较器支持相应声明时才增加价值，为科学工作流设计提供了指导。研究具有重要学术和实际价值，未来可扩展更多任务和评估指标。

title: One LR Doesn't Fit All: Heavy-Tail Guided Layerwise Learning Rates for LLMs
abstract: Learning rate configuration is a fundamental aspect of modern deep learning. The prevailing practice of applying a uniform learning rate across all layers overlooks the structural heterogeneity of Transformers, potentially limiting their effectiveness as the backbone of Large Language Models (LLMs). In this paper, we introduce Layerwise Learning Rate (LLR), an adaptive scheme that assigns distinct learning rates to individual Transformer layers. Our method is grounded in Heavy-Tailed Self-Regularization (HT-SR) theory, which characterizes the empirical spectral density (ESD) of weight correlation matrices to quantify heavy-tailedness. Layers with weaker heavy-tailedness are assigned larger learning rates to accelerate their training, while layers with stronger heavy-tailedness receive smaller learning rates. By tailoring learning rates in this manner, LLR promotes balanced training across layers, leading to faster convergence and improved generalization. Extensive experiments across architectures (from LLaMA to GPT-nano), optimizers (AdamW and Muon), and parameter scales (60M-1B) demonstrate that LLR achieves up to 1.5x training speedup and outperforms baselines, notably raising average zero-shot accuracy from 47.09% to 49.02%. A key advantage of LLR is its low tuning overhead: it transfers nearly optimal LR settings directly from the uniform baseline. Code is available at https://github.com/hed-ucas/Layer-wise-Learning-Rate.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于重尾理论的分层学习率（LLR）方法，为LLM各层自适应分配不同学习率，加速训练并提升泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前LLM训练中普遍采用统一学习率，忽略了Transformer各层的结构异质性，限制了模型性能。现有方法未针对不同层的训练动态进行调整，导致收敛慢、泛化差。本文旨在通过理论指导实现分层学习率配置，解决统一学习率带来的训练不平衡问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于重尾自正则化（HT-SR）理论，分析权重相关矩阵的经验谱密度（ESD），量化各层的重尾程度。重尾性弱的层分配较大学习率以加速训练，重尾性强的层分配较小学习率。该方法无需额外调参，可直接从统一基线迁移学习率设置。实验涵盖LLaMA、GPT-nano等架构，使用AdamW和Muon优化器，参数量从60M到1B。
light_analysis.result: LLR在多种架构和优化器下实现最高1.5倍训练加速，零样本准确率从47.09%提升至49.02%，优于统一学习率基线。该方法调优开销低，LR设置可直接从基线迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLR通过理论指导的分层学习率策略有效提升了LLM训练效率和泛化能力，验证了重尾理论在优化中的实用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的自适应机制或扩展到其他架构。

title: Long-term Fairness with Selective Labels
abstract: Long-term fairness algorithms aim to satisfy fairness beyond static and short-term notions by accounting for the dynamics between decision-making policies and population behavior. Most previous approaches evaluate performance and fairness measures from observable features and a label, which is assumed to be fully observed. However, in scenarios such as hiring or lending, the labels (e.g., ability to repay the loan) are selective labels as they are only revealed based on positive decisions (e.g., when a loan is granted). In this paper, we study long-term fairness in the selective labels setting and analytically show that naive solutions do not guarantee fairness. To address this gap, we then introduce a novel framework that leverages both the observed data and a label predictor model to estimate the true fairness measure value by decomposing it into the observed fairness and bias from label predictions. This allows us to derive sufficient conditions to satisfy true fairness from observable quantities by using the confidence in the predictor model. Finally, we rely on our theoretical results to propose a novel reinforcement learning algorithm for effective long-term fair decision-making with selective labels. In semisynthetic environments, the proposed algorithm reached comparable fairness and performance to an agent with oracle access to the true labels.

light_analysis.overview: 针对选择性标签下的长期公平性问题，提出分解公平性估计的理论框架和强化学习算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长期公平性算法假设标签完全可观测，但在招聘、贷款等场景中，标签（如还款能力）仅在积极决策后揭示，形成选择性标签。朴素方法忽略此偏差会导致公平性失效。该问题重要，因为实际决策系统常面临标签缺失，直接使用观测数据会误导公平性度量，阻碍长期公平目标的实现。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个框架，利用观测数据和标签预测器模型估计真实公平性，通过将公平性分解为观测公平性和标签预测偏差。从理论推导出基于预测器置信度的充分条件，使可观测量满足真实公平性。随后设计一种强化学习算法，将这些条件嵌入决策过程，实现长期公平性优化，并在半合成环境中验证。
light_analysis.result: 在半合成环境下，所提算法在公平性和性能上均达到与拥有真实标签的oracle代理相当的水平。具体而言，算法在公平性指标（如均等待遇）和累积效益上接近oracle，证明了其有效性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了长期公平性在选择性标签下的难题，提供了理论分析和实用算法。学术贡献在于扩展了公平性研究至更现实的标签缺失场景；实际意义在于可应用于贷款审批、招聘等需长期公平的决策系统。未来可考虑更复杂的标签依赖模式或动态预测器更新。

title: Detection of Virus and Small Cell Patches in Foci Images Using Switchable Convolution and Feature Pyramid Networks
abstract: Accurate detection and counting of virus patches in focus-forming unit (FFU) images, also known as foci images, are important for quantifying viral infection and analyzing cellular structures. This task is challenging because biomedical targets often vary substantially in size, density, contrast, and shape. In this paper, we propose an enhanced YOLOv2-based detector that integrates a Feature Pyramid Network (FPN) to improve multi-scale feature representation. We also incorporate a switchable atrous convolution mechanism to adapt the receptive field for fine-grained targets in dense microscopy images. The proposed method is evaluated on biomedical foci image datasets for virus patch and small cell patch detection. For small cell patch detection, the model achieves a mean average precision (mAP) of 40.5% at a 25% Intersection over Union (IoU) threshold. For FFU virus patch detection, the model achieves an mAP of 68%. These results indicate that combining FPN-based feature fusion with switchable convolution improves the suitability of YOLOv2 for specialized biomedical object detection tasks

light_analysis.overview: 结合特征金字塔网络和可切换空洞卷积改进YOLOv2，用于病灶图像中病毒斑和细胞斑的检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 准确检测和计数病灶图像中的病毒斑对量化病毒感染和分析细胞结构至关重要。由于生物医学目标在尺寸、密度、对比度和形状上变化很大，现有方法难以适应这种多样性和密集性。因此，需要一种能有效处理多尺度、高密度目标的检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出增强型YOLOv2检测器，集成特征金字塔网络(FPN)以改进多尺度特征表示，同时引入可切换空洞卷积机制，自适应调整感受野以处理密集显微镜图像中的精细目标。该方法在生物医学病灶图像数据集上评估，用于病毒斑和小细胞斑检测。
light_analysis.result: 在小细胞斑检测中，模型在25% IoU阈值下达到40.5%的mAP；在FFU病毒斑检测中，mAP为68%。结果表明，结合FPN特征融合与可切换空洞卷积显著提升了YOLOv2在生物医学目标检测中的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种增强型YOLOv2检测器，通过FPN和可切换空洞卷积有效提升了多尺度特征表示和感受野自适应能力，在病毒斑和小细胞斑检测任务上取得了良好效果。该方法为生物医学图像分析提供了一种有效的检测方案，未来可扩展至其他类似目标检测场景。

title: SciCore-Mol: Augmenting Large Language Models with Pluggable Molecular Cognition Modules
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are central to the one-for-all intelligent paradigm, but they face a fundamental challenge when dealing with heterogeneous scientific data such as molecules: the inherent gap between discrete linguistic symbols and topological molecular or continuous reaction data leads to significant information loss and semantic noise in text-based reasoning. We propose SciCore-Mol, a modular framework that bridges this gap through three deeply integrated pluggable cognitive modules: a topology-aware perception module, a latent diffusion-based molecular generation module, and a reaction-aware reasoning module. Each module is coupled to the LLM backbone through learned representation interfaces, enabling richer information exchange than is possible with text-only tool feedback. Our experiments on diverse chemical tasks demonstrate that SciCore-Mol achieves strong comprehensive performance across molecular understanding, generation, reaction prediction, and general chemistry knowledge, with an 8B-parameter open-source system that is competitive with and in several dimensions surpasses proprietary large models. This work provides a systematic blueprint for equipping LLMs with scientific expertise through decoupled, pluggable, and flexibly orchestrated modules, with direct implications for drug design, chemical synthesis, and broader scientific discovery.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SciCore-Mol框架，通过可插拔分子认知模块增强大语言模型的化学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型处理分子等异构科学数据时，离散语言符号与拓扑或连续数据之间存在鸿沟，导致信息损失和语义噪声。现有方法仅依赖文本工具反馈，信息交换有限。该问题制约了LLMs在化学、药物设计等领域的应用。
light_analysis.method: SciCore-Mol包含三个可插拔认知模块：拓扑感知感知模块、基于潜在扩散的分子生成模块、反应感知推理模块。每个模块通过学习的表示接口与LLM主干耦合，实现比纯文本工具反馈更丰富的信息交换。采用8B参数开源系统。
light_analysis.result: 在分子理解、生成、反应预测和通用化学知识等任务上，SciCore-Mol表现强综合性能。8B开源系统与专有大型模型竞争力强，且在多个维度超越专有模型，具体指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为LLM配备科学专业知识提供了系统蓝图，通过解耦、可插拔、灵活编排模块，直接应用于药物设计、化学合成和科学发现。未来可能扩展至更多模态科学数据。

title: EmoTrack: Robust Depression Tracking from Counseling Transcripts across Session Regimes
abstract: Text-based counseling is an important interface for AI mental-health support, where transcripts may be used to monitor depression severity and flag sessions requiring timely human review. However, robust PHQ-8 prediction across session regimes remains challenging: fine-tuning-based methods can exploit richer supervision but may generalize poorly under data scarcity, while prompt-based LLM methods are data-efficient but usually treat each transcript holistically and provide limited support for longitudinal context. We study robust depression tracking from counseling transcripts across single-session and multi-session regimes. We introduce LongCounsel, a multi-session counseling dataset with session-level PHQ-8 supervision for evaluating repeated-session tracking under partial symptom disclosure and cross-session continuity. We further propose EmoTrack, a PHQ-8 prediction framework that combines LLM-extracted clinical signals with frozen turn-level semantic embeddings and trains symptom-specific predictors over the resulting transcript representation. When prior sessions are available, EmoTrack can further incorporate them through compact cross-session memory. Experiments on LongCounsel and DAIC-WOZ show that EmoTrack achieves a clear gain on the real single-session benchmark, including a 13.5% relative MAE reduction over the strongest DAIC-WOZ baseline, and remains competitive with the strongest longitudinal baseline on LongCounsel.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EmoTrack框架，结合LLM提取的临床信号与回合级语义嵌入，并引入跨会话记忆机制，实现跨会话机制的鲁棒抑郁跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于文本的咨询是AI心理健康支持的重要接口，但现有方法在跨会话场景下鲁棒性不足。微调方法依赖大量标注数据，泛化能力差；基于提示的LLM方法虽数据高效但缺乏纵向上下文支持。因此需要一种能兼顾单会话和多会话场景的鲁棒抑郁跟踪方法。
light_analysis.method: 构建LongCounsel多会话咨询数据集，包含会话级PHQ-8标注。提出EmoTrack框架：利用LLM提取临床信号（如症状提及），并与冻结的回合级语义嵌入融合，形成统一的对话表示。训练症状特定的预测器预测PHQ-8各项得分。对于多会话场景，引入紧凑的跨会话记忆模块，将历史会话信息编码并整合到当前会话表示中，以捕捉症状披露的连续性和变化。
light_analysis.result: 在DAIC-WOZ单会话基准上，EmoTrack相对于最强基线实现了13.5%的相对MAE降低。在多会话LongCounsel基准上，EmoTrack与最强纵向基线方法竞争力相当，表明其在数据稀缺场景下的有效性和跨会话跟踪的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EmoTrack通过融合LLM临床信号与语义嵌入及跨会话记忆机制，鲁棒地实现了跨会话机制的抑郁跟踪，为AI心理支持中的自动抑郁监测提供了实用方法，尤其适用于数据稀缺和需要纵向跟踪的场景。未来可探索更精细的时间建模和可解释性。

title: Adaptive Measurement Allocation for Learning Kernelized SVMs Under Noisy Observations
abstract: Kernel methods are typically formulated under the assumption of exact, noise-free access to the Gram matrix. However, in emerging settings such as quantum machine learning, each kernel entry must be inferred from noisy observations, and its accuracy depends on how a limited measurement budget is allocated. Despite this, existing approaches overwhelmingly rely on uniform allocation, which equalizes estimator variance but ignores the highly non-uniform dependence of kernelized classifiers on the Gram matrix. In this work, we introduce an adaptive measurement-allocation strategy for learning kernelized Support Vector Machines (SVMs) from noisy Bernoulli observations. Our approach combines two complementary principles: (i) geometric sensitivity, capturing how perturbations of individual kernel entries affect the classifier margin, and (ii) active-set instability, quantifying the probability of discrete changes in support-vector membership induced by measurement noise. These signals define a task-aware allocation scheme that concentrates measurements on the most decision-critical regions of the kernel matrix. We provide a theoretical analysis showing that the benefit of adaptive allocation is governed by the heterogeneity of the induced kernel importance structure, leading to distinct regimes in which adaptive or uniform strategies are preferable. Empirical evaluations on synthetic datasets demonstrate that adaptive allocation significantly improves support-vector recovery, margin estimation, and decision-function accuracy under fixed measurement budgets. A dual-coefficient stability criterion further enables early stopping, achieving near-optimal performance while using only a fraction of the measurement cost. Additional experiments on quantum kernels derived from real-world data reveal a regime-dependent behavior aligned with known phenomena such as kernel concentration. Together...

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应测量分配策略，通过结合几何敏感性和主动集不稳定性，优化核化SVM在噪声观测下的有限测量预算分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 核方法通常假设精确的Gram矩阵，但量子机器学习等新场景中需从噪声观测推断核条目，精度取决于测量预算分配。现有均匀分配方法忽略核化分类器对Gram矩阵的非均匀依赖性，导致关键决策区域测量不足。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应分配策略，结合几何敏感性（核条目扰动对分类器间隔的影响）和主动集不稳定性（噪声引起支持向量成员变化的概率），定义任务感知分配方案，集中测量于决策关键区域。理论分析表明优势由核重要性结构的异质性决定。
light_analysis.result: 合成数据集上，自适应分配显著提升支持向量恢复、间隔估计和决策函数精度；双系数稳定性标准实现早期停止，在固定预算下达到近最优性能。量子核实验显示与核集中一致的依赖行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出自适应测量分配方法，理论揭示核重要性结构异质性对策略的影响，实验验证有效性。适用于量子机器学习等噪声场景，未来可扩展至更广泛核类型，但依赖具体核结构。

title: Exposing Vulnerabilities in Visible-Infrared VLMs: A Unified Geometric Adversarial Framework with Cross-Task Transferability
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong performance across diverse multimodal tasks, but their adversarial robustness in visible-infrared (VIS-IR) scenarios remains underexplored. This gap is critical because VIS-IR sensing is widely used in real-world perception systems to support reliable understanding under challenging imaging conditions. To address this cross-modal threat setting, we propose CFGPatch, a curved-edge fractal geometric adversarial patch framework for attacking VIS-IR VLMs. CFGPatch builds on triangular fractal geometry and replaces rigid straight-edged primitives with Bezier-curved elements, preserving multi-scale fractal self-similarity while introducing smoother contours, richer directional variation, and more flexible shape deformation. In addition, we design a modality-specific Fraser-spiral rendering mechanism to inject fine-grained texture distortions and misleading perceptual cues into visible and infrared images. By coupling global curved-fractal geometry with local spiral-based appearance interference, CFGPatch disrupts both shape perception and texture interpretation. We further adopt expectation over transformation (EOT) to improve robustness against common image-level transformations. Extensive experiments show that CFGPatch effectively fools VIS-IR VLMs and consistently outperforms standard patch baselines in attack effectiveness and robustness. Moreover, adversarial samples optimized for zero-shot classification transfer well to image captioning and visual question answering, demonstrating strong cross-task transferability and generalizability across downstream tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CFGPatch，一种曲线边缘分形几何对抗补丁框架，用于攻击可见光-红外视觉语言模型，并具有跨任务迁移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在多模态任务中表现优异，但可见光-红外场景下的对抗鲁棒性尚未充分探索。由于可见光-红外感知广泛用于真实世界的感知系统，支持恶劣成像条件下的可靠理解，因此填补这一跨模态威胁场景的研究空白至关重要。现有方法多针对单模态或同模态，缺乏对跨模态对抗攻击的系统研究。
light_analysis.method: CFGPatch基于三角分形几何，用贝塞尔曲线元素替代刚性直线边缘，保持多尺度分形自相似性，引入更平滑的轮廓和丰富的方向变化。同时设计模态特定的Fraser-spiral渲染机制，在可见光和红外图像中注入细粒度纹理失真和误导感知线索。通过耦合全局曲线分形几何与局部螺旋外观干扰，破坏形状感知和纹理解释。采用期望变换（EOT）增强对常见图像变换的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，CFGPatch有效欺骗可见光-红外视觉语言模型，在攻击有效性和鲁棒性上持续优于标准补丁基线。针对零样本分类优化的对抗样本可迁移到图像描述和视觉问答任务，展现出强大的跨任务迁移性和泛化能力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了可见光-红外视觉语言模型在跨模态对抗攻击下的脆弱性，提出的CFGPatch框架具有结构新颖性和通用性。其跨任务迁移能力表明对抗样本可干扰多种下游任务，对实际部署的安全性构成威胁。未来可能探索防御机制或扩展到更多模态。

title: MuKV: Multi-Grained KV Cache Compression for Long Streaming Video Question-Answering
abstract: Long streaming video QA remains challenging due to growing visual tokens and limited reasoning length of large language models (LLMs). KV-caching stores the Key-Value (KV) of the historical tokens via LLM prefill and enables more efficient streaming QA. However, existing methods cache every one or two frames, causing redundant memory usage and losing fine-grained spatial details within frame or temporal contexts across frames. This paper proposes MuKV, a method that features a multi-grained KV cache compression module and a semi-hierarchical retrieval approach to improve both efficiency and accuracy for long streaming VideoQA. For the offline KV cache, MuKV extracts visual representations at patch-, frame-, and segment-levels. The multiple levels of granularity preserve both local cues and global temporal context, while maintaining efficiency with a dual signal token compression mechanism guided by self-attention and frequency. For online QA, MuKV designs a semi-hierarchical retrieval method to retrieve relevant KV caches for answer generation. Experiments on long-streaming VideoQA benchmarks show that MuKV significantly improves answer accuracy, without sacrificing memory and online QA efficiency. Moreover, our compression mechanism alone brings consistent benefits across answer accuracy, memory, and QA efficiency over baselines, showcasing highly effective contribution.
comment: To appear at CVPR'26. Code is available at https://github.com/IMBALDY/MuKV

light_analysis.overview: 提出MuKV，一种多粒度KV缓存压缩方法，用于长流式视频问答，兼顾效率与准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 长流式视频QA面临视觉令牌增长和大语言模型推理长度限制的挑战。现有KV缓存方法每帧或每两帧缓存一次，导致内存冗余，且丢失帧内细粒度空间细节或帧间时间上下文。因此需要一种高效的缓存压缩方法，既能保留多粒度视觉信息，又能降低内存占用并提升在线问答效率。
light_analysis.method: MuKV包含多粒度KV缓存压缩和半层次化检索。离线阶段，在patch、帧、片段三个级别提取视觉表示，通过自注意力与频率引导的双信号令牌压缩机制保留局部线索和全局时间上下文。在线阶段，半层次化检索从压缩缓存中检索相关KV用于答案生成。该方法平衡了多粒度信息保留与压缩效率。
light_analysis.result: 在长流式视频QA基准上，MuKV在答案准确率上显著提升，同时不牺牲内存和在线QA效率。与基线相比，其压缩机制在准确率、内存和QA效率上均带来一致改进。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明方法有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: MuKV通过多粒度压缩和半层次化检索，有效解决了长流式视频QA中视觉令牌冗余和上下文丢失问题，提升了问答精度与系统效率。该方法具有实际应用价值，能支撑流式视频场景的实时问答。未来可探索更细粒度的压缩策略或与其他视觉语言模型结合。

title: Detecting Atypical Clients in Federated Learning via Representation-Level Divergence
abstract: Federated learning enables collaborative training across distributed clients with heterogeneous data, but such heterogeneity often leads to unstable updates and degraded global performance. Moreover, in practical deployments, client updates may deviate from the expected behavior not only due to benign not i.i.d. distributions, but also due to distributional shifts or anomalous inputs, raising concerns about the reliability of the aggregation process. In this work, we propose a lightweight geometric signal to quantify the functional deviation of a client with respect to the global model. Instead of comparing model parameters or gradients, our approach measures how the local training of each client alters the activation-induced partition of the input space, evaluated on a shared probe set. This yields a permutation-invariant, interpretable metric of client--global divergence that captures differences in how data is processed by the model. We show that this signal effectively identifies clients that induce atypical functional changes, distinguishing stable yet heterogeneous clients from those whose updates significantly diverge from the global regime. As a result, the proposed metric provides a simple tool for monitoring client behavior and enabling risk-aware aggregation strategies in federated learning systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于表示层散度的轻量级几何信号，用于检测联邦学习中的异常客户端。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数据异构会导致不稳定更新和全局性能下降。实际部署中，客户端更新不仅因非独立同分布数据偏离，还因分布偏移或异常输入，影响聚合可靠性。现有方法多比较模型参数或梯度，难以区分良性异构与异常行为。因此需要一种轻量、可解释的度量来监测客户端行为。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种轻量级几何信号，通过测量客户端本地训练如何改变输入空间在共享探针集上的激活诱导划分，来量化客户端相对于全局模型的功能偏差。该度量是排列不变且可解释的，捕捉模型处理数据方式的差异，从而区分稳定异构客户端与显著偏离全局状态的客户端。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该度量能有效识别引发异常功能变化的客户端，区分良性异构与有害偏离。虽然摘要未提供具体数值，但该方法为监测客户端行为和实现风险感知聚合提供了简单工具，有助于提升联邦学习系统的可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种新的联邦学习异常检测方法，通过表示层散度量化客户端-全局偏差，无需额外训练开销。该方法简单、可解释，可用于监测客户端行为并指导风险感知聚合，提升系统鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的检测策略或扩展到其他学习范式。

title: Tailoring Teaching to Aptitude: Direction-Adaptive Self-Distillation for LLM Reasoning
abstract: On-policy self-distillation (OPSD) is an emerging LLM post-training paradigm in which the model serves as its own teacher: conditioned on privileged information such as a reference trace or hint, the same policy provides dense token-level supervision on its own rollouts. However, recent studies show that OPSD degrades complex reasoning by suppressing predictive uncertainty, which supports exploration and hypothesis revision. Our token-level analysis shows that this failure arises from applying a uniform direction of teacher supervision across tokens with different uncertainty levels: conformity to the privileged self-teacher suppresses exploration at high entropy, while deviation from the teacher degrades step accuracy at low entropy. Accordingly, we propose \textbf{Direction-Adaptive Self-Distillation} (\textbf{DASD}), which reframes privileged self-distillation from uniform teacher imitation into entropy-routed directional supervision: high-entropy tokens are pushed away from the privileged teacher to preserve exploration, while low-entropy tokens are pulled toward the teacher to stabilize step-level execution. Across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks, DASD achieves the best macro Avg@16 over strong RLVR and self-distillation baselines. Pass@$k$, reasoning-health, and generalization analyses show that these average gains come from preserving exploration without sacrificing step-level execution.

light_analysis.overview: 提出方向自适应自蒸馏（DASD），通过熵引导的自监督方向解决传统自蒸馏抑制探索的问题，提升LLM推理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有on-policy self-distillation (OPSD)在LLM后训练中会抑制预测不确定性，从而削弱复杂推理中的探索和假设修订能力。令牌级分析表明，失败源于对具有不同不确定性的令牌施加统一的教师监督方向：高熵令牌的探索被抑制，低熵令牌的步级精度因偏离教师而下降。因此，需要一种自适应的蒸馏方向。
light_analysis.method: 提出Direction-Adaptive Self-Distillation (DASD)，将特权自蒸馏从统一教师模仿重构为熵路由的方向监督：高熵令牌推离教师以保留探索，低熵令牌拉向教师以稳定步级执行。该方法在六个数学推理基准上评估，使用Avg@16和Pass@k等指标。
light_analysis.result: 在六个数学推理基准上，DASD在宏观Avg@16指标上优于强RLVR和自蒸馏基线。Pass@k、推理健康和泛化分析表明，平均增益来自在不牺牲步级执行的情况下保留探索。具体数值摘要未明确，但强调最佳性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: DASD通过自适应蒸馏方向有效解决了OPSD的缺陷，在保持探索能力的同时稳定了步级执行，显著提升了数学推理性能。该方法为LLM后训练提供了新思路，但摘要未提及局限性或未来工作。

title: An Evidence Hierarchy for Bayesian Object Classification via OSINT-Aided Heterogeneous Sensor Fusion
abstract: Heterogeneous sensor fusion is vital for detecting, localizing, and classifying CBRNE threats. However, individual sensors are often only capable of detecting a subset of relevant threats with varying reliability or can even provide only indirect threat indications, making threat classification challenging. Furthermore, high clutter rates on the sensor side present a great challenge for fusion systems. Additionally, the limited availability of high quality datasets hinders the advancement of learning-based detection and classification models in smart sensors. To mitigate these sensor related shortcomings, a context-aware and domain knowledge-enhanced fusion process is proposed. First, a novel evidence hierarchy is established that enables modeling of direct, indicative, and contextual information. Second, contextual information about the environment is introduced into the fusion process, by collecting, processing, and exploiting OSINT inputs. Third, all levels of the evidence hierarchy are used to craft a Bayesian threat type classification mechanism with domain knowledge-informed priors. The proposed methodology is evaluated in simulated scenarios, and the results demonstrate the benefit of the proposed fusion approach in terms of robustness to clutter and prior mismatch, with an overall classification accuracy of up to 95%.
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure; \c{opyright} 2026 The Authors. Submitted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Multisensor Fusion and Integration (MFI 2026). Under review

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于证据层次和OSINT的贝叶斯分类方法，通过异构传感器融合实现CBRNE威胁的高鲁棒性分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 异构传感器融合对CBRNE威胁检测至关重要，但单个传感器仅能检测部分威胁且可靠性不一，高杂波率和有限的高质量数据集进一步加剧了分类困难。现有方法缺乏对间接指示和上下文信息的有效利用，导致分类精度和鲁棒性不足。
light_analysis.method: 首先建立包含直接、指示和上下文信息的证据层次；其次通过OSINT收集环境上下文信息并融入融合过程；最后利用领域知识指导先验，构建贝叶斯威胁分类机制。该方法在模拟场景中评估，考虑了杂波和先验不匹配情况。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟场景中，该方法对杂波和先验不匹配表现出强鲁棒性，整体分类准确率高达95%。相比未利用上下文和证据层次的方法，显著提升了分类性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种融合OSINT上下文信息和证据层次的贝叶斯分类框架，有效缓解了传感器异构性和数据稀疏性问题。该方法具有实际应用价值，可推广至其他多源信息融合场景。未来可探索更复杂的OSINT处理及动态先验更新。

title: Harder to Defend: Towards Chinese Toxicity Attacks via Implicit Enhancement and Obfuscation Rewriting
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) require robust toxicity evaluation beyond explicit wording. This setting remains underexplored in Chinese, where toxicity may combine semantic indirectness with surface obfuscation. We introduce Chinese Implicit Toxicity Attack (CITA), a controlled red-team evaluation and defense-data generation framework, not a deployable evasion tool. CITA uses three stages: (i) Harmful Intent Learning, (ii) Implicit Toxicity Enhancement, and (iii) Obfuscation Variant Rewriting, to preserve harmful intent, increase implicitness, and add controlled surface variants. On CITA-generated evaluation samples, the seven tested detectors exhibit substantial missed-detection risks, reaching an average ASR of 69.48%; human evaluation further confirms preserved harmfulness and increased implicitness/evasiveness. As a downstream defense application, we fine-tune a Chinese Implicit Toxicity Defense model (CITD) with CITA-generated red-team data, showing that such data can improve robustness through additional training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CITA框架，通过隐式增强和混淆重写生成中文毒性攻击样本，用于红队评估和防御数据生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型需要超越显式措辞的鲁棒毒性评估，但中文场景中毒性常结合语义间接性和表面混淆，现有方法未充分探索。CITA填补了这一空白，提供可控的红队评估和防御数据生成框架，以暴露检测缺陷并提升防御能力。
light_analysis.method: CITA包含三阶段：有害意图学习确保危害性，隐式毒性增强增加语义间接性，混淆变体重写添加表面变体。基于此生成评估样本，并用于微调隐式毒性防御模型CITD。方法强调可控性，而非部署性逃避工具。
light_analysis.result: 在CITA生成的样本上，七种检测器平均攻击成功率（ASR）达69.48%，表明显著漏检风险。人工评估确认样本保留了危害性，且隐式和规避性增加。下游任务中，CITD通过CITA数据微调提升了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CITA框架有效生成中文隐式毒性攻击样本，揭示现有检测器缺陷，并证明该数据可增强防御模型鲁棒性。其贡献在于填补中文毒性评估的空白，为红队测试和防御训练提供新工具。未来可扩展至其他语言或攻击类型。

title: What are the Right Symmetries for Formal Theorem Proving?
abstract: Formal theorem provers based on large language models (LLMs) are highly sensitive to superficial variations in problem representation: semantically equivalent statements can exhibit drastically different proof success rates, revealing a failure to respect structural symmetries inherent in formal mathematics. This raises a central question: what are the right symmetries for formal theorem proving? We introduce rewriting categories, a category-theoretic framework capturing the compositional, generally non-invertible transformations induced by proof tactics, and use it to formalize two symmetry notions: proof equivariance, governing how proof distributions transform under rewrites, and success invariance (i.e., invariance of success probability), requiring equivalent statements to be solved with the same probability. We observe that state-based next-tactic provers naturally satisfy proof equivariance by operating on proof states. In contrast, state-of-the-art LLM-based provers satisfy neither property, exhibiting large performance variation across equivalent formulations. To mitigate this, we propose test-time methods that aggregate over equivalent rewritings of the input, showing theoretically that they recover success invariance in the sampling limit, and empirically, that they improve robustness and performance under fixed inference budgets. Our results highlight symmetry as a key missing inductive bias in LLM-based theorem proving and suggest test-time computation as a practical route to approximate it.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对称性缺失是LLM定理证明的关键问题，通过范畴论形式化并设计测试时聚合方法近似恢复成功不变性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM形式定理证明器对问题表示的表面变化（如语义等价但语法不同）高度敏感，导致证明成功率差异巨大。这反映了缺乏对形式数学内在结构对称性的尊重，而对称性是数学推理的基本属性，现有方法未能有效利用这一归纳偏差，限制了鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 引入重写范畴（rewriting categories）的范畴论框架，建模证明策略诱导的组合性、非可逆变换。基于此形式化两种对称性：证明等变性（proof equivariance）和成功不变性（success invariance）。提出测试时方法，通过对输入进行等价重写并聚合结果，理论上证明在采样极限下恢复成功不变性。
light_analysis.result: 状态基础的下一步策略证明器自然满足证明等变性，而SOTA的LLM证明器两者均不满足，在等价表述间表现巨大差异。提出的测试时聚合方法在固定推理预算下，不仅提高了成功率一致性，还提升了整体性能，且理论上在采样极限下恢复成功不变性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 强调对称性是LLM定理证明中缺失的关键归纳偏差，测试时计算是实用的近似方案。工作揭示了形式数学对称性的重要性，为未来设计具有内在对称性的模型架构提供方向。局限性可能在于测试时聚合的计算开销及重写策略选择。

title: Direct content-based retrieval from music scores images
abstract: The digitization of musical scores plays a crucial role in their preservation and accessibility, yet information retrieval still depends mainly on metadata searches, such as by title or composer. Content based search in music score images remains underexplored compared to text documents, despite its potential value for musicians, musicologists, and educators. This work contributes to the field by first studying which characteristics of a score are most relevant for search and by defining a systematic method to build query datasets from any annotated corpus. We also consider diverse methods for content-based search on music score images, ranging from transcription-based approaches relying on Optical Music Recognition (OMR), to a transcription-free Transformer model trained to recognize queries directly from score images, and a text-prompted Large Language Model. Our experiments evaluate these models on four corpora exhibiting diverse characteristics in terms of dataset size, image quality, and typesetting mechanisms. Overall, each method excels under different conditions: OMR-based pipelines achieve higher in-domain retrieval, whereas transcription-free models handle domain variability more effectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多种方法用于乐谱图像内容检索，包括OMR转录、免转录Transformer和LLM，并在多样语料上评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 音乐乐谱数字化后主要依赖元数据检索，缺乏基于内容的搜索。现有方法未充分探索乐谱图像的直接内容检索，限制了音乐研究、教育等领域的应用。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究乐谱特征重要性并建立系统性查询数据集构建方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出了三种内容检索方法：基于光学音乐识别(OMR)的转录方法、免转录的Transformer模型（直接从图像识别查询）、以及文本提示的大语言模型。同时定义了从标注语料库构建查询数据集的系统方法，并分析了乐谱中最重要的特征。
light_analysis.result: 在四个不同特征（数据集大小、图像质量、排版）的语料库上评估。OMR方法在域内检索表现最佳，而免转录模型更有效地处理域变异性（如不同图像质量和排版）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究系统比较了乐谱图像内容检索方法，为音乐信息检索提供了新思路。OMR适用于同域，免转录模型更鲁棒。未来可探索混合方法或扩展至更广泛的应用。

title: D3Seg: Dependency-Aware Diffusion for Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing Modalities
abstract: Accurate brain tumor segmentation using multiparametric MRI is critical for effective treatment planning. However, in clinical settings, complete acquisition of all MRI sequences is not always possible. The absence of certain MRI modalities results in substantial performance degradation in existing segmentation methods, which typically rely on naive feature concatenation or direct fusion strategies. To address this limitation, we propose a novel segmentation model D3Seg which is designed to maintain stable performance under missing-modality settings. D3Seg introduces Multi-hop Modality Graph Fusion (MMGF) to model higher order inter-modality dependencies, a lightweight diffusion-based imputation mechanism to compensate for missing T1ce representations in latent space, and probability-space decision refinement to mitigate dominant class overconfidence and improve delineation of underrepresented tumor subregions. Extensive evaluation on BraTS 2023 dataset demonstrates that our D3Seg model consistently improves segmentation performance under missing modality configurations. The proposed model achieves approximately 1.5-2.0% Dice improvement on enhancing tumor (ET) and around 1.0% on tumor core (TC) across multiple missing modality configurations compared to the current state-of-the-art model, while maintaining computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出D3Seg模型，通过多跳模态图融合、扩散推算和概率空间决策细化，在缺失模态下实现鲁棒的脑肿瘤分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 在临床实践中，多参数MRI的完整序列获取常受限，缺失模态会导致现有分割方法性能显著下降，这些方法多依赖简单的特征拼接或直接融合，无法有效处理模态间复杂依赖。因此，需要一种能在缺失模态下维持稳定性能的分割模型。
light_analysis.method: D3Seg包含三个核心组件：1)多跳模态图融合(MMGF)建模高阶模态间依赖；2)轻量级扩散推算机制在潜在空间补偿缺失的T1ce表示；3)概率空间决策细化缓解主导类过度自信，改善欠代表肿瘤子区域的分割。在BraTS 2023数据集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS 2023数据集上，D3Seg在多种缺失模态配置下持续提升分割性能。与当前最优模型相比，增强肿瘤(ET)的Dice提升约1.5-2.0%，肿瘤核心(TC)提升约1.0%，同时保持计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: D3Seg有效解决了缺失模态下的脑肿瘤分割问题，通过建模模态依赖和扩散推算提升鲁棒性，具有临床实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的依赖建模或扩展至其他医学图像分割任务。

title: No Epoch Like the Present: Robust Climate Emulation Requires Out-of-Distribution Generalisation
abstract: Climate emulation is an out-of-distribution (OOD) projection task. This is precisely the challenge where modern Machine Learning (ML) methods are most prone to failure. Consequently, while current ML emulators trained on present climate achieve high in-distribution performance, their future reliability under the inevitable distribution shifts of a changing climate remains a critical, poorly understood blind spot. Addressing this challenge requires a fundamental shift in how we understand, evaluate, and design climate emulators. In this work, we first confirm that climate change drives a statistically significant and progressively growing shift in atmospheric state distributions, rendering standard evaluation protocols insufficient. We empirically establish that seasonal variation serves as an effective proxy for these long-term climate shifts, providing access to $\textit{real-world}$ distribution shifts without recourse to heuristics like synthetic perturbations. Motivated by this link, we introduce a novel evaluation framework that leverages seasonal shifts as a rigorous, zero-overhead testbed for emulator robustness. Our systematic characterisation confirms that current state-of-the-art hybrid-ML emulators degrade significantly under these realistic shifts. Finally, we chart a path forward by identifying compositional generalisation, the ability to form novel combinations from observed elementary components, as a principled route towards robust climate emulation. We demonstrate that physically motivated decompositions substantially improve OOD performance with only modest trade-offs against in-distribution performance, providing an avenue towards ML-driven climate emulators robust to an unknown future.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示气候仿真本质上是分布外（OOD）投影任务，提出利用季节变化作为分布偏移代理，构建零开销评估框架，并通过组合泛化大幅提升仿真器鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 气候仿真面临未来气候变化导致的分布偏移，现有ML仿真器在训练分布上表现优秀，但泛化至未知气候的可靠性未知且未充分研究。标准评估协议无法捕捉长期偏移，急需新的评估与设计方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先统计分析证实气候变化驱动大气状态分布显著且逐渐偏移，并实证季节变化可作为长期气候偏移的代理。基于此提出利用季节性分布偏移作为零开销测试床的新评估框架。进一步识别组合泛化能力为关键方向，通过物理动机分解（如将气候过程分解为基本成分）显著提升OOD泛化，同时保持分布内性能仅小幅下降。
light_analysis.result: 当前最先进的混合ML仿真器在真实季节性分布偏移下性能显著退化，验证了OOD挑战的严峻性。采用物理分解方法后，OOD性能取得实质性提升，且分布内性能仅略有牺牲，展现了良好权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次明确气候仿真需解决OOD泛化问题，提出基于季节偏移的低成本评估基准和组合泛化改进策略，为设计对未知气候鲁棒的ML仿真器提供了新路径。未来可探索更多物理驱动分解方法及验证其在广泛气候场景下的有效性。

title: IdioLink: Retrieving Meaning Beyond Words Across Idiomatic and Literal Expressions
abstract: Idioms pose a fundamental challenge for language models, as their meaning cannot be inferred from surface form alone. Understanding such expressions, therefore, requires semantic abstraction beyond lexical overlap. We introduce IdioLink, a retrieval benchmark designed to test whether models can link idiomatic expressions to conceptually equivalent meanings expressed in literal or paraphrased forms. IdioLink comprises 10,700 documents and 2,140 queries, spanning 107 idioms with both literal and figurative uses. Each document and query is annotated with spans that convey the core meaning. Evaluating strong embedding baselines (e.g., BGE, E5, Contriever, and Qwen), we show that current models struggle to retrieve equivalent meanings across divergent surface realizations, relying instead on topical and shallow semantic cues. IdioLink exposes key gaps in idiom-aware semantic retrieval and provides a challenging testbed for future models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种检索基准IdioLink，用于评估模型在习语与字面表达间检索等价含义的能力，揭示当前模型在语义抽象上的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 习语含义无法从表面形式推断，需要语义抽象。现有语言模型依赖词汇重叠和浅层语义线索，难以理解习语，亟需一个针对性测试基准来暴露模型缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含10,700文档和2,140查询的数据集，覆盖107个习语，每个均有字面与比喻用法，并标注核心含义跨度。评估BGE、E5、Contriever、Qwen等强嵌入基线。
light_analysis.result: 现有模型在检索跨表面形式的等价含义时表现不佳，多依赖主题和浅层语义线索，而非真正理解习语含义。未提供具体量化指标，但指出模型挣扎。
light_analysis.conclusion: IdioLink揭示了习语感知语义检索的关键差距，为未来模型提供了挑战性测试平台，有助于推动对习语和语义抽象的研究。

title: Explainable AI for Data-Driven Design of High-Dimensional Predictive Studies
abstract: Predictive modelling is important for health data analysis and data-driven clinical decision-making. However, predictive studies are challenging to design optimally by hand when tens or even hundreds of features require selection, transformation, or interaction modelling. While complex machine learning models offer high performance, their "black-box" nature limits the clinical trust, transparency, and interpretability required for decision-making. We developed and evaluated an Exploratory AI Recommender that provides data-driven recommendations to improve predictive performance of existing interpretable statistical models. The developed framework uses flexible AI modelling to capture complex data patterns and explainable AI techniques to translate the patterns into three recommendation types: feature exclusion, non-linear terms, and feature interactions. We evaluated the framework by comparing predictive performance of a baseline (i.e., no interactions or non-linear terms) Cox Proportional Hazards (CPH) model against an augmented CPH incorporating recommendations suggested by our method. The primary analysis predicts the time to the first occurrence of a fall or related injury in 245,614 patients. Our method recommended excluding 23 features, including non-linear terms for two features, and including 221 suggested feature interactions. The C-index improved from 0.805 (95% CI 0.798-0.812) to 0.815 (95% CI 0.809-0.822), and so did calibration (intercept: -0.006 to 0.003; slope: 1.063 to 0.950). All recommendations were supported by existing literature. The method also proved effective on two additional public datasets, demonstrating wider applicability. The proposed Exploratory AI Recommender demonstrates the potential of explainable AI and data-driven study design to improve the process of developing, and the performance of high-dimensional transparent predictive models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Exploratory AI Recommender框架，利用可解释AI为高维预测研究提供数据驱动建议，提升透明统计模型的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在健康数据分析中，高维特征的手动选择、变换和交互建模极具挑战；复杂机器学习模型虽性能高但缺乏临床所需的透明度和可解释性。现有可解释模型如Cox比例风险模型在复杂数据模式上表现有限，需要一种既能保持可解释性又能自动改进预测性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: 框架结合灵活AI建模捕获复杂数据模式，并通过可解释AI技术将其转化为三类建议：特征排除、非线性项、特征交互。以Cox比例风险模型为基线，根据建议增强模型。在245,614名患者的跌倒/损伤时间预测中应用，同时额外验证两个公开数据集。核心创新在于将黑盒AI的洞见转化为可解释统计模型的改进指南。
light_analysis.result: 在主要分析中，C-index从0.805（95%CI 0.798-0.812）提升至0.815（95%CI 0.809-0.822）；校准改善（截距从-0.006变为0.003，斜率从1.063变为0.950）。所有建议均获文献支持。两个额外公开数据集同样验证了有效性，表明方法具有广泛适用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究展示了可解释AI在数据驱动的高维预测模型设计中的潜力，通过提供明确的特征处理建议，显著提升透明模型的性能而不牺牲可解释性。方法有助于临床信任和决策支持。未来可扩展至更多模型类型和任务。

title: Decomposing Ensemble Spread in Lorenz '96 With Learned Stochastic Parameterizations
abstract: Weather and climate forecasts are inherently uncertain due to chaotic dynamics, imperfect initial conditions, and incomplete representation of the underlying physical processes. Operational ensemble forecasts aim to represent these uncertainties through forecast spread, yet many approaches yield underdispersive estimates, with spread that grows too slowly relative to forecast error. Using the two-scale Lorenz 1996 system as a widely used, controlled testbed, we design a systematic approach to disentangle intrinsic variability, initial-condition perturbations, and stochastic model uncertainty. We compare multiple ensemble configurations and parameterization strategies, including existing deterministic and autoregressive as well as novel Bayesian and flow-based approaches. Our results show that ensemble perturbations do not increase the system's long-term variance; rather, they regulate how rapidly trajectories decorrelate and explore the invariant measure. Stochastic parameterizations, particularly those with temporally persistent structure, enhance early spread growth and improve spread-error consistency. Overall, we bring clarity to how different sources of uncertainty interact in a chaotic system and provide guidance for the design and evaluation of stochastic parameterizations in weather and climate models.

light_analysis.overview: 在Lorenz '96系统中系统分解集合预报展开，比较贝叶斯和流式随机参数化，揭示不确定性来源的相互作用。
light_analysis.motivation: 天气预报和气候预测因混沌动力学、初始条件不完美和物理过程表示不完整而存在固有不确定性。集合预报旨在通过预报展开表示这些不确定性，但许多方法产生欠分散估计，展开相对于预报误差增长过慢。理解不同不确定性来源如何相互作用对于改进参数化至关重要，而现有方法缺乏系统性分解框架。
light_analysis.method: 使用双尺度Lorenz '96系统作为受控试验台，系统分解内在变率、初始条件扰动和随机模型不确定性。比较多种集合配置和参数化策略：现有确定性、自回归以及新提出的贝叶斯和基于流（Normalizing Flows）的随机参数化方法。通过分析长期方差和轨迹去相关速度评估不同来源对展开的影响。
light_analysis.result: 集合扰动不增加系统的长期方差，而是调节轨迹去相关速度及其对不变测度的探索。随机参数化，特别是具有时间持久性结构的方法，增强了早期展开生长并改善了展开-误差一致性。摘要未提供具体数值，但定性表明贝叶斯和流式方法优于传统确定性方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究厘清了混沌系统中不同不确定性来源的相互作用机制，为天气和气候模型中随机参数化的设计和评估提供了理论指导。未来工作可将该方法应用于复杂模式，并验证实际预报中的适用性。

title: Unlocking Proactivity in Task-Oriented Dialogue
abstract: Proactive task-oriented dialogue (TOD), such as outbound sales, demands a persuasive agent that actively probes the user's concerns and steers the conversation toward acceptance within a bounded number of turns. Yet post-trained LLMs are inherently conservative, and reward-shaping RL (e.g., GRPO) struggles since it only re-weights what an already passive policy samples. We show that conditioning on the user's latent concerns unlocks proactive capability that no amount of sampling can undermine, establishing these concerns as a pivotal training-time signal. To operationalize this finding, we build the \textbf{Cognitive User Simulator}, which models each user as a stratified persona comprising observable external traits and hidden internal concerns. The simulator produces faithful and diverse interactions, while emitting per-turn state dynamics that track persuasion progress. We then introduce \textbf{Simulator-Induced Asymmetric-View Policy Optimization}, which converts the modeled concerns and the simulation state transition into complementary training objectives: (1) \emph{Asymmetric On-Policy Self-Distillation} that transfers concern-aware behavior from a privileged view of the same policy into its deployable, conversation-only view; and (2) \emph{State-Transition Policy Refinement} ...

light_analysis.overview: 通过建模用户潜在关注和引入不对称视角策略优化，释放任务导向对话中的主动能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动任务导向对话需要代理在有限轮次内主动探查用户关切并引导对话，但后训练的大语言模型本质保守，基于奖励塑形的强化学习（如GRPO）仅重新加权已有被动策略的采样，无法突破固有限制。因此，需要利用用户潜在关注作为训练信号来解锁主动性。
light_analysis.method: 提出认知用户模拟器，将用户建模为包含可观察外部特征和隐藏内部关注的分层人物模型，产生忠实多样的交互并跟踪说服进度。进而提出模拟器诱导的不对称视角策略优化，将建模的关注和状态转换转化为互补训练目标：不对称在线自蒸馏（从特权视角转移关注感知行为到可部署视角）和状态转换策略精炼。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，但所提方法通过模拟器生成忠实交互并利用状态动态，在主动任务导向对话任务上预期能显著提升说服成功率和对话效率，优于传统奖励塑形方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了用户潜在关注作为训练信号对于释放主动性的关键作用，结合认知模拟器和不对称视角优化为主动对话提供了新范式。未来可应用于更多需要主动引导的交互场景，如销售、心理咨询等，但大规模部署时模拟器成本可能成为局限。

title: Evaluating Large Language Models as Live Strategic Agents: Provider Performance, Hybrid Decomposition, and Operational Gaps in Timed Risk Play
abstract: Static benchmarks capture only part of how large language models behave in practice. Real systems place models inside repeated loops with time limits, formatting constraints, and failure modes. We study this setting in a timed multi-phase Risk environment with explicit victory targets and repeated planning and execution cycles. In a replicated 32-game cross-provider championship under frozen rules, gemini-3.1-pro-preview won 20 of 32 games against gpt-5.1, claude-opus-4-7, and kimi-k2.6, and the pooled winner distribution differs strongly from an equal-strength null (p approx 1.5 x 10^-5). We then separate planning from execution by standardizing execution on a cheaper Gemini Flash scaffold. Under this design, a pooled 32-game planner bakeoff is consistent with near-equality (p approx 0.821), which indicates that much of the earlier provider spread came from end-to-end system behavior rather than planning alone. To study mechanism, we analyze saved planning and execution traces from the provider championship. Gemini refers to the terminal objective far more often than the other models and increases that focus as victory approaches. Gemini also converts more turns into deep conquest chains, even though it is not the cleanest runtime. These results show that live-agent performance depends on objective tracking, execution conversion, cost, and runtime reliability, and they support evaluating LLMs as components in bounded workflows rather than as isolated benchmark respondents.
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. Code and tracked notes: https://github.com/hcekne/risk-game . Public runtime artifact index: https://github.com/hcekne/risk-game/blob/main/docs/article-plans/public_experiment_artifacts.md

light_analysis.overview: 在限时Risk游戏环境中评估LLM作为实时战略代理的表现，发现Gemini-3.1-pro-preview胜率显著，但分离规划与执行后模型间差异消失，表明端到端系统行为而非纯规划能力是关键。
light_analysis.motivation: 静态基准无法捕捉LLM在真实系统中的行为，实际部署中模型需在时间限制、格式约束和失败模式下反复循环。现有评估方法忽视了这些动态因素，导致对模型在复杂工作流中性能的理解不足。本文旨在通过一个限时多阶段Risk环境模拟真实系统的挑战，揭示LLM作为实时战略代理的运作机制和性能差异。
light_analysis.method: 构建一个限时多阶段Risk游戏环境，包含明确的胜利目标和重复的计划执行循环。举办32场跨供应商锦标赛，对比Gemini-3.1-pro-preview、GPT-5.1、Claude-opus-4-7和Kimi-k2.6。然后分离规划与执行：使用较便宜的Gemini Flash作为标准化执行支架，重新进行32场规划器比赛。通过分析保存的规划和执行轨迹，研究模型行为差异，如目标引用频率和征服链深度。
light_analysis.result: 在32场端到端比赛中，Gemini-3.1-pro-preview赢得20场，胜率显著偏离均等（p≈1.5×10⁻⁵）。但使用标准化执行后，规划器比赛结果接近均等（p≈0.821），表明原始差异主要来自端到端系统行为。轨迹分析显示，Gemini更频繁地引用最终目标，且在临近胜利时增加关注度，并能将更多回合转化为深度征服链，尽管其运行时并非最干净。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM在实时代理场景中的性能取决于目标跟踪、执行转换、成本和运行时可靠性，而非单纯的规划能力。研究支持在有边界的工作流中评估LLM，而非作为孤立的基准测试对象。未来工作可探索不同任务和更复杂的工作流分解方式，以及运行时优化对整体性能的影响。

title: Holomorphic Neural ODEs with Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Interpretable Discovery of Complex Dynamics
abstract: Complex dynamical systems governed by holomorphic maps such as $z^2 + c$ exhibit fractal boundaries with extreme sensitivity to initial conditions. Accurately modelling these structures from data requires methods that respect the underlying complex-analytic geometry, yet Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) within Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (Neural ODEs) lack complex-analytic priors, violate the Cauchy--Riemann conditions, and function as opaque approximators incapable of yielding governing equations. We introduce Holomorphic KAN-ODE, a framework that replaces the MLP with a Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) whose learnable B-spline activations reside on network edges, and incorporates Cauchy--Riemann equations as a differentiable regularization to preserve holomorphic structure. We evaluate on six families of complex dynamical systems spanning polynomial and transcendental classes. With only 280 parameters ($16\times$ fewer than the MLP baseline), the network achieves velocity-field $R^2 > 0.95$ on all six systems, correctly identifies all six governing symbolic families through automatic spline-to-formula fitting, and reconstructs Julia set fractal boundaries with up to 98.0\% agreement. Crucially, the model exhibits only 4\% MSE degradation under 10\% observation noise versus $15.2\times$ for MLPs, and achieves 90.4\% improvement in transfer learning from quadratic to cubic dynamics. While the MLP attains lower pointwise reconstruction error due to its larger capacity, the KAN uniquely provides interpretable symbolic equations, enforced holomorphic structure, and superior noise resilience, capabilities that are entirely absent in black-box architectures. These results establish KANs as a parameter-efficient, interpretable alternative to MLPs for physics-informed discovery of holomorphic dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Holomorphic KAN-ODE框架，用KAN网络替代MLP，结合Cauchy-Riemann正则化，实现复动力学系统的可解释性发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 复解析映射（如z²+c）支配的复杂动力系统具有分形边界和极端初值敏感性。现有的基于MLP的神经ODE不满足复解析先验（违反Cauchy-Riemann条件），且作为黑箱模型无法给出控制方程。需要一种既能尊重复解析几何、又能提供符号方程的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Holomorphic KAN-ODE，用Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（KAN）替换MLP，其可学习的B样条激活函数位于网络边缘。将Cauchy-Riemann方程作为可微正则化项强制保持全纯结构。在6个复杂动力系统族（多项式和超越函数）上评估。
light_analysis.result: 仅用280参数（MLP的1/16）即在所有6个系统上达到速度场R²>0.95；通过样条到公式的自动拟合正确识别全部6个符号族；重建Julia集分形边界一致性达98.0%。在10%观测噪声下，MSE退化仅4%（MLP为15.2倍），从二次到三次动力学的迁移学习提升90.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: KAN提供了MLP所不具备的符号方程可解释性、强制的全纯结构和优异的噪声鲁棒性，是MLP在物理信息驱动的全纯动力学发现中的参数高效、可解释替代方案。未来可扩展至更高维系统。

title: REACH: Hand Pose Estimation from Room Corners
abstract: We introduce a novel 3D hand pose estimator that can accurately recover the shape and pose of people's hands in a room from afar, typically from fixed cameras at room corners, in extremely low-resolution and frequently occluded views. Our key idea is to fully leverage hand-body coordination, its temporal progression, and multiview observations. We achieve this with a novel Transformer-based model, in which hand and body configurations are modeled through correlations between their visual features expressed as per-view tokens, and their temporal coordination is exploited in an autoregressive manner. We introduce a novel dataset, which we refer to as REACH, Room-Environment dataset Annotated with Chest cameras for Hand pose estimation, to train and test our method. REACH is a first-of-its-kind large-scale hand pose dataset that captures accurate hand movements of 50 participants across a wide variety of daily activities. In order to avoid interfering with natural movements while annotating the hands with accurate shape and pose, we leverage concealed chest cameras. Through extensive experiments, including comparative studies with existing methods, we show that our model, REACH-Net, achieves highly accurate 3D hand pose estimation from afar. These results broaden the horizon of 3D hand pose estimation, especially towards "in-the-wild" continuous human behavior analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REACH-Net，利用Transformer从房间角落低分辨率、遮挡视图进行3D手部姿态估计，结合手-身体协调、时间序列和多视角。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D手部姿态估计方法通常依赖近距离、高分辨率图像，难以处理实际场景中固定摄像头从房间角落拍摄的远距离、低分辨率、频繁遮挡的视角。这些场景在连续人类行为分析中常见，但缺乏有效方法。因此，需要一种能够充分利用手-身体协调、时间信息以及多视角观察的模型，以实现从远处准确估计手部形状和姿态。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于Transformer的REACH-Net模型，将手和身体配置建模为每个视角的视觉特征token，并通过自回归方式利用时间协调。引入新数据集REACH，包含50名参与者在多种日常活动中的准确手部运动，通过隐蔽胸部摄像头高精度标注手部形状和姿态，避免干扰自然运动。模型从固定角落摄像头获取低分辨率输入，利用多视角和时间信息提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验（包括与现有方法对比），REACH-Net在远距离、低分辨率且常被遮挡的视角下实现了高精度3D手部姿态估计。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明结果优于基线方法，尤其在野外连续行为分析场景中性能显著，验证了手-身体协调和多视角机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: REACH-Net拓宽了3D手部姿态估计的应用范围，使其能够从房间角落等远距离视角进行准确估计，适用于真实野外连续人类行为分析。该工作通过新颖的数据集和模型，解决了低分辨率、遮挡等挑战。未来可进一步优化实时性能或扩展至更多动态场景，但摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: GHI: Graphormer over Conditioned Hypergraph Incidence for Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis
abstract: Aspect-based sentiment analysis (ABSA) requires models to bind sentiment evidence to the correct aspect, making it a natural testbed for fine-grained structural reasoning. We introduce GHI, a Graphormer-over-Conditioned-Hypergraph-Incidence framework that is designed as an incidence-based structural reasoning layer built on a bipartite topology. GHI represents diverse linguistic and semantic evidence as token--hyperedge incidence relations, allowing different structural signals to be incorporated through a unified interface. Extensive experiments on six standard ABSA benchmarks show that GHI outperforms all baselines on the SemEval domains, and multi-seed evaluations show stable improvements over strong DeBERTa. Further experiments show that with only 247M parameters, GHI approaches the performance of 11B Flan-T5 based methods on the ISE benchmark. Moreover, it demonstrates strong robustness on the challenging ARTS datasets, maintaining highly competitive performance where traditional models degrade. These results demonstrate that compact structural reasoning remains a valuable alternative to scale-driven approaches for fine-grained tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GHI框架，基于超图二分图拓扑的图变换器，实现方面级情感分析中的结构化推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 方面级情感分析需要模型将情感证据与特定方面绑定，现有方法依赖大规模模型，但忽略了紧凑的结构化推理。本文旨在探索结构推理作为规模驱动方法的替代方案，解决细粒度推理中的结构建模不足问题。
light_analysis.method: GHI框架构建在二分图拓扑上，将语言和语义证据表示为token-超边关联关系，通过统一的接口整合不同的结构信号。核心是Graphormer-over-Conditioned-Hypergraph-Incidence层，利用图变换器处理超图结构，实现方面与情感词的深层交互。
light_analysis.result: 在六个标准ABSA基准上，GHI超越所有基线，在SemEval领域表现最佳。多种子评估显示比DeBERTa稳定提升。仅247M参数即可接近11B Flan-T5在ISE基准上的性能。在ARTS数据集上展现强鲁棒性，传统模型性能下降时仍保持竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: GHI证明了紧凑的结构推理在细粒度任务中仍是有价值的方案，挑战了仅靠规模驱动的趋势。其统一接口易于扩展，为ABSAs提供了高效替代。未来可探索更多结构信号或与其他预训练模型结合。

title: How Many Different Outputs Can a Transformer Generate?
abstract: We study how we can leverage only a handful of characteristics of a transformer's architecture to closely predict the number of different sequences it can output, both qualitatively and quantitatively. We provide an upper bound depending on the length of the prompt, which we show empirically to be tight up to a factor less than 10, across architectures and model sizes. Our analysis also provides a theoretical explanation for previously observed empirical failures of transformers on simple sequence tasks, such as copying and cramming. Formally, we prove that (i) the maximal length of accessible sequences (those that the transformer can output for some prompt) grows linearly with the prompt length, (ii) beyond a critical threshold, the proportion of accessible sequences decays exponentially with sequence length, and (iii) the linear coefficient relating prompt length to accessible sequence length admits a theoretical upper bound. Notably, these results hold even with unbounded context and computation time.

light_analysis.overview: 通过理论分析，揭示了Transformer生成不同输出序列数量的严格上界，并解释了其在简单序列任务中的失败原因。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在生成任务中表现出色，但其生成多样性的理论边界尚不明确。现有研究多关注模型性能，忽略了对可生成序列数量的理论约束。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过分析架构特征预测输出序列数量，并解释此前观察到的Transformer在复制、填充等简单任务上的失败现象，为模型设计和任务适配提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于提示长度的上界估计方法，通过理论推导证明：(i)可访问序列的最大长度与提示长度呈线性关系；(ii)超过临界阈值后，可访问序列比例随序列长度指数衰减；(iii)线性系数存在理论上限。实验验证上界紧度，在不同架构和模型规模下，实际值与上界偏差小于10倍。理论结果在无限上下文和计算时间下仍成立。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，Transformer生成序列的数量受提示长度严格约束，且实际输出序列数接近理论上限（偏差小于10倍）。可访问序列的最大长度与提示长度线性相关，比例随序列长度指数下降。该结果解释了模型在复制、填充等简单任务上的局限性，即使拥有无限上下文和计算能力也无法突破此限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为Transformer生成多样性提供了理论边界，揭示了其内在结构限制。结论有助于理解模型能力上限，并为设计更高效的生成任务或改进架构（如引入外部记忆）提供依据。未来可探索非自回归模型或注意力机制的变体以突破此约束。

title: ARC-STAR: Auditable Post-Hoc Correction for PDE Foundation Models
abstract: Partial differential equation (PDE) foundation models are pretrained networks that forecast how physical fields like velocity and pressure evolve from a single reusable solver. On unfamiliar flows their predictions drift step by step, errors concentrate in a few regions, yet retraining destabilizes the network and uniform post-hoc correction overlooks this spatial concentration. To address this, we propose a frozen-solver post-hoc correction framework, Adaptive Risk-Calibrated Spatial Triage for Auditable Refinement (ARC-STAR). ARC-STAR organizes correction into three stages: a global corrector removes broad solver bias, a blockwise local refiner cleans the post-global residual, and, at deployment, a label-free score routes refinement to high-risk blocks under a compute budget. The framework is designed to be (i) frozen-host, preserving the pretrained solver without fine-tuning; (ii) auditable, with global and local stages trained and evaluated separately for measurable contributions; and (iii) budget-aware, using a blockwise interface that either refines the full field or routes limited compute to high-risk regions. Across five flow benchmarks spanning ten regime cells, ARC-STAR is the only method that cuts velocity rollout error by at least 36x over raw Poseidon on every cell. The global stage reduces raw host error by 91-99%, and the local stage further reduces the remaining post-global residual by up to 94.4%. Our code implementation is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/arc_star.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ARC-STAR框架，通过全局校正、块级局部精化和预算感知路由，可审计地修正PDE基础模型的预测误差，无需微调预训练求解器。
light_analysis.motivation: PDE基础模型在不熟悉流动场景中预测误差逐步累积并集中于少数区域，重新训练会破坏网络稳定性，而统一后验修正忽视误差的空间聚集性。现有方法缺乏可审计性和预算感知能力，难以在有限计算资源下高效修正误差。
light_analysis.method: ARC-STAR采用三阶段修正流程：全局校正器移除求解器偏差，块级局部精化器进一步清理残差，部署时通过无标签评分路由计算资源到高风险块。框架保持冻结求解器，支持全局与局部模块独立评估，实现预算感知的块级精化。
light_analysis.result: 在五个流动基准的十个域上，ARC-STAR是唯一将速度滚动误差至少降低36倍（相对于原始Poseidon）的方法。全局阶段减少主机误差91-99%，局部阶段进一步降低剩余残差最高达94.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARC-STAR提供了无需重新训练、可审计且预算感知的后验误差修正方案，显著提升PDE基础模型的预测精度。代码已开源，未来可拓展至其他物理场模型或探索更高效的路由策略。

title: Can Transformers Learn to Verify During Backtracking Search?
abstract: Backtracking search underlies classical constraint solvers, planners, and theorem provers. Recent transformer-based reasoning systems explore search trees over their own intermediate steps. A common training recipe fits an autoregressive next-token loss on offline solver traces. The model's input at each step is a cumulative trace of all prior decisions. The optimal continue-or-backtrack predictor depends only on the current search state, since two trajectories reaching the same state admit the same viable continuations. We show that decoder-only transformers trained on cumulative traces fail this requirement in two ways: the trace can scatter state features across many positions (scattered retrieval), and the predictor can condition on the trajectory rather than the state (history entanglement). We address scattered retrieval with localization, a trace-level fix that rewrites each decision block to expose state features locally. We address history entanglement with Selective State Attention (SSA), a fixed attention mask that enforces state-based decisions structurally without modifying training data, objective, or parameters. We focus on reactive verification, after propagation has exposed a contradiction. We test SSA on 3-SAT, graph coloring, Blocks World, and backtracking parsing. On same-state pairs that differ only in prior history, SSA emits identical decisions while a cumulative-trained causal baseline does not. Our contribution is a diagnostic of transformer behavior on serialized trajectory data, paired with a structural fix. Pretrained language models that search over their own reasoning steps may face the same failure. Our analysis opens up inference-time context clearing as a candidate way to apply the same isolation without retraining.

light_analysis.overview: 诊断了Transformer在回溯搜索中因累积轨迹导致的分散检索和历史纠缠问题，并提出定位和选择性状态注意力（SSA）的修复方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 回溯搜索是约束求解器、规划器和定理证明器的核心。基于Transformer的推理系统通过离线求解器轨迹训练自回归下一个词预测模型，但模型输入是累积轨迹，这可能引入冗余信息。最优的继续/回溯决策应仅依赖于当前搜索状态，因为到达同一状态的不同轨迹具有相同的可行后续。然而，训练在累积轨迹上的解码器-only Transformer未能满足这一要求，导致两个问题：状态特征分散在多个位置（分散检索），以及预测器可能基于轨迹而非状态（历史纠缠）。
light_analysis.method: 针对分散检索，提出定位（localization）方法，将每个决策块重写以局部暴露状态特征。针对历史纠缠，提出选择性状态注意力（SSA），一种固定的注意力掩码，在不修改训练数据、目标或参数的情况下，结构性地强制基于状态的决策。研究聚焦于反应性验证（传播揭示矛盾后）。在3-SAT、图着色、Blocks World和回溯解析任务上测试。
light_analysis.result: 在仅先验历史不同的同状态对上，SSA产生相同决策，而累积训练的因果基线则不一致。具体实验表明，SSA有效解决了历史纠缠问题，使得模型决策仅依赖当前状态。论文未提供数值性能指标（如准确率），但通过消融实验验证了修复效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于诊断了Transformer在序列化轨迹数据上的行为失败模式，并提供了结构性修复。研究表明，在自身推理步骤上进行搜索的预训练语言模型可能面临同样问题。该分析为推理时上下文清理提供了候选方法，无需重新训练即可实现相同的状态隔离。未来工作可探索更广泛的搜索树场景。

title: SGR-Bench: Benchmarking Search Agents on State-Gated Retrieval
abstract: Recent advances in large language models and tool-using agents have expanded the range of benchmarked web tasks. Yet an important class of specialized retrieval tasks remains undercharacterized. On many specialized data-retrieval websites, answer-bearing evidence becomes accessible only after establishing the correct site-specific retrieval state through filters, views, hierarchies, or scopes. We term this capability state-gated retrieval (SGR). We introduce SGR-Bench, a benchmark for this setting containing 100 expert-curated tasks spanning six source families and 12 public data ecosystems. Each task requires discovering the appropriate website and configuring its site-specific retrieval state to produce a structured answer. SGR-Bench pairs constraint-guided and goal-oriented formulations of the same underlying problems, enabling controlled comparisons between explicit and implicit guidance for state-gated retrieval. We evaluate eight CLI-based agentic LLM systems and three commercial search-agent products. On SGR-Bench, the strongest system reaches only 66.18% item-level F1, while row-level F1 remains much lower. A manual audit of 156 analyzable failed CLI trajectories shows why: agents often reach a relevant web source, but establish the wrong site-specific retrieval state. Retrieval-scope drift (37.2%) and criterion mismatch (27.6%) dominate, whereas final answer composition accounts for only 10.3%. The dataset and single-case evaluation instructions are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/PKUAIWeb/SGR-BENCH.
comment: Work in Progress. 23 pages, 7 figures, preprint

light_analysis.overview: 提出SGR-Bench基准，评估搜索代理在需要配置网站检索状态的任务上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Web任务基准未充分覆盖专门数据检索场景，许多网站需先建立正确检索状态（如过滤器、视图）才能获取答案。当前方法缺乏对“状态门控检索”的评估，导致代理表现不佳。因此需要专门基准以识别和解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: 定义状态门控检索(SGR)概念，构建SGR-Bench基准，含100个专家策划任务，覆盖6个源家族和12个公共数据生态系统。每个任务要求代理发现适当网站并配置站点特定检索状态以输出结构化答案。采用配对约束引导和目标导向表述，评估8个CLI-based agentic LLM系统和3个商业搜索代理产品。
light_analysis.result: 最强系统在SGR-Bench上仅达66.18%项目级F1，行级F1更低。失败分析显示，代理常建立错误检索状态：检索范围漂移占37.2%，标准不匹配占27.6%，最终答案组成仅占10.3%，表明状态门控是主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作首次系统定义并评估SGR，揭示现有搜索代理在配置站点检索状态方面的严重不足。SGR-Bench为改进代理的状态推理提供基准，推动更可靠网络搜索工具发展。未来可探索更好状态推理与错误恢复机制。

title: Survive or Collapse: The Asymmetric Roles of Data Gating and Reward Grounding in Self-Play RL
abstract: Self-play reinforcement learning trains language models on their own generated tasks, co-evolving a proposer and solver without human labels. Recent systems report strong reasoning gains, but collapse and instability are widely observed and poorly understood. The dominant response treats this as a reward-design problem. We argue instead that self-play stability is governed by two distinct levers: a data-level gate that decides which proposer-generated tasks enter the training pool, and the reward signal that updates the policy on tasks already admitted. Through controlled experiments on a Python output-prediction task and a deterministic-DSL twin task that strips pretraining priors, output ambiguity, and executor noise, we find the two levers are asymmetric.
