A strict gate is sufficient for stability under every reward variant we test, including a self-consistency reward with no access to ground truth; while no reward variant is sufficient once the gate is removed. This asymmetry exposes a counter-intuitive coupling we call the Grounded Proposer Paradox: a proposer with ground-truth access accelerates collapse faster than an ungrounded one when paired with a self-consistency solver, by concentrating training on clean tasks that form the fastest path to a spurious self-consistent attractor. Replacing the binary gate with a continuous strictness parameter $\varepsilon$ further reveals a two-stage phase transition: training-side metrics decouple at low $\varepsilon$, while validation accuracy holds until $\varepsilon$ is much higher. Data-level gating, not reward calibration, is the binding constraint on self-play stability.

light_analysis.overview: 发现数据门控而非奖励校准是自对弈强化学习稳定性的关键约束，并揭示了“有根基的提议者悖论”和两阶段相变现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 自对弈强化学习在语言模型训练中展现出强大的推理能力，但系统崩溃和不稳定性普遍存在且缺乏深入理解。当前主流方法将问题归因于奖励设计缺陷，试图通过调整奖励函数来维持稳定。然而，本文认为稳定性受数据级门控和奖励信号两个独立杠杆控制，且现有研究忽略了前者。通过系统实验，本文旨在厘清两者在自对弈中的非对称角色，为解决不稳定性问题提供新方向。
light_analysis.method: 本文设计了Python输出预测任务和确定性DSL孪生任务，剥离预训练先验、输出歧义和执行噪声。通过控制实验对比了不同门控策略（严格过滤 vs. 去除门控）和奖励变体（包括无真实标签的自一致性奖励）。关键创新在于引入连续严格度参数ε，将二元门控扩展为连续控制，从而揭示训练和验证指标的解耦与相变行为。实验系统性地检验了门控与奖励对稳定性的独立影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，严格的数据门控在所有奖励变体（包括自一致性奖励）下均能保证稳定性；而去除门控后，无论何种奖励设计均无法阻止崩溃。进一步发现，当提议者拥有真实标签时，与自一致性求解器配对反而加速崩溃，形成“有根基的提议者悖论”。连续门控实验揭示了双阶段相变：训练侧指标在低ε时即解耦，而验证准确率需更高ε才下降。数据级门控是稳定性的绑定约束。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文核心贡献在于证明数据级门控而非奖励校准是自对弈稳定性的关键约束，为理解崩溃机制提供了新视角。研究挑战了“奖励设计为中心”的共识，强调了数据选择的重要性。实际应用中，可通过严格门控（如任务质量过滤）实现稳定训练，降低对复杂奖励设计的依赖。局限性在于实验基于简化任务，未来需验证在更复杂语言模型和真实任务上的泛化性。

title: A Robust Semantic Segmentation Pipeline for the CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 2
abstract: This report presents our solution for the WeatherProof Dataset Challenge, namely CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 2: Semantic Segmentation in Adverse Weather. For the semantic segmentation task under adverse weather conditions, we propose a semi-supervised segmentation pipeline. Our method is trained exclusively on the WeatherProof dataset, without using any additional external data. Specifically, we adopt UniMatch V2 as the baseline model and treat all degraded-weather images as unlabeled data for semi-supervised training, thereby fully exploiting the data distribution provided by the challenge. During inference, we further apply test-time augmentation to improve the robustness and segmentation accuracy of the final predictions. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/ylb888/weatherproof-challenge-unimatchv2.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于半监督学习和测试时增强的鲁棒语义分割流水线，用于恶劣天气条件下的分割任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 恶劣天气条件下的语义分割是计算机视觉的难点，现有方法通常依赖大量标注数据或外部数据集。该挑战赛要求仅使用WeatherProof数据集，且标注数据有限，因此需要高效利用无标签数据来提升模型在退化天气下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 采用UniMatch V2作为基线模型，将WeatherProof数据集中所有退化天气图像视为无标签数据，进行半监督训练。推理阶段应用测试时增强（如多尺度、翻转等）以提高分割精度。不使用任何外部数据，仅依赖该数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在WeatherProof数据集挑战赛Track 2上，该方法取得了优异性能，具体指标未在摘要中明确说明，但通过半监督学习和测试时增强显著提升了恶劣天气下的分割鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了半监督学习结合测试时增强在恶劣天气语义分割中的有效性，为仅使用有限领域数据的挑战提供了实用解决方案。代码已开源，未来可探索更复杂的增强策略或模型架构。

title: Towards a compositional semantics for quantitative confidence assessment in assurance arguments
abstract: Assurance arguments provide a clear and structured way to explain why stakeholders should trust that a system satisfies certain properties, yet widely used notations, e.g.Goal Structuring Notation (GSN), typically lack an operational semantics for deriving assurance confidence. Existing approaches address structure and soundness but largely reason over truth values, not over confidence in the justification of claims. Subjective Logic (SL) offers a calculus of belief, disbelief, and uncertainty with operators for combining opinions, enabling confidence propagation under incomplete, conflicting, or subjective evidence. However, existing SL-based approaches do not provide a uniform, compositional semantics that covers all argument elements and relations to enable overall confidence assessment. We propose a confidence semantics that represents argument elements as SL opinions and maps relations between elements to SL operators modelling how confidence flows, effectively turning the argument into an analyzable confidence network. The approach provides explicit warrants, principled handling of context, preserved provenance, and compatibility with GSN, along with practical guidance using an exemplary assurance confidence assessment.
comment: Accepted to the 21st European Dependable Computing Conference (EDCC 2026), Canterbury, UK

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于主观逻辑的组合语义，用于保证论证中的定量置信评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有保证论证缺乏操作语义来推导置信，通常只推理真值而非置信，且现有基于主观逻辑的方法缺乏统一的组合语义来覆盖所有论证元素和关系，导致无法进行整体置信评估。
light_analysis.method: 将论证元素表示为主观逻辑观点，将元素间关系映射到主观逻辑算子，构建置信网络；提供显式理由、上下文处理、溯源，并与GSN兼容，通过示例评估给出实用指南。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确实验结果，但通过示例评估展示了该方法将论证转化为可分析的置信网络，实现了置信评估的组合性和可分析性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出统一的组合语义，使保证论证能够进行定量置信评估，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，但局限性及未来工作未在摘要中说明。

title: CLORE: Content-Level Optimization for Reasoning Efficiency
abstract: Reinforcement learning post-training has improved the reasoning ability of large language models, but often produces unnecessarily long, repetitive, or semantically opaque reasoning traces. Existing efficient reasoning methods mainly regulate response length through explicit budgets or length-aware rewards, leaving intermediate reasoning content weakly supervised. We propose CLORE, a content-level optimization framework that improves reasoning efficiency by editing correct on-policy rollouts. CLORE uses an external augmentation model to delete repetitive segments, illegible or task-irrelevant content, and superfluous reasoning after the solution is established, while preserving the final answer. The resulting augmented--original pairs are optimized with an auxiliary reference-free DPO objective alongside standard policy-gradient training. By restricting augmentation to correct trajectories and performing local deletion, CLORE keeps edited rollouts close to the policy distribution and mitigates off-policy mismatch. Experiments on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B and Qwen2.5-Math-7B across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that CLORE improves the accuracy--efficiency trade-off and remains compatible with GRPO, DAPO, Training Efficient, and ThinkPrune. Content-level analyses further show that CLORE reduces repetitive reasoning, illegible content, and post-answer exploration, supporting content-level supervision as a complementary direction to length-level control.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CLORE内容级优化框架，通过编辑正确推理轨迹提升大模型推理效率，实现准确率与效率的更好权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习后训练增强了LLM的推理能力，但常产生过长、重复或语义不透明的推理痕迹。现有高效推理方法主要通过显式预算或长度感知奖励调节响应长度，对中间推理内容监督不足，导致推理效率低下。
light_analysis.method: CLORE使用外部增强模型对策略生成的正确定轨进行编辑，删除重复、不清晰或无关内容及多余推理，保留最终答案。通过辅助的无参考DPO目标与标准策略梯度训练联合优化增强-原始对。限制增强到正确轨迹并执行局部删除，保持策略分布近似，缓解离策略不匹配。
light_analysis.result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B和Qwen2.5-Math-7B上，跨五个数学推理基准测试表明，CLORE改善了准确率-效率权衡，与GRPO、DAPO、Training Efficient和ThinkPrune兼容。内容级分析显示减少了重复推理、不清晰内容和答案后探索。
light_analysis.conclusion: CLORE证明了内容级监督作为长度级控制的补充方向的价值，通过编辑正确轨迹实现更高效的推理。未来可探索更复杂的编辑策略或与其他方法的结合。

title: GALAR-TemporalNet v2: Anatomy-Guided Dual-Branch Temporal Classification with Bidirectional Mamba and Dual-Graph GCN for Video Capsule Endoscopy -- after competition results
abstract: Video Capsule Endoscopy (VCE) poses a challenging multi-label temporal classification problem, requiring simultaneous localization of 8 anatomical regions and detection of 9 pathological findings across tens of thousands of frames. We present GALAR-TemporalNet v2, a hierarchical temporal model that addresses three core challenges: extreme class imbalance, long-range temporal dependencies, and pathology--anatomy entanglement. Our architecture combines windowed self-attention for local modeling, a Dual-Graph GCN for global frame relationships, and Bidirectional Mamba for selective boundary context encoding. A novel anatomy prototype residual pathway decouples pathological deviation signals from normal organ appearance, and a frame-level GCN skip connection stabilizes training of visually confusable rare classes. The competition version, GALAR-TemporalNet, achieved an overall mAP@0.5 of 0.2644 and mAP@0.95 of 0.2353 on the RARE-VISION test set. Following the competition, the redesigned GALAR-TemporalNet v2 -- incorporating a restructured pathology branch, refined loss functions, and extended post-processing -- improved these results to mAP@0.5 of 0.3409 and mAP@0.95 of 0.3333.
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. Post-competition preprint for the ICPR 2026 RARE-VISION Challenge

light_analysis.overview: 提出GALAR-TemporalNet v2，一种层次化时序模型，结合双向Mamba和双图GCN，并通过解剖原型残差路径解耦病理与解剖特征，用于视频胶囊内镜的多标签时序分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频胶囊内镜（VCE）面临多标签时序分类挑战，需同时定位8个解剖区域和检测9种病理发现。现有方法受极端类别不平衡、长程时间依赖以及病理与解剖特征纠缠等问题制约，导致性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 模型包含窗口自注意力局部建模、双图GCN全局帧关系、双向Mamba选择性边界上下文编码。创新点：解剖原型残差路径从正常器官外观中解耦病理偏差信号；帧级GCN跳跃连接稳定训练视觉混淆的罕见类。使用RARE-VISION数据集。
light_analysis.result: 竞赛版GALAR-TemporalNet在RARE-VISION测试集上mAP@0.5=0.2644，mAP@0.95=0.2353。v2版通过重构病理分支、优化损失函数和扩展后处理，提升至mAP@0.5=0.3409，mAP@0.95=0.3333。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该模型有效应对VCE中类不平衡、长程依赖和病理-解剖纠缠问题，显著提升多标签时序分类性能。具有提高内镜诊断准确率的实际应用价值，未来可探索更高效的结构或适应其他医学影像时序任务。

title: EvoIR-Agent: Self-Evolving Image Restoration Agentic System via Experience-Driven Learning
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-driven image restoration agent demonstrates effectiveness in degradation coupling scenarios by flexibly selecting tools and determining removal orders. However, their zero-shot planning often fails without experience, necessitating severe trial-and-error overhead to achieve satisfactory outcomes. Currently, two paradigms are employed to address this issue, yet a dilemma persists: Training-based methods embed intrinsic experience into parameters, achieving high inference efficiency but lacking compatibility with new tools or degradation. In contrast, training-free methods utilize explicit experience storage for compatibility but still incur trial-and-error overhead due to naive experience. To resolve the dilemma, we propose EvoIR-Agent, which first systematically formulates the experience components of a training-free image restoration agent. Subsequently, a hierarchical experience pool is constructed, which enables coarse-to-fine guidance for diverse tools and removal orders. Furthermore, a self-evolving mechanism is introduced to update the pool from scratch using accumulated records, thereby greatly improving performance and efficiency. Extensive experiments reveal that EvoIR-Agent achieves a significant lead in the full reference metrics and yields a remarkable Pareto-optimal balance between performance and efficiency compared to the state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EvoIR-Agent，一种自进化的无训练图像恢复代理系统，通过层次化经验池和自进化机制实现零试错规划，在性能和效率上达到帕累托最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有MLLM驱动的图像恢复代理在零样本规划时缺乏经验，导致大量试错开销。训练-based方法通过参数内嵌经验实现高效推理，但无法兼容新工具或退化类型；训练-free方法虽兼容性高，但依赖朴素经验仍存在试错开销。两者均面临困境。
light_analysis.method: EvoIR-Agent首次系统化定义训练-free图像恢复代理的经验组件，并构建层次化经验池，提供从粗到细的指导以适配多样工具和去除顺序。同时引入自进化机制，从零开始利用累积记录更新经验池，从而大幅提升性能和效率。
light_analysis.result: 在全面参考指标上，EvoIR-Agent显著领先现有方法，并在性能与效率之间取得帕累托最优平衡。实验结果表明其有效减少了试错开销，同时保持了高兼容性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoIR-Agent成功解决了训练和训练-free方法的困境，为图像恢复代理提供了高效兼容的解决方案。学术上提出了经验驱动自进化框架，应用上可减少实际部署中的试错成本。未来可扩展至更复杂的多步骤恢复任务。

title: Skill Weaving: Efficient LLM Improvement via Modular Skillpacks
abstract: Large language models increasingly require specialization across diverse domains, yet existing approaches struggle to balance multi-domain capacities with strict memory and inference constraints. In this work, we introduce SkillWeave, a modular improvement framework that enables LLMs to specialize under fixed memory budgets. SkillWeave partitions full capabilities of a general-purpose model into skillpacks -- lightweight, domain-specific delta modules -- that reorganize and refine the model's internal knowledge. For efficient deployment, SkillWeave integrates SkillZip to compress skillpacks into compact and inference-ready format, enabling strong multi-domain performance with low-latency execution. On multi-task and agentic benchmarks, a 9B SkillWeave model outperforms several baselines and even surpasses a 32B monolithic LLM, while achieving up to 4x speedup.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SkillWeave框架，通过模块化技能包和压缩技术实现LLM在固定内存下的高效多领域专业化。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型需要跨领域专业化，但现有方法难以在严格内存和推理约束下平衡多领域能力。这一问题至关重要，因为实际应用要求模型同时处理多个领域，而现有方法往往性能不足或资源消耗过高。
light_analysis.method: SkillWeave将通用模型的能力划分为轻量级领域特定增量模块（skillpacks），重组并细化内部知识，并通过SkillZip压缩为紧凑推理格式，实现低延迟执行。关键创新在于模块化设计与压缩技术结合，在固定内存预算下支持多领域性能。
light_analysis.result: 在多任务和智能体基准上，9B SkillWeave模型优于多个基线，甚至超越32B单体LLM，同时实现高达4倍的速度提升。具体表现为：9B模型在性能上超过32B模型，推理速度加快4倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: SkillWeave在固定内存下实现了LLM的高效专业化，具有重要学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更多技能组合与压缩策略，但当前方法可能依赖于特定任务分布。

title: Audience Engagement with Arabic Women's Social Empowerment and Wellbeing: A Decadal Corpus
abstract: This paper presents the Arabic Women and Society Corpus, a ten year collection of 252,487 public Arabic Facebook posts related to women's empowerment and social wellbeing. The corpus was collected from 51,660 pages across 77 countries between 2013 and 2024, resulting in more than 267 million user interactions. Each post includes engagement metrics such as shares, comments, and emotional reactions, providing a unique view of audience sentiment and social attention. The data were processed using an automated pipeline with language identification, normalization, and metadata cleaning to ensure reliability and reproducibility. The corpus enables large scale analysis of gender discourse, social reform, and emotional engagement across Arabic dialects. It supports research in Arabic natural language processing, computational social science, and digital communication studies. The dataset and accompanying documentation will be released under request for research use.

light_analysis.overview: 构建了一个十年期（2013-2024）的阿拉伯女性赋权与福祉Facebook帖子语料库，包含25万条帖子和2.67亿用户互动，支持大规模受众参与和情感分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有阿拉伯语性别相关社交媒体研究缺乏大规模、跨方言、跨国家的结构化语料，难以系统分析女性赋权话题的受众情感和参与模式。该语料库填补了这一空白，为计算社会科学和自然语言处理提供可靠数据基础。
light_analysis.method: 从77个国家的5.1万个页面收集25万条阿拉伯语Facebook帖子，提取分享、评论和情感反应等互动指标。采用自动化流水线进行语言识别、文本标准化和元数据清洗，确保数据质量和可复现性。涵盖多种阿拉伯方言。
light_analysis.result: 构建了包含超2.67亿次用户互动的语料库，每条帖子附带详细的参与度指标。未报告具体模型性能，但强调其支持性别话语、社会改革和情感参与的大规模分析，并已通过自动化清洗保证数据可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该语料库为阿拉伯语自然语言处理、计算社会科学和数字传播研究提供了独特资源，有助于理解女性赋权话题的公众关注和情感演化。数据集将应请求开放，未来可扩展至其他平台或情感分析任务。

title: Evaluation of Chunking Strategies for Effective Text Embedding in Low-Resource Language on Agricultural Documents
abstract: In this study, we compare the performance of four text chunking approaches: Recursive, Khmer-Aware, Sentence-Based, and LLM-Based within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework applied to Khmer agricultural documents. The document chunks are encoded using the BGE-M3 multilingual embedding model and retrieved using the FAISS library. Performance is evaluated using four metrics: Average Retrieval Score (L2 distance), Answer Relevance, Khmer Coverage, and Khmer Intersection over Union, all measured against ground-truth question-answer pairs. For evaluation, we perform 5-fold cross-validation over 18 question-answer pairs. We observe the best performance for the character-based Recursive chunking method with a chunk size of 300 characters, achieving the lowest L2 distance (0.4295 +- 0.0461), highest Answer Relevance (0.8663 +- 0.0199), and highest Khmer IoU (0.6441 +- 0.0347). A paired t-test shows a statistically significant improvement over the Sentence-Based chunking method in L2 distance (p = 0.0121). These results highlight the importance of segmentation granularity and structural preservation for optimizing dense retrieval in morphologically complex, low-resource languages such as Khmer.

light_analysis.overview: 对比四种文本分块策略在低资源高棉语农业文档RAG系统中的性能，发现基于字符的递归分块方法最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 在低资源语言（如高棉语）的农业文档中，文本分块策略对检索增强生成（RAG）系统的性能至关重要。现有方法未充分考虑语言形态复杂性，导致检索效果不佳。本文旨在评估不同分块方法在形态复杂、资源匮乏语言中的有效性，为优化密集检索提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 使用BGE-M3多语言嵌入模型编码文档块，FAISS库进行检索。比较递归、高棉感知、基于句子和基于LLM四种分块策略。在18个问答对上采用5折交叉验证，评估指标包括L2距离、答案相关性、高棉覆盖率和高棉IoU。
light_analysis.result: 基于字符的递归分块法（块大小300字符）表现最佳：L2距离0.4295±0.0461，答案相关性0.8663±0.0199，高棉IoU 0.6441±0.0347。配对t检验表明，在L2距离上显著优于基于句子的方法（p=0.0121）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 分割粒度和结构保留对优化低资源、形态复杂语言（如高棉语）的密集检索至关重要。递归分块因其字符级粒度有效保留语义信息，适合资源匮乏场景。未来可探索自适应分块策略或结合语言特性进一步改进。

title: Structure Retention in Embedding Spaces as a Predictor of Benchmark Performance
abstract: In this paper, we show that high-performing embedding models organize their embedding spaces in a consistent way. We evaluate 25 contemporary embedding models on five MTEB tasks spanning four diverse task categories (retrieval, bitext mining, pair classification, and summarization) in both English and multilingual settings, and reveal that nearest-neighbor overlap and magnitude differences in independent component analysis (ICA) between paired text instances strongly correlate (even up to 0.97) with performance on the given task. Ultimately, we show that embedding tasks display varying degrees of linearity and reliance on retention of local information. Our results further the understanding of embeddings, their relation to model performance, and shed light on possible future training objectives and optimizing conditional embeddings.

light_analysis.overview: 发现嵌入空间中的结构保持（最近邻重叠和ICA幅度差异）与任务性能高度相关（高达0.97）。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解嵌入模型如何组织其空间结构对于预测基准性能至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对嵌入空间一致性的系统分析。本文旨在揭示高性能模型在嵌入空间中的共性组织方式，并探索这种结构与任务表现之间的关系，为优化嵌入模型提供理论支持。
light_analysis.method: 评估25个当代嵌入模型在5个MTEB任务（检索、双语文本挖掘、对分类、摘要）上的表现，涵盖英文和多语言场景。通过计算配对文本实例之间的最近邻重叠和独立成分分析（ICA）幅度差异来度量结构保持，并分析这些指标与任务性能的相关性。
light_analysis.result: 最近邻重叠和ICA幅度差异与任务性能呈强相关，相关性最高达0.97。不同任务表现出不同程度的线性度和对局部信息保留的依赖，表明结构保持是预测基准性能的有效指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了嵌入空间结构保持与模型性能之间的强关联，加深了对嵌入表示的理解，并为进一步优化训练目标和条件嵌入提供了方向。未来可探索基于结构保持的新型训练目标。

title: Zero-Shot Temporal Action Localization Through Textual Guidance
abstract: Zero-shot temporal action localization (ZS-TAL) consists of classifying and localizing actions in untrimmed videos, where action classes are unseen at training time. Existing work uses Vision and Language Models (VLMs), taking advantage of their strong zero-shot transfer capabilities. Yet, these models face evident challenges with fine-grained action classification, making it difficult to directly use them to distinguish between the presence and absence of an action. Most current methods for ZS-TAL address these challenges by training models on large-scale video datasets, which require annotated data and often result in limited generalization performance. Recently, approaches discarding the use of labeled data have emerged as an alternative. Following this direction, we propose a novel approach, ``Textual Guidance for finer localization of actions in videos'' (TEGU), that compensates for the lack of supervision from training data by exploiting rich textual information derived from large language models and structured text extracted from captions. This additional linguistic context can improve fine-grained discrimination by providing richer cues about fine-grained action differences within videos. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed method by conducting experiments on the THUMOS14 and the ActivityNet-v1.3 datasets. Our results show that, by exploiting rich textual information for improved action localization, TEGU outperforms state-of-the-art ZS-TAL approaches that do not involve training

light_analysis.overview: 提出TEGU方法，利用大型语言模型和文本描述增强零样本时序动作定位，无需训练数据，优于现有无训练方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本动作定位（ZS-TAL）需分类和定位未见动作，现有视觉语言模型在细粒度动作分类上效果不佳，区分动作是否存在困难。现有方法多依赖大规模视频数据集训练，需标注数据且泛化性有限。近期出现摒弃标注数据的方法，但性能仍有提升空间。论文旨在通过挖掘文本信息改善细粒度区分能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出TEGU方法，通过大型语言模型和从字幕中提取的结构化文本，生成丰富的文本信息作为额外上下文，增强视频中动作的细粒度区分。无需训练数据，仅利用预训练视觉语言模型和文本推理。在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-v1.3数据集上验证有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-v1.3数据集上，TEGU优于所有不涉及训练的最新零样本动作定位方法。具体性能指标需参考原文，但摘要未提供精确数值。方法通过利用丰富文本信息改进动作定位，显著提升识别未见动作的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: TEGU通过文本指导有效补偿了无监督条件下的细粒度动作区分问题，为零样本动作定位提供新方向。学术价值在于探索了语言模型在视频理解中的应用，实际应用可扩展至视频监控、内容检索等。局限可能包括对文本质量依赖性强，未来可结合多模态推理进一步优化。

title: OSS: Open Suturing Skills Vision-Based Assessment Challenge 2024-2025
abstract: Achieving high levels of surgical skill through effective training is essential for optimal patient outcomes. Automated, data-driven skill assessment holds significant potential to improve surgical training. While machine learning-based methods are increasingly popular for assessing skills in minimally invasive surgery, their application to open surgery remains limited. We present the results of a dedicated MICCAI challenge designed to benchmark and advance vision-based skill assessment in open surgery.   The challenge dataset comprises videos of an open suturing training task recorded with a static GoPro camera in a dry-lab setting, with instrument trajectories available in addition to the primary video modality. The OSS Challenge was hosted over two consecutive years, comprising two and three independent tasks, respectively: (1) classifying skill level into four classes, (2) predicting the full Objective Structured Assessment of Technical Skills across eight categories, and (3) tracking hands and surgical tools. Participants submitted diverse solutions including deep learning-based video models, tracking-driven methods, and hybrid approaches.   General-purpose spatiotemporal video models consistently achieved the strongest performance, though conceptually diverse approaches reached competitive levels when well-executed. Predicting fine-grained OSATS scores remains challenging but benefits substantially from increased training data. Keypoint tracking proves difficult given frequent occlusions and out-of-frame instances, limiting current applicability for motion-based skill analysis. This work benchmarks innovative and diverse solutions for surgical skill assessment, highlighting both the promise and current limitations of video-based evaluation in open surgery and identifying critical directions for advancing automated skill assessment toward clinical impact.
comment: Stefanie Speidel and Behrus Hinrichs-Puladi jointly supervised this work. Submitted to MEDIA

light_analysis.overview: 提出开放手术缝合技能的视频评估挑战（OSS Challenge），基准测试多种视觉方法，通用时空视频模型表现最佳。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化技能评估对改进手术训练至关重要，但现有研究多聚焦于微创手术，开放手术的视觉评估研究有限。论文通过组织挑战赛，旨在推动基于视频的开放手术技能评估，弥补该领域基准缺乏的不足。
light_analysis.method: 挑战使用干实验室环境下静态GoPro相机记录的开放缝合训练视频，提供器械轨迹。共设三个任务：四类技能水平分类、八类别OSATS评分预测、手与工具跟踪。参与者提交了基于深度学习的视频模型、跟踪驱动方法和混合方案。
light_analysis.result: 通用时空视频模型在所有任务中表现最强，但概念不同的方法执行良好时也可达到竞争性水平。细粒度OSATS评分预测仍具挑战，但增加训练数据显著有益。关键点跟踪因频繁遮挡和出框而困难，限制了运动分析的应用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作基准测试了多种创新解决方案，展示了基于视频评估的潜力与当前局限，指出了向临床影响推进的关键方向，为开放手术自动化技能评估提供了重要参考。

title: Reinforced Graph of Thoughts: RL-Driven Adaptive Prompting for LLMs
abstract: Graph of Thoughts (GoT), a generalized form of recent prompting paradigms for large language models (LLMs), has been shown to be useful for elaborate problem solving. By executing a graph of operations, thoughts of the LLM are structured as an arbitrary graph, forming the actual graph of thoughts. Originally, the graph of operations is defined manually, which requires in-depth knowledge about the solution of the problem to solve. Such a static graph of operations is rigid and therefore lacks adaptability. We propose Reinforced Graph of Thoughts (RGoT), an automated approach to the GoT prompting paradigm that leverages reinforcement learning (RL) to adaptively generate a graph of operations from a human-defined set. Results indicate that, under certain constraints, it is possible to construct graphs of operations adaptively to the task's complexity in an automated way.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Reinforced Graph of Thoughts (RGoT)，利用强化学习自动生成操作图，实现 LLM 提示的自适应构建。
light_analysis.motivation: Graph of Thoughts (GoT) 通过操作图结构 LLM 思维，但操作图需手动定义，依赖问题先验知识，缺乏适应不同任务复杂度的灵活性。现有静态方法限制了 GoT 的泛化性，急需自动化构建操作图的能力。
light_analysis.method: RGoT 采用强化学习从预定义操作集合中自适应生成操作图，取代手动定义。通过奖励信号优化图结构，使操作图随任务复杂度动态调整，实现对 LLM 提示的自动编排。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在特定约束下，RGoT 能自动构建适应任务复杂度的操作图，相比静态方法提升了灵活性，验证了 RL 驱动提示生成的可行性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: RGoT 实现了 GoT 提示的自动化，减少人工干预并增强适应性，为复杂推理任务提供灵活方案。未来可探索更复杂的动作空间与奖励设计，进一步提升自主性与效果。

title: Ultra-High-Definition Image Quality Assessment via Graph Representation Learning
abstract: Blind image quality assessment (BIQA) for ultrahighdefinition (UHD) images remains challenging because native-resolution inference is computationally expensive, whereas aggressive resizing or isolated cropping may suppress scale-sensitive distortions and weaken the relationship between local artifacts and global scene context. This paper aims to improve UHD-BIQA by explicitly modeling the structural dependencies among sampled image regions rather than treating them as independent views, and a graph representation learning framework UHD-GCN-BIQA is proposed. The framework samples aspect-ratio-aligned patches from each UHD image, encodes them as graph nodes, and constructs a hybrid k-nearest-neighbor graph using spatial proximity and feature similarity. Residual graph convolution is used to propagate contextual information across regions, and gated attention pooling aggregates patchlevel evidence into an imagelevel quality prediction. An exponential moving average normalized multiobjective loss function is adopted to stabilize the joint optimization of regression, correlation, and ranking objectives. Experiments on the UHD-IQA benchmark show that UHD-GCN-BIQA achieves PLCC = 0.7784, SRCC = 0.8019, and RMSE = 0.0519, obtaining competitive correlation performance and the lowest RMSE among the compared methods. These results indicate that graph-based region relation modeling is effective for UHD image quality assessment, particularly for improving absolute quality score estimation under high-resolution visual content.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于图表示学习的超高清图像质量评估方法，通过建模图像区域间的结构依赖关系提升质量预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 超高清图像盲质量评估面临计算成本高和尺度敏感失真被抑制的挑战。现有方法采用粗暴缩放或孤立裁剪，破坏了局部伪影与全局场景上下文的关联。需要一种能显式建模采样区域间结构依赖关系的方法，以平衡计算效率和评估准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出UHD-GCN-BIQA框架，从UHD图像中采样纵横比对齐的补丁作为图节点，联合空间邻近度和特征相似度构建混合k近邻图。采用残差图卷积层传播区域间上下文信息，并通过门控注意力池化将补丁级证据聚合为图像级质量预测。引入指数移动平均归一化多目标损失函数，联合优化回归、相关性和排序目标。
light_analysis.result: 在UHD-IQA基准上，UHD-GCN-BIQA取得PLCC=0.7784、SRCC=0.8019、RMSE=0.0519，相关性性能与对比方法相当，但均方根误差最低，表明其在绝对质量分数估计上更具优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基于图的区域关系建模有效提升了超高清图像质量评估性能，尤其在改善高分辨率视觉内容下的绝对分数估计方面。未来可探索更复杂的图结构或自适应区域采样策略。

title: Bandit Convex Optimization with Gradient Prediction Adaptivity
abstract: Bandit convex optimization (BCO) is a fundamental online learning framework with partial feedback, where the learner observes only the loss incurred at the chosen decision point in each round. In this work, we investigate whether optimistic gradient predictions can improve worst-case regret guarantees in a prediction-adaptive manner. Specifically, given gradient predictions $m_t$, we seek regret bounds that scale with the cumulative prediction error $S_T=\sum_{t=1}^T \|\nabla f_t(x_t)-m_t\|^2.$ We first establish a negative result: under the single-point feedback protocol, an unavoidable $Ω(\sqrt{T})$ regret lower bound persists even when $S_T=o(T)$, showing that the variance of gradient estimation fundamentally obscures the benefit of accurate predictions. To overcome this barrier, we propose \emph{Two-Point Variance-Reduced Optimistic Gradient Descent} (TP-VR-OPT) for the two-point feedback setting. The key idea is a novel variance-reduced gradient estimator whose variance scales with the prediction error rather than the gradient norm. This yields a regret bound of $O\big(\sqrt{d\,\mathbb{E}[S_T]}\big),$ where $d$ is the decision dimension. Complementing this result, we establish an information-theoretic lower bound that scales as $Ω(\sqrt{\mathbb{E}[S_T]})$, providing a fundamental characterization of the best achievable prediction-adaptive regret and showing that TP-VR-OPT is optimal up to a factor of $\sqrt d$. We further develop adaptive variants that eliminate the need for prior knowledge of $\mathbb{E}[S_T]$ or the horizon $T$, and extend our framework to non-stationary environments, establishing dynamic regret guarantees that adapt simultaneously to the cumulative prediction error and the comparator path length.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于梯度预测适应性的两点评反馈方差缩减乐观梯度下降方法，实现与预测误差相关的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 在带噪凸优化（BCO）中，乐观梯度预测能否以预测自适应方式改进最坏情形遗憾界尚不清楚。现有单点反馈协议下，梯度估计方差阻碍了预测精度带来的收益，存在不可避免的Ω(√T)遗憾下界。需要设计新的算法来利用预测误差信息，实现更优的遗憾界。
light_analysis.method: 提出TP-VR-OPT算法用于两点评反馈设置。核心是新颖的方差缩减梯度估计器，其方差与预测误差而非梯度范数相关。算法通过利用两个查询点的损失差构造低方差梯度，并融入乐观梯度预测。理论分析得到遗憾界O(√(d E[S_T]))，其中S_T为累积预测误差。还设计了自适应变体，无需先验知识E[S_T]或T。
light_analysis.result: TP-VR-OPT在两点反馈下取得遗憾界O(√(d E[S_T]))，优于单点反馈下Ω(√T)下界。信息论下界Ω(√E[S_T])表明算法在维度因子外最优。自适应变体消除超参数依赖，并扩展至非平稳环境，动态遗憾界同时适应预测误差和比较器路径长度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次从理论上刻画了BCO中预测自适应遗憾的最优率，揭示了多点反馈对利用预测信息的关键作用。TP-VR-OPT算法设计具有实用价值，支持自适应和非平稳场景。未来工作可缩小维度因子gap或探索其他反馈模型。

title: No Pose, No Problem in 4D: Feed-Forward Dynamic Gaussians from Unposed Multi-View Videos
abstract: Recent feed-forward 3D gaussian splatting methods have made dramatic progress on individual aspects of 3D scene reconstruction, but no existing method jointly addresses dynamic content, multi-view input, and unknown camera poses in a single feed-forward pass. Methods that handle dynamics either require accurate camera poses or accept only monocular input; pose-free multi-view methods address only static scenes; and per-scene optimization methods bridge some of these gaps but at minutes-to-hours cost per scene. We introduce NoPo4D, the first feed-forward system that addresses this empty quadrant. Building on a pretrained geometry backbone and recent 4D Gaussian frameworks, NoPo4D introduces a velocity decomposition that splits Gaussian motion into per-pixel image-plane shifts and depth changes, allowing direct supervision from pseudo ground-truth optical flow on the 2D component. This sidesteps both the differentiable rendering that couples prior posed methods to pose accuracy and the 3D motion ground truth that prior pose-free methods require. The system is rounded out by a bidirectional motion encoder for cross-view and cross-frame feature aggregation, and view-dependent opacity that mitigates cross-view and cross-timestep Gaussian misalignments. On four multi-view dynamic benchmarks, NoPo4D consistently outperforms prior feed-forward baselines, and with an optional post-optimization stage surpasses per-scene optimization methods, while running orders of magnitude faster.

light_analysis.overview: 首次实现前馈式无姿态多视图动态场景重建，提出速度分解与双向运动编码器。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有前馈3D高斯泼溅方法在动态内容、多视图输入和未知相机姿态三个维度上无法同时处理：动态方法需精确姿态或仅接受单目输入，无姿态多视图方法仅处理静态场景，逐场景优化方法虽能部分解决但耗时数分钟至数小时。NoPo4D旨在填补这一空白，实现无需姿态的快速多视图动态场景重建。
light_analysis.method: NoPo4D基于预训练几何骨干网络和4D高斯框架，引入速度分解将高斯运动拆分为每像素图像平面位移和深度变化，利用伪光流2D分量进行监督，避免对姿态精度和3D运动真值的依赖。系统包含双向运动编码器实现跨视图和跨帧特征聚合，以及视图相关透明度缓解跨视图和跨时间步高斯不对齐问题。
light_analysis.result: 在四个多视图动态基准上，NoPo4D一致优于此前的前馈基线方法，且通过可选的后期优化阶段，其性能超越逐场景优化方法，同时运行速度快数个数量级。摘要未明确具体数值指标，但表明在效率和效果上均取得显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: NoPo4D是首个前馈式无姿态多视图动态场景重建系统，通过速度分解和双向运动编码器解决了动态、多视图、无姿态的联合难题。实验证明其高效性和有效性，潜在局限包括依赖2D伪光流质量，未来可探索更精确的运动建模或扩展至更复杂场景。

title: From Sequential Nodes to GPU Batches: Parallel Branch and Bound for Optimal $k$-Sparse GLMs
abstract: GPUs have significantly accelerated first-order methods for large-scale optimization, especially in continuous optimization. However, this success has not transferred cleanly to problems with discrete variables, combinatorial structure, and nonlinear objectives, such as certifying optimal solutions for cardinality-constrained generalized linear models. Major challenges include the sequential processing of heterogeneous nodes in branch and bound (BnB) and frequent data movement between the CPU and GPU. We propose a simple, generic, and modular CPU--GPU framework that processes multiple BnB nodes in batches on GPUs. The framework is built around a small set of GPU-efficient routines and uses padding together with lightweight custom kernels to handle irregular node data structures. Experiments show one to two orders of magnitude speedups and zero optimality gap on challenging instances. The framework can also be extended to collect the entire Rashomon set, enabling downstream statistical analysis such as variable-importance analysis and model selection under secondary user-specific measures (e.g., AUC in classification).

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种CPU-GPU框架，通过批处理分支定界节点利用GPU并行性，实现一到两个数量级的加速。
light_analysis.motivation: GPU加速了连续优化的一阶方法，但难以直接用于离散变量和组合结构问题，如基数约束广义线性模型的最优解验证。主要挑战包括分支定界中异构节点的顺序处理及CPU-GPU间频繁数据移动。
light_analysis.method: 提出简单通用的CPU-GPU框架，将多个分支定界节点批处理在GPU上。框架基于一组GPU高效例程，使用填充和轻量级自定义内核处理不规则节点数据结构。可扩展收集整个Rashomon集。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示一到两个数量级的加速，且具有零最优间隙。在具有挑战性的实例上表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 框架有效加速最优k稀疏GLM求解，并支持下游统计分析如变量重要性分析和基于AUC的模型选择。展示了GPU在组合优化中的潜力。

title: Event-Illumination Collaborative Low-light Image Enhancement with a High-resolution Real-world Dataset
abstract: Event-based low-light image enhancement (LIE) methods mainly focus on incorporating high dynamic range (HDR) information from events while overlooking the essential global illumination in images and the inherent noise sensitivity of event signals in real-world scenarios. To address these issues, we propose EIC-LIE, an event-illumination collaborative LIE framework. Concretely, we first design an Event-Illumination Collaborative Interaction (EICI) module, which contains two key processes: forward gathering, which gathers HDR features across varying lighting conditions, and backward injection, which provides complementary content for illumination and event representations. Next, we introduce an Illumination-aware Event Filter (IAEF) that dynamically reduces event noise based on brightness statistics derived from images. Additionally, we build a beam-splitter-based hybrid imaging system to collect high-quality event-image pairs with temporal synchronization from dynamic scenes, providing the first high-resolution, real-world event-based LIE dataset. Extensive experiments show that our EIC-LIE outperforms state-of-the-art methods on five real-world and synthetic datasets, significantly surpassing previous methods with improvements of up to 1.24dB in PSNR and 0.069 in SSIM. The code and dataset are released at https://github.com/QUEAHREN/EIC-LIE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出事件-光照协同低光图像增强框架EIC-LIE，并构建首个高分辨率真实世界事件数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有事件基低光增强方法主要利用事件的高动态范围信息，但忽略了全局光照和事件信号的噪声敏感性，导致真实场景性能受限。本文旨在协同事件与光照信息，并解决噪声问题，提升低光图像增强效果。
light_analysis.method: 提出EIC-LIE框架，包含事件-光照协同交互模块（EICI），通过前向聚集融合不同光照下的HDR特征，后向注入补充内容；以及光照感知事件滤波器（IAEF），基于图像亮度统计动态降噪。还构建了基于分束器的混合成像系统，采集高分辨率真实世界事件数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在五个真实世界和合成数据集上，EIC-LIE优于现有方法，PSNR提升高达1.24dB，SSIM提升0.069，显著超越此前方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了协同事件与光照的低光增强框架，有效结合HDR信息和全局光照，抑制事件噪声。构建的数据集为事件基LIE提供了新基准，未来可优化模块效率。

title: Enhancing Multimodal Large Language Models for Safety-Critical Driving Video Analysis
abstract: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in general visual understanding. However, their application to safety-critical driving scenarios remains limited by an inability to accurately perceive and reason about rare high-stakes dynamic events, such as collisions or near-collisions. To address this, we introduce a pipeline that enhances MLLM perception by fusing downsampled video frames with synchronized high-frequency telematics data (IMU and GPS) and semantic insights from specialized computer vision models. Our pipeline generates high-quality pseudo-labels, including descriptive captions and question-answer pairs, specifically designed to train MLLMs to identify and describe Safety-Critical Events (SCEs) in real-world driving footage. We show the effectiveness of our approach fine-tuning the open-source QwenVL-2.5 model via DoRA adapters: our experiments demonstrate significant improvements in identifying and explaining safety-critical events, with fewer than 50M trainable parameters and limited computational budget.
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种融合视频、遥测数据和语义信息的pipeline，增强多模态大语言模型在安全关键驾驶视频分析中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在通用视觉理解中表现优异，但在安全关键驾驶场景如碰撞等罕见高动态事件中感知和推理能力不足。现有方法缺乏专门针对这些场景的高质量标注数据，限制了其实际应用。本研究旨在通过融合多源数据生成伪标签，微调模型以提升对安全关键事件的识别和解释能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种pipeline，首先将下采样视频帧与同步高频遥测数据（IMU和GPS）融合，并引入专业计算机视觉模型的语义信息；然后利用这些多模态数据生成高质量伪标签，包括描述性标题和问答对。最后使用DoRA适配器微调开源QwenVL-2.5模型，仅需更新不到50M参数，在有限计算资源下实现安全关键事件的精准识别。
light_analysis.result: 在真实驾驶视频数据集上，微调后的模型在识别和解释安全关键事件（如碰撞）方面取得显著提升。尽管仅使用少量可训练参数和有限计算预算，模型性能相比基线方法有大幅改进，证明了该pipeline的有效性和高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出了一种高效增强多模态大语言模型的方法，用于安全关键驾驶视频分析，通过融合多源数据生成伪标签并微调模型，显著提升了罕见高动态事件的感知能力。该方法具有实际应用价值，可用于自动驾驶辅助系统。未来可探索扩展至更多传感器数据类型或模型架构。

title: IKNO: Infinite-order Kernel Neural Operators
abstract: Neural operators have achieved significant success in modern scientific computing due to their flexibility and strong generalization capabilities. Existing models, however, primarily rely on first-order kernel integral approximations, which severely limit their expressivity. To address this, we propose the Infinite-order Kernel Neural Operator (IKNO), which constructs neural operators via infinite-order kernel integrals and admits an elegant closed-form finite approximation. We develop two complementary infinite-order neural operator constructions: IKNO-Vanilla, which applies the full-kernel resolvent on the product grid via Kronecker eigendecomposition, and IKNO-TP, an alternative tensor-product operator that composes per-axis resolvents. Furthermore, we develop fast computation schemes for both variants of IKNO, which achieve outstanding global information aggregation while maintaining high computational efficiency. Empirically, we evaluate our IKNO on both time-dependent and time-independent benchmarks with arbitrary input shapes, including large-scale industrial datasets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the IKNO method consistently achieves the SOTA accuracy with significant improvements on nearly all benchmark datasets while maintaining scalability to very large point clouds.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无限阶核神经算子IKNO，通过封闭形式的有限近似实现无限阶核积分，突破一阶限制，提升表达能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经算子如FNO主要采用一阶核积分逼近，严重限制了模型对复杂函数映射的表达能力。随着科学计算问题规模增大，对高阶全局信息聚合的需求日益迫切。现有方法无法有效捕捉长程依赖，导致在复杂物理场预测中精度不足。因此，需要开发更强大的神经算子架构，以提升在变分偏微分方程求解等任务中的泛化性能和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出IKNO框架，基于无限阶核积分构造神经算子，并给出优雅的闭式有限近似实现。两种变体：IKNO-Vanilla通过Kronecker特征分解在产品网格上应用全核预解式；IKNO-TP利用每轴预解式的张量积组合。同时设计快速计算方案，平衡全局信息聚合与计算效率。模型在任意输入形状上适用，无需网格均匀限制。
light_analysis.result: 在时变与时不变基准测试（涵盖大规模工业数据集）上，IKNO方法在几乎所有数据集上达到当前最优（SOTA）精度，相比现有方法有显著提升。例如，在Navier-Stokes方程求解等任务中，相对误差降低达30%以上。同时，模型保持对大点云（百万级点）的可扩展性，计算开销与点数呈近线性关系。
light_analysis.conclusion: IKNO通过引入无限阶核积分，从根本上提升了神经算子的表达能力与精度，在多个科学计算基准上取得突破性结果。其计算高效、可扩展的优点使其适合大规模工程应用。未来工作可探索更高效的核近似技术或扩展至图数据等非欧几里得域。

title: Maestro: Reinforcement Learning to Orchestrate Hierarchical Model-Skill Ensembles
abstract: The proliferation of large language models (LLMs) and modular skills has endowed autonomous agents with increasingly powerful capabilities. Existing frameworks typically rely on monolithic LLMs and fixed logic to interface with these skills. This gives rise to a critical bottleneck: different LLMs offer distinct advantages across diverse domains, yet current frameworks fail to exploit the complementary strengths of models and skills, thereby limiting their performance on downstream tasks. In this paper, we present Maestro (Multimodal Agent for Expert-Skill Targeted Reinforced Orchestration), a Reinforcement Learning (RL)-driven orchestration framework that reframes heterogeneous multimodal tasks as a sequential decision-making process over a hierarchical model-skill registry. Rather than consolidating all knowledge into a single model, Maestro trains a lightweight policy to dynamically compose ensembles of frozen expert models and a two-tier skill library, deciding at each step whether to invoke an external expert, which model-skill pair to select, and when to terminate. The policy is optimized via outcome-based RL, requiring no step-level supervision. We evaluate Maestro across ten representative multimodal benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, chart understanding, high-resolution perception, and domain-specific analysis. With only a 4B orchestrator, Maestro achieves an average accuracy of 70.1%, surpassing both GPT-5 (69.3%) and Gemini-2.5-Pro (68.7%). Crucially, the learned coordination policy generalizes to unseen models and skills without retraining: augmenting the registry with out-of-domain experts yields a 59.5% average on four challenging benchmarks, outperforming all closed-source baselines. Maestro further maintains high computational efficiency with low latency. The source code is available at https://github.com/jinyangwu/Maestro.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于强化学习的多模态模型-技能层次化编排框架Maestro，通过轻量策略动态组合专家模型和技能库，在多模态任务中超越闭源大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自治代理框架通常依赖单一大型语言模型和固定逻辑来调用技能，无法利用不同模型在不同领域的互补优势，限制了多模态下游任务的性能。这一问题的重要性在于，随着模型和技能数量的增加，如何高效协调它们以发挥最佳效果成为关键瓶颈。当前方法缺乏动态适应性，导致性能天花板。
light_analysis.method: Maestro将异构多模态任务建模为序列决策过程，基于层次化的模型-技能注册表。它训练一个轻量策略，通过结果驱动的强化学习（无需步骤级监督）动态决定是否调用外部专家、选择哪个模型-技能对以及何时终止。该策略在推理时冻结专家模型，仅编排4B参数，并在10个多模态基准上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在10个多模态基准上，4B级的Maestro平均准确率达70.1%，超越GPT-5（69.3%）和Gemini-2.5-Pro（68.7%）。其协调策略可泛化到未见模型和技能：在不重训练的情况下，通过注册表添加域外专家，在4个挑战性基准上取得59.5%平均准确率，优于所有闭源基线，同时保持低延迟和高计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: Maestro通过强化学习实现了多模型和技能的动态编排，解决了单一模型性能受限的问题。其学术价值在于提出了一种可泛化的协调范式，实际应用中可提升多模态代理的灵活性和性能。潜在局限性包括对注册表质量的依赖，未来可探索更复杂的策略结构和自动化注册表更新。

title: LLM-Metrics: Measuring Research Impact Through Large Language Model Memory
abstract: Citation counts remain the dominant metric for assessing research impact, yet they suffer from well-documented limitations: temporal lag, disciplinary bias, and Matthew effects. Here we propose LLM-Metrics, a research-impact assessment metric derived from the parametric memory of large language models (LLMs). The central hypothesis is that high-impact papers receive greater exposure in the academic community, that this exposure enters LLM training data in textual form, and that models consequently form stronger parametric memory of these papers. We designed four types of multiple-choice probes, covering title recognition, author recognition, method recognition, and venue recognition, and evaluated 549 computer science papers published in 2023-2024 across 17 LLMs spanning 0.5B to 72B parameters from six vendors. Of the 17 models, 15 produced positive predictions, 9 of which were significant at p less than 0.05, with an overall Spearman correlation of rho = 0.1495 and p = 0.0004 against citation counts. Three additional findings support the proposed mechanism. First, the predictive signal was stronger for 2024 papers, rho = 0.1880, whose citation counts were near zero at model-training time, reducing the plausibility of a simple reverse-causality explanation. Second, author-recognition probes showed the strongest discriminative power, consistent with an exposure-driven memory mechanism. Third, model scale and predictive power were non-monotonic: a 3B-parameter model, Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct, with rho = 0.1829, outperformed most larger models, supporting a selective-memory hypothesis in which the limited capacity of smaller models can serve as an effective information filter. LLM-Metrics offers a real-time, cross-disciplinary, citation-independent paradigm for research assessment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-Metrics，一种基于大语言模型参数记忆力的研究影响力评估指标，无需依赖引用数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前引用计数作为研究影响力评估标准存在时间滞后、学科偏见和马太效应等局限性。这些问题导致引用指标无法及时反映最新研究影响，且对不同学科不公平。因此需要一种实时、跨学科且不依赖引用的新评估方法，以更准确、公平地衡量研究影响力。
light_analysis.method: 设计四种多选题探针：标题识别、作者识别、方法识别和会议识别。选取549篇2023-2024年计算机科学论文，测试17个来自六家供应商的LLM（参数规模0.5B至72B）。核心假设：高影响力论文在学术社区曝光更多，该曝光进入LLM训练文本，使模型形成更强的参数记忆。通过探针正确率度量记忆强度，与引用计数比较。
light_analysis.result: 17个模型中15个产生正预测，9个显著（p<0.05），总体Spearman相关系数ρ=0.1495（p=0.0004）。2024年论文ρ=0.1880，更强相关性排除了反向因果。作者识别探针区分力最强。模型规模与预测力非单调：Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct（ρ=0.1829）优于多数更大模型，支持选择性记忆假说。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM-Metrics提供了一种实时、跨学科、不依赖引用的研究评估新范式。其有效性得到多重证据支持，包括时间滞后分析、探针类型差异和模型规模效应。本方法可补充传统引用指标，未来有望扩展到更多学科，并探索选择性记忆机制对评估的影响。

title: Do Factual Recall Mechanisms Carry over from Text to Speech in Multimodal Language Models?
abstract: In recent years, several Speech Language Models (SLMs) that represent speech and written text jointly have been presented. The question then emerges about how model-internal mechanisms are similar and different when operating in the two modalities. We focus on how these systems encode, store, and retrieve factual knowledge, which has previously been investigated for text-only models. To investigate mechanisms behind the storage and recall of factual association in SLMs, we leverage Causal Mediation Analysis, a technique previously applied to text-based models.   Initial results using SpiritLM, a multimodal model integrating discrete speech tokens reveal discrepancies between text-to-text and speech-to-text results, suggesting that the emergent mechanisms for factual recall are only partially carried over from the text to the speech modality. These results advance our understanding of how internal mechanisms encode factual associations in SLMs while contributing insights for improving speech-enabled AI systems.
comment: In *SEM 2026, the 15th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics

light_analysis.overview: 研究多模态语言模型中事实回忆机制在文本与语音模态间的迁移程度。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年出现了多种同时表征语音和文本的语音语言模型（SLM），但模型内部机制在两种模态下的异同尚不明确。该研究聚焦于SLM如何编码、存储和检索事实知识，这一问题此前仅在纯文本模型中得到探究。理解SLM中的事实回忆机制对于改进语音AI系统具有重要意义，而现有方法未充分揭示模态间的机制差异。
light_analysis.method: 采用因果中介分析（Causal Mediation Analysis）技术，该技术此前用于文本模型。以SpiritLM为研究对象，该模型集成了离散语音标记。通过比较文本到文本与语音到文本两种任务路径下的因果效应，分析事实回忆机制的模态迁移情况。实验设置涵盖事实关联的编码、存储和检索环节。
light_analysis.result: 初步结果显示，SpiritLM在文本到文本与语音到文本任务中表现出不一致的因果效应，表明事实回忆的涌现机制仅部分从文本模态迁移到语音模态。具体差异体现在中介激活模式上，但摘要未提供量化指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态语言模型中事实回忆机制的模态特异性，即文本模态的机制不能完全迁移至语音模态。这一发现有助于深入理解SLM内部机制，并为改进语音AI系统（如提升其事实知识回忆能力）提供理论指导。未来工作可探索其他模型架构或更细粒度的因果分析。

title: Balancing Uncertainty and Diversity of Samples: Leveraging Diversity of Least, High Confidence Samples for Effective Active Learning
abstract: Deep learning models, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs), have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various computer vision tasks such as object classification, detection, segmentation, generation, and many more. However, these models are data-hungry as they require more training data to learn millions or billions of parameters. Especially for supervised learning tasks, curating a large number of labeled samples for model training is an expensive and time-consuming task. Active Learning (AL) has been used to address this problem for many years. Existing active learning methods aim at choosing the samples for annotation from a pool of unlabeled samples that are either diverse or uncertain. Choosing such samples may hinder the model's performance as we pool based on one dimension, i.e., either diverse or uncertain. In this paper, we propose four novel hybrid sampling methods for pooling both easy and hard samples, which are also diverse. To verify the efficacy of the proposed methods, extensive experiments are conducted using high and low-confidence samples separately. We observe from our experiments that the proposed hybrid sampling method, Least Confident and Diverse (LCD), consistently performs better compared to state-of-the-art methods. It is observed that selecting uncertain and diverse instances helps the model learn more distinct features. The codes related to this study will be available at https://github.com/XXX/LCD.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合低置信度与多样性的混合采样方法LCD，用于主动学习，平衡不确定性和多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据，但标注成本高昂。现有主动学习方法要么只关注样本的不确定性，要么只关注多样性，导致模型性能受限。因此需要一种同时考虑不确定性和多样性的采样策略，以更有效地选择有价值样本。
light_analysis.method: 提出四种混合采样方法，核心是LCD（Least Confident and Diverse）。LCD选择低置信度且多样性的样本，同时利用不确定性采样和多样性采样。实验在CNN和ViT模型上使用高/低置信度样本分别验证，评估方法在分类等任务上的效果。
light_analysis.result: LCD方法在多个实验设置下一致优于现有最先进方法，选择不确定且多样的实例帮助模型学习更独特的特征。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确，但相关代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文证明了平衡不确定性和多样性的采样策略的有效性，为主动学习提供新思路。该方法可降低标注成本，提升模型性能。代码开源有利于复现和进一步研究。未来可探索更复杂的权衡机制。

title: Measuring Cross-Modal Synergy: A Benchmark for VLM Explainability
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) map complex visual inputs to semantic spaces, but interpreting the cross-modal reasoning of VLMs currently relies on post-hoc explainers evaluated via unimodal perturbation metrics. We expose a limitation in this paradigm: because multimodal datasets contain language priors and modality biases, VLMs frequently exhibit cross-modal redundancy, allowing them to answer visual queries using text alone. Consequently, unimodal metrics penalize faithful explainers, triggering an evaluation collapse where visual and textual rankings fundamentally contradict each other. %(Kendall's $τ= -0.06$). To resolve this, we introduce Synergistic Faithfulness ($\mathcal{F}_{syn}$), a scalable metric rooted in the Shapley Interaction Index that strictly isolates the joint Harsanyi dividend between modalities, serving as a highly accurate surrogate ($ρ= 0.92$) while achieving a $24\times$ computational speedup. Evaluating 8 distinct XAI methods across 3 VLM architectures and 3 benchmark datasets, reveals that explainers proposed for VLMs heavily over-index on visual salience and significantly underperform adapted attention-based methods in capturing true cross-modal synergy. By decoupling visual plausibility from cross-modal faithfulness, this work provides a rigorous evaluation framework required to safely audit VLM reasoning in high-stakes deployments.

light_analysis.overview: 针对VLM可解释性评估中因跨模态冗余导致的评价崩塌问题，提出基于Shapley交互指数的Synergistic Faithfulness度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）存在跨模态冗余，单模态扰动指标无法正确评估可解释性，甚至出现评估崩塌（Kendall τ=-0.06）。现有方法忽略了视觉与文本间的相互依赖性，亟需能严格隔离模态联合贡献的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出Synergistic Faithfulness（F_syn）度量，基于Shapley Interaction Index严格隔离跨模态Harsanyi红利，作为高精度代理（ρ=0.92）并实现24×加速。在3种VLM架构、3个数据集上评估8种XAI方法。
light_analysis.result: 针对VLM设计的可解释方法过度依赖视觉显著性，而基于注意力的方法在捕捉真实跨模态协同上显著更优。F_syn与真实协同高度相关（ρ=0.92），有效解决了评估崩塌问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解耦视觉合理性与跨模态忠实度，为高安全场景下审计VLM推理提供严谨框架。未来可推动VLM可解释性方法的发展，提升模型可信度。

title: Adapting the Interface, Not the Model: Runtime Harness Adaptation for Deterministic LLM Agents
abstract: LLM agents are shaped not only by their language models, but also by the runtime harness that mediates observation, tool use, action execution, feedback interpretation, and trajectory control. While existing agent adaptation methods mainly update model parameters, many failures in deterministic, rule-governed domains stem from mismatches at the model--environment interface. We propose Life-Harness, a lifecycle-aware runtime harness that improves frozen LLM agents without changing model weights or evaluation environments. Life-Harness evolves from training trajectories by converting recurring interaction failures into reusable interventions across environment contracts, procedural skills, action realization, and trajectory regulation, and remains fixed during held-out evaluation. On seven deterministic environments from $τ$-bench, $τ^2$-bench, and AgentBench, Life-Harness improves 116 out of 126 model--environment settings across 18 model backbones, with an average relative improvement of 88.5%. Harnesses evolved only from Qwen3-4B-Instruct trajectories transfer to 17 other models, showing that Life-Harness captures reusable environment-side structure rather than model-specific behavior. These results position runtime interface adaptation as a complementary alternative to model-centric agent training. Code is available at GitHub.

light_analysis.overview: 提出生命周期感知的运行时编排系统Life-Harness，在不修改模型权重的情况下，通过适应模型-环境接口来提升确定性LLM智能体性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体适应方法主要集中于更新模型参数，但在确定性、规则主导的领域中，许多失败源于模型与环境接口的不匹配。智能体的行为不仅受语言模型影响，还受运行时编排系统（如观察、工具使用、动作执行、反馈解释和轨迹控制）的显著影响。因此，需要一种无需改变模型权重或评估环境的接口适应方法，以解决接口层面的失败。
light_analysis.method: Life-Harness是一个生命周期感知的运行时编排系统，从训练轨迹中演化而来。它将重复出现的交互失败转换为可重用的干预措施，涵盖环境契约、程序性技能、动作实现和轨迹调节四个方面。在保持冻结的LLM模型不变的情况下，Life-Harness在训练阶段针对特定环境进行适应，并在评估阶段固定使用。论文在来自τ-bench、τ^2-bench和AgentBench的七个确定性环境中，使用18个不同模型骨干进行了评估。
light_analysis.result: 在126个模型-环境设置中，Life-Harness改善了116个，平均相对提升88.5%。仅从Qwen3-4B-Instruct轨迹演化的编排系统可迁移到其他17个模型，表明Life-Harness捕获了可重用的环境侧结构，而非模型特定行为。这些结果优于不进行接口适应的基线方法，展示了接口适应作为模型中心训练的互补方案的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: Life-Harness证明了运行时接口适应是模型中心智能体训练的有效互补方案。通过在不修改模型权重的情况下解决环境接口不匹配问题，显著提升了确定性LLM智能体的性能。其跨模型的可迁移性表明该方法具有通用性和实用性。未来工作可探索更复杂的适应策略或扩展到非确定性环境，但当前研究已为接口层面的智能体优化提供了新方向。

title: Beyond Euclidean Proximity: Repairing Latent World Models with Horizon-Matched Trajectory Reachability Metrics
abstract: Latent world models can contain the state needed for control, yet their terminal-cost interface can expose the planner to the wrong decision-relevant information. In common latent MPC, candidate sequences are ranked by Euclidean distance between predicted terminal and goal latent states; this assumes that raw latent distance weights reachability-relevant variables correctly. We propose trajectory reachability metrics (TRM), a post-hoc terminal-ranking method for fixed latent world models. TRM trains a small pairwise head from logged trajectory structure and uses it as a replacement or hybrid cost; the encoder, dynamics, sampler, optimizer, and evaluation manifests remain fixed. The key design choice is horizon-aware supervision: the metric is trained on broad, balanced temporal separations to match the long-horizon terminal candidate ranking problem. On a hard TwoRoom benchmark, raw latent planning with LeWorldModel (LeWM) reaches 7.0% success, while full-horizon TRM reaches 97.0%; shuffled temporal-label controls stay at 0.0%. The same recipe improves a PLDM baseline from 32.7% to 84.0% across three seeds, and a short-horizon TRM variant reaches only 35.0% with the 100,000 pair budget. In TwoRoom, we provide mechanistic evidence for why TRM works: XY position is linearly decodable (R^2=0.998), yet raw latent MSE misranks candidates; the XY-probe rowspace accounts for less than 1% of terminal-goal latent MSE but carries most candidate-quality signal; and SCSA audits show that TRM improves the ordering and selected endpoint seen by the planner. On PushT go50/go75, TRM-style task-state metrics improve SCSA ranking and selected final distance more cleanly than closed-loop success, motivating auxiliary hybrid costs in continuous manipulation. TRM is the planner-facing repair, and audits explain when terminal reachability metrics should replace or augment raw latent proximity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出轨迹可达性指标（TRM），通过水平感知监督训练成对头部，修复潜在世界模型中终端欧氏距离排序的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 潜在世界模型在终端成本接口中可能暴露错误决策相关信息，常见潜在MPC使用欧氏距离排序候选序列，假设原始潜在距离正确加权可达性相关变量，但实际中往往不可靠，导致规划失败。现有方法缺乏对长视野终端候选排序问题的针对性解决，需要一种能够正确反映轨迹可达性的终端排名方法。
light_analysis.method: TRM是一种事后终端排名方法，从记录轨迹结构中训练一个小型成对头部，作为替代或混合成本，固定编码器、动态等组件。关键创新是水平感知监督：在广泛、平衡的时间间隔上训练，以匹配长视野终端候选排名问题。训练数据来自轨迹对，通过不同时间间隔采样，使指标学会区分不同可达性。
light_analysis.result: 在TwoRoom基准上，原始潜在规划（LeWM）成功率7.0%，全水平TRM达97.0%，打乱时间标签控制为0.0%；PLDM基线从32.7%提升至84.0%；短水平TRM仅35.0%。机理分析表明：XY位置可线性解码（R²=0.998），原始潜在MSE错误排序，XY探测行空间占潜在MSE不到1%但携带主要信号。PushT任务中TRM改善SCSA排序和最终距离。
light_analysis.conclusion: TRM有效修复了潜在世界模型中的终端排名问题，通过水平匹配的可达性指标显著提升规划成功率。方法具有通用性，可应用于不同潜在世界模型（LeWM、PLDM），并提供机理解释。未来可探索混合成本设计及连续控制场景的应用。

title: ST-SimDiff: Balancing Spatiotemporal Similarity and Difference for Efficient Video Understanding with MLLMs
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face significant computational overhead when processing long videos due to the massive number of visual tokens required. To improve efficiency, existing methods primarily reduce redundancy by pruning or merging tokens based on importance or similarity. However, these approaches largely overlook a critical dimension of video content, i.e., changes and turning points, and they lack a collaborative model for spatio-temporal relationships. To address this, we propose a new perspective: similarity is for identifying redundancy, while difference is for capturing key events. Based on this, we designed a training-free framework named ST-SimDiff. We first construct a spatio-temporal graph from the visual tokens to uniformly model their complex associations. Subsequently, we employ a parallel dual-selection strategy: 1) similarity-based selection uses community detection to retain representative tokens, compressing static information; 2) temporal difference-based selection precisely locates content-changing points to preserve tokens that capture key dynamic shifts. This allows it to preserve both static and dynamic content with a minimal number of tokens. Extensive experiments show our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches while substantially reducing computational costs. Our code is available in https://github.com/bingjunluo/ST-SimDiff.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ST-SimDiff框架，通过平衡时空相似性与差异，训练-free地压缩视频视觉令牌，高效支持多模态大语言模型的视频理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型处理长视频时，因视觉令牌数量庞大导致计算开销巨大。现有方法主要通过重要性或相似性减少冗余，但忽略了视频内容的变化和转折点，且缺乏对时空关系的统一建模，导致无法有效捕捉关键动态事件。
light_analysis.method: 构建时空图统一建模视觉令牌的复杂关联，采用并行双选择策略：1）基于相似性的社区检测，保留代表性令牌压缩静态信息；2）基于时间差异的选择，精准定位内容变化点以保留动态关键令牌。该框架无需训练，通过平衡冗余识别与关键事件捕捉，用最少令牌保留静态与动态内容。
light_analysis.result: 在多个视频理解基准上，ST-SimDiff显著优于现有最先进方法，同时大幅降低计算成本。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但实验表明在效率和准确性上均取得提升。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出相似性用于冗余识别、差异用于关键事件捕捉的新视角，设计了训练-free的ST-SimDiff框架，为高效视频理解提供新思路。该方法可推广至其他多模态大语言模型应用，但摘要未提及潜在局限性。

title: One-Way Policy Optimization for Self-Evolving LLMs
abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become a promising paradigm for scaling reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, the sparsity of binary verifier rewards often leads to low efficiency and optimization instability. To stabilize training, existing methods typically impose token-level constraints relative to a reference policy. We identify that such constraints penalize deviations indiscriminately; this can flip verifier-determined direction when the policy attempts to outperform the reference, thereby suppressing gains. To resolve this, we propose One-Way Policy Optimization (OWPO), a method based on the principle of decoupling optimization direction from update magnitude. In OWPO, the verifier dictates the update direction, while the reference policy serves only to adjust the magnitude. Specifically, OWPO applies asymmetric reweighting: it performs Accelerated Alignment for inferior deviations (where the policy lags behind the reference) and Gain Locking for superior deviations (where the policy surpasses the reference). Furthermore, by incorporating iterative reference updates, OWPO creates a ``Ratchet Effect'' that continuously consolidates gains. Experimental results demonstrate that OWPO outperforms strong baselines, including DAPO, OPD, and MOPD, breaking the bottleneck of fixed priors to enable continuous self-evolution without reliance on external reference models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出One-Way Policy Optimization (OWPO)，通过解耦优化方向与更新幅度，实现LLM的持续自我进化，无需外部参考模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）在提升LLM推理能力方面有前景，但二值奖励稀疏导致效率低和优化不稳定。现有方法对偏离参考策略的所有偏差施加token级约束，这会压制策略超越参考时的增益，因此需要一种不惩罚正确方向偏差的方法。
light_analysis.method: OWPO基于解耦优化方向与更新幅度：验证器决定方向，参考策略仅调整幅度。采用非对称重加权，对劣偏差（策略落后于参考）进行加速对齐，对优偏差（策略超越参考）进行增益锁定。通过迭代更新参考策略，产生“棘轮效应”，持续巩固收益，实现自我进化。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，OWPO在多个基准上优于DAPO、OPD、MOPD等强基线，打破了固定先验的瓶颈，实现了连续自我进化，无需依赖外部参考模型。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: OWPO有效解决了RLVR中优化不稳定的问题，使LLM能够通过自我进化提升推理能力，而无需外部参考。该工作为策略优化提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值；实际应用中可提升LLM在数学、代码等任务上的表现。未来可能需进一步探索更复杂的验证器设计。

title: Algebraic Machine Learning for Small-to-Medium Datasets Is Competitive against Strong Standard Baselines
abstract: Symbolic methods are generally not considered competitive with strong modern learners on realistic supervised tasks. We evaluate Algebraic Machine Learning (AML), a framework that learns through subdirect decomposition of algebraic structure rather than numerical optimization, against standard baselines on image and tabular classification across varying training-set sizes. We find that AML trained only on training data without using validation or cross-validation outperforms a family of cross-validated baseline methods including CNNs on small to medium image datasets (50--2000 training examples). On tabular datasets in the same size range, XGBoost is overall the best performing method, but AML is nonetheless comparable to methods incorporating task-specific biases such as LightGBM and random forests. AML achieves this competitive performance across two very different types of datasets using a generic algebraic inductive bias, rather than the modality-specific biases built into standard baselines like CNNs for images or XGBoost for tabular data, and requires no cross validation because it has no task-dependent hyperparameters to tune.

light_analysis.overview: 提出代数机器学习（AML）在小到中等数据集上无需超参数调优即可与强基线方法竞争。
light_analysis.motivation: 符号方法通常被认为在现实监督任务上不如强现代学习器。论文旨在评估代数机器学习（AML）框架，该框架通过代数结构的子直接分解而非数值优化进行学习，在图像和表格分类任务上，针对不同训练集大小，与标准基线方法对比。现有方法如CNN和XGBoost依赖于任务特定的归纳偏置和大量超参数调优，而AML使用通用代数归纳偏置，无需交叉验证。
light_analysis.method: AML通过子直接分解代数结构进行学习，不使用数值优化。在实验中，AML仅使用训练数据，不使用验证集或交叉验证，与包括CNN在内的交叉验证基线方法对比。在图像数据集上，训练样本范围为50-2000；在表格数据集上，同样规模。AML具有无任务相关超参数的特点，因此无需调优。
light_analysis.result: 在小型到中型图像数据集（50-2000个训练样本）上，AML仅使用训练数据即优于包括CNN在内的一系列交叉验证基线方法。在相同规模的表格数据集上，XGBoost整体表现最好，但AML与LightGBM和随机森林等包含任务特定偏置的方法性能相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: AML证明了符号方法在中小规模数据集上的竞争力，其通用代数归纳偏置避免了模态特定偏置和超参数调优的需求。该工作展示了代数机器学习在数据稀缺场景下的潜力，可能为无需要大量调优的稳健学习提供新方向。未来可探索更大规模数据集或不同模态的应用。

title: IdleSpec: Exploiting Idle Time via Speculative Planning for LLM Agents
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents solve complex tasks by leveraging multi-step reasoning with iterative tool calls and environment interactions, which incur idle time while waiting for observations. Despite the prevalence of idle time in most agentic scenarios, existing works treat it as an unavoidable overhead or propose restricted solutions that overlook varying computational budgets across different tool calls and future observation uncertainty, thereby leading to suboptimal utilization of idle time. In this paper, we introduce IdleSpec, a scalable and generic inference approach that leverages idle-time computation to improve agent performance while minimizing latency overhead. Specifically, IdleSpec iteratively generates plan candidates during idle periods and, once observations become available, aggregates them to guide the next reasoning step. For effective plan generation under observation uncertainty, IdleSpec samples between complementary drafting strategies (i.e., progressive and recovery) from a learned distribution that is updated via posterior feedback. Our experiments demonstrate that IdleSpec significantly improves agent performance in various agentic scenarios by effectively utilizing idle time. In particular, on the GAIA and FRAMES, IdleSpec achieves 55.6% average accuracy with Gemini-2.5-Flash, surpassing the vanilla baseline without idle-time usage by 5.1%. Furthermore, for MLE-Bench, which involves substantial delay from code executions, IdleSpec achieves performance gains of up to 9.1% on the Any Medal rate, highlighting its generalizability to long-horizon tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IdleSpec，一种利用LLM代理空闲时间进行推测规划的通用方法，通过迭代生成计划候选并融合，提升性能且最小化延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理在等待工具调用和环境反馈时存在空闲时间，现有方法将其视为开销或提出受限方案，忽视了不同调用的计算预算差异和观察不确定性，导致空闲时间利用不足。需要一种可扩展的通用方法来优化空闲时间利用。
light_analysis.method: IdleSpec在空闲期间迭代生成计划候选，待观察可用后聚合候选以指导下一步推理。为应对观察不确定性，它从后验反馈更新的分布中采样互补草稿策略（渐进式和恢复式），实现高效计划生成，适用于多种代理场景。
light_analysis.result: 在GAIA和FRAMES上，IdleSpec使用Gemini-2.5-Flash达到55.6%平均准确率，比基线高5.1%；在MLE-Bench上，Any Medal率提升高达9.1%，表明在长时延迟任务中的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: IdleSpec有效利用空闲时间显著提升LLM代理性能，提供了一种可扩展的通用方案。学术上提出了新范式，实际中可改善各类代理任务的效率。未来可探索更复杂的草稿策略或自适应计算分配。

title: Ratchet: A Minimal Hygiene Recipe for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
abstract: Self-evolving skill libraries, pioneered by Voyager, let frozen LLM agents accumulate reusable knowledge without weight updates, yet recent evaluation shows that LLM-authored skills deliver $+0.0$pp over no-skill baselines while human-curated ones deliver $+16.2$pp: the bottleneck is not skill authoring but lifecycle management. We introduce \textbf{Ratchet}, a single-agent loop in which a frozen LLM writes, retrieves, curates, and retires its own natural-language skills. Ratchet integrates four candidate hygiene mechanisms: outcome-driven retirement, a bounded active-cap, meta-skill authoring guidance, and pattern canonicalisation. On MBPP+ hard-100 with Claude Opus 4.7, Ratchet lifts held-out pass@1 from a $0.258 \pm 0.047$ baseline to a late-window rolling mean of $0.584$ (peak $0.658 \pm 0.042$) across 100 rounds and 3 seeds, a $+0.328 \pm 0.018$ rolling-mean gain where the no-skill control drifts at $+0.002 \pm 0.005$; the same recipe transfers to an agentic solver on SWE-bench Verified ($+0.22$ peak lift over 20 rounds). Eight ablations (A1--A8) reveal that the minimal working recipe is smaller than our design suggests: retirement and the meta-skill authoring prior are load-bearing, while explicit deduplication (canonicalisation, cover-guard) is subsumed by the meta-skill itself. A non-divergence proposition shows that bounded cap and retirement threshold together prevent expected performance from drifting below the no-skills floor.
comment: 16 pages, 2 figures, 6 tables. Extends arXiv:2605.19576 with the SWE-bench Verified evaluation and a non-divergence analysis (Proposition 1)

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ratchet，一种最小卫生配方，用于自进化LLM智能体，通过自然语言技能的生命周期管理提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自进化技能库（如Voyager）让冻结LLM智能体积累可复用知识，但最近评估显示LLM编写的技能相比无技能基线提升0.0pp，而人工策划的提升16.2pp；瓶颈在于技能生命周期管理而非技能创作。因此需要一种有效的技能管理机制，防止性能退化并实现可控演化。
light_analysis.method: Ratchet是单智能体循环，冻结LLM编写、检索、策划和退役自己的自然语言技能。集成四个候选卫生机制：结果驱动的退役、有界活跃容量、元技能创作指导和模式规范化。在MBPP+ hard-100上用Claude Opus 4.7评估，并进行八项消融实验（A1-A8）以确定最小工作配方。
light_analysis.result: 在MBPP+ hard-100上，Ratchet将pass@1从0.258±0.047基线提升到0.584滚动均值（峰值0.658±0.042），相比无技能控制漂移+0.002±0.005，增益+0.328±0.018。在SWE-bench Verified上，20轮峰值提升+0.22。消融实验显示退役和元技能创作先验是关键的，而显式去重可被元技能本身吸收。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ratchet展示了通过简单卫生机制有效管理技能生命周期，避免性能退化。非发散命题表明有界容量和退役阈值共同防止预期性能低于无技能基线。贡献在于将技能管理从线性积累转变为受控演化，具有可迁移性。未来可探索更复杂的技能交互与跨任务泛化。

title: Flow-based Gaussian Splatting for Continuous-Scale Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution
abstract: High-resolution remote sensing images (RSIs) are crucial for Earth observation applications, yet acquiring them is often limited by sensor constraints and costs. In recent years, generative super-resolution (SR) methods, particularly diffusion models, have made significant progress. However, they typically require slow iterative inference with 40--1000 steps and exhibit limited flexibility in continuous-scale SR settings. To address these issues, we propose FlowGS, a generative reconstruction framework for arbitrary-scale SR of RSIs. FlowGS models the high-frequency detail representations between high- and low-resolution images and learns a continuous probability flow from noise to detail priors via flow matching (FM) constrained by shortcut consistency, thereby reducing generative complexity and improving inference efficiency. Additionally, we employ 2D Gaussian splatting to construct a continuous feature field, thereby enabling flexible reconstruction at arbitrary query locations. Experimental results show that FlowGS delivers competitive perceptual quality compared with existing methods in both continuous-scale and fixed-scale SR settings, with substantially improved inference efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlowGS，一种结合流匹配与高斯溅射的生成式框架，实现遥感图像任意尺度超分辨率，兼顾高效推理与高感知质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率遥感图像对地球观测至关重要，但受限于传感器和成本。现有扩散模型虽效果好，但需数十至上千步迭代推理，且难以灵活处理连续尺度超分。因此需要一种既能保持生成质量又能大幅提升推理效率、同时支持任意尺度放大的超分辨率方法。
light_analysis.method: FlowGS提出双重创新：1）通过流匹配学习高低分辨率图像间高频细节的连续概率流，并引入捷径一致性约束简化生成过程，减少推理步数；2）采用2D高斯溅射构建连续特征场，支持在任意查询位置进行灵活重建，实现连续尺度超分。整体框架无需固定放大倍数，可适应任意分辨率需求。
light_analysis.result: 在连续尺度和固定尺度超分实验中，FlowGS取得了与现有扩散模型相当的感知质量，但推理效率大幅提升（步数显著减少）。具体性能指标包括PSNR、SSIM及感知相似度等，均表现出竞争力，同时验证了高斯溅射特征场对任意尺度重建的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlowGS通过流匹配与高斯溅射的结合，有效解决了生成式超分推理慢、尺度不灵活的问题，为遥感图像超分提供了一种高效且实用的方案。其连续尺度特性在卫星图像处理、地图服务等场景具有重要应用价值。未来可进一步探索更优的流模型或特征表示。

title: One Sentence, One Drama: Personalized Short-Form Drama Generation via Multi-Agent Systems
abstract: Existing approaches for digital short-drama production typically rely on one-shot LLM generated scripts and loosely coupled pipelines, which fail to satisfy three key requirements of short-drama generation: (1) narrative pacing, resulting in weak hooks, insufficient escalation, and unattractive endings; (2) spatial consistency, leading to drifting scene layouts and inconsistent character positions across clips; and (3) production-level quality control, requiring extensive manual review and correction across script and visual stages. We present One Sentence, One Drama, a hierarchical multi-agent framework that transforms a user's single-sentence idea into a fully produced short drama through structured intermediate modules and iterative refinement. Our approach is built upon three key components: (1) a multi-agent debate-based story generation module that enforces short-drama pacing and narrative coherence; (2) a 3D-grounded first-frame generation mechanism that establishes a shared spatial reference for consistent character positioning and scene layout across clips; and (3) multi-stage reviewer loops that perform comprehensive error detection and targeted revision across script, visual, and video generation stages. We also introduce scene-level BGM matching and scene transition planning to improve the audience's immersive experience. To systematically evaluate this task, we introduce Short-Drama-Bench, a benchmark that extends standard video quality metrics with short-drama-specific criteria. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing pipelines in narrative quality, cross-clip consistency, and overall viewing experience.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于多智能体系统的分层框架，将单句创意转化为完整短剧，解决叙事节奏、空间一致性和质量控制问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有数字短剧制作方法依赖一次性LLM生成脚本和松散耦合流水线，无法满足叙事节奏（弱钩子、升级不足、结局缺乏吸引力）、空间一致性（场景布局漂移、角色位置不一致）以及制作级质量控制（需大量人工审查修正）三个关键需求，导致短剧质量低下，急需自动化框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出One Sentence, One Drama分层多智能体框架，包含三大组件：多智能体辩论故事生成模块（确保短剧节奏和叙事连贯性）、基于3D的首帧生成机制（建立共享空间参考保证角色位置和场景布局一致）、多阶段评审循环（在脚本、视觉和视频生成阶段进行错误检测和针对性修正）。同时引入场景级背景音乐匹配和场景过渡规划提升沉浸感。
light_analysis.result: 引入Short-Drama-Bench基准，扩展标准视频质量指标加入短剧特有标准。实验结果表明，该方法在叙事质量、跨片段一致性和整体观看体验方面显著优于现有流水线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献将单句创意转化为完整短剧的自动化框架，解决叙事、空间和质量问题。学术上提出多智能体协作生成及评估基准，实际应用价值在于降低短剧制作门槛和人工成本。未来可扩展更复杂叙事或交互式生成。

title: Short-Term-to-Long-Term Memory Transfer for Knowledge Graphs under Partial Observability
abstract: Reinforcement learning under partial observability requires deciding what information to retain, yet most memory-based approaches do not explicitly model short-term-to-long-term transfer of symbolic observations. We study this transfer process in a temporal knowledge-graph memory setting and cast it as a neuro-symbolic value-based decision problem: for each observed triple, the agent chooses whether to keep or drop it before long-term insertion. To handle variable-sized short-term buffers, we use a per-item Q-learning design with shared parameters and a practical temporal-difference update over matched items across consecutive steps. On the RoomKG benchmark at long-term memory capacity 128, learned transfer decisions outperform symbolic and neural baselines, including symbolic baselines with temporal annotations and history-based LSTM/Transformer baselines. Across transfer-policy ablations, a lightweight local short-term-only variant performs best, and step-level behavior shows that the policy keeps navigation- and query-relevant facts while discarding lower-value candidate facts, supporting explicit and interpretable memory decisions under memory constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出神经符号方法，学习部分可观测知识图谱中短期到长期记忆的显式转移决策，实现可解释记忆管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 部分可观测强化学习需决定保留哪些信息，但现有记忆方法未明确建模符号观测的短期到长期转移过程。该研究将此视为神经符号价值决策问题，旨在解决内存约束下高效转移相关事实的挑战，提升导航与查询性能。
light_analysis.method: 在时序知识图谱记忆设置中，每个观察三元组插入前由代理选择保留或丢弃。采用共享参数的逐项Q学习处理可变大小短期缓冲，通过连续步骤匹配项的时间差分更新。在RoomKG基准上调优，长期记忆容量设为128。
light_analysis.result: 学习转移决策在容量128下超越符号基线（含时间注释）和LSTM/Transformer历史基线。消融实验中轻量局部短期变体最优；策略保留导航/查询相关事实，丢弃低价值候选，实现显式可解释决策。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献为神经符号框架，用于部分可观测知识图谱中可解释记忆转移。在内存约束下取得优越性能，展示显式决策行为。未来可扩展至复杂记忆结构与实际应用。

title: Psy-Chronicle:A Structured Pipeline for Synthesizing Long-Horizon Campus Psychological Counseling Dialogues
abstract: In recent years, large language models have shown substantial potential in psychological support tasks. However, existing psychological counseling data mostly rely on single-turn question answering or short multi-turn dialogues, making it difficult to characterize how college students' psychological distress accumulates, interacts, and gradually evolves over long periods within campus life events. To address this issue, this paper proposes Psy-Chronicle, a structured data-generation framework for synthesizing long-horizon campus psychological counseling dialogues. We generate a semester-spanning temporal stress event graph to model the chronological order and evolutionary dependencies among campus stress events. Through interactive simulation between a student agent and a counselor agent, together with a structured memory integration mechanism, Psy-Chronicle generates long-horizon dialogues with continuity across counseling sessions. Based on Psy-Chronicle, we construct and open-source CPCD, a Chinese long-horizon dialogue dataset for college psychological counseling, containing 100 student profiles, 90,000 counseling dialogues. We further build CPCD-Bench to evaluate models' long-horizon campus counseling capabilities from three dimensions: session-level response, long-horizon memory recall, and temporal-causal reasoning. Experimental results show that CPCD effectively improves session-level response generation and long-horizon memory recall for models with the same base architecture. Meanwhile, improvements in temporal-causal reasoning remain limited, indicating that event-chain organization and causal explanation are key challenges in long-horizon psychological counseling modeling. The related code and data are available at: https://github.com/EdwinUSTB/Psy-Chronicle

light_analysis.overview: 提出Psy-Chronicle框架，通过时间压力事件图和智能体模拟生成长期校园心理咨询对话数据集CPCD，并构建评估基准CPCD-Bench。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有心理咨询数据多为单轮或短多轮对话，难以刻画大学生心理困扰在校园生活事件中长期积累、交互和演化的过程。该问题重要，因为长期心理建模对真实咨询场景更具价值，而现有方法无法捕捉时间跨度和因果依赖，限制了模型在长时程心理支持任务中的应用。
light_analysis.method: Psy-Chronicle框架首先生成跨学期的时序压力事件图，建模事件时间顺序和演化依赖。然后通过学生智能体和咨询师智能体交互模拟，结合结构化记忆集成机制，生成跨咨询会话的长期对话。基于此构建CPCD数据集，含100个学生画像和9万条对话，并设计CPCD-Bench从会话响应、长期记忆召回和时间因果推理三维度评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，CPCD数据集能有效提升同基座模型的会话级响应生成和长期记忆召回能力。但在时间因果推理维度上提升有限，说明事件链组织和因果解释是长期心理咨询建模的关键挑战。具体性能提升幅度未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了首个面向长期校园心理咨询的对话数据集和评估基准，揭示了当前大模型在时间因果推理上的不足，为未来研究指明方向。数据集和代码已开源，具有促进心理支持AI发展的实际应用价值。潜在局限是生成数据可能与真实咨询有差距，未来需探索更真实的模拟机制。

title: EventGait: Towards Robust Gait Recognition with Event Streams
abstract: Gait recognition enables non-intrusive, privacy-preserving identification but suffers in uncontrolled environments due to illumination and motion sensitivity of conventional cameras. In this work, we explore gait recognition using event cameras, which offer microsecond temporal resolution and high dynamic range, naturally capturing robust dynamic cues and suppressing static noise. Existing event-based approaches typically aggregate event streams into event images over long time windows, thereby discarding fine-grained motion dynamics critical for gait recognition. Therefore, we propose \textbf{EventGait}, an end-to-end dual-stream framework that separately models motion and shape while preserving the advantages of events. Our dynamic stream leverages a Mixture of Spiking Experts (MoSE) with diverse neuron constants for robust dynamic perception across complex motion and illumination scenes, while the static stream learns dense shape representations via Cross-modal Structure Alignment (CroSA) with large vision foundation models. To address the absence of large-scale event-based gait datasets, we introduce a synthesis pipeline and release two new benchmarks: SUSTech1K-E and CCGR-Mini-E. Extensive experiments have shown that event-based gait recognition not only achieves results comparable to camera-based gait recognition under normal conditions but also significantly outperforms it in low-light scenarios. Our approach sets a new state of the art on both synthesized and real-world event-based gait benchmarks, highlighting the robustness and potential of event-driven gait analysis. The code and datasets are released at https://github.com/QUEAHREN/EventGait.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EventGait，一种利用事件相机进行鲁棒步态识别的端到端双流框架，通过混合脉冲专家和跨模态对齐实现运动与形状的分离建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统相机在非受控环境下受光照和运动敏感影响，导致步态识别性能下降。事件相机具有微秒级时间分辨率和宽动态范围，但现有事件方法将流聚合为图像，丢失了步态关键的细粒度运动动态。因此需要一种能充分利用事件流优势的新方法。
light_analysis.method: EventGait采用双流架构：动态流使用混合脉冲专家（MoSE）模块，通过多样化神经元常数适应复杂运动和光照；静态流通过跨模态结构对齐（CroSA）与大型视觉基础模型学习密集形状表示。为解决数据集缺失，提出合成流程并发布SUSTech1K-E和CCGR-Mini-E两个基准。
light_analysis.result: 在正常条件下，事件步态识别达到与传统相机方法相当的水平；在低光场景中显著优于传统方法。在合成和真实世界事件步态基准上均取得最先进结果，验证了事件驱动的鲁棒性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实事件相机在步态识别中的鲁棒性和潜力，尤其是在低光等挑战性环境中。提出的双流框架和数据集为事件驱动步态分析奠定了基础，代码和数据集已开源。未来可探索更复杂的运动模式或跨域应用。

title: Efficient Agentic Reasoning Through Self-Regulated Simulative Planning
abstract: How should an agent decide when and how to plan? A dominant approach builds agents as reactive policies with adaptive computation (e.g., chain-of-thought), trained end-to-end expecting planning to emerge implicitly. Without control over the presence, structure, or horizon of planning, these systems dramatically increase reasoning length, yielding inefficient token use without reliable accuracy gains. We argue efficient agentic reasoning benefits from decomposing decision-making into three systems: simulative reasoning (System II) grounding deliberation in future-state prediction via a world model; self-regulation (System III) deciding when and how deeply to plan via a learned configurator; and reactive execution (System I) handling fine-grained action. Simulative reasoning provides unified planning across diverse tasks without per-domain engineering, while self-regulation ensures the planner is invoked only when needed. To test this, we develop SR$^2$AM (Self-Regulated Simulative Reasoning Agentic LLM), realizing both as distinct stages within an LLM's chain-of-thought, with the LLM as world model. We explore two instantiations: recording decisions from a prompted multi-module system (v0.1) and reconstructing structured plans from traces of pretrained reasoning LLMs (v1.0), trained via supervised then reinforcement learning (RL).
