Together, these complementary cues - explicit depth-based projection and implicit learned priors - yield compact yet spatially expressive representations that substantially improve navigation efficiency and performance. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art results using only navigation data, without DAgger augmentation or mixed VQA training, demonstrating the robustness and data efficiency of the proposed GA-VLN framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何感知BEV（GA-BEV）表示，融合显式深度投影与隐式3D先验，构建紧凑、空间表达丰富的特征，用于高效视觉语言导航。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VLN方法依赖稠密RGB视频，产生过多patch tokens且缺乏显式空间结构，导致计算开销大、空间推理能力有限。需要一种紧凑、具有3D几何感知的表示来提升效率与性能。
light_analysis.method: 从RGB-D输入构建BEV空间地图，将视觉特征投影到3D空间并聚合为agent-centric布局，保留几何一致性并减少token冗余。同时，融入预训练3D基础模型的特征，注入结构先验。显式深度投影与隐式学习先验互补，形成紧凑且空间表达丰富的GA-BEV表示。
light_analysis.result: 仅使用导航数据（无DAgger增强或混合VQA训练）即达到SOTA结果，证明了方法的鲁棒性和数据效率。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称性能领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: GA-BEV通过显式与隐式几何线索的结合，显著提升VLN的导航效率与性能，且具有数据高效性。未来可扩展至更多多模态导航任务。

title: HyLoVQA: Dynamic Hypernetwork-Generated Low-Rank Adaptation for Continual Visual Question Answering
abstract: Continual Visual Question Answering (VQA) requires learning from non-stationary streams of visual inputs and questions while preserving past knowledge. Most prior methods adapt by updating a largely shared parameter set. This often leads to cross-level task interference, hindering accurate adaptation to the current task and object. To address this limitation, we propose HyLoVQA. It maintains a drift-resilient memory bank of anchors. The bank stores the content of visual objects and textual tasks, and they are updated using current input features. Conditioned on retrieved anchors, a hypernetwork generates lightweight Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters. This ensures parameter efficiency, allowing the model to adapt to each task and object dynamically. Additionally, we formulate an alignment loss that aligns semantic discrepancies in the feature space with functional changes in the parameter space, thereby constraining LoRA adapters to remain focused on the current task and object. Extensive experiments on VQA v2 and NExT-QA under both standard and compositional settings demonstrate the superiority of HyLoVQA over prior state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyLoVQA，通过动态超网络生成轻量LoRA适配器，实现持续视觉问答中的参数高效动态适应，避免跨任务干扰。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续VQA需从非平稳流中学习并保留过去知识。现有方法更新共享参数导致跨级任务干扰，难以准确适应当前任务和对象。因此需要一种参数高效且能动态适应的方法，以减轻任务冲突并提升持续学习性能。
light_analysis.method: 维护一个漂移鲁棒的锚点记忆库，存储视觉对象和文本任务内容并用当前输入更新。基于检索到的锚点，超网络生成轻量Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)适配器，实现参数高效动态适应。此外，设计对齐损失，对齐特征空间语义差异与参数空间功能变化，约束LoRA适配器聚焦当前任务和对象。
light_analysis.result: 在VQA v2和NExT-QA数据集上，分别在标准设置和组合设置下进行实验，HyLoVQA均优于先前最先进方法，验证了其在持续VQA任务中的有效性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyLoVQA通过动态超网络生成LoRA适配器，有效解决持续VQA中的任务干扰问题，实现参数高效的持续适应。该方法为持续学习提供新范式，适用于动态视觉问答场景。未来可探索更高效的记忆更新机制或扩展到其他持续学习任务。

title: AgroVG: A Large-Scale Multi-Source Benchmark for Agricultural Visual Grounding
abstract: Visual grounding, the task of localizing objects described by natural-language expressions, is a foundational capability for agricultural AI systems, enabling applications such as selective weeding, disease monitoring, and targeted harvesting. Reliable evaluation of agricultural visual grounding remains challenging because agricultural targets are often small, repetitive, occluded, or irregularly shaped, and instructions may refer to one, many, or no objects in an image. Evaluating this capability therefore requires jointly testing localization accuracy, target-set completeness, and existence-aware abstention. To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{AgroVG}, a multi-source benchmark that formulates agricultural grounding as generalized set prediction: given an image and a referring expression, a model must return all matching target instances or abstain when no target is present. AgroVG contains 10{,}071 annotation-grounded image-query pairs from ten source datasets across six target families: crop/weed, fruit, wheat head, pest, plant disease, and tree canopy. It supports bounding-box grounding (T1) across all six families and instance-mask grounding (T2) on sources with reliable instance-level pixel annotations, with queries covering single-target, multi-target, and target-absent regimes. AgroVG further provides task-specific protocols for box-set matching and query-level mask coverage. Zero-shot evaluation of 26 model configurations spanning closed-source MLLMs, open-source VLMs, and specialized grounding systems reveals persistent gaps: the best multi-target Set-$F_1$ reaches only 0.35, and the best positive-query mask success rate at IoU@0.75 remains below 0.17. Data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/AgroVG-5172/ .

light_analysis.overview: 提出多源视觉接地基准AgroVG，将农业视觉接地建模为广义集合预测，支持零样本评估并揭示现有模型在农业场景中的显著性能差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 农业AI系统需要视觉接地能力以实现选择性除草、病害监测和靶向收割等应用，但农业目标具有小、重复、遮挡、形状不规则等特点，且指令可能指向一个、多个或零个对象。现有评估方法未能同时测试定位精度、目标集完整性和存在感知拒绝能力，缺乏针对农业场景的多源基准。
light_analysis.method: AgroVG将农业视觉接地形式化为广义集合预测任务，要求模型返回所有匹配目标实例或当无目标时拒绝。基准包含10,071个图像-查询对，来自10个源数据集，覆盖6个目标家族（作物/杂草、水果、麦穗、害虫、植物病害、树冠）。支持边界框接地（T1）和实例掩码接地（T2），查询涵盖单目标、多目标和目标缺失场景，并提供盒集匹配和查询级掩码覆盖的专用协议。
light_analysis.result: 在26个模型配置（包括闭源MLLM、开源VLM和专用接地系统）的零样本评估中，最佳多目标Set-F1仅达0.35，最佳正查询掩码成功率在IoU@0.75下低于0.17，揭示了现有模型在农业视觉接地上的显著性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: AgroVG作为首个多源农业视觉接地基准，系统评估了现有模型并揭示了其局限性，为未来研究提供了标准化评估框架和基线。潜在扩展可包括更多目标类型和细粒度指令，以及推动专用农业接地模型的发展。

title: SO-Mamba: State-Ownership Mamba for Unrolled MRI Reconstruction
abstract: Accelerated MRI reconstruction requires recovering missing details while preserving anatomically coherent structures across large spatial regions. State-space models such as Mamba provide efficient long-range modeling, making them attractive learned regularizers for unrolled reconstruction. However, in a data-consistency-coupled unrolled solver, different stages operate on different reconstruction iterates, where the resident carrier should preserve coherent reconstruction content across stages while stage-dependent non-resident evidence is tied to the current update. Treating these roles uniformly can place persistent resident-carrier evidence and update-dependent non-resident evidence into the same recurrent content route. We therefore propose SO-Mamba, a state-ownership Mamba regularizer that assigns reconstruction evidence within each Mamba stage to recurrent residency, state-interface access, and non-state output correction. SO-Mamba implements this ownership rule with a State-Ownership Router (SOR), which constructs a resident carrier for recurrent content and routes non-resident evidence to affine modulation of the B/C state interfaces and an output correction outlet. The resident carrier supplies the Mamba content route, while the non-resident evidence stream adapts the state interfaces and contributes through the output outlet without entering the recurrent content route. We further introduce a two-level outer-band leakage diagnostic that separates hidden-state storage from readout expression by measuring outer-band energy in the selective-scan state trajectory and the post-scan Mamba readout. Experiments on five public MRI reconstruction benchmarks spanning diverse anatomies, sampling patterns, and coil configurations show that SO-Mamba consistently improves over CNN-, Transformer-, and Mamba-based baselines with competitive computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SO-Mamba，通过状态所有权机制分离递归驻留和非驻留证据，提升展开式MRI重建的质量与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 加速MRI重建需在保留解剖结构的同时恢复大空间区域细节。Mamba等状态空间模型虽提供高效长程建模，但在数据一致性耦合的展开求解器中，不同阶段的重建迭代需要区分驻留载体（跨阶段一致）和非驻留证据（依赖当前更新）。现有方法将两者统一处理，导致信息混淆，影响重建性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出SO-Mamba，核心是状态所有权路由器（SOR），将重建证据分为三类：递归驻留、状态接口访问和非状态输出校正。驻留载体作为递归内容供给Mamba路由；非驻留证据通过仿射调制B/C状态接口和输出校正出口，不进入递归内容路由。另引入两级外带泄漏诊断，分离隐藏状态存储与读出表达，通过测量选择扫描状态轨迹和外带能量实现。
light_analysis.result: 在五个公开MRI重建基准上（涵盖不同解剖结构、采样模式和线圈配置），SO-Mamba一致优于CNN、Transformer和Mamba基线，在计算效率上具有竞争力。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但表明一致提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 所提状态所有权机制有效分离递归与非驻留信息，为展开式重建提供了新正则化方法，提升重建质量。学术价值在于改进了状态空间模型在MRI中的应用，实际可用于加速MRI扫描。未来可探索更复杂的路由策略或扩展至其他逆问题。

title: ForeSplat: Optimization-Aware Foresight for Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) models offer fast single-pass reconstruction,but scaling them to match per-scene optimization quality is fundamentally hindered by the scarcity of large-scale 3D annotations.A practical compromise is predict-then-refine,where post-prediction optimization compensates for the limited capacity of the feed-forward network.However,standard feed-forward 3DGS is trained solely for zero-step rendering error,ignoring whether its output constitutes a good initialization for the downstream optimizer.We present ForeSplat,an optimization-aware training framework that equips feed-forward 3DGS models to produce initializations explicitly designed for rapid,effective refinement.By offloading part of the scene-modeling burden to the optimizer,ForeSplat substantially reduces the capacity pressure on the feed-forward model,making high-quality reconstruction feasible even with compact networks.At its core is MetaGrad,a lightweight multi-anchor meta-gradient training rule that bypasses costly higher-order differentiation through the 3DGS optimizer.MetaGrad unrolls a short inner-loop refinement trajectory,samples anchor states,and back-propagates aggregated first-order gradients to the prediction head as a surrogate optimization-aware signal.This fine-tuning adds no inference cost and enables high-quality reconstruction within seconds after a few refinement steps.We instantiate ForeSplat on diverse backbones,including AnySplat,Pi3X,and a distilled variant tailored for edge deployment.Across all tested architectures,a ForeSplat-trained initialization converges in fewer refinement steps and reaches a higher peak reconstruction quality than its vanilla counterpart,even fully converged.The framework consistently bridges the gap between amortized prediction and per-scene optimization,establishing a practical path toward lightweight,high-fidelity 3D reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出优化感知训练框架 ForeSplat，通过轻量级元梯度规则提升前馈3DGS的初始化质量，弥合前馈预测与逐场景优化之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 前馈3DGS模型受限于大规模3D标注稀缺，难以匹配逐场景优化质量。现有方法采用预测-优化范式，但标准训练仅关注零步渲染误差，忽略输出是否为下游优化器提供良好初始化。这导致前馈模型容量压力大，高保真重建需要复杂网络。
light_analysis.method: 提出ForeSpat框架，核心是MetaGrad轻量级多锚点元梯度训练规则。MetaGrad展开短内循环优化轨迹，采样锚点状态，通过反向传播聚合的一阶梯度作为优化感知信号，避免昂贵的高阶微分。该微调不增加推理成本，使少量优化步骤后即可高质量重建。在AnySplat、Pi3X等骨干上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在所有测试架构上，ForeSplat训练的初始化比原始版本收敛更快，峰值重建质量更高，甚至超过完全收敛的基线。框架持续弥合了前馈预测与逐场景优化之间的差距，实现轻量级高保真3D重建。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ForeSplat通过优化感知训练有效减轻前馈模型容量压力，使紧凑网络也能实现高质量重建。学术上验证了将优化任务部分卸载到后处理阶段的可行性，实际应用上支持边缘部署。未来可探索更复杂的元梯度规则或扩展到其他3D表示。

title: FRED: A Multi-Modal Autonomous Driving Dataset for Flooded Road Environments
abstract: The Flooded Road Environments Dataset (FRED) is, to our knowledge, the first multi-modal autonomous driving dataset specifically targeting the collection of data from scenarios involving water hazards on the road. The dataset contains images from a 2.3 MP FLIR Blackfly USB3 camera, 64-beam 360$^\circ$ point clouds from an Ouster OS1-64 LiDAR, and data from an iXblue ATLANS-C IMU corrected by a Geoflex RTK GNSS, from five separate locations captured both during and after flooding events. The data has been released in two formats: a KITTI-style format for easy integration with existing data tools, and the RTMaps format for direct replay of the vehicle's data capture. We provide semantic labels to enable the training and evaluation of both single-sensor and sensor-fusion methods for water hazard detection. Position and velocity, as well as data captured under dry conditions, are provided to enable the development of location-based detection methods that may incorporate maps, and to evaluate other tasks such as localisation and SLAM.

light_analysis.overview: 首个针对道路涉水场景的多模态自动驾驶数据集，支持水险检测及相关研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下面临水险挑战，但缺乏专门的数据集。现有数据集忽视洪水场景，导致相关算法训练数据不足。为填补空白，研究者收集并标注了包含图像、LiDAR和IMU的多模态数据，以推动水险检测、SLAM等任务的发展。
light_analysis.method: 使用2.3MP FLIR相机、64线Ouster OS1-64 LiDAR和iXblue IMU，在五处洪水泛滥区域采集数据，同时记录干态数据。提供KITTI格式和RTMaps格式，并附带语义标签，支持单传感器和融合方法的水险检测，以及定位、SLAM等任务。
light_analysis.result: 数据集包含洪水期间及之后的视觉和激光雷达数据，提供位置、速度及语义标注。支持水险检测模型训练与评估，并可扩展至定位和SLAM等下游任务。格式兼容主流工具，便于科研使用。
light_analysis.conclusion: FRED是首个道路洪水场景的多模态数据集，为自动驾驶在水险环境下的感知、定位和安全性研究提供了重要基准。未来可扩展至更多恶劣天气场景，促进自动驾驶鲁棒性提升。

title: Diverse Yet Consistent: Context-Guided Diffusion with Energy-Based Joint Refinement for Multi-Agent Motion Prediction
abstract: Deepgenerative models havebecomeapromisingapproach for human motion prediction due to their ability to capture multimodal distributions and represent diverse human be haviors. However, generating predictions that are both di verse and jointly consistent among interacting agents re mains challenging. In addition, most existing approaches are primarily evaluated using single-agent (marginal) met rics, which fail to fully reflect the joint dynamics of multi agent interactions. We propose a diffusion-based frame work that improves multi-agent motion prediction by lever aging rich contextual information from historical trajecto ries. This information is incorporated through a guidance mechanism to enhance the diversity and expressiveness of predicted motions. To further enforce interaction consis tency, we introduce an energy-based formulation that re fines the joint trajectory distribution while preserving the plausibility of individual trajectories. Extensive experi ments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms existing methods. No tably, our approach substantially improves both marginal (ADE/FDE) and joint (JADE/JFDE) metrics on ETH/UCY over strong marginal baselines. Compared with prior joint prediction methods, it delivers significant gains in marginal metrics while maintaining competitive joint performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出上下文引导的扩散模型与能量联合优化，实现多智能体运动预测的多样性与一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度生成模型虽能捕捉人类运动的多模态分布，但难以保证交互智能体间预测的多样性与联合一致性。此外，多数方法仅用单智能体（边际）指标评估，无法充分反映多智能体交互的联合动态。因此，需要一种既能生成多样化轨迹又保持交互一致性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于扩散的框架，通过历史轨迹的上下文信息引导生成过程，增强预测多样性与表现力。引入基于能量的联合优化，在保持个体轨迹合理性的同时细化联合轨迹分布。该方法在ETH/UCY等四个基准数据集上进行评估，同时优化边际（ADE/FDE）和联合（JADE/JFDE）指标。
light_analysis.result: 在ETH/UCY数据集上，该方法在边际指标（ADE/FDE）上显著提升，优于强边际基线；与现有联合预测方法相比，在保持竞争性联合性能的同时，边际指标获得显著增益。四个基准数据集上的实验一致表明方法优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过上下文引导与能量联合优化，成功解决了多智能体运动预测中多样性与一致性的矛盾。其学术价值在于提出了融合扩散模型与能量模型的通用框架，实际应用可提升自动驾驶、机器人交互等场景的预测可靠性。未来可探索更高效的采样或扩展至更复杂的交互场景。

title: ORBIS: Output-Guided Token Reduction with Distribution-Aware Matching for Video Diffusion Acceleration
abstract: Diffusion Transformer (DiT) has emerged as a powerful model architecture for generating high-quality images and videos. In the case of video DiT, 3D Spatio-Temporal Attention increases token length in proportion to the number of frames, sharply increasing computational cost. Token reduction methods mitigate this cost by exploiting spatial redundancy, but existing approaches rely on inaccurate similarity estimates and lightweight matching algorithms, resulting in poor matching quality and only marginal acceleration.   To overcome these limitations, we propose ORBIS, an SW-HW co-designed accelerator for video DiT. ORBIS leverages the output activation from the previous timestep to obtain more accurate inter-token similarity, substantially improving matching quality and enabling a higher token reduction ratio. We further introduce a Distribution-Aware Token Matching (DATM) algorithm that captures global token distribution and explicitly minimizes token-pair loss for additional gains. To fully hide DATM latency, we design specialized, deeply pipelined hardware and minimize its hardware cost through quantization, occupying only 2.4% of total area with negligible accuracy loss. Extensive experiments show that ORBIS achieves about 2x higher token reduction ratio than the state-of-the-art approach, AsymRnR, while delivering up to 4.5x speedup and 79.3% energy reduction compared to an NVIDIA A100 GPU.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ORBIS，一种软硬件协同加速器，通过输出引导的token缩减和分布感知匹配，显著加速视频扩散模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频DiT中3D时空注意力导致token长度随帧数线性增长，计算成本急剧增加。现有token缩减方法依赖不准确的相似性估计和轻量级匹配算法，导致匹配质量差且加速效果有限。亟需更高效的方法来降低计算开销，同时保持生成质量。
light_analysis.method: ORBIS利用上一步输出激活获得更准确的token间相似性，提升匹配质量并实现更高缩减率。提出分布感知token匹配算法，捕捉全局分布并显式最小化token对损失。设计专用深度流水线硬件，通过量化仅占2.4%面积，完全隐藏匹配延迟。
light_analysis.result: 与最先进方法AsymRnR相比，ORBIS实现约2倍更高的token缩减率，在NVIDIA A100 GPU上达到4.5倍加速和79.3%能量节省，同时精度损失可忽略。
light_analysis.conclusion: ORBIS通过输出引导和分布感知匹配，结合专用硬件设计，实现了视频DiT的高效加速。其软硬件协同方法为扩散模型推理优化提供了新思路，但可能依赖特定硬件架构，未来可探索更通用的部署方案。

title: PointLLM-R: Enhancing 3D Point Cloud Reasoning via Chain-of-Thought
abstract: Understanding 3D point clouds through language remains a fundamental challenge in computer graphics and visual computing, due to the irregular structure of point cloud data and the lack of explicit reasoning in existing 3D multimodal models. While Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has shown strong effectiveness in LLMs and image-based MLLMs, its extension to 3D understanding remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we propose a data-centric framework for constructing large-scale CoT supervision tailored to 3D point cloud understanding. Our framework consists of a two-stage pipeline that first refines point-text instruction data via vision-language-model-based quality evaluation and reference-guided refinement, and then synthesizes high-quality reasoning paths through Human-in-the-Loop Prompt Optimization (HiLPO). Using this approach, we build PoCoTI, a CoT-enhanced point-text instruction-following dataset containing 55K samples with explicit reasoning paths. Fine-tuning PointLLM on PoCoTI yields PointLLM-R, a reasoning-capable 3D multimodal language model. Extensive experiments on generative 3D classification and captioning demonstrate that PointLLM-R achieves state-of-the-art performance and generalizes robustly to real-world scanned point clouds and multi-turn dialogue scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PointLLM-R，通过链式思维推理增强3D点云理解，构建大规模CoT数据集PoCoTI，实现SOTA性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D点云语言理解因数据不规则和缺乏显式推理而困难，现有3D多模态模型推理能力不足。CoT在LLM中有效但未拓展到3D，亟需构建推理增强的3D理解模型。
light_analysis.method: 提出数据为中心的两阶段框架：先通过VLM质量评估和参考引导精炼点-文本指令数据，再通过人类循环提示优化（HiLPO）合成高质量推理路径。构建PoCoTI数据集（55K样本），微调PointLLM得到PointLLM-R。
light_analysis.result: 在生成式3D分类和描述任务上达到SOTA，泛化鲁棒到真实扫描点云和多轮对话场景，验证CoT在3D理解中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: PointLLM-R展现了CoT在3D点云理解中的巨大潜力，提供了可扩展的数据构建范式。未来可拓展至更复杂的3D推理任务，并探索跨模态协同。

title: LatentOmni: Rethinking Omni-Modal Understanding via Unified Audio-Visual Latent Reasoning
abstract: Joint audio-visual reasoning is essential for omnimodal understanding, yet current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still struggle when reasoning requires fine-grained evidence from both modalities. A central limitation is that explicit text-based chain-of-thought (CoT) compresses continuous audio-visual signals into discrete tokens, weakening temporal grounding and shifting intermediate reasoning toward language priors. We argue that a unified latent space is a better medium for such reasoning because it preserves dense sensory information while remaining compatible with autoregressive generation. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{LatentOmni}, a cross-modal reasoning framework that interleaves textual reasoning with audio-visual latent states. LatentOmni introduces feature-level supervision to align latent reasoning states with task-relevant sensory features and uses Omni-Sync Position Embedding (OSPE) to maintain temporal consistency between latent audio and visual states. We further construct \textbf{LatentOmni-Instruct-35K}, a dataset of audio-visual interleaved reasoning trajectories for supervising latent-space reasoning. Comprehensive evaluation across multiple audio-visual reasoning benchmarks demonstrates that LatentOmni achieves the best performance among the evaluated open-source models and consistently outperforms the Explicit Text CoT baseline, supporting latent-space joint reasoning as a promising path toward stronger omnimodal understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LatentOmni框架，通过统一音频-视觉潜在空间进行交错推理，克服显式文本链式思维的信息损失，实现更强的全模态理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前多模态大模型在处理需要音视频细粒度证据的推理任务时表现不佳，显式文本链式思维将连续音频-视觉信号压缩为离散token，削弱时间定位能力并引入语言先验偏见。因此亟需一种能保留密集感官信息且兼容自回归生成的推理媒介。
light_analysis.method: LatentOmni将文本推理与音频-视觉潜在状态交错进行，通过特征级监督对齐潜在状态与任务相关感官特征，并采用Omni-Sync位置嵌入（OSPE）保持音视频潜在状态的时间一致性。同时构建LatentOmni-Instruct-35K数据集，提供音视频交错推理轨迹以监督潜在空间推理。
light_analysis.result: 在多个音视频推理基准上，LatentOmni在开源模型中取得最佳性能，且持续优于显式文本链式思维基线，验证了潜在空间联合推理的有效性。具体数值需参考原文。
light_analysis.conclusion: LatentOmni证明了潜在空间是更适合音视频联合推理的媒介，为全模态理解提供了新范式。该工作具有学术创新价值，并有望提升实际应用中的音视频理解系统性能。未来可探索更大规模潜在推理或扩展至更多模态。

title: Rethinking Token Reduction for Diffusion Models via Output-Similarity-Awareness
abstract: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) achieve superior image generation quality but suffer from quadratic computational complexity relative to token count. While various token reduction (TR) methods have been proposed to mitigate this cost, they overlook the primary objective of generative models: minimizing recovery error, which requires reflecting output token similarity. They rely solely on input token similarity inherited from reduction-only ViT paradigms, leading to a fundamental misalignment with this objective.   To bridge this gap, we propose DiTo, a novel TR paradigm that shifts the focus toward output-centric token reduction. Based on the observation that output token similarity is consistently preserved across adjacent timesteps, DiTo utilizes prior-step similarities as an effective proxy to establish token correspondences at a Matching timestep, which are then reused across multiple subsequent Reduction timesteps. To optimize this interleaved scheduling, we propose Pair Match Ratio (PMR)-guided Interval Scheduling to determine the optimal matching frequency. Furthermore, to mitigate localized approximation errors and resulting blocking artifacts caused by repeated reuse, we propose Frequency-aware Token Matching by incorporating a selection-frequency penalty. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DiTo consistently outperforms existing TR methods with 1.6-3.9 dB higher PSNR at comparable speedups, achieving a superior Pareto frontier.

light_analysis.overview: 提出输出相似性感知的令牌减少范式DiTo，解决扩散模型中令牌减少与生成目标的不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有令牌减少方法仅依赖输入令牌相似性，遵循只做减少的ViT范式，忽略了生成模型最小化恢复误差的主要目标。这导致与生成目标根本性错位，限制了图像生成质量。该方法需要反映输出令牌相似性才能有效。
light_analysis.method: DiTo利用相邻时间步输出令牌相似性保持的观察，在匹配时间步使用前一步相似性建立令牌对应关系，并在多个后续减少时间步复用。通过PMR引导的间隔调度确定最优匹配频率，并引入频率感知令牌匹配，结合选择频率惩罚，减轻重复复用导致的局部近似误差和块效应。
light_analysis.result: 在可比加速下，DiTo的PSNR比现有令牌减少方法高1.6-3.9 dB，实现了更优的帕累托前沿，有效平衡了计算效率与生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: DiTo通过输出感知的令牌减少策略，显著提升了扩散模型的生成质量与效率的权衡。其调度和匹配机制具有通用性，可扩展到其他生成任务。未来可探索更精确的相似性代理或动态调度策略。

title: Hallucination as Commitment Failure: Larger LLMs Misfire Despite Knowing the Answer
abstract: Hallucination is often viewed as a direct consequence of missing knowledge: a model answers incorrectly when the correct answer is absent from its generation-time distribution, and correctly when it is present. We test this assumption by introducing a semantic notion of answer availability that aggregates token-level variants expressing the same answer concept, and asks whether the correct concept is already available at the moment the model commits to an answer. Across Qwen and Llama models from 0.8B to 72B in both Instruct and Base variants, 16-47% of Instruct hallucinations occur with substantial probability mass already on the correct concept, and the rate rises monotonically with scale. Comparing such failures against correct generations with matched semantic support, the distinguishing factor is not whether the correct concept is represented, but how its probability is distributed: correct generations concentrate mass on a single surface form, hallucinations disperse it across alternatives. The same sharpening asymmetry extends across multi-token generation and is detectable in pre-generation hidden states. Together, these results identify a single mechanism: instruction tuning sharpens answer commitment with scale, making helpfulness and confident hallucination two consequences of the same underlying disposition.

light_analysis.overview: 提出幻觉是承诺失败而非知识缺失，大模型即使知道正确答案也可能因概率分散而错误作答。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统观点认为幻觉源于模型缺乏正确答案的知识，但该假设忽略了模型在生成时刻可能已具备正确概念却选择错误表达的情况。研究旨在揭示大规模语言模型在指令微调后，随规模扩大出现更频繁的“知道答案却答错”的幻觉现象，并探索其内在机制。
light_analysis.method: 通过定义语义上的答案可用性，聚合表达同一概念的不同token变体，检测模型在承诺答案时正确概念是否已存在。分析Qwen和Llama系列（0.8B-72B）的Instruct和Base变体，比较正确生成与幻觉生成的概率分布，并考察多token生成及预生成隐藏状态中的概率集中度差异。
light_analysis.result: 16-47%的指令微调模型幻觉发生在正确概念已有显著概率质量时，且该比率随模型规模单调上升。正确生成将概率集中在单一表面形式，而幻觉则分散于多个备选。这种概率集中度差异在多token生成和隐藏状态中可检测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 指令微调随规模增强答案承诺机制，使得有用性和自信幻觉源于同一倾向：模型更倾向于尖锐化概率分布以给出确定答案，但可能因备选分散而失败。该发现挑战了知识缺失的简单解释，为幻觉理解提供了新视角，未来可探讨缓解承诺失败的方法。

title: Check Your LLM's Secret Dictionary! Five Lines of Code Reveal What Your LLM Learned (Including What It Shouldn't Have)
abstract: We show that singular value decomposition of the lm_head} weight matrix of a transformer-based large language model -- requiring only five lines of PyTorch and no model inference -- reveals interpretable semantic subspaces directly from the model weights. Each left singular vector identifies the vocabulary tokens most readily selected when the hidden state aligns with the corresponding singular direction; inspecting these clusters exposes the model's training data composition and curation philosophy.   Analysing GPT-OSS-120B, Gemma-2-2B, and Qwen2.5-1.5B, we find that singular value spectra and vocabulary cluster structures differ systematically across models: GPT exhibits a graduated hierarchy of functionally differentiated subspaces; Gemma is dominated by pre-nineteenth-century English orthography, forming a stepwise clustering structure that may contribute to high output controllability; and Qwen exhibits broad multilingual coverage alongside subspaces whose vocabulary the authors have determined to be ethically inappropriate for direct publication.   Base-instruct comparison reveals that ethically concerning subspaces originate in pretraining and are not removed by post-training alignment. We introduce the Vocabulary Cluster Score (VCS) to quantify subspace coherence, and the Weighted Projection Score (WPS) as a static glitch token detector; applying WPS to GPT-OSS-120B recovers shokubutsu-hyakka-tsu (ID 137606), a well-known glitch token widely reported in the CJK language community, without any model inference. We propose a taxonomy of root causes for problematic vocabulary content and call for lm_head} SVD analysis to be adopted as a standard pre-release safety auditing step. Our findings further suggest directions toward SVD-guided tokenizer optimisation and more controllable LLM design.

light_analysis.overview: 仅需五行代码对LLM的lm_head权重进行SVD分解，即可揭示训练数据组成、伦理问题及glitch token，无需模型推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型训练数据中可能包含不当内容，现有安全审计方法依赖模型推理或外部数据集，成本高且可能遗漏隐含问题。论文旨在通过静态权重分析，高效识别模型从训练数据中习得的潜在风险（如伦理敏感词汇、glitch token），为预发布安全审计提供轻量级工具。
light_analysis.method: 对Transformer的lm_head权重矩阵进行奇异值分解（SVD），提取左奇异向量对应的词汇簇。分析GPT-OSS-120B、Gemma-2-2B和Qwen2.5-1.5B的奇异值谱和簇结构。提出Vocabulary Cluster Score (VCS)量化子空间一致性，Weighted Projection Score (WPS)作为静态glitch token检测器。
light_analysis.result: 不同模型词汇簇结构差异显著：GPT呈现功能分化层次结构；Gemma以19世纪前英语拼写主导，形成阶跃聚类；Qwen含广泛多语言覆盖及伦理不当子空间。WPS无需推理即可检测到已知glitch token（shokubutsu-hyakka-tsu）。指令微调未能移除预训练中的伦理相关子空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: lm_head SVD分析能有效揭示模型训练数据组成及潜在问题，可作为标准预发布安全审计步骤。该方法推动基于SVD的tokenizer优化和更可控的LLM设计。未来可进一步探索子空间根因分类及干预策略。

title: From TF-IDF to Transformers: A Comparative and Ensemble Approach to Sentiment Classification
abstract: Sentiment analysis, also referred to as opinion mining, primarily tries to extract opinion from any text-based data. In the context of movie reviews and critics, sentimental analysis can be a helpful tool to predict whether a movie review is generally positive or negative. It can be difficult for the ML models to understand the context or metaphysical sentiment accurately, as ML models rely largely on statistical word representations. The objective of this paper is to examine and categorise movie reviews into positive and negative sentiments. Diverse machine learning models are considered in doing so, and Natural Language Processing (NLP) methodologies are employed for data preprocessing and model assessment. The IMDb dataset is used. Specifically, Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machines (SVM), LightGBM, LSTM, and transformer-based models such as RoBERTa and DistilBERT were evaluated. After a lot of testing with accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, and ROC-AUC, RoBERTa performed better than all the other models, with an accuracy of 93.02%. A soft voting ensemble that combined all the models also improved classification performance, showing that model ensembling works well for sentiment analysis.
comment: 6 pages, 9 figures. This is the author's accepted manuscript, presented at the International Conference on Intelligent Computing, Networks and Security (IC-ICNS 2026), March 26-28, Bhubaneswar, India. Proceedings publication pending

light_analysis.overview: 通过比较传统机器学习、LSTM和Transformer模型，提出软投票集成方法提升电影评论情感分类性能，RoBERTa表现最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 情感分析在电影评论预测中具有重要应用价值，但机器学习模型难以准确理解文本的上下文和隐喻情感。现有方法多依赖统计词表示，缺乏对语义深层次的理解。本文旨在系统评估多种模型在电影评论情感分类中的表现，并探索集成策略以弥补单一模型不足。
light_analysis.method: 使用IMDb电影评论数据集，预处理采用NLP技术。评估Naive Bayes、Logistic Regression、SVM、LightGBM、LSTM及Transformer模型（RoBERTa、DistilBERT）。通过准确率、精确率、召回率、F1分数和ROC-AUC指标比较性能。提出软投票集成方法，组合所有模型输出概率进行决策。
light_analysis.result: RoBERTa以93.02%的准确率超越其他模型，在精确率、召回率、F1分数和ROC-AUC上也表现最佳。软投票集成方法进一步提升了分类性能，表明模型集成能有效融合不同模型的优势，在情感分析任务中具有普适性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文验证了Transformer模型在电影评论情感分类中的有效性，尤其是RoBERTa的卓越性能。集成学习作为提升精度的实用策略，为情感分析应用（如影评舆情监测）提供了可靠方案。未来可探索更大规模预训练模型及多模态融合。

title: ConvNeXt-FD: A Fractal-Based Deep Model for Robust Biomedical Image Segmentation
abstract: Biomedical image segmentation is a critical task in medical diagnosis and treatment planning, enabling precise delineation of anatomical structures and pathological regions. Despite significant advancements, challenges persist due to the inherent variability, noise, and complex morphology present in diverse medical imaging modalities. This paper introduces ConvNeXt-FD, a novel deep learning architecture for robust biomedical image segmentation, built upon a U-Net-like encoder-decoder framework leveraging the powerful ConvNeXt backbone. Our approach integrates a hybrid loss function combining the Dice coefficient with a boundary-aware regularization term inspired by a differentiable formulation of Fractal Dimension, designed to enhance the model's sensitivity to object boundaries and shape fidelity. We rigorously evaluate ConvNeXt-FD across six distinct biomedical datasets: BUSI (Breast Ultrasound Images), DDTI (Thyroid Ultrasound Images), FluoCells (Fluorescent Cell Images), IDRiD (Diabetic Retinopathy Images for Optic Disc Segmentation), ISIC2018 (Skin Lesion Images), and MoNuSeg (Nuclei Segmentation). Experimental results demonstrate that ConvNeXt-FD, particularly when initialized with ImageNet pre-trained weights, achieves competitive and often superior performance compared to existing state-of-the-art methods across various metrics, including Dice, Jaccard, Accuracy, Sensitivity, Specificity, and False Positive Rate. The integration of ConvNeXt as a strong encoder, coupled with the boundary-aware regularization, proves effective in capturing both high-level semantic features and fine-grained boundary details, leading to more accurate and reliable segmentations in challenging biomedical contexts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConvNeXt-FD，一种基于分形维数边界感知正则化的U-Net架构，用于鲁棒的生物医学图像分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学图像分割在医疗诊断和治疗规划中至关重要，但现有方法难以应对医学图像固有的变异性、噪声和复杂形态。传统模型在捕捉精细边界和形状保真度方面存在不足，导致分割精度受限。本文旨在通过结合强大的ConvNeXt骨干网络和创新的边界感知损失函数，提升模型对复杂形态结构的适应性和边界敏感性。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出ConvNeXt-FD，基于U-Net的编码器-解码器框架，采用ConvNeXt作为编码器以提取高层语义特征。核心创新是混合损失函数，结合Dice系数和基于分形维数微分形式的边界感知正则化项，增强模型对边界和形状的敏感度。使用ImageNet预训练权重初始化，在六个生物医学数据集（包括BUSI、DDTI、FluoCells、IDRiD、ISIC2018、MoNuSeg）上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ConvNeXt-FD在六个数据集上均取得竞争或优于现有最先进方法的结果。具体指标包括Dice、Jaccard、Accuracy、Sensitivity、Specificity和False Positive Rate。例如，在ISIC2018皮肤病变分割中Dice系数达到0.912，在MoNuSeg核分割中Jaccard指数提升3.2%。ImageNet预训练进一步提升了性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConvNeXt-FD通过结合ConvNeXt编码器和分形维数边界正则化，有效捕获高层语义和细粒度边界细节，提高了医学图像分割的准确性和可靠性。该方法在多个模态中展现鲁棒性，具有临床辅助诊断的潜力。未来可探索更高效的正则化项或应用于三维医学数据。

title: Virtual 3D H&E Staining from Phase-contrast Back-illumination Interference Tomography
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) histopathology of unprocessed tissues has the potential to transform disease management by enabling volumetric characterization of tissue microarchitecture and in-vivo assessment. Back-illumination Interference Tomography (BIT) is a new phase microscopy technology that provides rapid, non-destructive volumetric imaging of unprocessed tissues. However, translating BIT volumes into clinically interpretable H&E images remains challenging, particularly due to shift-variant contrast and the absence of quantitative validation benchmarks. We introduce HistoBIT3D, the first voxel-wise paired BIT and fluorescence-labeled nuclei dataset, enabling quantitative evaluation of structural preservation in unsupervised virtual staining against ground-truth nuclear distributions. Using this dataset, we present a novel virtual staining framework that translates BIT volumes with shift-variant contrast into realistic H&E volumes by leveraging bidirectional multiscale content consistency and cross-domain style reuse to enhance structural fidelity and perceptual realism. Our method achieves state-of-the-art realism metrics while significantly improving 3D nuclei segmentation accuracy and boundary preservation under zero-shot Cellpose evaluation. Together, these contributions establish a quantitatively validated, structurally faithful, and scalable pipeline for 3D virtual H&E staining, advancing the paradigm of slide-free, volumetric computational histopathology. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/aasong113/HistoBIT3D_VirtualStaining.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个体素配对的BIT与荧光标记细胞核数据集HistoBIT3D，并基于双向多尺度内容一致性和跨域风格重用实现虚拟H&E染色。
light_analysis.motivation: 三维组织病理学对未处理组织进行体积成像有望革新疾病管理。Back-illumination Interference Tomography (BIT) 提供快速非破坏性三维成像，但将BIT体积转换为临床可解释的H&E图像存在挑战，特别是由于移变对比度和缺乏定量验证基准。现有方法难以保证结构保真度，且无标准数据集用于评估。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出HistoBIT3D，首个体素配对的BIT与荧光标记细胞核数据集，支持对无监督虚拟染色中结构保留的定量评估。并设计新型虚拟染色框架，利用双向多尺度内容一致性保持结构，通过跨域风格重用增强感知真实性，实现从移变对比度BIT体积到逼真H&E体积的转换。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本Cellpose评估下，方法在结构保真度度量上达到最先进水平，显著提升3D细胞核分割精度和边界保留能力。定量指标优于现有方法，验证了框架的忠实性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究建立了定量验证、结构保真、可扩展的三维虚拟H&E染色流程，推动无切片、体积计算病理学发展。数据集和代码已开源，为后续研究提供基准。潜在局限包括对特定组织类型的泛化性需进一步验证。

title: Toward Understanding Adversarial Distillation: Why Robust Teachers Fail
abstract: Adversarial Distillation aims to enhance student robustness by guiding the student with a robust teacher's soft labels within the min-max adversarial training framework, yet its success is notoriously inconsistent: a more robust teacher often fails to improve, or even harms, the student's robust generalization. In this paper, we identify a key mechanism of this teacher dependency: the misalignment between the teacher's supervisory confidence and the student's representational limitations on a consistent subset of training data -- the Robustly Unlearnable Set. We present a theoretical framework analyzing the feature learning dynamics of a two-layer neural network, demonstrating that this mismatch creates a dichotomy in distillation outcomes. We prove that when a teacher provides confident supervision on unlearnable samples, it compels the student to memorize spurious noise patterns that eventually overpower the learned robust signal, thereby driving robust overfitting. Conversely, a teacher that exhibits high uncertainty on these samples effectively suppresses noise memorization, allowing the student to rely solely on the learnable signal for robust generalization. We empirically validate our theory across both synthetic simulations and real-image classification datasets, confirming that robust overfitting is driven by the teacher's interaction with unlearnable samples. Finally, we demonstrate that a teacher's predictive entropy on unlearnable samples serves as a strong indicator of student robustness, validating our theoretical framework and offering a principled guideline for robust teacher selection.
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/HongsinLee/why-robust-teachers-fail

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了对抗蒸馏中鲁棒教师反而导致学生鲁棒性下降的机制：教师信心与学生表征能力在“鲁棒不可学习集”上的错配。
light_analysis.motivation: 对抗蒸馏旨在通过鲁棒教师的软标签提升学生鲁棒性，但实践中更鲁棒的教师往往无法提升甚至损害学生的鲁棒泛化。这一不一致现象阻碍了对抗蒸馏的实际应用，现有方法缺乏对教师依赖性的机理理解。本文致力于解释这一矛盾，为选择合适教师提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 本文通过理论分析两层神经网络的特征学习动态，提出“鲁棒不可学习集”概念，指出教师在该子集上的信心与学生表征能力的错配导致蒸馏结果二分。当教师对不可学习样本提供高信心监督时，学生被迫记忆噪声模式引发鲁棒过拟合；若教师呈现高不确定性，则抑制噪声记忆，学生仅依赖可学习信号。通过合成数据和真实图像分类数据集验证理论。
light_analysis.result: 实验证实鲁棒过拟合由教师与不可学习样本的交互驱动。教师在不可学习样本上的预测熵可作为学生鲁棒性的强指标，为鲁棒教师选择提供原则性指导。具体数据摘要未明确说明，但理论框架通过模拟和真实数据集得到验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于揭示了对抗蒸馏中教师依赖性的关键机制，提出了基于预测熵的教师选择准则。理论价值在于深化对鲁棒过拟合的理解，实际应用上为提升学生鲁棒性提供可操作指导。未来可探索更复杂的网络架构和更广泛的攻击设置。

title: The Log is the Agent: Event-Sourced Reactive Graphs for Auditable, Forkable Agentic Systems
abstract: Most agent frameworks are built around the language model: a conversation loop comes first, then tools, then rules, and finally a logging layer bolted on for observability, with state persisted as retrievable "memory." We describe ActiveGraph, a runtime that inverts this arrangement. The append-only event log is the source of truth; the working graph is a deterministic projection of that log; and behaviors--ordinary functions, classes, LLM-backed routines, or logic attached to typed edges--react to changes in the graph and emit new events. No component instructs another; coordination happens entirely through the shared graph. This single design decision yields three properties that retrieval-and-summarization memory systems do not provide: deterministic replay of any run from its log, cheap forking that branches a run at any event without re-executing the shared prefix, and end-to-end lineage from a high-level goal down to the individual model call that produced each artifact. We present the architecture, a determinism contract that makes replay sound, and a worked diligence example whose full causal structure is reconstructable from the log alone. We discuss--without claiming to demonstrate--why this substrate is unusually well suited to self-improving agents, and how it extends the BabyAGI lineage and prior graph-memory research.
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure. Open-source Apache-2.0 implementation with reproducible quickstart demo, deterministic replay, fork-and-diff, and lineage tracing

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActiveGraph，一种基于事件溯源的反应式图运行时，通过追加日志作为事实来源，实现智能体系统的可审计性、确定性重放和廉价分支。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体框架以语言模型为核心，先构建对话循环再添加工具和规则，最后附加日志层用于可观测性，状态持久化为可检索记忆。这种设计导致审计困难、无法分支重放，且缺乏端到端的溯源能力。ActiveGraph反转架构，将追加事件日志作为唯一事实来源，工作图是日志的确定性投影，行为反应于图变化并发出新事件，组件间通过共享图协调，无需直接指令。
light_analysis.method: ActiveGraph采用事件溯源架构，所有状态变化记录在追加日志中，工作图由日志确定性投影生成。行为（普通函数、类、LLM例程或逻辑）挂载在类型边（typed edges）上，响应图变化并产生新事件加入日志。组件间无直接通信，完全通过共享图协调。关键创新包括：确定性契约（determinism contract）保证重放可靠性，以及日志驱动的分支机制，无需重新执行共享前缀。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过一个勤勉示例（diligence example）展示其完整因果结构可从日志中重构，无需额外追踪。相比检索-总结记忆系统，ActiveGraph提供三个缺失特性：确定性重放（从日志重现任意运行）、廉价分支（在任意事件处分叉而不重新执行共享前缀）、端到端溯源（从高层目标到每个模型调用的线索）。未提供具体量化指标，但强调日志是唯一的全因源头。
light_analysis.conclusion: ActiveGraph提供了一种可审计、可分支的智能体系统新范式，其事件溯源架构天然支持确定性重放和完全关联分析，提升了透明度和可控性。论文讨论该基质对自改进智能体的潜在适用性，并扩展了BabyAGI和先前的图记忆研究。未来工作需实际验证自改进能力，并探索大规模部署中的日志压缩与检索效率。

title: Ex-GraphRAG: Interpretable Evidence Routing for Graph-Augmented LLMs
abstract: GraphRAG conditions language models on subgraphs retrieved from knowledge graphs, encoded via message-passing GNNs. Because these encoders entangle node contributions through iterated neighborhood aggregation, there is no closed-form way to determine how much each retrieved entity influenced the encoder's output, and therefore no way to faithfully audit what structural evidence actually reached the model. We introduce Ex-GraphRAG, which replaces the GNN encoder with a Multivariate Graph Neural Additive Network (M-GNAN), an extension of additive graph models to high-dimensional embedding spaces that yields an exact decomposition of the encoder's output across individual nodes and feature groups, without post-hoc approximation. On STaRK-Prime, this auditable encoder matches black-box performance. Using it to audit evidence routing, we uncover a semantic-structural mismatch: the nodes that dominate the encoder's output are structurally disconnected in the retrieved subgraph, held together by low-attribution intermediaries whose removal degrades multi-hop QA by up to 28%. This mismatch, invisible to any opaque encoder, reveals that semantic importance and structural connectivity are governed by disjoint sets of nodes, with direct implications for retrieval pruning, context construction, and failure diagnosis in graph-augmented LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Ex-GraphRAG，用可审计的M-GNAN编码器替代GNN，实现图增强LLM中证据路由的精确可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有GraphRAG使用GNN编码检索子图，但GNN通过迭代邻域聚合纠缠节点贡献，无法确定每个实体对编码器输出的影响，导致无法审计结构证据是否真正到达模型。这种不可解释性阻碍了模型可信度和故障诊断，亟需一种能精确分解节点贡献的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Ex-GraphRAG，核心创新是将GNN编码器替换为多变量图神经网络加性网络（M-GNAN）。M-GNAN扩展了加性图模型到高维嵌入空间，能精确分解编码器输出到每个节点和特征组，无需事后近似。在STaRK-Prime数据集上评估，保持性能的同时提供可审计性。
light_analysis.result: 在STaRK-Prime上，可审计的M-GNAN编码器匹配了黑盒GNN的性能。利用其可解释性审计证据路由，发现语义-结构不匹配：输出中高归因的节点在子图中结构断开，由低归因中介连接；移除这些中介使多跳QA性能下降28%。该现象在不可解释编码器中无法察觉。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了语义重要性与结构连通性由不相交节点集控制，对检索剪枝、上下文构建和图增强LLM的故障诊断有直接影响。Ex-GraphRAG提供了一个可审计框架，有助于理解模型内部机制，改进可靠性和可解释性。未来可进一步优化中介节点的作用。

title: ECPO: Evidence-Coupled Policy Optimization for Evidence-Certified Candidate Ranking
abstract: Ranking systems used in decision-support settings should not only order candidates but also expose evidence that can be independently checked. We study evidence-certified candidate ranking: given an intent_id, a predefined plan skeleton, a window-local candidate roster, and text-derived candidate trajectories with span provenance, a system must output a Top-K list together with doc_id:span evidence certificates whose cited spans are sufficient to recover the decision. We instantiate this task on MAVEN-ERE and RAMS with fixed upstream extraction, window-local randomized candidate identifiers, skeleton-aligned trajectory supervision, hard negatives, and audit references. We introduce Evidence-Coupled Policy Optimization (ECPO), a listwise policy-optimization objective whose action is the joint object of ranking and evidence certificate. ECPO first learns an interpretable trajectory reward from skeleton alignment, argument consistency, and optional graph features; it then optimizes a constrained policy with three coupled rewards: listwise ranking utility, span-level certificate validity, and an evidence-cycle reward computed by a label-free deterministic verifier that reconstructs candidate support from claim-stripped cited spans. This reframes the goal from maximizing ordinary NDCG alone to maximizing CertNDCG and decision-evidence coupling. The evaluation compares ECPO against zero-shot, SFT, and GRPO policies, RM-only scoring with deterministic evidence attachment, grammar/JSON-constrained decoding, validator retry, best-of-N RM selection, and post-hoc evidence rationalization under closed-roster, predicted-roster, and hybrid-roster settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出证据耦合策略优化（ECPO），用于输出带有可验证证据证书的候选排名，联合优化排序与证据生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 决策支持系统中的排名不仅需要排序候选，还需提供可独立检查的证据，以增强决策的可解释性和可信度。现有方法通常将排名与证据生成分离，导致输出难以验证。因此，需要一种既能优化排名质量又能确保证据有效性的耦合方法，在MAVEN-ERE和RAMS等数据集上实现证据认证候选排名。
light_analysis.method: ECPO是一种列表策略优化目标，其动作是排名与证据证书的联合对象。首先从骨架对齐、参数一致性和可选图特征中学习可解释的轨迹奖励；然后优化一个约束策略，包含三个耦合奖励：列表排名效用、跨度级证书有效性，以及通过无标签确定性验证器计算的证据循环奖励（从去除主张的引用跨度中重建候选支持）。该方法重新定义了目标，从最大化普通NDCG转向最大化CertNDCG和决策-证据耦合。
light_analysis.result: 在MAVEN-ERE和RAMS数据集上，与零样本、SFT、GRPO策略、仅RM评分、确定性证据附加、语法/JSON约束解码、验证器重试、最佳N RM选择以及事后证据合理化等基线方法进行了比较。实验在封闭名册、预测名册和混合名册设置下进行，评估指标包括CertNDCG和决策-证据耦合度。具体数值未在摘要中明确给出，但ECPO在耦合奖励指导下取得了更优的结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: ECPO通过耦合排名与证据生成，提升了决策支持系统的可解释性和可靠性。其核心贡献是将目标从单一排名优化转向联合优化排名与证据证书，具有重要的学术价值和应用前景。未来可探索更复杂的验证器或扩展到其他序列决策任务。摘要未提及明显的局限性。

title: Learning Spatiotemporal Sensitivity in Video LLMs via Counterfactual Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Video large language models (Video LLMs) achieve strong benchmark accuracy, yet often answer video questions through shortcuts such as single-frame cues and language priors rather than by tracking spatiotemporal dynamics. This issue is exacerbated in RL post-training, where correctness-only rewards can further reinforce shortcut policies that obtain high reward without tracking video dynamics. We address this by asking a controlled counterfactual question: if the visual world changed while the question remained fixed, should the answer change or stay the same? Based on this view, we propose \textbf{Counterfactual Relational Policy Optimization (CRPO)}, a dual-branch RL framework for improving \emph{spatiotemporal sensitivity}. CRPO constructs counterfactual videos through horizontal flips and temporal reversals, trains on both original and counterfactual branches, and introduces a \textbf{Counterfactual Relation Reward (CRR)} between their answers. CRR encourages answers to change for dynamic questions and remain unchanged for static questions. This cross-branch constraint makes it difficult for shortcut policies to be consistently rewarded across both branches. To evaluate this property, we introduce \textbf{DyBench}, a paired counterfactual video benchmark with 3,014 videos covering reversible dynamics, moving direction, and event sequence, together with a strict pair-accuracy metric that prevents fixed-answer shortcuts from inflating scores. Experiments show that CRPO outperforms prior RL methods on spatiotemporal-sensitive evaluations while maintaining competitive general video performance. On Qwen3-VL-8B, CRPO improves DyBench P-Acc by +7.7 and TimeBlind I-Acc by +8.2 over the base model, indicating improved spatiotemporal sensitivity rather than stronger reliance on static shortcuts. The project website can be found at https://ddz16.github.io/crpo.github.io/ .

light_analysis.overview: 提出反事实关系策略优化(CRPO)框架，通过双分支强化学习提升视频大模型的时空敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频大模型在基准测试中表现优异，但常通过单帧线索和语言先验等捷径回答视频问题，而非真正跟踪时空动态。强化学习后训练中，仅基于正确性的奖励会进一步强化这种捷径策略，导致模型忽视视频动态变化。现有方法缺乏对时空敏感性的专门优化，亟需一种能引导模型关注动态信息而非静态捷径的强化学习框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出CRPO双分支强化学习框架，通过水平翻转和时间反转构建反事实视频，在原始和反事实分支上训练。引入反事实关系奖励(CRR)，鼓励动态问题的答案随视频变化而改变，静态问题答案保持不变。这种跨分支约束使捷径策略难以同时获得高奖励。同时构建DyBench基准，包含3014个反事实视频对，采用成对准确率评估，防止固定答案捷径。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3-VL-8B上，CRPO在DyBench成对准确率上提升7.7%，在TimeBlind I-Acc上提升8.2%，优于先前强化学习方法，同时保持通用视频任务性能。实验表明模型时空敏感性提升，而非依赖静态捷径。
light_analysis.conclusion: CRPO有效提升了视频大模型对时空动态的敏感性，通过反事实强化学习抑制捷径策略。DyBench为评估时空敏感性提供了可靠基准。未来可扩展到更复杂的反事实变换和视频理解任务，但当前方法仅考虑空间翻转和时间反转，对更复杂的动态变化仍有局限。

title: ParaVT: Taming the Tool Prior Paradox for Parallel Tool Use in Agentic Video Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Training large multimodal models (LMMs) via reinforcement learning (RL) to natively invoke video-processing tools (e.g., cropping) has become a promising route to long-video understanding. However, existing native-RL methods dispatch tool calls sequentially (i.e., one per turn): a single wrong crop propagates errors without peer correction, multi-turn tool calls corrupt context, and inference cost scales linearly with the number of turns. We introduce ParaVT, the first multi-agent end-to-end RL-trained framework for Parallel Video Tool calling, dispatching multiple time-window crops in a single turn for cleaner context and better fault tolerance. Yet applying standard RL to ParaVT reveals an obstacle we term the Tool Prior Paradox: the pretrained tool priors that enable tool exploration also destabilize cold-started structural format and expose the skip-tool reward shortcut under temperature sampling. A cross-model contrast on a weaker-prior LMM supports this claim: format stays stable but RL elicits zero tool calls, indicating that prior strength is the shared driver of both format collapse and tool exploration. We propose PARA-GRPO (Parseability-Anchored and Ratio-gAted GRPO), which augments standard RL with two complementary mechanisms: (i) a targeted format reward applied only at the structural-token positions most prone to collapse, and (ii) a per-prompt frame-budget randomization that creates training prompts where calling the tool yields a measurable reward signal over skipping it. Across six long-video understanding benchmarks, ParaVT improves over the Qwen3-VL baseline by +7.9% on average, with PARA-GRPO lifting training-time format compliance from 0.13 to 0.64. As tool capabilities become increasingly internalized in modern LMMs, RL must cooperate with the resulting priors, and ParaVT offers a general recipe for agentic RL. Code, data, and model weights are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ParaVT，首个多智能体端到端RL框架实现并行视频工具调用，并设计PARA-GRPO解决工具先验悖论。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LMM通过RL顺序调用视频工具（如裁剪）进行长视频理解，但顺序调用导致错误传播、上下文污染及推理成本随轮次线性增长。此外，标准RL面临工具先验悖论：预训练工具先验虽促进工具探索，却破坏冷启动结构格式稳定性，并暴露跳过工具奖励捷径。
light_analysis.method: ParaVT采用多智能体端到端RL训练，在单次交互中调度多个时间窗口裁剪，实现并行工具调用以保持上下文简洁和容错。提出PARA-GRPO，包含两个机制：(i) 仅在易崩溃的结构令牌位置施加格式奖励；(ii) 每提示帧预算随机化，使调用工具优于跳过工具获得可测量奖励信号。
light_analysis.result: 在六个长视频理解基准上，ParaVT平均比Qwen3-VL基线提升+7.9%。PARA-GRPO将训练格式合规性从0.13提升至0.64。代码、数据和模型权重已公开。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParaVT作为并行工具调用框架，结合PARA-GRPO有效解决了工具先验悖论，为智能体RL提供通用方案。随着工具能力内化，RL需与先验协作。未来可探索更复杂的工具组合策略。

title: Smooth Partial Lotteries for Stable Randomized Selection
abstract: Competitive selection processes, from scientific funding to admissions and hiring, use evaluations to score candidates, and eventually choose a subset of them based on those scores. Recently, many organizations have adopted partial lotteries, which randomize selection based on evaluation scores. However, existing lottery designs are inherently unstable, as a small change to a single candidate's score can cause large shifts in their selection probabilities. This instability undermines a key goal of lotteries: reducing the influence of fine-grained score distinctions near the decision boundary. We propose smoothness as a design principle for partial lotteries, formalizing it as a Lipschitz condition on the mapping from review scores over candidates to selection probabilities. We introduce the Clipped Linear Lottery, a simple mechanism in which selection probabilities scale linearly with estimated quality between an upper threshold, above which we always accept, and a lower threshold, below which we always reject. We prove that the Clipped Linear Lottery's worst-case regret matches a lower bound for any smooth selection rule up to a factor of $(1 - k/n)$, where $k/n$ is the acceptance rate. We compare smooth selection to other stability notions like Individual Fairness and Differential Privacy, showing that the Clipped Linear Lottery achieves a better smoothness-regret tradeoff than alternatives. Experiments on real peer review data from ICLR 2025, NeurIPS 2024, and the Swiss National Science Foundation demonstrate that existing lottery designs are highly unstable in practice even under perturbations to a single score. Our experiments also confirm the tightness of our theoretical analysis and show that our proposed Clipped Linear Lottery achieves a better smoothness-utility tradeoff than alternatives in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Clipped Linear Lottery机制，通过Lipschitz平滑性约束解决随机选择中分数微小变化导致概率大幅波动的不稳定性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 竞争性选择（如基金评审、录取）使用评估分数选择子集，部分彩票虽引入随机化，但现有设计不稳定：单个候选者分数微小变化会导致其选中概率大幅波动，削弱了减少决策边界歧视的目标。需要设计一种平滑的彩票机制，使得概率对分数变化不敏感。
light_analysis.method: 提出平滑性作为设计原则，形式化为从分数到选择概率映射的Lipschitz条件。引入Clipped Linear Lottery：设置上阈值（以上全接受）和下阈值（以下全拒绝），中间概率与质量线性相关。证明其最坏情况遗憾匹配下界（因子(1-k/n)），并分析其与个体公平性、差分隐私的关系，展示更好的平滑-遗憾权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在ICLR 2025、NeurIPS 2024和瑞士国家科学基金的同行评议数据上实验，现有彩票设计在单个分数扰动下极不稳定，而Clipped Linear Lottery实现了更好的平滑-效用权衡。实验验证了理论分析的紧性，表明该方法在实践中优于替代方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了平滑部分彩票的设计原则，Clipped Linear Lottery在保证平滑性的同时实现接近最优的遗憾。学术上明确了稳定性要求，实践上可应用于科学资助、录取等竞争性选拔，减少分数边界处的不公平。未来可探索更复杂的阈值设定或多阶段彩票。

title: Normative Networks for Source Separation via Local Plasticity and Dendritic Computation
abstract: Blind source separation (BSS) is a natural framework for studying how latent causes may be recovered from sensory mixtures, but deriving online and biologically plausible algorithms for structured (i.e., constrained to known domains) and potentially correlated sources remains challenging. Recent work has derived neural networks for BSS from maximization of an entropy measure, yet its online implementations involve complex and nonlocal recurrent dynamics. Motivated by this perspective, we propose Predictive Entropy Maximization, which achieves competitive performance in BSS, using only local weight updates. The method employs a close approximation of an entropy measure, yielding an objective function with easily interpretable components. Minimizing this objective leads to a predictive neural architecture in which feedforward synapses follow an error-driven rule (that can be realized through dendritic mechanisms), lateral inhibitory connections are learned with local Hebbian plasticity, and source-domain constraints are enforced through simple output nonlinearities. We derive explicit spectral bounds on the surrogate error, characterizing when the approximation is accurate. Empirically, Predictive Entropy Maximization remains robust under increasing source correlation and observation noise, outperforms biologically plausible algorithms that rely on stronger independence or decorrelation assumptions, and remains competitive with exact determinant- and correlative-information-based baselines. These results show how local plasticity and adaptive lateral inhibition can emerge from maximizing a regularized second-order entropy over structured source domains. Our implementation code is available at https://github.com/BariscanBozkurt/Predictive-Entropy-Maximization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Predictive Entropy Maximization 方法，通过局部可塑性和树突计算实现盲源分离，仅需局部权重更新，性能与全局方法相当。
light_analysis.motivation: 盲源分离（BSS）需要从混合信号中恢复潜在原因，但现有在线生物合理算法涉及复杂非局部循环动力学。结构化（约束到已知域）和相关源的分离更具挑战性。因此需要开发仅使用局部更新且生物合理的算法。
light_analysis.method: 提出 Predictive Entropy Maximization，通过近似熵测度得到目标函数，最小化该目标产生预测性神经架构：前馈突触采用误差驱动规则（可通过树突机制实现），侧向抑制连接使用局部赫布可塑性学习，源域约束通过简单输出非线性实施。推导了代理误差的谱界。
light_analysis.result: 在源相关性和观测噪声增加时保持鲁棒，优于依赖强独立性假设的生物合理算法，与基于精确行列式和相关性信息的基线方法竞争力相当。代码开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 展示了局部可塑性和自适应侧向抑制如何从最大化结构化源域上的正则化二阶熵中涌现。具有生物合理性和计算效率，为神经形态计算提供新思路。

title: Neural Collapse by Design: Learning Class Prototypes on the Hypersphere
abstract: Supervised classification has a theoretical optimum, Neural Collapse (NC), yet neither of its two dominant paradigms reaches it in practice. Cross entropy (CE) leaves radial degrees of freedom unconstrained and converges to a degenerate geometry, while supervised contrastive learning (SCL) drives features toward NC during pretraining but discards this structure in a post hoc linear probing phase. We show that both paradigms are different appearances of the same method that contrasts prototypes on the unit hypersphere, and that closing the gap requires fixing each at its point of failure. From the CE side, we propose NTCE and NONL, two normalized losses that import contrastive optimization's missing ingredients into classifier learning: a large effective negative set and decoupled alignment and uniformity terms. From the SCL side, we prove that SCL's objective already optimizes throughout training for a principled classifier whose weights are the class mean embeddings, making linear probing both redundant and harmful. Empirically, on four benchmarks including ImageNet-1K, NTCE and NONL surpass CE accuracy, closely approximate NC ($\geq 95\%$), and match CE's converged NC on 4/5 metrics in under $7.5\%$ of its iterations, while SCL with fixed prototypes matches linear probing without the hours-long classifier training phase. The learned geometry yields $+5.5\%$ mean relative improvement in transfer learning, up to $+8.7\%$ under severe class imbalance, and improved robustness to corruptions on ImageNet-C. Our work recasts supervised learning as prototype learning on the hypersphere, with NC reached by design.
comment: 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026); Code: https://github.com/pakoromilas/nc_by_design

light_analysis.overview: 提出NTCE和NONL两种归一化损失，使监督学习在超球面上通过设计达到神经坍缩（NC）最优，并揭示交叉熵与对比学习的统一性。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督分类的理论最优是神经坍缩（NC），但交叉熵（CE）未约束径向自由度，收敛到退化几何；监督对比学习（SCL）虽在预训练中驱动特征向NC，却在随后的线性探测阶段丢弃了已学结构，两者均未达到NC。需要弥合这一差距，实现通过设计达到NC。
light_analysis.method: 从CE侧提出NTCE和NONL两种归一化损失，引入对比优化的大负样本集及解耦的对齐与均匀性项；从SCL侧证明其目标实质已优化权重为类平均嵌入的分类器，线性探测冗余且有害。通过将分类重构为超球面上的原型学习，使网络在训练中直接逼近NC几何。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet-1K等四个基准上，NTCE和NONL超越CE准确率，达到≥95%的NC近似度，且仅用CE约7.5%的迭代次数即在4/5指标上匹配CE的NC收敛；SCL固定原型匹配线性探测性能，省去小时级分类器训练。其学习的几何在迁移学习中提升+5.5%平均相对性能，严重类不平衡下提升+8.7%，在ImageNet-C上鲁棒性增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文重新定义监督学习为超球面上的原型学习，通过设计达到NC，统一了CE和SCL框架。学术上揭示了两种范式的内在联系并给出更优损失；实践中在迁移学习、类不平衡和鲁棒性上表现显著提升。未来可探索更极端不平衡或细粒度分类场景。

title: Lens Privacy Sealing: A New Benchmark and Method for Physical Privacy-Preserving Action Recognition
abstract: RGB camera-based surveillance systems enable human action recognition for public safety and healthcare, yet raise serious privacy concerns. Existing methods rely on post-capture algorithms, which fail to protect privacy during data acquisition. We propose Lens Privacy Sealing (LPS), a simple hardware solution that physically obscures camera lenses with adjustable laminating film, providing pre-sensor privacy protection at minimal cost. Unlike software methods or expensive engineered optics, LPS achieves strong privacy through stochastic multi-layer scattering that is physically irreversible. We introduce the P$^3$AR dataset for privacy-preserving action recognition, featuring both large-scale replay-captured (P$^3$AR-NTU, 114K videos) and real-world collected (P$^3$AR-PKU) subsets with privacy attribute annotations. To handle video degradation from LPS, we propose MSPNet, a single-stage framework incorporating Inter-Frame Noise Suppressor (IFNS) and Cross-Frame Semantic Aggregator (CFSA), enhanced by contrastive language-image pre-training for robust semantic extraction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MSPNet with IFNS and CFSA nearly doubles action recognition accuracy compared to baseline methods while suppressing identity recognition to low levels. Comprehensive validation shows LPS achieves a superior privacy-utility trade-off compared to state-of-the-art hardware methods, resists reconstruction attacks including PSF inversion and data-driven recovery, and generalizes robustly across optical configurations and challenging environments. Code is available at https://github.com/wangzy01/MSPNet.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出镜头隐私密封（LPS）硬件方案，通过物理遮挡实现预传感器隐私保护，并构建P$^3$AR数据集与MSPNet网络，实现隐私与动作识别性能的优越平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RGB摄像头监控系统支持动作识别但存在隐私泄露风险。后采集算法无法在数据获取阶段保护隐私，而昂贵的光学工程方案成本高。需要一种低成本、物理不可逆的预传感器隐私保护方法，同时保持动作识别可用性。摘要强调现有方法在数据采集阶段隐私保护的缺失。
light_analysis.method: LPS采用可调层压膜物理覆盖镜头，利用随机多层散射实现不可逆模糊。提出P$^3$AR数据集，包含114K视频的P$^3$AR-NTU（回放采集）和真实世界的P$^3$AR-PKU子集，附有隐私属性标注。为处理视频退化，设计MSPNet单阶段框架，包含帧间噪声抑制器（IFNS）和跨帧语义聚合器（CFSA），并结合对比语言-图像预训练增强语义提取。
light_analysis.result: MSPNet（含IFNS和CFSA）在动作识别准确率上相比基线方法提升近一倍，同时将身份识别率压制至低水平。LPS在隐私-效用权衡上优于现有硬件方法，能抵抗PSF反演和数据驱动重建攻击，且在多种光学配置和挑战性环境下具有鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LPS提供低成本、物理可逆性（实际是物理不可逆）的预传感器隐私保护，结合MSPNet实现了优异的隐私-动作识别权衡。具有实际应用价值，可部署于监控系统。未提及明显局限性，未来工作可探索更广泛的场景适配。

title: RE-VLM: Event-Augmented Vision-Language Model for Scene Understanding
abstract: Conventional vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to interpret scenes captured under adverse conditions (e.g., low light, high dynamic range, or fast motion) because standard RGB images degrade in such environments. Event cameras provide a complementary modality: they asynchronously record per-pixel brightness changes with high temporal resolution and wide dynamic range, preserving motion cues where frames fail. We propose RE-VLM, the first dual-stream vision-language model that jointly leverages RGB images and event streams for robust scene understanding across both normal and challenging conditions. RE-VLM employs parallel RGB and event encoders together with a progressive training strategy that aligns heterogeneous visual features with language. To address the scarcity of RGB-Event-Text supervision, we further propose a graph-driven pipeline that converts synchronized RGB-Event streams into verifiable scene graphs, from which we synthesize captions and question-answer (QA) pairs. To develop and evaluate RE-VLM, we construct two datasets: PEOD-Chat, targeting illumination-challenged scenes, and RGBE-Chat, covering diverse scenarios. On captioning and VQA benchmarks, RE-VLM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art RGB-only and event-only models with comparable parameter counts, with particularly large gains under challenging conditions. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of event-augmented VLMs in achieving robust vision-language understanding across a wide range of real-world environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RE-VLM，首个双流视觉语言模型，结合RGB图像和事件流，实现正常与恶劣条件下的鲁棒场景理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统视觉语言模型在低光、高动态范围或快速运动等恶劣环境下表现不佳，因为标准RGB图像在这些场景中退化严重。事件相机通过异步记录像素亮度变化，提供高时间分辨率和宽动态范围的互补信息。然而，缺乏RGB-事件-文本联合标注数据，限制了多模态模型的发展。本文旨在解决这一问题，构建事件增强的VLM以提升场景理解的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: RE-VLM采用并行RGB和事件编码器，通过渐进训练策略对齐异构视觉特征与语言。为解决数据稀缺，提出图驱动管道：将同步RGB-事件流转换为可验证的场景图，并从中合成描述和问答对。构建两个数据集：PEOD-Chat（光照挑战场景）和RGBE-Chat（多样化场景）。模型在描述和VQA任务上训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在描述和VQA基准上，RE-VLM一致优于同等参数量的最先进RGB-only和event-only模型，尤其在挑战条件下提升显著。具体数值摘要未明确，但表明方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: RE-VLM证明了事件增强VLM在正常与恶劣环境下实现鲁棒视觉语言理解的潜力。通过图驱动数据合成缓解了标注稀缺问题。未来可探索更高效的双流融合机制及扩展到更多模态。

title: Benchmarking Commercial ASR Systems on Code-Switching Speech: Arabic, Persian, and German
abstract: Code-switching -- the natural alternation between two languages within a single utterance -- represents one of the most challenging and under-studied conditions for automatic speech recognition (ASR). Existing commercial ASR benchmarks predominantly evaluate clean, monolingual audio and report a single Word Error Rate (WER) figure that tells practitioners little about real-world multilingual performance. We present a benchmark evaluating five commercial ASR providers across four language pairs: Egyptian Arabic--English, Saudi Arabic (Najdi/Hijazi)--English, Persian (Farsi)--English, and German--English. Each dataset comprises 300 samples selected by a two-stage pipeline: a heuristic filter scoring transcripts on five structural code-switching signals, followed by a GPT-4o and Gemini 1.5 Pro ensemble scoring candidates across six linguistic dimensions. This pipeline reduces LLM scoring costs by approximately 91% relative to exhaustive scoring. We evaluate the systems on both WER and BERTScore, arguing that BERTScore is a more reliable metric for Arabic and Persian pairs where transliteration variance causes WER to penalise semantically correct transcriptions. ElevenLabs Scribe v2 achieves the lowest WER across all four language pairs (13.2% overall; 13.1% on Egyptian Arabic) and leads on BERTScore (0.936 overall). We further demonstrate that difficulty-stratified analysis reveals performance gaps masked by aggregate averages, and that BERT embedding projections confirm semantic proximity between reference and hypothesis despite surface-level script differences. The benchmarking dataset is publicly available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Perle-ai/ASR_Code_Switch.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对代码切换语音的商业ASR系统基准测试，涵盖四种语言对，并指出BERTScore比WER更适用于评价阿拉伯语和波斯语对。
light_analysis.motivation: 代码切换是ASR中极具挑战性且研究不足的场景。现有商业ASR基准主要评估干净的单语言音频，仅报告单一WER，无法反映真实多语言性能。因此需要专门评估代码切换场景下的ASR系统，以揭示实际部署中的性能差异。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含四种语言对（埃及阿拉伯语-英语、沙特阿拉伯语-英语、波斯语-英语、德语-英语）的基准数据集，每对300样本。采用两阶段流水线：启发式过滤器基于五种结构代码切换信号评分，再用GPT-4o和Gemini 1.5 Pro集成在六个维度评分，降低约91%的LLM成本。评估使用WER和BERTScore。
light_analysis.result: ElevenLabs Scribe v2在全部语言对上取得最低WER（总体13.2%，埃及阿拉伯语13.1%）和最高BERTScore（总体0.936）。难度分层分析揭示聚合平均值掩盖的性能差距，BERT嵌入投影显示语义接近性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 公开了代码切换ASR基准数据集，论证了BERTScore对阿拉伯语和波斯语对的优势，并展示了分层分析的重要性。该工作为评估多语言ASR系统提供了新方法，未来可扩展更多语言和模型。

title: MedFM-Robust: Benchmarking Robustness of Medical Foundation Models
abstract: Medical foundation models (MedFMs) have emerged as transformative tools in healthcare, demonstrating capabilities across diverse clinical applications. These models can be broadly categorized into two paradigms: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) and segmentation foundation models. Med-VLMs range from medical-specialized models such as LLaVA-Med and MedGemma, to general-purpose models like GPT-4o and Gemini, all capable of medical image understanding tasks including visual question answering (VQA), report generation, and visual grounding. Concurrently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has catalyzed a new generation of medical segmentation models, with adaptations like SAM-Med2D and MedSAM. The widespread clinical deployment of these models thus necessitates rigorous evaluation of their reliability under real-world conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MedFM-Robust基准测试，系统性评估医疗基础模型在真实世界条件下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗基础模型（MedFMs）在临床应用中潜力巨大，但现有研究缺乏对其可靠性的系统评估，尤其是面对噪声、分布偏移等真实世界挑战时的鲁棒性。临床部署需要严格验证，因此构建鲁棒性基准至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 涵盖两类主流模型：医疗视觉语言模型（如LLaVA-Med、GPT-4o）和分割模型（如SAM-Med2D、MedSAM）。通过设计多种扰动（如图像噪声、模糊、对抗攻击）和任务（VQA、报告生成、分割）来测试模型性能，构建标准化评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体结果。推测实验将揭示不同模型在鲁棒性测试中的性能差异，例如通用模型（GPT-4o）可能优于专用模型，分割模型对噪声敏感度较高。
light_analysis.conclusion: MedFM-Robust为医疗基础模型的鲁棒性评估提供标准框架，有助于识别模型脆弱性，推动临床可靠部署。未来可扩展至更多模型类型和医疗场景。

title: GROW: Aligning GRPO with State-Action Modeling for Open-World VLM Agents
abstract: Recently, vision-language model (VLM) agents have shown promising progress in open-world tasks, where successful task completion often requires multiple turns of visual perception and action execution. However, existing methods still rely primarily on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with expert demonstrations, while the advanced reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm, specifically Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), has not been effectively employed for multi-turn RL in these tasks because standard GRPO requires full trajectories as training samples which leads to excessively long context and noise. To address this issue, we propose GROW, a RL framework for open-world VLM agents that decomposes collected trajectories into state-action samples, and computes advantages between these samples rather than treating a full trajectory as a single entity. We further provide a surrogate analysis indicating that, even though the grouped samples are conditioned on different local states rather than an identical prompt context, the objective can preserve the core relative policy optimization signal of GRPO under simplifying assumptions. Experiments on more than 800 Minecraft tasks show that our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed RL framework for open-world VLM agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GROW框架，通过将轨迹分解为状态-动作样本并计算优势，使GRPO有效用于开放世界VLM智能体的多轮强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放世界任务中VLM智能体需多轮视觉感知和行动执行，现有方法主要依赖监督微调和专家演示，而强化学习算法GRPO因需完整轨迹作为训练样本，导致上下文过长和噪声，难以用于多轮RL。因此，亟需一种能高效利用轨迹信息进行多轮强化学习的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出GROW框架，将收集的轨迹分解为状态-动作样本，并计算这些样本之间的优势，而非将整个轨迹视为单一实体。同时提供替代分析，表明即使分组样本基于不同局部状态，目标在简化假设下仍能保留GRPO的核心相对策略优化信号。该方法无需完整轨迹，降低了上下文长度和噪声。
light_analysis.result: 在超过800个Minecraft任务上评估，GROW取得SOTA性能，显著优于现有方法。实验结果表明，所提出的基于状态-动作样本优势计算的RL框架能有效提升VLM智能体在开放世界任务中的完成能力，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作成功将GRPO适配到多轮RL场景，通过状态-动作建模解决了标准GRPO在开放世界任务中的局限性。该方法为VLM智能体的自主学习提供了新范式，具有重要学术价值。潜在局限性包括对简化假设的依赖，未来可探索更通用的优势计算策略。

title: CatalyticMLLM: A Graph-Text Multimodal Large Language Model for Catalytic Materials
abstract: Property prediction and inverse structural design of catalytic materials are typically modeled as two independent tasks: the former predicts target properties from given structures, whereas the latter generates candidate structures according to desired properties. Although the decoupled paradigm facilitates the implementation of a ``generation--evaluation--screening'' workflow, the inconsistency between the generative model and the property prediction model in terms of representation spaces and training objectives can readily introduce data distribution shifts and evaluator bias, thereby limiting the stability of closed-loop optimization.   In this work, we propose QE-Catalytic-V2, a unified graph--text multimodal large language model for catalytic materials, which integrates property prediction and inverse design within the same model and shared representation space. Under this unified framework, QE-Catalytic-V2 can not only perform reliable property prediction by leveraging three-dimensional structures and textual information, but also generate and screen physically feasible CIF candidates conditioned on target properties, thereby forming a closed-loop optimization workflow of ``inverse design--prediction--screening--redesign.'' Experimental results demonstrate that this unified paradigm outperforms decoupled baselines on both catalytic relaxed-energy prediction and inverse design tasks, validating the effectiveness of jointly modeling property prediction and structure generation within a single multimodal model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一图-文本多模态大语言模型QE-Catalytic-V2，整合性质预测与逆向设计，实现闭环优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 催化材料的性质预测和逆向结构设计通常作为独立任务处理，导致生成模型与预测模型在表示空间和训练目标上不一致，容易引入数据分布偏移和评估偏差，限制闭环优化的稳定性。因此需要一种统一框架，将两个任务融合在共享表示空间中，以消除不一致性，提升优化闭环的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出QE-Catalytic-V2，一种图-文本多模态大语言模型，利用三维结构和文本信息进行性质预测，并基于目标属性生成和筛选物理可行的CIF候选结构，形成“逆向设计-预测-筛选-再设计”闭环。模型在统一框架下共享表示空间，同时优化预测和生成能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该统一范式在催化松弛能预测和逆向设计任务上均优于解耦基线方法，验证了在多模态模型中联合建模性质预测与结构生成的有效性。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但定性说明了性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: QE-Catalytic-V2实现了性质预测与逆向设计的统一建模，为催化材料领域提供了一种高效的闭环优化方案。该工作证明了多模态大语言模型在材料科学中的潜力，未来可扩展至其他材料类型或引入更多模态信息。潜在局限性包括对大规模标注数据的需求和计算开销。

title: Closing the Gap at CRAC 2026: Two-Stage Adaptation for LLM-Based Multilingual Coreference Resolution
abstract: We present our submission to the LLM track of the 2026 Computational Models of Reference, Anaphora and Coreference (CRAC 2026) shared task. With an average CoNLL F1 score of 74.32 on the official test set, our system ranked first in the LLM track, and third overall. Our system is based on the Gemma-3-27b model, fine-tuned using a two-stage strategy with a multilingual base adapter followed by dataset-specific adapters. We represent mention spans by their headword using an XML-inspired format with local reindexing and annotate documents iteratively. These design choices proved effective across languages, document lengths, and annotation guidelines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Gemma-3-27b的两阶段微调策略，在CRAC 2026 LLM赛道以74.32 CoNLL F1获得第一，有效推动多语言共指消解。
light_analysis.motivation: 共指消解对多语言NLP至关重要，但LLM在多语言场景下泛化不足，现有方法难以兼顾跨语言一致性与数据集特异性。该研究旨在通过两阶段适应策略缩小性能差距，提升模型在不同语言、标注规范下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 基于Gemma-3-27b模型，采用两阶段微调：先训练多语言基础适配器，再针对每个数据集训练专用适配器。使用headword表示提及，采用类似XML的格式并进行局部重新索引，配合迭代文档标注策略，以增强跨语言和跨领域适应性。
light_analysis.result: 在CRAC 2026官方测试集上取得平均CoNLL F1 74.32，位居LLM赛道第一，整体第三。实验证明该设计在多种语言、不同文档长度及标注指南下均有效，显著优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究验证了两阶段适应策略对提升LLM多语言共指消解性能的有效性，为跨语言NLP任务提供了可复现的技术路径。未来可探索更高效的适配器融合或融入句法信息以进一步优化。

title: MixSD: Mixed Contextual Self-Distillation for Knowledge Injection
abstract: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is widely used to inject new knowledge into language models, but it often degrades pretrained capabilities such as reasoning and general-domain performance. We argue this forgetting arises because fine-tuning targets from humans or external systems diverge from the model's autoregressive distribution, forcing the optimizer to imitate low-probability token sequences. To address this problem, we propose MixSD, a simple external-teacher-free method for distribution-aligned knowledge injection. Instead of training on fixed targets, MixSD constructs supervision dynamically by mixing tokens from two conditionals of the base model itself: an expert conditional that observes the injected fact in context, and a naive conditional that reflects the model's original prior. The resulting supervision sequences preserve the factual learning signal while remaining substantially closer to the base model's distribution. We evaluate MixSD on two synthetic corpora that we construct to study factual recall and arithmetic function acquisition in a controlled setting, together with established benchmarks for open-domain factual question answering and knowledge editing. Across multiple model scales and settings, MixSD consistently achieves a better memorization-retention trade-off compared to SFT and on-policy self distillation baselines, retaining up to 100% of the base model's held-out capability while maintaining near-perfect training accuracy, whereas standard SFT retains as little as 1%. We further show that MixSD produces substantially lower-NLL supervision targets under the base model and reduces harmful movement along Fisher-sensitive parameter directions. These results suggest that aligning supervision with the model's native generation distribution is a simple and effective principle for knowledge injection that mitigates catastrophic forgetting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MixSD，一种无需外部教师的混合上下文自蒸馏方法，通过动态混合基模型的两个条件分布来构建监督，实现分布对齐的知识注入，缓解灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督微调（SFT）在注入新知识时常导致预训练能力（如推理和通用性能）退化。原因是微调目标与模型自回归分布不一致，迫使优化器模仿低概率token序列。现有方法无法在记忆新知识和保留原有能力间取得良好平衡。需要一种与模型原生分布对齐的知识注入方法。
light_analysis.method: MixSD无需外部教师，从基模型自身构建监督。动态混合两个条件：专家条件（观察到注入事实的上下文）和朴素条件（反映原始先验）。将token按比例混合生成监督序列，保留事实学习信号的同时接近基模型分布。在合成语料（事实回忆和算术函数获取）以及开放域问答和知识编辑基准上评估，涵盖多种模型规模。
light_analysis.result: 相比SFT和同策略自蒸馏基线，MixSD在不同设置下一致实现更好的记忆-保留权衡。保留基模型高达100%的保留能力，同时保持近100%训练准确率，而标准SFT仅保留1%。产生的监督目标在基模型下具有更低的负对数似然，并减少对Fisher敏感参数方向的有害移动。
light_analysis.conclusion: MixSD通过使监督与模型原生生成分布对齐，简单有效地注入知识并缓解灾难性遗忘。在多个任务和模型规模上验证了有效性，为知识注入提供了新原则。未来可探索更复杂的混合策略或扩展到其他微调场景。

title: Symphony for Speech-to-Text: Supporting Real-Time Medical Voice Interfaces
abstract: After decades of use in dictation and, more recently, ambient documentation, speech is emerging as a primary modality for interacting with technology and AI in healthcare. Yet medical speech recognition remains difficult: systems must capture specialized terminology, resolve contextual ambiguity, and render measurements, abbreviations, and clinical shorthand precisely. Existing solutions are typically optimized either for general-purpose transcription or narrow dictation workflows, limiting their reliability in safety-critical settings and their usefulness for broader clinical workflows. We introduce Symphony for Speech-to-Text, a medical-grade speech recognition system for real-time streaming and batch file-based clinical use. Symphony decomposes the transcription process into specialized components for recognition, formatting, and contextual correction to optimize medical term recall while producing clinically structured text in real time and adapting across use cases. Evaluations on public benchmark and medical speech datasets show that Symphony substantially outperforms state-of-the-art systems in clinical settings while matching or exceeding them in general-domain settings, suggesting robust generalization rather than overfitting. We release a clinical benchmark dataset to support reliable validation and further progress in medical speech recognition. Symphony is available through a production-grade API for live dictation, conversational transcription, and batch audio file processing.
comment: Updated with a correction and improvement to Symphony's performance in spoken punctuation evaluation (R_punct, P_punct)

light_analysis.overview: 提出了Symphony，一个模块化的医学语音识别系统，通过分解转录为识别、格式化和校正组件，实现实时临床级文本输出，显著提升医学术语准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 医疗语音识别面临医学术语、上下文歧义、临床缩写等挑战。现有系统要么针对通用转录，要么针对窄域听写，在安全关键的临床环境中可靠性和有用性受限。因此需要一种专门针对临床工作流程、实时且准确处理医学语音的系统。
light_analysis.method: 将转录过程分解为三个专门组件：识别（自动语音识别）、格式化（将口语转换为医疗标准格式，如测量、缩写）、上下文校正（基于医疗知识纠正错误）。系统支持实时流式处理和批量文件处理，并适应不同用例。使用公开和医学语音数据集评估。
light_analysis.result: 在公开基准和医学语音数据集上，Symphony在临床设置中大幅优于现有最先进系统，同时在通用领域匹配或超越。例如，医学术语召回率显著提升。论文还发布了一个临床基准数据集以支持可靠验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了Symphony系统及其模块化设计，证明了在医疗语音识别中的有效性。发布临床数据集促进研究。系统通过生产级API可用，支持实时听写、对话转录和批量处理，具有实际应用价值。

title: Towards Generalization of Block Attention via Automatic Segmentation and Block Distillation
abstract: Block attention, which processes the input as separate blocks that cannot attend to one another, offers significant potential to improve KV cache reuse in long-context scenarios such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). However, its broader application is hindered by two key challenges: the difficulty of segmenting input text into meaningful, self-contained blocks, and the inefficiency of existing block fine-tuning methods that risk degrading performance. To address these, we first construct SemanticSeg, a large and diverse semantic segmentation dataset containing over 30k instances across 16 categories-including books, code, web text, and conversations with text lengths ranging from 2k to 32k. Using this dataset, we train a lightweight segmenter to automatically partition text into human-instinct-aligned blocks with controllable granularity. Second, we propose block distillation, a training framework that is more efficient than block fine-tuning, which uses a frozen full-attention teacher model to guide the block-attention student. This framework integrates three novel components: block sink tokens to mitigate information loss at block boundaries, block dropout to leverage training signals from all blocks, and token-level loss weighting to focus learning on block-attention-sensitive tokens. Experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that our segmenter outperforms heuristic and statistical baselines, and block distillation achieves near-full-attention performance under block attention, establishing a practical and scalable pathway for deploying block attention.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于自动分割和块蒸馏的块注意力泛化方法，解决长上下文场景中KV缓存重用问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 块注意力通过将输入分割为独立块以提升KV缓存重用，在RAG等长上下文场景中潜力巨大。然而，现有方法面临两大挑战：难以将文本分割为有意义的自包含块，以及块微调方法效率低且易导致性能下降。这些问题限制了块注意力的广泛应用，亟需有效的分割和训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建包含30k+实例、16类文本的语义分割数据集SemanticSeg，训练轻量分割器实现自动分块。其次提出块蒸馏训练框架，使用冻结的全注意力教师模型指导学生模型，包含三个创新组件：块沉溺令牌缓解边界信息损失、块丢弃利用所有块训练信号、令牌级损失加权聚焦敏感令牌。该方法比块微调更高效。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提分割器在多个模型和基准上优于启发式和统计基线。块蒸馏在块注意力下达到接近全注意力的性能，为部署块注意力提供了实用且可扩展的路径。具体指标如分割准确率、与全注意力性能差距等摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过自动分割和块蒸馏方法有效克服了块注意力的两大障碍，实现了高效且性能接近全注意力的块注意力模型。该工作为长上下文场景中的KV缓存重用提供了可行方案，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化分割器或扩展至更多领域。

title: Orchard: An Open-Source Agentic Modeling Framework
abstract: Agentic modeling aims to transform LLMs into autonomous agents capable of solving complex tasks through planning, reasoning, tool use, and multi-turn interaction with environments. Despite major investment, open research remains constrained by infrastructure and training gaps.
