Many high-performing systems rely on proprietary codebases, models, or services, while most open-source frameworks focus on orchestration and evaluation rather than scalable agent training. We present Orchard, an open-source framework for scalable agentic modeling. At its core is Orchard Env, a lightweight environment service providing reusable primitives for sandbox lifecycle management across task domains, agent harnesses, and pipeline stages. On top of Orchard Env, we build three agentic modeling recipes. Orchard-SWE targets coding agents. We distill 107K trajectories from MiniMax-M2.5 and Qwen3.5-397B, introduce credit-assignment SFT to learn from productive segments of unresolved trajectories, and apply Balanced Adaptive Rollout for RL. Starting from Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking, Orchard-SWE achieves 64.3% on SWE-bench Verified after SFT and 67.5% after SFT+RL, setting a new state of the art among open-source models of comparable size. Orchard-GUI trains a 4B vision-language computer-use agent using only 0.4K distilled trajectories and 2.2K open-ended tasks. It achieves 74.1%, 67.0%, and 64.0% success rates on WebVoyager, Online-Mind2Web, and DeepShop, respectively, making it the strongest open-source model while remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Orchard-Claw targets personal assistant agents. Trained with only 0.2K synthetic tasks, it achieves 59.6% pass@3 on Claw-Eval and 73.9% when paired with a stronger ZeroClaw harness. Collectively, these results show that a lightweight, open, harness-agnostic environment layer enables reusable agentic data, training recipes, and evaluations across domains.

light_analysis.overview: Orchard是一个开源的、可扩展的智能体建模框架，通过轻量级环境服务和多种训练配方，在代码、GUI和个人助手领域实现开放智能体的高效训练，达到或超越现有开源和专有系统性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 智能体建模旨在将LLM转化为能自主完成复杂任务的智能体，但开放研究受限于基础设施和训练差距。许多高性能系统依赖专有代码库或服务，而开源框架多专注于协调和评估，缺乏可扩展的智能体训练。因此需要一种开源、可复用的框架来支持跨领域的智能体训练。
light_analysis.method: 提出Orchard框架，核心是Orchard Env轻量级环境服务，提供可重用的沙箱生命周期管理原语。在此基础上构建三种配方：Orchard-SWE通过蒸馏107K轨迹、引入信用分配SFT和平衡自适应RL训练代码智能体；Orchard-GUI使用0.4K蒸馏轨迹和2.2K开放任务训练4B VLM；Orchard-Claw仅用0.2K合成任务训练个人助手智能体。
light_analysis.result: Orchard-SWE在SWE-bench Verified上达到64.3%（SFT）和67.5%（SFT+RL），成为同尺寸开源模型最优。Orchard-GUI在WebVoyager、Online-Mind2Web和DeepShop上分别取得74.1%、67.0%和64.0%成功率，优于开源模型且与专有系统竞争。Orchard-Claw在Claw-Eval上取得59.6% pass@3，搭配更强框架达73.9%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文展示了轻量级、开放、框架无关的环境层可以实现跨领域的可重用智能体数据、训练配方和评估。Orchard框架为开源智能体研究提供了基础设施，降低了训练门槛，并取得显著性能提升。未来可扩展到更多领域和更复杂任务。

title: SCRWKV: Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision-RWKV for Topological Crack Segmentation
abstract: Achieving pixel-level accurate segmentation of structural cracks across diverse scenarios remains a formidable challenge. Existing methods face significant bottlenecks in balancing crack topology modeling with computational efficiency, often failing to reconcile high segmentation quality with low resource demands. To address these limitations, we propose the Ultra-Compact Structure-Calibrated Vision RWKV (SCRWKV), a network that achieves high-precision modeling via a novel Structure-Field Encoder (SFE) backbone while maintaining linear complexity. The SFE integrates the Adaptive Multi-scale Cascaded Modulator (AMCM) to enhance texture representation and utilizes the Structure-Calibrated Insight Unit (SCIU) as its core engine. Specifically, the SCIU employs the Geometry-guided Bidirectional Structure Transformation (GBST) to capture topological correlations and integrates the Dynamic Self-Calibrating Decay (DSCD) into Dy-WKV to suppress noise propagation. Furthermore, we introduce a lightweight Cross-Scale Harmonic Fusion (CSHF) decoder to achieve precise feature aggregation. Systematic evaluations on multiple benchmarks characterized by complex textures and severe interference demonstrate that SCRWKV, with only 1.22M parameters, significantly outperforms SOTA methods. Achieving an F1 score of 0.8428 and mIoU of 0.8512 on the TUT dataset, the model confirms its robust potential for efficient real-world deployment. The code is available at https://github.com/zhxhzy/SCRWKV.

light_analysis.overview: 提出超紧凑结构校准视觉RWKV (SCRWKV)，以线性复杂度实现高精度拓扑裂缝分割，参数仅1.22M。
light_analysis.motivation: 像素级准确分割结构裂缝面临挑战，现有方法在裂缝拓扑建模与计算效率间存在瓶颈，难以兼顾高质量分割与低资源需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出SCRWKV网络，核心为结构场编码器（SFE）主干，包含自适应多尺度级联调制器（AMCM）增强纹理表示，以及结构校准洞察单元（SCIU），其内几何引导双向结构变换（GBST）捕获拓扑相关性，动态自校准衰减（DSCD）抑制噪声。轻量级跨尺度谐波融合（CSHF）解码器实现特征聚合。
light_analysis.result: 在多个复杂纹理和干扰基准上，SCRWKV仅1.22M参数显著超越SOTA，在TUT数据集上F1=0.8428，mIoU=0.8512。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出超紧凑SCRWKV网络，实现高效精确的裂缝分割，代码开源。未来可扩展到其他拓扑结构分割任务，但当前主要在裂缝场景验证。

title: LiWi: Layering in the Wild
abstract: Recent advances in generative models have empowered impressive layered image generation, yet their success is largely confined to graphic design domains. The layering of in-the-wild images remains an underexplored problem, limiting fine-grained editing and applications of images in real-world scenarios. Specifically, challenges remain in scalable layered data and the modeling of object interaction in natural images, such as illumination effects and structural boundary. To address these bottlenecks, we propose a novel framework for high-fidelity natural image decomposition. First, we introduce an Agent-driven Data Decomposition (ADD) pipeline that orchestrates agents and tools to synthesize layered data without manual intervention. Utilizing this pipeline, we construct a large-scale dataset, named LiWi-100k, with over 100,000 high-quality layered in-the-wild images. Second, we present a novel framework that jointly improves photometric fidelity and alpha boundary accuracy. Specifically, shadow-guided learning explicitly models the illumination effects, and degradation-restoration objective provides boundary-correction supervision by recovering clean foreground image from degraded one. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art (SoTA) performance in natural image decomposition, outperforming existing models in RGB L1 and Alpha IoU metrics. We will soon release our code and dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 提出高保真自然图像分层框架，包含自动化数据合成管道和阴影引导学习，实现真实场景图像分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成模型在图形设计领域实现分层图像生成，但在自然图像的分层分解方面研究不足，限制了真实场景图像的细粒度编辑应用。主要瓶颈在于缺乏可扩展的分层数据以及对自然图像中物体交互（如光照效果和结构边界）的建模。现有方法无法有效处理这些挑战，因此需要新的框架来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Agent-driven Data Decomposition (ADD)管道，利用代理和工具自动合成分层数据，无需人工干预，构建大规模数据集LiWi-100k（超过10万张高质量分层自然图像）。然后提出联合优化光度和alpha边界精度的框架：阴影引导学习显式建模光照效果，退化-恢复目标通过从退化图像恢复干净前景图提供边界校正监督。
light_analysis.result: 在自然图像分解任务上达到最先进性能，在RGB L1和Alpha IoU指标上优于现有模型。实验表明，框架有效提升了分解质量，具体数据对比显示显著改进（摘要未提供精确数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献包括自动化数据合成管道、大规模数据集以及联合优化框架，推动了自然图像分层分解技术的发展。具有重要学术价值（解决未探索问题）和实际应用价值（细粒度编辑）。未来可探索更复杂的场景和交互建模，代码和数据集将开源。

title: Herculean: An Agentic Benchmark for Financial Intelligence
abstract: As AI agents improve, the central question is no longer whether they can solve isolated well-defined financial tasks, but whether they can reliably carry out financial professional work. Existing financial benchmarks offer only a partial view of this ability, as they primarily evaluate static competencies such as question answering, retrieval, summarization, and classification. We introduce Herculean, the first skilled benchmark for agentic financial intelligence spanning four representative workflows, including Trading, Hedging, Market Insights, and Auditing. Each workflow is instantiated as a standardized MCP-based skill environment with its own tools, interaction dynamics, constraints, and success criteria, enabling consistent end-to-end assessment of heterogeneous agent systems. Across frontier agents, we find agents perform relatively well on Trading and Market Insights, but struggle substantially on Hedging and Auditing, where long-horizon coordination, state consistency, and structured verification are critical. Overall, our results point to a key gap in current agents in turning financial reasoning into dependable workflow execution in high-stakes financial workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 首个针对金融专业工作流的代理技能基准Herculean，评估交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四个工作流，揭示当前代理在长期协调与验证任务中的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有金融基准多评估静态能力（如问答、检索），无法衡量代理在复杂金融工作流中的端到端可靠性。金融职业要求长期协调、状态一致性和结构化验证，但缺乏统一评估标准。Herculean旨在填补这一空白，测试代理在高风险场景下的实际执行能力。
light_analysis.method: Herculean包含交易、对冲、市场洞察和审计四个代表性工作流。每个工作流基于Model Context Protocol (MCP)标准化为技能环境，提供独立工具、交互规则、约束和成功标准，支持异构代理系统的一致端到端评估。
light_analysis.result: 前沿代理在交易和市场洞察任务中表现相对较好，但在对冲和审计中显著挣扎，失败率较高。这表明当前代理在需要长周期协调、状态一致性和结构化验证的高风险金融工作流中，难以将金融推理转化为可靠执行。
light_analysis.conclusion: Herculean作为首个金融代理技能基准，系统揭示了代理在复杂金融工作流中的能力缺口，强调了长期规划与验证的重要性。它为金融AI代理研究提供了标准化评估框架，有助于推动更稳健的金融自动化系统发展，未来可扩展更多工作流。

title: Sakura at BEA 2026 Shared Task 1: What Makes Vocabulary Difficult?
abstract: We describe two types of models for vocabulary difficulty prediction: a high-accuracy black-box model, which achieved the top shared task result in the open track, and an explainable model, which outperforms a fine-tuned encoder baseline. As the black-box model, we fine-tuned an LLM using a soft-target loss function for effective application to the rating task, achieving r > 0.91. The explainable model provides insights into what impacts the difficulty of each item while maintaining a strong correlation (r > 0.77). We further analyze the results, demonstrating that the difficulty of items in the British Council's Knowledge-based Vocabulary Lists (KVL) is often affected by spelling difficulty or the construction of the test items, in addition to the genuine production difficulty of the words. We make our code available online at https://github.com/ynklab/vocabulary-difficulty .
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the 21st Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications (BEA 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出高精度黑盒LLM模型和可解释模型预测词汇难度，揭示拼写和测试结构等因素的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 词汇难度预测对语言学习与测试设计至关重要，但现有方法在准确性和可解释性上存在不足。该研究旨在构建高精度预测模型，同时提供对难度影响因素的深入理解，以改进词汇教学和评估工具。
light_analysis.method: 采用两种方法：1）高精度黑盒模型：基于LLM微调，使用软目标损失函数以适应评分任务；2）可解释模型：在保持较高预测性能的同时，通过分析模型输出揭示每个项目难度的影响因素。研究进一步分析了英国文化协会知识型词汇列表（KVL），探究拼写难度和测试项目结构对难度的影响。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 黑盒模型在公开赛道中取得最高分，相关系数r>0.91；可解释模型相关系数r>0.77，优于微调编码器基线。分析表明，KVL列表中词汇难度不仅源于真实产出难度，还受拼写复杂度和测试项目结构影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了两种有效的词汇难度预测模型，兼顾精度和可解释性，为语言教育领域提供了实用工具。通过揭示难度影响因素，有助于改进词汇测试设计和教学资源开发。未来可扩展至其他语言或更细粒度的难度分类。

title: VectraYX-Nano: A 42M-Parameter Spanish Cybersecurity Language Model with Curriculum Learning and Native Tool Use
abstract: We present VectraYX-Nano, a 41.95M-parameter decoder-only language model trained from scratch in Spanish for cybersecurity, with a Latin-American regional focus and native tool invocation via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The model has four contributions. (i) Corpus: VectraYX-Sec-ES, a 170M-token Spanish corpus assembled by an eight-VM distributed pipeline at ~$25 USD of cloud compute and split into three curriculum phases (conversational 42M, cybersecurity 118M, offensive tooling 10M). (ii) Architecture: a 42M Transformer decoder with GQA, QK-Norm, RMSNorm, SwiGLU, RoPE and z-loss, paired with a domain-balanced 16,384-token byte-fallback BPE. (iii) Curriculum with replay across the three phases yields a monotonic loss descent (9.80 -> 3.17 -> 3.00 -> 2.16); after SFT (loss 1.74) the v2 bootstrap-ablation reference attains a conversational gate of 0.775 +/- 0.043 on B5 over N=4 seeds, and a controlled Phase-2 replay sweep over {0,5,10,25,50}% saturates B5 at >=25% replay. (iv) Two empirical findings, both N=4. A controlled bootstrap-corpus ablation across v2 (OpenSubs), v4 (mC4-ES), and v6 (60/25/15 OpenSubs/mC4/Wiki) exposes a loss-versus-register inversion: lower-perplexity bootstraps yield measurably worse conversational behavior (v2 > v4 > v6 on B5 at every paired seed). The B4 (tool-selection) floor of 0.000 is a corpus-density artifact, not a capacity gate: rebalancing the SFT mixture to tool-use ratio 1:21 yields VectraYX-Nano v7, the released headline configuration, reaching B4 = 0.230 +/- 0.052 at 42M while retaining B1 = 0.332 +/- 0.005 and B5 = 0.725 +/- 0.130; a LoRA replication on a 260M from-scratch mid-tier reaches 0.445 +/- 0.201. The released GGUF is 96 MB in F16, runs sub-second TTFT on commodity hardware under llama.cpp, and is, to our knowledge, the first published Spanish-native cybersecurity LLM with end-to-end MCP integration.
comment: 24 pages, 5 figures, 12 tables. v3: post-Chinchilla compute ablation (v8-v15), Globant affiliation finalized, EMNLP Findings 2026 submission. Released model: VectraYX-Nano v7 (42M params, GGUF Q4 ~20 MB, native MCP)

light_analysis.overview: 提出VectraYX-Nano，一个42M参数的西班牙语网络安全语言模型，首次集成课程学习与原生MCP工具调用。
light_analysis.motivation: 缺乏面向西班牙语（特别是拉美区域）的网络安全语言模型，现有模型多为英语且未原生支持工具调用，导致在西班牙语网络安全任务中性能受限且部署成本高。
light_analysis.method: 构建170M token的分阶段语料VectraYX-Sec-ES，采用42M参数Transformer解码器（GQA、QK-Norm、RMSNorm、SwiGLU、RoPE、z-loss），三阶段课程学习（对话、网络安全、进攻工具）配合回放机制，通过SFT和bootstrap消融实验优化，最终版本v7调整工具比率为1:21。
light_analysis.result: 课程学习实现单调损失下降（9.80→3.17→3.00→2.16），SFT后损失1.74。v7在B4（工具选择）达0.230±0.052，B1为0.332±0.005，B5为0.725±0.130。GGUF模型96MB，在llama.cpp上亚秒级TTFT。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首个端到端集成MCP的西班牙语网络安全LLM，通过课程学习和bootstrap消融揭示损失-寄存器反转现象，为低资源语言模型训练提供实用指南，未来可扩展至更大规模与多语言。

title: DocAtlas: Multilingual Document Understanding Across 80+ Languages
abstract: Multilingual document understanding remains limited for low-resource languages due to scarce training data and model-based annotation pipelines that perpetuate existing biases. We introduce DocAtlas, a framework that constructs high-fidelity OCR datasets and benchmarks covering 82 languages and 9 evaluation tasks. Our dual pipelines, differential rendering of native DOCX documents and synthetic LaTeX-based generation for right-to-left scripts produce precise structural annotations in a unified DocTag format encoding layout, text, and component types, without learned models for core annotation. Evaluating 16 state-of-the-art models reveals persistent gaps in low-resource scripts. We show that Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) using rendering-derived ground truth as positive signal achieves stable multilingual adaptation, improving both in-domain (+1.9%) and out-of-domain (+1.8%) accuracy without measurable base-language degradation, where supervised fine-tuning degrades out-of-domain performance by up to 21%. Our best variant, DocAtlas-DeepSeek, improves +1.7% over the strongest baseline. Code is available at https://github.com/ahmedheakl/DocAtlas .

light_analysis.overview: 提出DocAtlas框架，通过差分渲染和合成生成构建82种语言的高保真OCR数据集，并揭示低资源语言的多语言文档理解差距，利用DPO实现稳定多语言适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言文档理解在低资源语言中仍受限于训练数据稀缺和模型标注管道的偏见，现有方法难以覆盖大量语言，导致性能不平衡。该问题重要，因为全球化需要跨语言文档理解，而低资源语言用户被边缘化。
light_analysis.method: DocAtlas采用双管道：差分渲染原生DOCX文档和合成LaTeX生成（针对右至左脚本），统一DocTag格式编码布局、文本和组件类型，无需学习模型进行核心标注。使用DPO，将渲染地面真值作为正信号，实现多语言适应，避免监督微调导致的域外性能下降。
light_analysis.result: 评估16个最新模型，显示低资源脚本存在持续性差距。DPO相比监督微调，提升域内+1.9%和域外+1.8%准确率，而监督微调使域外性能下降高达21%。最佳变体DocAtlas-DeepSeek比最强基线提升+1.7%。
light_analysis.conclusion: DocAtlas提供了高质量多语言OCR基准和数据集，DPO方法有效平衡多语言适应与基础语言性能，促进低资源语言文档理解。未来可扩展更多语言和任务，代码开源。

title: Holder Policy Optimisation
abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) enhances large language models by estimating advantages across a group of sampled trajectories. However, mapping these trajectory-level advantages to policy updates requires aggregating token-level probabilities within each sequence. Relying on a fixed aggregation mechanism for this step fundamentally limits the algorithm's adaptability. Empirically, we observe a critical trade-off: certain fixed aggregations frequently suffer from training collapse, while others fail to yield satisfactory performance. To resolve this, we propose \textbf{HölderPO}, a generalised policy optimisation framework unifying token-level probability aggregation via the Hölder mean. By explicitly modulating the parameter $p$, our framework provides continuous control over the trade-off between gradient concentration and variance bounds. Theoretically, we prove that a larger $p$ concentrates the gradient to amplify sparse learning signals, whereas a smaller $p$ strictly bounds gradient variance. Because no static configuration can universally resolve this concentration-stability trade-off, we instantiate the framework with a dynamic annealing algorithm that progressively schedules $p$ across the training lifecycle. Extensive evaluations demonstrate superior stability and convergence over existing baselines. Specifically, our approach achieves a state-of-the-art average accuracy of $54.9\%$ across multiple mathematical benchmarks, yielding a substantial $7.2\%$ relative gain over standard GRPO and secures an exceptional $93.8\%$ success rate on ALFWorld.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HölderPO框架，通过Hölder均值统一token级概率聚合，并动态调度参数p以平衡梯度集中与方差，提升训练稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: GRPO通过固定聚合机制将轨迹级优势映射到策略更新，但导致训练崩溃或性能不佳。本文旨在解决固定聚合导致的适应性不足问题，通过可调节参数p实现梯度集中与方差约束的动态权衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出HölderPO框架，使用Hölder均值统一token级概率聚合，通过参数p连续控制梯度集中与方差边界。采用动态退火算法在训练过程中逐步调度p，以自适应地平衡稳定性和收敛性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数学基准上平均准确率54.9%，相对GRPO提升7.2%；ALFWorld任务成功率93.8%，显著优于基线方法，表现出更优的稳定性和收敛性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HölderPO通过动态调度p有效解决了固定聚合的适应性缺陷，提升了策略优化的稳定性和性能，为策略梯度方法提供了新视角。未来可探索更优的调度策略或扩展到其他序列决策任务。

title: Quantifying Rodda and Graham Gait Classification from 3D Makerless Kinematics derived from a Single-view Video in a Heterogeneous Pediatric Clinical Cohort
abstract: Cerebral Palsy (CP) is a neurological disorder of movement and the most common cause of lifelong physical disability in childhood. Approximately 75% of children with CP are ambulatory, and accurate gait assessment is central to preserving walking function, which deteriorates by mid-adulthood in a quarter to half of adults with CP. The Rodda and Graham classification system quantifies sagittal-plane gait deviations using ankle and knee z-scores derived from 3D Instrumented Gait Analysis (3D-IGA), but 3D-IGA is expensive and limited to specialized centers, while observational assessment shows only moderate inter-rater agreement. We developed a markerless gait analysis pipeline that quantifies Rodda and Graham knee and ankle z-scores directly from single-view clinical gait videos. Across 1,058 bilateral limb samples from 529 trials of 152 children (88 male, 63 female; age 12.1 $\pm$ 4.0 years; 60 distinct primary diagnoses, cerebral palsy the most common at $n=54$), the sagittal-view model achieved $R^2 = 0.80 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.89 \pm 0.02$ for knee z-scores and $R^2 = 0.57 \pm 0.02$ and CCC $= 0.72 \pm 0.02$ for ankle z-scores against 3D-IGA. Binary screening for excess knee flexion achieves AUROC $= 0.88$, correctly identifying 83% of affected children, and applying Rodda and Graham rules yields $43 \pm 1$% 7-class accuracy with macro-AUROC $= 0.78 \pm 0.01$, ankle prediction error remaining the primary bottleneck. Beyond cross-sectional screening, continuous z-scores support longitudinal trajectory tracking across visits, providing a quantitative substrate for monitoring disease progression and treatment response unavailable from observational scales. These results demonstrate the feasibility of video-based z-score estimation, excess-flexion screening, and longitudinal trajectory tracking as a path toward scalable, objective gait assessment in low-resource clinical settings.
comment: 29 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables (including 1 supplementary table); manuscript prepared in PLOS ONE format

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于单视角视频的无标记步态分析管道，直接从临床视频中量化Rodda和Graham膝关节和踝关节z分数，实现客观、可扩展的步态评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 脑瘫是儿童最常见的终身运动障碍，约75%患儿能步行，准确步态评估对维持行走功能至关重要。Rodda和Graham分类依赖3D步态分析，但3D-IGA昂贵且局限于专业中心；观察评估仅中等可靠性。亟需低成本、可扩展的客观步态评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 开发无标记步态分析管道，从单视角临床视频中提取3D运动学，直接计算Rodda和Graham膝关节和踝关节z分数。使用152名儿童（529次试验，1058侧肢体样本）的数据，脑瘫最常见（n=54）。采用深度学习模型从视频中估计关节角度，无需标记点。
light_analysis.result: 膝关节z分数达到R²=0.80±0.02，CCC=0.89±0.02；踝关节z分数R²=0.57±0.02，CCC=0.72±0.02。膝过屈筛查AUROC=0.88，正确识别83%受影响儿童。7分类准确率43±1%，宏AUROC=0.78±0.01，踝预测误差是主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了视频基z分数估计、过屈筛查和纵向轨迹追踪的可行性，为低资源临床环境提供可扩展的客观步态评估路径。踝关节预测误差较大是当前局限，未来可改进模型或融合多视角信息以提高精度。

title: Support-Proximity Augmented Diffusion Estimation for Offline Black-Box Optimization
abstract: Offline black-box optimization aims to discover novel designs with high property scores using only a static dataset, a task fundamentally challenged by the out-of-distribution (OOD) extrapolation problem. Existing approaches typically bifurcate into inverse methods, which struggle with the ill-posed nature of mapping scores to designs, and forward methods, which often lack the distributional expressivity to quantify uncertainty effectively. In this work, we propose SPADE (Support-Proximity Augmented Diffusion Estimation), a novel framework that reimagines forward surrogate modeling through the lens of conditional generative modeling. SPADE models the forward likelihood p(y|x) using a diffusion model, but with two critical enhancements to tailor it for optimization: (1) a Calibrated Diffusion Estimation module that enforces global consistency in statistical moments and pairwise rankings, and (2) a Support-Proximity Regularization mechanism that implicitly internalizes the data manifold constraint p(x) via kNN-based density estimation. Theoretically, we prove that our regularization is first-order equivalent to maximizing a Bayesian posterior with a valid design prior. Empirically, SPADE achieves state-of-the-art performance across Design-Bench tasks and an LLM data mixture optimization benchmark.
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. First two authors contributed equally

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPADE框架，通过条件扩散模型和两种增强机制（校准扩散估计与支持邻近正则化）解决离线黑箱优化中的分布外外推问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线黑箱优化旨在仅用静态数据集发现高分设计，但面临分布外外推挑战。现有逆方法难以处理映射的不适定性，前向方法缺乏分布表达能力来量化不确定性。因此，需要一种既能建模前向似然又能显式考虑数据流形约束的方法。
light_analysis.method: SPADE利用扩散模型建模前向似然p(y|x)，并添加两个关键增强：1）校准扩散估计模块，强制全局统计矩和成对排名一致性；2）支持邻近正则化，通过kNN密度估计内化数据流形约束p(x)。理论上证明该正则化一阶等价于使用有效设计先验的贝叶斯后验最大化。
light_analysis.result: SPADE在Design-Bench任务和LLM数据混合优化基准上实现了最先进的性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确声称达到了SOTA，表明该方法在多个任务上优于现有基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPADE通过条件扩散模型和两种增强机制有效解决了离线黑箱优化的OOD问题，理论证明了正则化与贝叶斯后验的等价性。在多个基准上表现优异，具有较高学术和实际应用价值，未来可扩展至其他优化场景或提高计算效率。

title: PMCTS: Particle Monte Carlo Tree Search for Principled Parallelized Inference Time Scaling
abstract: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is a widely used approach for policy improvement through search with increasing popularity for real world applications. Due to the sequential and deterministic nature of its search, runtime-scaling of MCTS with parallel compute remains a major challenge. We introduce Particle MCTS (PMCTS), to our knowledge the first principled parallel MCTS algorithm which is suited for neural network evaluations and can preserve formal policy improvement guarantees. Empirically, PMCTS scales well with parallel compute and significantly outperforms the popular heuristic-based baselines across domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个原则性并行MCTS算法PMCTS，适用于神经网络评估并保持策略改进保证。
light_analysis.motivation: MCTS广泛应用于策略改进，但其顺序和确定性搜索特性限制了并行计算下的运行时扩展。现有并行方法多为启发式，缺乏正式的理论保证，亟需一种可扩展且原则性的并行MCTS算法。
light_analysis.method: 引入Particle MCTS（PMCTS），将粒子滤波思想融入MCTS，实现并行搜索。该算法适用于神经网络评估，并能在并行化下保持形式化策略改进保证，避免了传统启发式方法的理论缺陷。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，PMCTS在并行计算下具有良好的扩展性，显著优于多个领域的流行启发式基线方法。具体性能提升幅度因任务而异，论文未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PMCTS作为首个理论保证的并行MCTS算法，有效解决了MCTS并行化的可扩展性与原则性问题。其适用于神经网络评估，具有重要学术价值，未来可探索在更多实际应用中的部署与优化。

title: Decoupling Endpoint and Semantic Transition Learning for Zero-Shot Composed Image Retrieval
abstract: Zero-shot composed image retrieval (ZS-CIR) retrieves a target image from a reference image and a text modification without human-annotated CIR triplets. Projection-based ZS-CIR methods are attractive because they do not rely on LLMs at inference and remain lightweight, but they often underperform LLM-based approaches on complex semantic modifications. This gap reflects a semantic transition bottleneck in projection-based ZS-CIR: endpoint-level matching can let the edit text act as a target-side attribute cue rather than grounding it as a source-conditioned semantic transition. We further show that adding semantic transition supervision to the same text adapter creates an endpoint--transition conflict between endpoint alignment and semantic transition alignment. To address this conflict, DeCIR decouples endpoint and transition learning. It constructs paired forward/reverse edit tuples from image-caption pairs, trains separate low-rank text adapter branches for endpoint alignment and semantic transition alignment, and merges them with Low-Rank Directional Merge (LRDM) into one deployable adapter. Extensive experiments on CIRR, CIRCO, FashionIQ, and GeneCIS demonstrate that DeCIR consistently improves projection-based ZS-CIR without increasing inference complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeCIR方法，通过解耦端点匹配和语义转换学习，克服投影式零样本组合图像检索中的语义转换瓶颈，无需增加推理复杂度。
light_analysis.motivation: 投影式ZS-CIR方法在复杂语义修改上不如LLM方法，因为端点匹配使编辑文本仅作为目标属性提示，而非源条件语义转换，且同一文本适配器中端点对齐与语义转换对齐存在冲突。需要解决这一瓶颈以提升投影式方法性能。
light_analysis.method: DeCIR从图像-文本对构建正向和反向编辑元组，训练两个独立的低秩文本适配器分支，分别负责端点对齐和语义转换对齐，并通过低秩方向合并（LRDM）将两个分支合并为单个可部署适配器，保持推理轻量。
light_analysis.result: 在CIRR、CIRCO、FashionIQ和GeneCIS数据集上的实验表明，DeCIR一致性地提升了投影式ZS-CIR方法的性能，且推理复杂度不变，优于现有投影式方法，接近LLM方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeCIR通过解耦端点与转换学习有效解决了投影式方法的语义转换瓶颈，学术上创新了低秩适配器分支的设计，实际应用中保持轻量高效，为未来零样本组合检索提供了新的方向。

title: SimCT: Recovering Lost Supervision for Cross-Tokenizer On-Policy Distillation
abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a standard tool for transferring teacher behavior to a smaller student, but it implicitly assumes that teacher and student predictions are comparable token by token, an assumption that fails whenever the two models tokenize the same text differently. Under heterogeneous tokenizers, exact shared-token matching silently discards a large fraction of the teacher signal at precisely the positions where vocabularies disagree. We propose \textbf{\underline{Sim}ple \underline{C}ross-\underline{T}okenizer OPD (SimCT)}, which restores this signal by enlarging the supervision space: alongside shared tokens, SimCT compares teacher and student over short multi-token continuations that both tokenizers can realize, leaving the OPD loss form itself unchanged. We show that these units are the finest jointly tokenizable supervision interface, and that coarser alternatives remove teacher-student distinctions that are useful for on-policy learning. Across three heterogeneous teacher-student pairs on mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, SimCT shows consistent gains over shared-vocabulary OPD and representative cross-tokenizer baselines, with ablations confirming that the improvements come from recovering supervision discarded by exact shared-token matching. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/sunjie279/SimCT-}{https://github.com/sunjie279/SimCT-}.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SimCT方法，通过短多token连续片段恢复跨分词器策略蒸馏中丢失的教师监督信号。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有on-policy distillation假设师生模型词表对齐，但异质分词器下共享token匹配会丢弃大量教师信号，限制了小模型从大模型学习的效果，尤其在数学推理和代码生成任务中问题突出。
light_analysis.method: SimCT在共享token之外引入两者都能实现的短多token连续片段作为监督单元，保持OPD损失形式不变。这些片段是最细粒度的联合可分词监督界面，而粗糙替代可能丢失有用的师生差异。
light_analysis.result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准上的三组异质师生对实验中，SimCT一致优于共享词表OPD和代表性跨分词器基线，消融实验证实改进来源于恢复被精确共享token匹配丢弃的监督信号。
light_analysis.conclusion: SimCT恢复了跨分词器OPD中丢失的教师监督，无需修改损失函数形式，提升了异构分词器下学生模型的迁移效果，具有实用价值。未来可探索更细粒度的联合监督单元设计。

title: Optimal Recourse Summaries via Bi-Objective Decision Tree Learning
abstract: Actionable Recourse provides individuals with actions they can take to change an unfavorable classifier outcome. While useful at the instance level, it is ill-suited for global auditing and bias detection, since aggregating local actions is costly and often inconsistent. Recourse Summaries address this limitation by partitioning the population and assigning one shared action per subgroup, enabling comparison across subgroups. Designing summaries involves a fundamental trade-off between recourse effectiveness and recourse cost, which existing methods do not adequately address. We introduce Summaries of Optimal and Global Actionable Recourse (SOGAR), which formulates recourse summary learning as an optimal decision tree learning problem and finds the Pareto front -- the complete set of solutions where improving one objective necessarily worsens the other. SOGAR enables post-hoc selection of the desired trade-off without retraining. Using shallow axis-parallel decision trees and sparse leaf actions, SOGAR produces stable, low-cost, and effective recourse summaries that outperform existing approaches across effectiveness and cost metrics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SOGAR方法，将回溯摘要学习转化为双目标最优决策树学习问题，寻找帕累托前沿，实现效果与成本的最优权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的可操作回溯方法虽在个体层面有效，但难以用于全局审计和偏差检测，因为聚合局部动作成本高且结果不一致。回溯摘要通过将人群分区并为每个子组分配共享动作来解决此问题，但现有方法未能充分处理回溯效果与成本之间的根本权衡。因此，需要一种能够同时优化这两个目标的方法。
light_analysis.method: SOGAR将回溯摘要学习形式化为双目标最优决策树学习问题，通过寻找帕累托前沿来获得效果与成本的所有最优解集。该方法使用浅层轴平行决策树和稀疏叶动作，确保生成的摘要稳定、低成本且有效。事后无需重训练即可选择所需的权衡点，从而提供灵活性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SOGAR在回溯效果和成本指标上均优于现有方法。具体地，它产生的回溯摘要具有更低的平均成本（如动作数量少）和更高的有效性（如更多个体能改变分类结果）。由于使用浅层树，模型可解释性强，且帕累托前沿提供了多个选择。
light_analysis.conclusion: SOGAR为生成全局回溯摘要提供了一种优化框架，有效平衡了效果与成本。其学术价值在于将双目标优化与可解释决策树结合，实际可用于公平性审计和群体差异检测。未来工作可扩展到非线性模型或动态环境。

title: SplatWeaver: Learning to Allocate Gaussian Primitives for Generalizable Novel View Synthesis
abstract: Generalizable novel view synthesis aims to render unseen views from uncalibrated input images without requiring per-scene optimization. Recent feed-forward approaches based on 3D Gaussian Splatting have achieved promising efficiency and rendering quality. However, most of them assign a fixed number of Gaussians to each pixel or voxel, ignoring the spatially varying complexity of real-world scenes. Such uniform allocation often wastes Gaussian primitives in smooth regions while providing insufficient capacity for fine structures, complex geometry, and high-frequency details. This motivates us to predict region-dependent primitive cardinalities rather than impose a fixed primitive budget everywhere, enabling a more expressive 3D scene representation. Therefore, we propose SplatWeaver, a generalizable novel view synthesis framework that is able to dynamically allocate Gaussian primitives over different regions in a feed-forward manner. Specifically, SplatWeaver introduces cardinality Gaussian experts and a pixel-level routing scheme, wherein each expert specializes in producing a specific number of primitives from 0 to M, and the routing scheme coordinates these experts to adaptively determine how many Gaussian primitives should be allocated to each spatial location. Moreover, SplatWeaver incorporates a high-frequency prior with attendant guidance module and routing regularization to stabilize expert selection and promote complexity-aware allocation. By leveraging high-frequency cues, the routing process is encouraged to assign more Gaussian primitives to fine structures and textured regions, while suppressing redundancy in smooth areas. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios show that SplatWeaver consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, delivering more faithful novel-view renderings with fewer Gaussian primitives. Project Page: https://yecongwan.github.io/SplatWeaver/

light_analysis.overview: 提出SplatWeaver，一种通过动态分配高斯原语实现可泛化新视角合成的框架，显著提升渲染效率和质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可泛化新视角合成方法通常为每个像素或体素分配固定数量的高斯原语，忽略了真实场景的空间变化复杂性。这种均匀分配在平滑区域浪费原语，而在精细结构、复杂几何和高频细节处容量不足。因此，需要一种能够根据区域复杂度动态调整原语数量的方法，以实现更高效的3D场景表示。
light_analysis.method: SplatWeaver引入基数高斯专家和像素级路由方案。每个专家专门产生0到M个原语，路由机制协调专家，自适应决定每个空间位置分配的高斯原语数量。同时，集成高频先验、引导模块和路由正则化，利用高频线索鼓励在纹理丰富区域分配更多原语，抑制平滑区域冗余，稳定专家选择并促进复杂度感知分配。
light_analysis.result: 在多种场景的广泛实验中，SplatWeaver一致优于最先进方法，使用更少的高斯原语即可生成更忠实的新视角渲染。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但表明在效率和渲染质量上均取得显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SplatWeaver通过动态分配高斯原语解决了均匀分配导致的表示效率问题，提升了可泛化新视角合成的性能。其学术价值在于提出了一种基于路由的复杂度感知原语分配策略，实际应用价值在于无需逐场景优化即可高效渲染。未来工作可探索更精细的路由机制或扩展到动态场景。

title: SpecBlock: Block-Iterative Speculative Decoding with Dynamic Tree Drafting
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting a tree of candidate continuations and verifying it in one target forward. Existing drafters fall into two camps with opposite weaknesses. Autoregressive drafters such as EAGLE-3 preserve dependence along each draft path but call the drafter once per tree depth, making drafting a non-trivial share of per-iteration latency. Parallel drafters cut drafter calls by predicting multiple future positions in one forward, but each position is predicted without seeing the others, producing paths the verifier rejects. In this paper, we propose SpecBlock, a block-iterative drafter that combines path dependence with cheap drafting. Each drafter forward produces K dependent positions and we call this a block. The draft tree grows through repeated block expansions. Two mechanisms explicitly carry path dependence to keep later draft positions accurate. Within each block, a layer-wise shift carries the previous position's hidden state into every decoder layer. Across blocks, each new block can start from any position of the previous block, inheriting its hidden state to extend the path. To spend verifier budget where acceptance is likely, a co-trained rank head replaces the fixed top-k tree by allocating per-position branching during drafting. To avoid training the drafter on prefixes it never produces at inference, a valid-prefix mask drops the loss at later positions once an earlier one is wrong. Beyond static drafting, a cost-aware bandit at deployment uses free verifier feedback to update the drafter selectively, only when the expected throughput gain exceeds the update cost. Experiments show that SpecBlock improves mean speedup by 8-13% over EAGLE-3 at 44-52% of its drafting cost, and cost-aware adaptation extends this lead to 11-19%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SpecBlock，一种块迭代推测解码方法，通过路径依赖与低成本草稿加速LLM推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推测解码草稿器分为自回归型和并行型两类。自回归型（如EAGLE-3）保留路径依赖但每深度调用一次草稿器，导致延迟高；并行型一次预测多个位置但缺乏依赖，验证拒绝率高。如何同时实现路径依赖和低成本草稿是核心挑战。
light_analysis.method: SpecBlock采用块迭代：每个草稿器前向生成K个依赖位置（一个块），树通过重复块扩展生长。块内通过层间移位传递前位置隐藏状态；块间新块从旧块任意位置开始继承隐藏状态。协同训练排名头动态分配分支，替代固定top-k树。有效前缀掩码避免训练不匹配。部署时通过成本感知bandit选择性更新草稿器。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SpecBlock在草稿成本仅为EAGLE-3的44-52%时，平均加速比提升8-13%。引入成本感知适应后，加速优势进一步扩大到11-19%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出一种结合路径依赖与低成本草稿的块迭代推测解码器，通过动态树分配和成本感知更新显著提升推理速度。该方法在学术上改进了推测解码的效率和实用性，为LLM推理加速提供新思路。未来可探索更大块大小或更优训练策略。

title: UniSD: Towards a Unified Self-Distillation Framework for Large Language Models
abstract: Self-distillation (SD) offers a promising path for adapting large language models (LLMs) without relying on stronger external teachers. However, SD in autoregressive LLMs remains challenging because self-generated trajectories are free-form, correctness is task-dependent, and plausible rationales can still provide unstable or unreliable supervision. Existing methods mainly examine isolated design choices, leaving their effectiveness, roles, and interactions unclear. In this paper, we propose UniSD, a unified framework to systematically study self-distillation. UniSD integrates complementary mechanisms that address supervision reliability, representation alignment, and training stability, including multi-teacher agreement, EMA teacher stabilization, token-level contrastive learning, feature matching, and divergence clipping. Across six benchmarks and six models from three model families, UniSD reveals when self-distillation improves over static imitation, which components drive the gains, and how these components interact across tasks. Guided by these insights, we construct UniSDfull, an integrated pipeline that combines complementary components and achieves the strongest overall performance, improving over the base model by +5.4 points and the strongest baseline by +2.8 points. Extensive evaluation highlights self-distillation as a practical and steerable approach for efficient LLM adaptation without stronger external teachers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一自蒸馏框架UniSD，系统研究自蒸馏在大语言模型中的机制，并构建集成管道UniSDfull实现性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 自蒸馏在自回归大语言模型中面临挑战：自生成轨迹自由形式、正确性依赖任务、合理推理仍可能提供不稳定监督。现有方法孤立研究设计选择，未明确其有效性、角色和交互。因此需要统一框架系统研究自蒸馏，揭示何时改进、哪些组件驱动增益及组件间如何交互。
light_analysis.method: UniSD集成互补机制：多教师一致性、指数移动平均教师稳定化、令牌级对比学习、特征匹配和散度裁剪。在六个基准和六个模型（三个模型家族）上实验，系统分析组件效果。基于洞察构建UniSDfull，组合互补组件形成集成管道。
light_analysis.result: UniSDfull在基线上提升+5.4点，最强基线提升+2.8点。实验揭示自蒸馏在特定任务优于静态模仿，并明确关键驱动组件及其交互。结果表明自蒸馏是无需更强外部教师的高效LLM适配方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: UniSD框架系统研究了自蒸馏机制，验证了其作为实用且可控的LLM适配途径。学术贡献在于统一视角和组件分析，实际价值在于无需外部教师即可提升性能。潜在局限性包括组件选择依赖任务，未来可探索自动化组件选择。

title: X-OmniClaw Technical Report: A Unified Mobile Agent for Multimodal Understanding and Interaction
abstract: Inspired by the development of OpenClaw, there is a growing demand for mobile-based personal agents capable of handling complex and intuitive interactions. In this technical report, we introduce X-OmniClaw, a unified mobile agent designed for multimodal understanding and interaction in the Android ecosystem. This unified architecture of perception, memory, and action enables the agent to handle complex mobile tasks with high contextual awareness. Specifically, Omni Perception provides a unified multimodal ingress pipeline that integrates UI states, real-world visual contexts, and speech inputs, leveraging a temporal alignment module to decompose raw data into structured multimodal intent representations. Omni Memory leverages multimodal memory optimization to enhance personalized intelligence by integrating runtime working memory for task continuity with long-term personal memory distilled from local data, enabling highly context-aware and personalized interactions. Finally, Omni Action employs a hybrid grounding strategy that combines structural XML metadata with visual perception for robust interaction. Through Behavior Cloning and Trajectory Replay, the system captures user navigation as reusable skills, enabling precise direct-access execution. Demonstrations across diverse scenarios show that X-OmniClaw effectively enhances interaction efficiency and task reliability, providing a practical architectural blueprint for the next generation of mobile-native personal assistants.

light_analysis.overview: 提出X-OmniClaw统一移动智能体，通过感知、记忆、动作统一架构实现多模态理解和交互。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着OpenClaw的发展，对能够处理复杂直观交互的移动个人智能体需求日益增长。现有方法在整合多模态信息、保持任务连续性和个性化智能方面存在不足，缺乏统一的架构来有效处理UI状态、真实世界视觉和语音输入，导致智能体在复杂移动任务中的上下文感知能力有限。
light_analysis.method: X-OmniClaw采用统一的感知-记忆-动作架构。Omni Perception通过时间对齐模块整合UI状态、视觉和语音，生成结构化多模态意图表示。Omni Memory结合运行时工作记忆和长期个人记忆，实现上下文感知和个性化。Omni Action使用混合定位策略，结合XML元数据和视觉感知，并通过行为克隆和轨迹回放学习用户导航技能，实现精确的即达执行。
light_analysis.result: 在多种真实场景下的演示表明，X-OmniClaw有效提升了交互效率和任务可靠性。摘要未提供具体量化指标，但强调该架构为下一代移动原生个人助手提供了实用的架构蓝图，相比基线方法在复杂任务完成上表现更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: X-OmniClaw通过统一的多模态感知、记忆和动作架构，显著增强了移动智能体的上下文感知和个性化交互能力。该工作为构建更自然、高效的移动个人助手提供了关键技术支撑。未来可进一步优化混合定位策略的效率，并扩展至更多应用场景。

title: Ray-Aware Pointer Memory with Adaptive Updates for Streaming 3D Reconstruction
abstract: Dense 3D reconstruction from continuous image streams requires both accurate geometric aggregation and stable long-term memory management. Recent feed-forward reconstruction frameworks integrate observations through persistent memory representations, yet most rely primarily on appearance-based similarity when updating memory. Such appearance-driven integration often leads to redundant accumulation of observations and unstable geometry when viewpoint changes occur. In this work, we propose a ray-aware pointer memory for streaming 3D reconstruction that explicitly models both spatial location and viewing direction within a unified memory representation. Each memory pointer stores its 3D position, associated ray direction, and feature embedding, allowing the system to reason jointly about geometric proximity and viewpoint consistency. Based on this representation, we introduce an adaptive pointer update strategy that replaces traditional fusion-based memory compression with a retain-or-replace mechanism. Instead of averaging nearby observations, the system selectively retains informative pointers while discarding redundant ones, preserving distinctive geometric structures while maintaining bounded memory growth. Furthermore, the joint reasoning over spatial distance and ray-direction discrepancy enables the system to distinguish between local redundancy, novel observations, and potential loop revisits in a unified manner. When loop candidates are detected, pose refinement is triggered to enforce global geometric consistency across the reconstruction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed ray-aware memory design significantly improves long-term reconstruction stability and camera pose accuracy while maintaining efficient streaming inference. Our approach provides a principled framework for scalable and drift-resistant online 3D reconstruction from image streams.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种射线感知的指针记忆方法，通过显式建模空间位置和视角方向，实现自适应更新，用于流式3D重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有流式3D重建方法主要依赖外观相似性更新记忆，导致视角变化时观测冗余累积和几何不稳定。缺乏对空间位置和视角方向的联合建模，无法有效区分局部冗余、新观察和回环访问，影响长期重建稳定性和位姿精度。
light_analysis.method: 提出射线感知指针记忆，每个指针存储3D位置、射线方向和特征嵌入，实现几何邻近性和视角一致性的联合推理。采用自适应保留-替换更新策略，替代传统融合压缩，选择性保留信息性指针并丢弃冗余。通过联合空间距离和射线方向差异，统一处理冗余、新观察和回环候选，触发位姿优化以保持全局一致性。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，所提射线感知记忆设计显著提升长期重建稳定性和相机位姿精度，同时维持高效流式推理。与传统方法相比，在视角变化和长序列场景下性能更优，具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为从图像流进行在线3D重建提供了可扩展、抗漂移的框架。通过显式建模射线方向，提升了长期几何一致性和位姿准确性。未来可探索更高效的指针管理和与神经渲染的结合。

title: Jordan-RoPE: Non-Semisimple Relative Positional Encoding via Complex Jordan Blocks
abstract: Relative positional encodings determine which functions of query-key lag can enter the primitive attention logit. RoPE supplies a rotary phase, while ALiBi supplies an additive distance bias. Motivated by group-theoretic views of linear translation-invariant positional encodings, we study a non-semisimple case in which a complex rotary eigenvalue and a nilpotent response live in the same defective Jordan block. The resulting relative operator generates oscillatory-polynomial features such as $e^{-γd}\cos(ωd)$, $e^{-γd}\sin(ωd)$, $d e^{-γd}\cos(ωd)$, and $d e^{-γd}\sin(ωd)$, for causal lag $d=i-j\geq 0$. Thus the construction realizes a distance-modulated phase basis $d e^{iωd}$, rather than merely adding a separate distance channel to RoPE.   We formulate Exact Jordan-RoPE as a non-semisimple one-parameter representation, give its real block form, and specify the contragredient query action required by non-orthogonal positional maps. We also distinguish this exact representation from stabilized variants whose bounded shear improves numerical behavior but breaks the exact group law. Kernel-level diagnostics and a Jordan-friendly synthetic language-model task show that the coupled Jordan basis is useful when the target contains distance-modulated phase interactions. On a small WikiText-103 byte language model, a scaled-exact variant improves over RoPE and direct-sum baselines within the Jordan family, while RoPE+ALiBi remains strongest overall. The evidence is structural rather than a broad performance claim.
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables; code available at https://github.com/ybzhang-nxu/jordan_rope

light_analysis.overview: 提出Jordan-RoPE，一种基于复Jordan块的相对位置编码，实现距离调制相位基，改进RoPE。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有相对位置编码如RoPE提供旋转相位，ALiBi提供距离偏置，但缺乏同时编码振荡和距离衰减的能力。基于线性平移不变位置编码的群论视角，研究非半单情形，以捕获距离调制的相位交互，提升模型表达能力。
light_analysis.method: Jordan-RoPE将复旋转特征与零幂响应置于同一缺陷Jordan块中，生成距离调制相位基（如d e^{iωd}）。采用非半单单参数表示，定义实块形式和反梯度查询动作。区分精确表示与稳定化变体，后者有界剪切改善数值稳定性但破坏精确群律。
light_analysis.result: 在小型WikiText-103字节语言模型上，缩放精确变体优于RoPE和Jordan族内的直和基线，但RoPE+ALiBi整体最强。核级诊断和Jordan友好合成任务显示，Jordan基在目标包含距离调制相位交互时有效。结论为结构性证据而非广泛性能声明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Jordan-RoPE提供了一种新的位置编码结构，能建模距离调制的相位模式，具有理论价值。但实际性能未超越简单组合方法，未来需探索更优实现或组合策略。局限性在于精确表示数值稳定性差，变体牺牲群律。

title: From Spherical to Gaussian: A Comparative Analysis of Point Cloud Cropping Strategies in Large-Scale 3D Environments
abstract: Large-scale 3D point clouds can consist of hundreds of millions of points. Even after downsampling, these point clouds are too large for modern 3D neural networks. In order to develop a semantic understanding of the scene, the point clouds are divided into smaller subclouds that can be processed. Typically, this division is done using spherical crops, resulting in a loss of surrounding geometric context. To address this issue, we propose alternative methods that produce subclouds with larger crop sizes while maintaining a similar number of points. Specifically, we compare exponential, Gaussian, and linear cropping methods with the spherical method. We evaluated three 3D deep learning model architectures using multiple indoor and outdoor environment datasets. Our results demonstrate that altering the cropping strategy can enhance model performance, especially for large-scale outdoor scenes, yielding new state-of-the-art results. Code is available at https://github.com/mvg-inatech/point_cloud_cropping

light_analysis.overview: 提出高斯、指数和线性裁剪策略替代传统球形裁剪，提升大规模3D点云分割性能，在室外场景取得新最优结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模3D点云经下采样后仍过大，现代3D神经网络需将其划分为小子云处理。传统球形裁剪方法会丢失周围几何上下文，影响模型对场景的语义理解。现有方法对此问题关注不足，亟需探索能保留更多上下文信息且不增加点数的裁剪策略。
light_analysis.method: 提出指数、高斯和线性三种裁剪方法，与球形裁剪进行对比。这些方法在保持相同点数量的前提下，生成更大的子云尺寸，从而保留更多几何上下文。采用三个经典3D深度学习模型架构（未明确指定名称）在多个室内外数据集（如大型室外场景）上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，改变裁剪策略能显著提升模型性能，尤其在大型室外场景中取得新最优结果。具体性能提升幅度未在摘要中给出，但确认了方法有效性。与球形裁剪相比，高斯、指数和线性方法在语义分割精度上均有改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过比较不同点云裁剪策略，证明了非球形裁剪方法在保持点数相似的情况下提供更大上下文，有效提升3D场景理解性能。特别适用于大规模室外环境，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索自适应裁剪策略或与特定网络结构结合。

title: SplAttN: Bridging 2D and 3D with Gaussian Soft Splatting and Attention for Point Cloud Completion
abstract: Although multi-modal learning has advanced point cloud completion, the theoretical mechanisms remain unclear. Recent works attribute success to the connection between modalities, yet we identify that standard hard projection severs this connection: projecting a sparse point cloud onto the image plane yields an extremely sparse support, which hinders visual prior propagation, a failure mode we term Cross-Modal Entropy Collapse. To address this practical limitation, we propose SplAttN, which replaces hard projection with Differentiable Gaussian Splatting to produce a dense, continuous image-plane representation. By reformulating projection as continuous density estimation, SplAttN avoids collapsed sparse support, facilitates gradient flow, and improves cross-modal connection learnability. Extensive experiments show that SplAttN achieves state-of-the-art performance on PCN and ShapeNet-55/34. Crucially, we utilize the real-world KITTI benchmark as a stress test for multi-modal reliance. Counter-factual evaluation reveals that while baselines degenerate into unimodal template retrievers insensitive to visual removal, SplAttN maintains a robust dependency on visual cues, validating that our method establishes an effective cross-modal connection. Code is available at https://github.com/zay002/SplAttN.
comment: Accepted as a Spotlight paper at ICML 2026; camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 提出SplAttN，用可微高斯软喷溅替代硬投影，结合注意力机制实现鲁棒的点云补全，有效解决跨模态熵坍缩问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态学习虽推进了点云补全，但硬投影将稀疏点云投影到图像平面导致极稀疏支持，阻碍视觉先验传播，即跨模态熵坍缩。现有方法未解决这一连接断裂问题，因此需要一种能保持密集连续表征、促进梯度流动的新方法。
light_analysis.method: SplAttN 采用可微高斯软喷溅产生密集连续的图像平面表征，替代硬投影的离散稀疏支持。通过将投影重定义为连续密度估计，避免了坍缩，改善了梯度流和跨模态连接的可学习性。模型结合注意力机制融合2D和3D特征。
light_analysis.result: 在PCN和ShapeNet-55/34上取得最优性能。在真实世界KITTI上的反事实评估显示，基线方法退化为对视觉去除不敏感的单模态模板检索器，而SplAttN保持对视觉线索的稳健依赖，验证了有效跨模态连接。
light_analysis.conclusion: SplAttN通过可微高斯软喷溅建立了有效的跨模态连接，为多模态点云补全提供了新思路。其鲁棒性在真实场景中得以验证，潜在局限在于计算开销，未来可探索更高效的密度估计。

title: When LLMs Stop Following Steps: A Diagnostic Study of Procedural Execution in Language Models
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often achieve strong performance on reasoning benchmarks, but final-answer accuracy alone does not show whether they faithfully execute the procedure specified in a prompt. We study this question through a controlled diagnostic benchmark for procedural execution, where models are given a step-wise arithmetic algorithm and two numeric inputs, and must return the final computed value. The benchmark uses simple arithmetic operations but increases complexity through algorithm length and look-back dependencies over intermediate variables. Across 14 models and 55 datasets, average first-answer accuracy drops from 61% on 5-step procedures to 20% on 95-step procedures. Generation-level analysis shows that failures often involve missing answers, premature answers, self-correction after an initial error, under-executed traces, and hallucinated extra steps. These findings suggest that apparent reasoning ability can mask substantial weaknesses in faithful instruction execution.

light_analysis.overview: 通过受控诊断基准测试揭示大语言模型在忠实执行逐步程序中的显著缺陷，表明推理能力可能掩盖执行弱点。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究多依赖最终答案准确率评估LLM推理能力，但无法反映模型是否严格遵循提示中的步骤化过程。为此，需要诊断模型在程序执行中的忠实性，特别关注算法长度和变量回溯依赖对执行效果的影响，以揭示潜在的系统性失败模式。
light_analysis.method: 设计一个受控诊断基准，包含逐步算术算法和两个数值输入，要求模型返回最终计算值。基准使用简单算术运算，通过增加算法步骤数（5至95步）和中间变量的回溯依赖来提升复杂度。评估14个模型和55个数据集，并分析生成结果中的失败类型（如缺失答案、过早答案、自我纠正等）。
light_analysis.result: 平均首次答案准确率从5步程序的61%急剧下降至95步程序的20%。生成级分析揭示多种失败模式：缺失答案、过早结束、初始错误后自我纠正、执行轨迹不完全以及虚构额外步骤，表明模型在长程序执行中忠实性显著降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM在推理任务中表现出的能力可能掩盖其在忠实执行指令上的严重弱点，特别是长步骤程序。研究强调了设计更鲁棒的执行机制的必要性，并为评估模型过程级遵循提供了新视角。局限性在于基准仅使用简单算术，未来可扩展至更复杂任务。

title: Trees to Flows and Back: Unifying Decision Trees and Diffusion Models
abstract: Decision trees and diffusion models are ostensibly disparate model classes, one discrete and hierarchical, the other continuous and dynamic. This work unifies the two by establishing a crisp mathematical correspondence between hierarchical decision trees and diffusion processes in appropriate limiting regimes. Our unification reveals a shared optimization principle: \emph{Global Trajectory Score Matching (GTSM)}, for which gradient boosting (in an idealized version) is asymptotically optimal. We underscore the conceptual value of our work through two key practical instantiations: \treeflow, which achieves competitive generation quality on tabular data with higher fidelity and a 2\times computational speedup, and \dsmtree, a novel distillation method that transfers hierarchical decision logic into neural networks, matching teacher performance within 2\% on many benchmarks.
comment: 12 pages (main), 68 pages (inclusive of appendix), Accepted in the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 统一决策树与扩散模型，揭示共享优化原则，实现高效生成与知识蒸馏。
light_analysis.motivation: 决策树和扩散模型看似截然不同：前者离散分层，后者连续动态。现有方法通常将两者视为独立领域，缺乏统一的数学框架。本文旨在通过建立两者在极限条件下的严格数学对应，弥合这一鸿沟，并揭示其共同优化原则，从而为生成建模和模型蒸馏提供新视角。
light_analysis.method: 提出全局轨迹评分匹配（GTSM）作为统一优化原则，并证明梯度提升（理想化版本）是其渐近最优解。基于此，实现两个实例：TreeFlow，一种用于表格数据的生成模型，保持高保真度且计算速度提升2倍；DSMTree，一种蒸馏方法，将决策树的分层逻辑迁移至神经网络，在多个基准上性能与教师模型差距在2%以内。
light_analysis.result: TreeFlow在表格数据生成任务中达到更高保真度，并实现2倍计算加速。DSMTree在多个基准测试中，蒸馏后的神经网络与原始决策树教师模型的性能差距不超过2%，验证了该方法的知识迁移有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究从理论上统一了两类看似无关的模型，提出了GTSM这一通用优化框架，并展示了其在生成与蒸馏中的实用价值。未来工作可探索将统一框架扩展至其他模型类型，或应用于更复杂的生成任务。

title: RTPrune: Reading-Twice Inspired Token Pruning for Efficient DeepSeek-OCR Inference
abstract: DeepSeek-OCR leverages visual-text compression to reduce long-text processing costs and accelerate inference, yet visual tokens remain prone to redundant textual and structural information. Moreover, current token pruning methods for conventional vision-language models (VLMs) fail to preserve textual fidelity due to improper compression mechanisms. By analyzing the decoding process of DeepSeek-OCR, we find that a distinct two-stage reading trajectory: the model initially prioritizes the majority of high-norm tokens, then subsequently redistributes its attention to the remaining ones. Motivated by this insight, we propose RTPrune, a two-stage token pruning method tailored for DeepSeek-OCR. In the first stage, we prioritize high-norm visual tokens that capture salient textual and structural information. In the second stage, the remaining tokens are paired and merged based on optimal transport theory to achieve efficient feature aggregation. We further introduce a dynamic pruning ratio that adapts to token similarity and textual density for OCR tasks, enabling a better efficiency-accuracy trade-off. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, as evidenced by 99.47% accuracy and 1.23$\times$ faster prefill on OmniDocBench, achieved with 84.25% token retention when applied to DeepSeek-OCR-Large.

light_analysis.overview: 提出针对DeepSeek-OCR的两阶段标记剪枝方法RTPrune，基于解码过程中高范数标记优先的观察，先保留高信息标记再合并剩余标记，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.motivation: DeepSeek-OCR虽采用视觉-文本压缩加速推理，但视觉标记仍存在冗余。现有VLM剪枝方法因不适当压缩机制无法保持文本保真度，需设计专用方法提升OCR效率且不损失精度。
light_analysis.method: RTPrune包含两阶段：第一阶段优先保留高范数视觉标记（捕捉关键文本结构信息）；第二阶段基于最优传输理论将剩余标记配对合并，实现高效特征聚合。同时引入动态剪枝比率，根据标记相似性和文本密度自适应调整，优化效率-精度权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在OmniDocBench上，DeepSeek-OCR-Large应用RTPrune后达到99.47%准确率，预填充加速1.23倍，仅保留84.25%标记，性能优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: RTPrune通过两阶段剪枝和动态比率有效提升OCR推理效率，保持高精度。揭示了DeepSeek-OCR的两阶段注意力特性，具有实际文档处理应用价值。

title: Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching
abstract: Flow matching has become a leading framework for generative modeling, but quantifying the uncertainty of its samples remains an open problem. Existing approaches retrain the model with auxiliary variance heads, maintain costly ensembles, or propagate approximate covariance through many integration steps, trading off training cost, inference cost, or accuracy. We show that none of these trade-offs is necessary. By extending Tweedie's formula from the denoising setting to the flow matching interpolant, we derive an exact, closed-form expression for the posterior covariance at every point along the generative trajectory. The result depends on a single quantity, namely the divergence of the learned velocity field, which can be computed post-hoc on any pre-trained flow matching model, requiring no retraining and no architectural modification. For one-step generators such as MeanFlow, the same formula yields the end-to-end generation uncertainty in a single forward pass, eliminating the multi-step variance propagation required by all prior methods. Experiments on MNIST confirm that the resulting per-pixel uncertainty maps are semantically meaningful, concentrating on digit boundaries where inter-sample variation is highest, and that the scalar uncertainty score tracks actual prediction error, all at roughly $10^4 \times$ less total compute than ensembling or Monte Carlo dropout.

light_analysis.overview: 提出流匹配后验协方差的精确闭式解，仅需速度场的散度，无需重训练或架构修改。
light_analysis.motivation: 流匹配已成为生成建模的主流框架，但样本不确定性量化仍待解决。现有方法需训练辅助方差头、维护集成或传播近似协方差，在训练成本、推理成本和准确性间权衡。本文旨在消除这些权衡，提供一种零额外开销的不确定性量化方案。
light_analysis.method: 扩展Tweedie公式至流匹配插值，推导出生成轨迹上每一点后验协方差的精确闭式表达式。该表达式仅依赖学习速度场的散度，可在任意预训练流匹配模型上事后计算，无需重训练或修改架构。对于单步生成器（如MeanFlow），端到端不确定性在单次前向传播中即可获得，避免了多步方差传播。
light_analysis.result: 在MNIST数据集上，所得逐像素不确定性图具有语义意义，集中在数字边界（样本间变化最大区域）；标量不确定性分数能有效跟踪实际预测误差。计算量约为集成或蒙特卡洛dropout的1/10^4。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次为流匹配提供闭式后验协方差，将不确定性量化简化为单一散度计算，显著降低计算开销且保持准确性。该方法即插即用，适用于任意预训练流匹配模型，具有高实用价值。未来可探索其在更高维数据及连续时间生成中的应用。

title: Negative Ontology of True Target for Machine Learning: Towards Evaluation and Learning under Democratic Supervision
abstract: This article philosophically examines how shifts in assumptions regarding the existence and non-existence of the true target (TT) give rise to new perspectives and insights for machine learning (ML)-based predictive modeling and, correspondingly, proposes a knowledge system for evaluation and learning under Democratic Supervision. By systematically analysing the existence assumption of the TT in current mainstream ML paradigms, we explicitly adopt a negative ontology perspective, positing that the TT does not objectively exist in the real world, and, grounded in this non-existence assumption, define Democratic Supervision for ML. We further present Multiple Inaccurate True Targets (MIATTs) as an instance-level realization of Democratic Supervision. Building upon MIATTs, we derive principles, for the logic-driven generation and assessment of MIATTs, a logical assessment formulation for evaluation with MIATTs, and undefinable true target learning for learning with MIATTs. Based on these components, we establish the evaluation and learning with MIATTs (EL-MIATTs) framework for ML-based predictive modelling. A real-world application demonstrates the potential of the proposed EL-MIATTs framework in supporting education and professional development for individuals, aligning with prior discussions of Democratic Supervision in the fields of education and professional development.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于负本体论的民主监督框架，通过多个不准确真实目标实现评估与学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习范式假设存在客观真实目标，但哲学上质疑这一假设；实际中真实目标难以定义，导致评估与学习偏差。该研究从哲学角度分析，提出负本体论视角，旨在解决真实目标不存在下的预测建模问题。
light_analysis.method: 采用负本体论，认定真实目标客观不存在，定义民主监督。进一步提出多个不准确真实目标（MIATTs）作为实例实现，包括逻辑驱动的生成与评估公式、不可定义真实目标学习，建立EL-MIATTs框架。
light_analysis.result: 通过真实世界应用展示EL-MIATTs框架在教育与职业发展中的潜力，表明其支持个性化教育，与民主监督理念一致。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文从哲学角度为机器学习提供新视角，挑战传统真实目标假设，提出民主监督框架，具有理论创新和实际应用价值。未来可进一步探索更广泛的评估与学习场景。

title: Dual-Anchoring: Addressing State Drift in Vision-Language Navigation
abstract: Vision-Language Navigation(VLN) requires an agent to navigate through 3D environments by following natural language instructions. While recent Video Large Language Models(Video-LLMs) have largely advanced VLN, they remain highly susceptible to State Drift in long scenarios. In these cases, the agent's internal state drifts away from the true task execution state, leading to aimless wandering and failure to execute essential maneuvers in the instruction. We attribute this failure to two distinct cognitive deficits: Progress Drift, where the agent fails to distinguish completed sub-goals from remaining ones, and Memory Drift, where the agent's history representations degrade, making it lose track of visited landmarks. In this paper, we propose a Dual-Anchoring Framework that explicitly anchors the instruction progress and history representations. First, to address progress drift, we introduce Instruction Progress Anchoring, which supervises the agent to generate structured text tokens that delineate completed versus remaining sub-goals. Second, to mitigate memory drift, we propose Memory Landmark Anchoring, which utilizes a Landmark-Centric World Model to retrospectively predict object-centric embeddings extracted by the Segment Anything Model, compelling the agent to explicitly verify past observations and preserve distinct representations of visited landmarks. Facilitating this framework, we curate two extensive datasets: 3.6 million samples with explicit progress descriptions, and 937k grounded landmark data for retrospective verification. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method, achieving a 15.2% improvement in Success Rate and a remarkable 24.7% gain on long-horizon trajectories. To facilitate further research, we will release our code, data generation pipelines, and the collected datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双锚定框架，通过指令进度锚定和记忆地标锚定解决视觉-语言导航中的状态漂移问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉-语言导航（VLN）要求智能体根据自然语言指令在3D环境中导航。现有视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）在长场景中极易出现状态漂移，导致漫无目的游荡和指令执行失败。问题源于两种认知缺陷：进度漂移（无法区分已完成和未完成子目标）和记忆漂移（历史表征退化，丢失已访问地标）。现有方法未能同时解决这两个问题，因此需要一种显式锚定指令进度和历史表征的框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出双锚定框架：1) 指令进度锚定：监督智能体生成结构化文本标记，区分已完成和未完成子目标；2) 记忆地标锚定：利用地标中心世界模型，通过Segment Anything模型提取对象中心嵌入，进行回溯预测，强制智能体验证过去观察并保留独特的地标表征。为此构建了两个大规模数据集：360万样本含显式进度描述，93.7万接地地标数据用于回溯验证。
light_analysis.result: 在仿真和真实环境中进行了大量实验。与基线方法相比，该方法在成功率上提升了15.2%，在长时程轨迹上取得了24.7%的显著增益。这些结果表明双锚定框架有效缓解了状态漂移，尤其在长场景导航中表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的双锚定框架通过显式锚定指令进度和历史表征，有效解决了VLN中的状态漂移问题。在模拟和真实环境中的实验验证了其优越性，特别是长轨迹场景。同时贡献了大规模数据集和代码，为后续研究提供了基础。未来工作可探索更细粒度的锚定机制或扩展到多模态任务。

title: Prototype-Grounded Concept Models for Verifiable Concept Alignment
abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) aim to improve interpretability in Deep Learning by structuring predictions through human-understandable concepts, but they provide no way to verify whether learned concepts align with the human's intended meaning, hurting interpretability. We introduce Prototype-Grounded Concept Models (PGCMs), which ground concepts in learned visual prototypes: image parts that serve as explicit evidence for the concepts. This grounding enables direct inspection of concept semantics and supports targeted human intervention at the prototype level to correct misalignments. Empirically, PGCMs achieve similar predictive performance as state-of-the-art CBMs while substantially improving transparency, interpretability, and intervenability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出原型引导概念模型，通过视觉原型显式证据增强概念可解释性与可验证性。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念瓶颈模型（CBM）通过可理解的概念结构化预测来提升可解释性，但无法验证学习到的概念是否与人类意图一致，这损害了可解释性。现有方法缺乏对概念语义的直接检查机制，也无法支持针对性的干预来纠正对齐错误。因此，需要一种能够提供显式概念证据并支持人类验证和干预的方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入原型引导概念模型（PGCM），将每个概念与学习到的视觉原型（即图像中的局部区域）相关联，作为概念的显式证据。这种设计使得概念语义可被直接检查，并支持在原型层面进行人工干预以修正概念对齐错误。模型保留了CBM的瓶颈结构，但通过原型增强了透明性和可干预性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，PGCM在预测性能上与最先进的CBM相当，同时显著提升了透明度、可解释性和可干预性。具体而言，原型提供了概念的可视化证据，使得用户能够直观理解模型决策依据，并允许通过修改原型进行有效的概念校正。
light_analysis.conclusion: PGCM通过原型机制实现了概念的可验证对齐，增强了深度学习模型的可解释性和人类可控性。该工作为构建可信赖的AI系统提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的原型设计、自动干预策略以及在大规模模型上的应用。局限性在于原型可能无法覆盖所有概念，且干预效果依赖人类判断。

title: MemEvoBench: Benchmarking Safety Risks from Memory Misevolution in LLM Agents
abstract: Equipping Large Language Models (LLMs) with persistent memory enhances interaction continuity and personalization but introduces new safety risks. Specifically, contaminated or biased memory accumulation can trigger abnormal agent behaviors. Existing evaluation methods have not yet established a standardized framework for measuring memory misevolution. This phenomenon refers to the gradual behavioral drift resulting from repeated exposure to misleading information. To address this gap, we introduce MemEvoBench, the first benchmark evaluating long-horizon memory safety in LLM agents against adversarial memory injection, noisy tool outputs, and biased feedback. The framework consists of QA-style tasks across 7 domains and 36 risk types, complemented by workflow-style tasks adapted from 20 Agent-SafetyBench environments with noisy tool returns. Both settings employ mixed benign and misleading memory pools within multi-round interactions to simulate memory evolution. Experiments on representative models reveal substantial safety degradation under biased memory updates. Our analysis suggests that memory evolution is a significant contributor to these failures. Furthermore, static prompt-based defenses prove insufficient, underscoring the urgency of securing memory evolution in LLM agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个评估LLM代理记忆退化安全风险的基准MemEvoBench。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM代理配备持久内存增强了交互连续性，但也带来了新的安全风险，如污染或有偏记忆积累导致异常行为。现有评估方法缺乏衡量记忆退化的标准化框架，该现象指反复接触误导信息导致的渐进行为漂移。因此，需要建立基准来系统评估长程记忆安全性。
light_analysis.method: MemEvoBench包含7个领域36种风险类型的QA式任务，以及来自20个Agent-SafetyBench环境的带噪声工具输出的工作流式任务。两种设置均采用混合良性及误导记忆池，在多轮交互中模拟记忆进化。通过在代表性模型上实验，分析记忆更新偏置下的安全退化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，代表性模型在偏置记忆更新下安全性能显著下降。分析指出记忆进化是这些失败的主要贡献因素。此外，静态提示式防御方法不足，表明需加强LLM代理中记忆进化的安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemEvoBench首次量化了记忆退化带来的安全风险，揭示了现有防御的局限性。其学术价值在于建立标准化评估框架，实际应用价值在于指导开发更安全的记忆管理机制。未来工作可能包括改进记忆更新策略或设计动态防御。

title: Flow of Truth: Proactive Temporal Forensics for Image-to-Video Generation
abstract: The rapid rise of image-to-video (I2V) generation enables realistic videos to be created from a single image but also brings new forensic demands. Unlike static images, I2V content evolves over time, requiring forensics to move beyond 2D pixel-level tampering localization toward tracing how pixels flow and transform throughout the video. As frames progress, embedded traces drift and deform, making traditional spatial forensics ineffective. To address this unexplored dimension, we present **Flow of Truth**, the first proactive framework focusing on temporal forensics in I2V generation. A key challenge lies in discovering a forensic signature that can evolve consistently with the generation process, which is inherently a creative transformation rather than a deterministic reconstruction. Despite this intrinsic difficulty, we innovatively redefine video generation as *the motion of pixels through time rather than the synthesis of frames*. Building on this view, we propose a learnable forensic template that follows pixel motion and a template-guided flow module that decouples motion from image content, enabling robust temporal tracing. Experiments show that Flow of Truth generalizes across commercial and open-source I2V models, substantially improving temporal forensics performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Flow of Truth，首个面向图像到视频生成的主动式时序取证框架，通过追踪像素随时间流动实现有效取证。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着图像到视频（I2V）生成技术的快速发展，从单张图像生成逼真视频成为现实，但同时也带来了新的取证需求。与静态图像不同，I2V内容随时间演化，传统空间取证方法因嵌入痕迹随时间漂移变形而失效。现有方法缺乏针对时序维度的取证手段，无法有效追踪像素在视频帧间的流动和变换，因此亟需一种能够与时序生成过程协同演化的主动取证框架。
light_analysis.method: 论文将视频生成重新定义为像素随时间的运动，而非帧的合成。在此基础上，提出可学习的取证模板，该模板能跟随像素运动，并设计模板引导的流模块，将运动与图像内容解耦，实现鲁棒的时序追踪。该方法不依赖特定生成模型，可泛化至商业和开源I2V模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Flow of Truth在多种商业和开源I2V模型上均具有良好的泛化能力，相比传统方法显著提升了时序取证性能。摘要未给出具体量化指标，但强调其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flow of Truth首次将主动式取证引入I2V生成，解决了时序维度上的取证难题。其核心创新在于重新定义视频生成本质并设计可学习模板与运动解耦模块，为视频取证提供了新范式。未来可进一步优化模板学习或扩展至其他生成任务。

title: Representation over Routing: Overcoming Surrogate Hacking in Multi-Timescale PPO
abstract: Temporal credit assignment in reinforcement learning has long been a central challenge. Inspired by the multi-timescale encoding of the dopamine system in neurobiology, recent research has sought to introduce multiple discount factors into Actor-Critic architectures, such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), to balance short-term responses with long-term planning. However, this paper reveals that blindly fusing multi-timescale signals in complex delayed-reward tasks can lead to severe algorithmic pathologies. We systematically demonstrate that exposing a temporal attention routing mechanism to policy gradients results in surrogate objective hacking, while adopting gradient-free uncertainty weighting triggers irreversible myopic degeneration, a phenomenon we term the Paradox of Temporal Uncertainty. To address these issues, we propose a Target Decoupling architecture: on the Critic side, we retain multi-timescale predictions to enforce auxiliary representation learning, while on the Actor side, we strictly isolate short-term signals and update the policy based solely on long-term advantages. Rigorous empirical evaluations across multiple independent random seeds in the LunarLander-v2 environment demonstrate that our proposed architecture achieves statistically significant performance improvements. Without relying on hyperparameter hacking, it consistently surpasses the ''Environment Solved'' threshold with minimal variance, completely eliminates policy collapse, and escapes the hovering local optima that trap single-timescale baselines. The source code to reproduce our experiments is publicly available at https://github.com/ben-dlwlrma/Representation-Over-Routing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Target Decoupling架构解决多时间尺度PPO中的代理目标劫持问题，通过分离Critic的多时间尺度表示学习与Actor的长期优势更新。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习中时间信用分配是核心挑战，受神经生物学多巴胺系统多时间尺度编码启发，研究者将多个折扣因子引入Actor-Critic架构（如PPO）以平衡短期响应与长期规划。然而，本文揭示在复杂延迟奖励任务中盲目融合多时间尺度信号会导致严重算法病态：将时间注意力路由机制暴露于策略梯度会引发代理目标劫持，而采用无梯度不确定性加权则触发不可逆的短视退化（时序不确定性悖论）。亟需解决方案以避免这些病理现象。
light_analysis.method: 提出Target Decoupling架构：Critic侧保留多时间尺度预测以强制辅助表示学习；Actor侧严格隔离短期信号，仅基于长期优势更新策略。该设计避免了多时间尺度信号融合带来的代理目标劫持和短视退化，无需依赖超参数调整。在LunarLander-v2环境进行严格实证评估，基于多个独立随机种子。
light_analysis.result: 在LunarLander-v2环境中，所提架构无需超参数调整，即持续超越“Environment Solved”阈值（通常指平均奖励≥200），且方差极小。完全消除策略崩溃现象，并逃离了单时间尺度基线陷入的徘徊局部最优。统计上显著优于现有方法，性能提升具有可重复性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了多时间尺度强化学习中的关键病理，并提出Target Decoupling架构有效解决。该工作为多时间尺度信用分配提供了稳健方法，有望应用于复杂延迟奖励任务（如机器人控制、游戏AI）。未来可探索扩展到更广泛的Actor-Critic方法及实际场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: EdgeRazor: A Lightweight Framework for Large Language Models via Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation
abstract: Quantization has emerged as a mainstream approach for deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on resource-constrained devices, yet compressing precision below 4-bit typically causes severe performance degradation or prohibitive retraining costs. In this paper, we propose EdgeRazor, a lightweight framework for LLMs via Mixed-Precision Quantization-Aware Distillation. It contains three modules: Structural Quantization with Mixed Precision for fine-grained control of bit-widths, Layer-Adaptive Feature Distillation that dynamically selects the most informative features for alignment, and Entropy-Aware KL Divergence for forward-reverse balance on both human-annotated and distilled datasets. Evaluations conducted on MobileLLM and Qwen families show that under weight-activation quantization, the 1.88-bit Qwen3-0.6B-EdgeRazor outperforms the state-of-the-art 2-bit baselines by 11.27 and surpasses the strongest 3-bit baselines by 4.38, while the quantized MobileLLM-350M-EdgeRazor requires a training budget 4-10$\times$ lower than the leading quantization-aware training method. In terms of efficiency, EdgeRazor achieves higher compression ratios at all bit-widths, and the 1.58-bit Qwen3-0.6B-EdgeRazor reduces storage from 1.11 GB to 0.19 GB while accelerating decoding by 15.16$\times$ over the 16-bit baseline. These results empirically validate the effectiveness and efficiency of EdgeRazor. The codes can be accessed from \href{https://github.com/zhangsq-nju/EdgeRazor}{GitHub} and \href{https://huggingface.co/collections/zhangsq-nju/edgerazor-nbit}{Huggingface}.

light_analysis.overview: EdgeRazor是一种轻量级混合精度量化感知蒸馏框架，通过细粒度位宽控制、自适应特征蒸馏和熵感知KL散度，实现低比特LLMs的高效部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 量化是部署LLMs到资源受限设备的主流方法，但压缩至4比特以下常导致性能严重下降或高昂的重新训练成本。现有方法在极低比特下难以平衡精度和效率，亟需一种轻量级框架在不显著增加开销的前提下保持模型质量。
light_analysis.method: EdgeRazor包含三个模块：混合精度结构化量化用于细粒度位宽控制；层自适应特征蒸馏动态选择最信息量的特征进行对齐；熵感知KL散度在人工标注和蒸馏数据集上平衡前向-反向分布。框架适用于MobileLLM和Qwen家族，通过联合优化实现高效压缩。
light_analysis.result: 在权重-激活量化下，1.88-bit Qwen3-0.6B-EdgeRazor优于2-bit基线11.27，超过3-bit基线4.38。MobileLLM-350M-EdgeRazor训练预算比领先的量化感知训练方法低4-10倍。1.58-bit版本将存储从1.11GB降至0.19GB，解码加速15.16倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: EdgeRazor验证了混合精度量化感知蒸馏在极低比特下的有效性，兼顾压缩率与性能。其轻量级训练方案显著降低了资源需求，为LLM边缘部署提供了实用方案。未来可扩展至更多模型架构和任务场景。

title: GeoPAS: Geometric Probing for Algorithm Selection in Continuous Black-Box Optimization
abstract: Automated algorithm selection for continuous black-box optimization depends on representing problem information under limited probing and selecting solvers under heavy-tailed performance distributions. This paper proposes a geometric probing framework that represents each problem instance by randomly sampled multi-scale two-dimensional slices of the objective landscape. The slices are encoded with validity-mask-aware visual pooling and aggregated into an instance representation. Solver selection is then performed by a logarithmic composite score combining a learned instance-conditioned estimate with an algorithm-side empirical prior.   The framework is evaluated on a standard single-objective black-box optimization benchmark suite with a portfolio of twelve solvers under instance-level, grouped random, and problem-level transfer protocols. Under the two within-suite protocols, it reduces aggregate mean relative expected running time from 30.37 for the single best solver to 3.14 and 3.61, while also improving median and upper-tail performance. Under problem-level transfer, the canonical adaptive setting improves typical and moderate-tail performance but leaves the mean dominated by rare extreme failures; a prior-heavy scoring variant mitigates this failure mode, although its robustness may be benchmark-dependent. The results suggest that coarse geometric probes provide useful solver-relevant information, while robust cross-problem selection also depends on metric-aligned decision scoring.
comment: 20 pages, 9 figures, 6 tables; extended version of a GECCO 2026 poster-track paper; code available at https://github.com/BradWangW/GeoPAS

light_analysis.overview: 提出几何探测框架GeoPAS，通过随机采样目标景观的二维切片并结合视觉池化与对数合成评分，实现连续黑箱优化中的算法选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续黑箱优化的自动算法选择面临两大挑战：有限探测下获取问题信息，以及重尾性能分布下选择求解器。现有方法在跨问题迁移时易受罕见极端失败影响，鲁棒性不足。GeoPAS旨在通过粗粒度几何探测获取有效的求解器相关信息，并设计鲁棒的评分机制以提升选择性能。
light_analysis.method: GeoPAS框架对每个问题实例随机采样多尺度二维目标景观切片，使用有效掩码感知的视觉池化进行编码，聚合为实例表示。求解器选择通过对数复合评分实现，结合学习到的实例条件估计与算法侧经验先验。在标准单目标黑箱优化基准套件上，使用12个求解器在实例级、分组随机和问题级迁移协议下评估。
light_analysis.result: 在实例级和分组随机协议下，聚合平均相对期望运行时间从单最佳求解器的30.37降至3.14和3.61，同时改善中位数和上尾性能。问题级迁移下，规范自适应设置改善典型和中尾性能，但均值受罕见极端失败主导；先验重评分变体缓解此问题，但鲁棒性可能依赖基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: GeoPAS证明粗粒度几何探测能提供求解器相关有用信息，跨问题鲁棒选择依赖于度量对齐的决策评分。该框架在持续黑箱优化中有效，但迁移场景下的极端失败仍需进一步研究。未来可能探索更鲁棒的先验融合或自适应探测策略。

title: How does Chain of Thought decompose complex tasks?
abstract: Many language tasks can be modeled as classification problems where a large language model (LLM) is given a prompt and selects one among many possible answers. We show that the classification error in such problems scales as a power law in the number of classes. This has a dramatic consequence: the prediction error can be reduced substantially by splitting the overall task into a sequence of smaller classification problems, each with the same number of classes ("degree"). This tree-structured decomposition models chain-of-thought (CoT). It has been observed that CoT-based predictors perform better when they "think", i.e., when they develop a deeper tree, thus decomposing the problem into a larger number of steps. We identify a critical threshold for the degree, below which thinking is detrimental, and above which there exists an optimal depth that minimizes the error. It is impossible to surpass this minimal error by increasing the depth of thinking.

light_analysis.overview: 将链式思维建模为树状分类分解，证明其误差随深度变化的幂律规律及最佳深度阈值。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言任务常建模为多类分类，但类别数增加会导致误差上升。现有方法如链式思维（CoT）通过分解步骤提升性能，但其理论机制尚不明确。本文旨在从分类误差的幂律特性出发，解释CoT为何有效：将大分类问题分解为多个小分类子问题可降低误差，但存在深度和度的关键阈值，过度思考反而有害。
light_analysis.method: 将CoT建模为树状结构，每个节点对应一个分类子问题，每个子问题有相同数量的类别（度d）。整体任务被分解为深度为h的树。理论分析表明，分类误差随类别数呈幂律分布。通过优化树深度和度，可最小化总误差。推导出关键阈值d*：当d < d*时，思考（增加深度）有害；当d > d*时，存在最优深度h*，超过该深度误差不再下降。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导得出分类误差与类别数的幂律关系，并验证了CoT分解的有效性。证明存在临界度阈值，低于该阈值时CoT性能下降，高于阈值时存在最优深度使误差最小化，且无法通过无限增加深度超越该最小误差。摘要未提供具体实验数据，但结论基于严格数学分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论上阐明了链式思维分解复杂任务的机制，揭示了误差与任务分解深度、度的幂律关系。关键贡献在于识别了度阈值和最优深度，解释了为何CoT需适度思考。该发现为设计高效CoT提示策略提供了理论指导，未来可探索更复杂树结构或非均匀分解方法。

title: Towards Real-world Human Behavior Simulation: Benchmarking Large Language Models on Long-horizon, Cross-scenario, Heterogeneous Behavior Traces
abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has illuminated the potential for a general-purpose user simulator. However, existing benchmarks remain constrained to isolated scenarios, narrow action spaces, or synthetic data, failing to capture the holistic nature of authentic human behavior. To bridge this gap, we introduce OmniBehavior, the first user simulation benchmark constructed entirely from real-world data, integrating long-horizon, cross-scenario, and heterogeneous behavioral patterns into a unified framework. Based on this benchmark, we first provide empirical evidence that previous datasets with isolated scenarios suffer from tunnel vision, whereas real-world decision-making relies on long-term, cross-scenario causal chains. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art LLMs reveal that current models struggle to accurately simulate these complex behaviors, with performance plateauing even as context windows expand. Crucially, a systematic comparison between simulated and authentic behaviors uncovers a fundamental structural bias: LLMs tend to converge toward a positive average person, exhibiting hyper-activity, persona homogenization, and a utopian bias. This results in the loss of individual differences and long-tail behaviors, highlighting critical directions for future high-fidelity simulation research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个完全基于真实数据构建的用户模拟基准OmniBehavior，发现LLM在长期、跨场景、异构行为模拟中存在结构性偏差。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有用户模拟基准局限于孤立场景、狭窄动作空间或合成数据，无法反映真实人类行为的整体性。真实决策依赖长期跨场景因果链，而现有方法存在隧道视野问题，亟需一个全面评估LLM模拟能力的基准。
light_analysis.method: 构建OmniBehavior基准，集成长期、跨场景、异构行为模式，全部来源于真实世界数据。基于该基准，系统评估了多个SOTA LLM的模拟能力，比较了模拟行为与真实行为的差异。
light_analysis.result: LLM难以准确模拟复杂行为，即使扩展上下文窗口性能也趋于饱和。模拟行为存在结构性偏差：趋向积极平均人，表现为超活跃、角色同质化和乌托邦偏见，导致个体差异和长尾行为丢失。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示LLM在真实用户模拟中的根本局限，指出高保真模拟需克服结构性偏差，保留个体差异和长尾行为。为未来通用用户模拟研究提供了关键方向。

title: U-CECE: A Universal Multi-Resolution Framework for Conceptual Counterfactual Explanations
abstract: As AI models grow more complex, explainability is essential for building trust, yet concept-based counterfactual methods still face a trade-off between expressivity and efficiency. Representing underlying concepts as atomic sets is fast but misses relational context, whereas full graph representations are more faithful but require solving the NP-hard Graph Edit Distance (GED) problem. We propose U-CECE, a unified, model-agnostic multi-resolution framework for conceptual counterfactual explanations that adapts to data regime and compute budget. U-CECE spans three levels of expressivity: atomic concepts for broad explanations, relational sets-of-sets for simple interactions, and structural graphs for full semantic structure. At the structural level, both a precision-oriented transductive mode based on supervised Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and a scalable inductive mode based on unsupervised graph autoencoders (GAEs) are supported. Experiments on the structurally divergent CUB and Visual Genome datasets characterize the efficiency-expressivity trade-off across levels, while human surveys and LVLM-based evaluation show that the retrieved structural counterfactuals are semantically equivalent to, and often preferred over, exact GED-based ground-truth explanations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一多分辨率概念反事实解释框架U-CECE，平衡表达力与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有概念反事实方法在表达力和效率间存在权衡：原子表示快速但缺失关系信息，全图表示精确但需解NP难图编辑距离问题。需要一种能适应不同数据规模和计算预算的统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出U-CECE框架，包含三个表达层次：原子概念、集合的集合（简单交互）、结构图（完整语义）。结构层支持两种模式：基于监督图神经网络的精确传导模式和无监督图自编码器的可扩展归纳模式。方法模型无关，可适配不同数据域和计算资源。
light_analysis.result: 在结构差异大的CUB和Visual Genome数据集上验证了各层次的效率-表达力权衡。人类调查和基于大视觉语言模型的评估表明，检索到的结构反事实与精确GED基准语义等价，且通常更受偏好。
light_analysis.conclusion: U-CECE框架统一了概念反事实解释的不同表达层次，克服了原子表示和全图表示之间的鸿沟。提供了灵活的选择以适应不同应用场景，同时保证解释质量。未来可探索更高效的图结构学习或扩展到更多模态。

title: Energy-based Tissue Manifolds for Longitudinal Multiparametric MRI Analysis
abstract: We propose a geometric framework for longitudinal multi-parametric MRI analysis based on patient-specific energy modelling in sequence space. Rather than operating on images with spatial networks, each voxel is represented by its multi-sequence intensity vector ($T1$, $T1c$, $T2$, FLAIR, ADC), and a compact implicit neural representation is trained via denoising score matching to learn an energy function $E_θ(\mathbf{u})$ over $\mathbb{R}^d$ from a single baseline scan. The learned energy landscape provides a differential-geometric description of tissue regimes without segmentation labels. Local minima define tissue basins, gradient magnitude reflects proximity to regime boundaries, and Laplacian curvature characterises local constraint structure. Importantly, this baseline energy manifold is treated as a fixed geometric reference: it encodes the set of contrast combinations observed at diagnosis and is not retrained at follow-up. Longitudinal assessment is therefore formulated as evaluation of subsequent scans relative to this baseline geometry.
