ComprExIT adaptively selects features across frozen LLM layers, then allocates information from anchors to compression slots through a globally coordinated transport plan. Experiments on 12 datasets show that ComprExIT consistently outperforms strong soft-compression baselines, improving average F1 by up to 18.5%, while adding only ~1% trainable parameters and achieving more than 2x faster compression than the fastest baselines. The code will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ComprExIT框架，通过显式信息传输解决长上下文压缩中的结构瓶颈，显著提升压缩质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文LLM代理面临令牌、内存和延迟成本增长，现有压缩方法性能不及全上下文。作者发现标准压缩器存在两个关键瓶颈：压缩令牌在信息聚合时协调不足，以及层间稀释弱化中间隐藏状态的有用信号，导致上下文信息保留不充分。
light_analysis.method: ComprExIT框架通过显式信息传输进行上下文压缩：自适应选择冻结LLM层的特征，然后通过全局协调传输计划将信息从锚点分配到压缩槽位。该方法仅增加约1%的可训练参数，无需重新训练整个模型。
light_analysis.result: 在12个数据集上，ComprExIT优于强软压缩基线，平均F1提升最高达18.5%，压缩速度比最快基线快2倍以上，且仅引入约1%可训练参数。
light_analysis.conclusion: ComprExIT有效缓解了LLM压缩器中的结构瓶颈，实现了高效上下文压缩，具有实际部署价值。未来可探索将显式传输机制融入更多模型架构。

title: ATLAS: A Multi-LLM Training Framework for EvoDPO with Adaptive Reference Evolution
abstract: Recent multi-LLM agent systems have shown promising capabilities for automated problem-solving, yet they predominantly rely on frozen agents or static fine-tuning pipelines. To address this limitation, our primary contribution is ATLAS (Adaptive Task-distributed Learning for Agentic Self-evolution), a multi-agent framework where specialized meta-agents collaboratively train and refine an active agent toward a domain-specific policy. A core challenge in iterative preference learning within these pipelines is the reliance on fixed reference models, which typically leads to overly conservative updates or training stagnation. To overcome this, the framework's algorithmic engine utilizes Evolving Direct Preference Optimization (EvoDPO). EvoDPO employs an inspection agent to perform adaptive, proxy-KL gated reference policy updates based on continuous training telemetry. We evaluate this full framework across a diverse set of challenging environments-including non-stationary contextual bandits, partial differential equations (PINNs), and combinatorial optimization tasks (TSP, Bin Packing). Through comparison against fixed-reference, adaptive-reference, and external automated-discovery baselines, our results suggest that ATLAS combines supporter-driven exploration with EvoDPO-driven stability to improve long-horizon evaluator-driven self-improvement.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ATLAS框架，结合多智能体协作与自适应参考演化，解决固定参考模型导致的训练停滞问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于多LLM的智能体系统多依赖冻结智能体或静态微调，在迭代偏好学习中使用固定参考模型导致更新保守或训练停滞。为解决这些问题，需要一种能自适应更新参考策略的框架，以平衡探索与稳定性，提升长时域自我进化能力。
light_analysis.method: ATLAS框架包含多个专门化元代理，协作训练和优化一个主动代理。其核心算法EvoDPO通过检查代理基于连续训练遥测进行自适应代理-KL门控参考策略更新，替代固定参考模型，实现动态调整。框架在非平稳上下文赌博机、PINNs及组合优化（TSP、Bin Packing）等任务上测试。
light_analysis.result: 与固定参考、自适应参考及外部自动发现基线对比，ATLAS在多个挑战性环境（非平稳上下文赌博机、PINNs、TSP、Bin Packing）中展示了更好的性能，尤其在长时域任务中，通过支持者驱动的探索与EvoDPO驱动的稳定性相结合，显著提升了自我改进效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出ATLAS框架，通过多智能体协作和EvoDPO算法实现了自适应参考演化，克服了固定参考模型的局限，为LLM智能体的持续自我进化提供了有效方案。未来可探索更复杂的代理交互和扩展至其他领域。

title: Causal Forcing: Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation Done Right for High-Quality Real-Time Interactive Video Generation
abstract: To achieve real-time interactive video generation, current methods distill pretrained bidirectional video diffusion models into few-step autoregressive (AR) models, facing an architectural gap when full attention is replaced by causal attention. However, existing approaches do not bridge this gap theoretically. They initialize the AR student via ODE distillation, which requires frame-level injectivity, where each noisy frame must map to a unique clean frame under the PF-ODE of an AR teacher. Distilling an AR student from a bidirectional teacher violates this condition, preventing recovery of the teacher's flow map and instead inducing a conditional-expectation solution, which degrades performance. To address this issue, we propose Causal Forcing, which uses an autoregressive teacher for ODE initialization to bridge the architectural gap, and then applies the same DMD procedure as in Self Forcing. Empirical results show that our method outperforms all baselines across all metrics, surpassing the SOTA Self Forcing by 19.3\% in Dynamic Degree, 8.7\% in VisionReward, and 16.7\% in Instruction Following. Project page: \href{https://thu-ml.github.io/CausalForcing.github.io/}{https://thu-ml.github.io/CausalForcing.github.io/}; the code: \href{https://github.com/thu-ml/Causal-Forcing}{https://github.com/thu-ml/Causal-Forcing}.
comment: Project page and the code: \href{https://thu-ml.github.io/CausalForcing.github.io/}{https://thu-ml.github.io/CausalForcing.github.io/}; https://github.com/thu-ml/Causal-Forcing. ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出Causal Forcing方法，通过自回归教师ODE初始化弥合双向扩散与自回归模型间的架构鸿沟，提升实时交互视频生成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 实时交互式视频生成需要将预训练双向扩散模型蒸馏为少步自回归模型，但全注意力被因果注意力替代导致架构鸿沟。现有方法通过ODE蒸馏初始化自回归学生，要求帧级单射性，而双向教师蒸馏自回归学生违反该条件，导致条件期望解，性能下降。因此需要一种能桥接架构鸿沟的蒸馏方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Causal Forcing，首先使用自回归教师模型进行ODE初始化以匹配学生模型的因果注意力架构，然后应用与Self Forcing相同的DMD（分布匹配蒸馏）过程。该方法通过确保帧级单射性，使自回归学生能恢复教师流映射，避免条件期望退化。实验基于视频扩散模型和自回归生成框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多个指标上超越所有基线，包括Self Forcing。动态度提升19.3%，VisionReward提升8.7%，指令遵循提升16.7%。证明Causal Forcing在生成视频的动态性、视觉质量和指令对齐方面显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Causal Forcing有效解决了双向扩散蒸馏为自回归模型时的架构鸿沟问题，提升了实时交互视频生成的质量。该工作为视频生成模型的高效部署提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的注意力机制和蒸馏策略。

title: Unifying Masked Diffusion Models with Various Generation Orders and Beyond
abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) are a potential alternative to autoregressive models (ARMs) for language generation, but generation quality depends critically on the generation order. Prior work either hard-codes an ordering (e.g., blockwise left-to-right) or learns an ordering policy for a pretrained MDM, which incurs extra cost and can yield suboptimal solutions due to the two-stage optimization. Motivated by this, we propose order-expressive masked diffusion model (OeMDM) for a broad class of diffusion generative processes with various generation orders, enabling the interpretation of MDM, ARM, and block diffusion in a single framework. Furthermore, building on OeMDM, we introduce learnable-order masked diffusion model (LoMDM), which jointly learns the generation ordering and diffusion backbone through a single objective from scratch, enabling the diffusion model to generate text in context-dependent ordering. Empirically, we confirm that LoMDM outperforms various discrete diffusion models across multiple language modeling benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架OeMDM涵盖多种生成顺序的掩码扩散模型，并在此基础上提出可学习生成顺序的LoMDM，实现端到端优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDM）作为自回归模型（ARM）的潜在替代方案，其生成质量严重依赖于生成顺序。现有方法要么硬编码顺序（如从左到右），要么对预训练MDM学习顺序策略，但两阶段优化会引入额外成本并导致次优解。因此，需要一种能够统一不同生成顺序并实现联合优化的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出OeMDM（order-expressive masked diffusion model），涵盖MDM、ARM和块扩散等多种生成顺序的统一框架。在此基础上，提出LoMDM（learnable-order masked diffusion model），通过单一目标从零开始联合学习生成顺序和扩散骨干，使扩散模型能够根据上下文生成文本。该方法无需两阶段训练，直接优化顺序和生成质量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LoMDM在多个语言建模基准上优于各种离散扩散模型。具体性能提升幅度及对比基线在摘要中未详细说明，但确认了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoMDM通过联合学习生成顺序和扩散过程，提升了文本生成质量，为离散扩散模型提供了更灵活的生成策略。该工作统一了不同顺序模型，具有理论价值。未来可探索更复杂的顺序学习机制或应用于其他模态。

title: LiteCoOp: Lightweight Multi-LLM Shared-Tree Reasoning for Model-Serving Compiler Optimizations
abstract: LLM-guided compiler optimization has recently shown promise, but existing approaches rely on a single large LLM throughout search, making them expensive and excluding smaller models. We pose the research question: whether heterogeneous LLMs can collaborate during compiler optimization while reducing compilation cost below optimization guided by a single large LLM. Crucially, this must be achieved without introducing overhead from agentic frameworks, which would run counter to the goal of lower compilation cost. To achieve these competing objectives, we introduce LiteCoOp, a lightweight framework that turns the optimization search tree itself into the mechanism for multi-LLM collaboration, enabling heterogeneous models to share progress without external agentic coordination. At each optimization step, LiteCoOp queries one LLM to propose both a compiler transformation and select the LLM to query at the next step. These LLM proposals are recorded in a shared MCTS tree, so all models are invoked serially and yet are informed by each other's decisions. The shared MCTS backpropagates the rewards, allowing progress made by one model to influence later decisions by others. This makes the MCTS tree the collaborative reasoning mechanism itself, avoiding inter-model communication, heavy reasoning traces, or agentic infrastructure. We instantiate this idea with an LLM-aware UCT that biases model selection toward smaller LLMs to reduce cost while still preserving the compiler performance objective. Across diverse GPU and (CPU) benchmarks, LiteCoOp consistently outperforms single-model baselines, with the best results obtained when scaling collaboration to eight heterogeneous LLMs. This eight-model config reduces total compilation time by 1.95x (1.74x), reduces API cost by 4.47x (4.32x), and invokes the largest model for only 23.1% (23.9%) of total calls while demonstrating collaboration scalability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiteCoOp，一种轻量级多LLM共享树推理框架，通过MCTS实现异构模型协作，降低编译器优化成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM-guided编译器优化依赖单一大型LLM，成本高昂且排除小模型。多LLM协作需避免外部agent框架带来的额外开销，因此需要一种无需显式协调的轻量级协作机制，在保证编译器优化性能的同时降低编译时间和API成本。
light_analysis.method: LiteCoOp将优化搜索树本身作为多LLM协作机制。每步一个LLM同时提议编译器变换和选择下一步查询的LLM；提议记录在共享MCTS树中，通过反向传播奖励实现模型间信息共享。使用LLM-aware UCT策略偏向选择小模型以降低成本，避免模型间通信和agent基础设施，实现轻量级协作。
light_analysis.result: 在GPU和CPU基准测试中，8个异构LLM配置下，LiteCoOp相较于单模型基线，编译时间降低1.95倍（GPU）/1.74倍（CPU），API成本降低4.47倍（GPU）/4.32倍（CPU），大型模型调用仅占总调用的23.1%/23.9%，并展示了协作的可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiteCoOp证实异构LLM可通过共享MCTS树低成本协作进行编译器优化，无需agent框架即可超越单模型性能。其轻量设计适合实际部署，未来可探索更多异构模型组合和优化目标。

title: How Well Do Models Follow Visual Instructions? VIBE: A Systematic Benchmark for Visual Instruction-Driven Image Editing
abstract: Recent generative models have achieved remarkable progress in image editing. However, existing systems and benchmarks remain largely text-guided. In contrast, human communication is inherently multimodal, where visual instructions such as sketches efficiently convey spatial and structural intent. To address this gap, we introduce VIBE, the Visual Instruction Benchmark for Image Editing with a three-level interaction hierarchy that captures deictic grounding, morphological manipulation, and causal reasoning. Across these levels, we curate high-quality and diverse test cases that reflect progressively increasing complexity in visual instruction following. We further propose a robust LMM-as-a-judge evaluation framework with task-specific metrics to enable scalable and fine-grained assessment. Through a comprehensive evaluation of 17 representative open-source and proprietary image editing models, we find that proprietary models exhibit early-stage visual instruction-following capabilities and consistently outperform open-source models. However, performance degrades markedly with increasing task difficulty even for the strongest systems, highlighting promising directions for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VIBE基准，系统评估视觉指令驱动的图像编辑，包含三层次交互任务和LMM自动评估框架，发现专有模型优于开源但随难度增加性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑主要依赖文本指令，忽略了人类沟通中多模态的本质。视觉指令（如草图）能高效传达空间和结构意图，但缺乏系统基准来评估模型遵循视觉指令的能力。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过构建多层级难度递增的测试用例，促进视觉指令理解研究。
light_analysis.method: 构建VIBE基准，定义三层次交互层级：指向性接地、形态操作和因果推理，并设计相应测试用例。提出基于大型多模态模型的自动评估框架，使用任务特定指标进行细粒度评估。对17个开源和专有图像编辑模型进行系统评估，涵盖不同难度级别。
light_analysis.result: 专有模型在视觉指令遵循上表现出早期能力，一致优于开源模型。但所有模型随任务难度增加性能显著下降，即使最强系统也面临挑战。具体性能数据摘要未明确，但指出差距和退化趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIBE揭示了当前模型在复杂视觉指令理解上的局限性，专有模型虽有优势但远非完美。该基准为未来研究提供了方向，如提升对层级交互的推理能力。潜在局限在于测试用例的覆盖范围可能有限，且自动评估仍需人工验证。

title: What Does Vision Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Really Learn? Disentangling Tool-Induced and Intrinsic Effects for Crop-and-Zoom
abstract: Vision tool-use reinforcement learning (RL) can equip vision language models with visual operators such as crop-and-zoom and achieves strong performance gains, yet it remains unclear whether these gains are driven by improvements in tool use or evolving intrinsic capabilities. We introduce MED (Measure--Explain--Diagnose), a coarse-to-fine framework that disentangles intrinsic capability changes from tool-induced effects, decomposes the tool-induced performance difference into gain and harm terms, and probes the mechanisms driving their evolution. Across checkpoint-level analyses in the crop-and-zoom setting on two VLMs with different tool priors and six benchmarks, we find that improvements are dominated by intrinsic learning, while tool-use RL mainly reduces tool-induced harm (e.g., fewer call-induced errors and weaker tool schema interference) and yields limited progress in tool-based correction of intrinsic failures. Overall, in the crop-and-zoom setting studied here, current vision tool-use RL learns to coexist safely with tools rather than master them.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MED框架，解耦视觉工具使用强化学习中工具诱导效应与内在能力变化，发现性能提升主要源于内在学习而非工具掌握。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉工具使用RL能提升VLM性能，但其增益来源不明。现有方法无法区分内在能力提升与工具使用效果，导致对学习机制理解模糊。该问题关键，因为明确改进根源有助于设计更有效的训练策略，避免资源浪费。
light_analysis.method: 提出MED（Measure-Explain-Diagnose）粗到细框架，将工具诱导性能差异分解为增益和损失项，并探测其演变机制。在crop-and-zoom设置下，对两个具有不同工具先验的VLM和六个基准进行逐检查点分析。
light_analysis.result: 改进主要由内在学习主导；工具使用RL主要减少工具诱导损失（如调用错误和工具模式干扰减少），但在工具纠正内在失败方面进步有限。整体上，模型学会与工具安全共存而非掌握工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了当前视觉工具使用RL的本质是适应工具以减少负面效应，而非提升工具利用能力。这为未来研究提供方向：需重新设计奖励函数或训练目标以促进工具掌握。局限性在于仅考察crop-and-zoom场景，其他工具或设置需进一步验证。

title: Provably Protecting Fine-Tuned LLMs from Training Data Extraction while Preserving Utility
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) on sensitive datasets raises privacy concerns, as training data extraction (TDE) attacks can expose highly confidential information. Existing defenses against such attacks either lack formal privacy guarantees or incur substantial utility degradation. We observe that fine-tuning induces widespread probability shifts, yet preserving only a small subset of influential token-level deviations is sufficient; the remaining shifts can be aggressively smoothed with minimal impact on utility. Motivated by this insight, we propose SCP-$Δ_r$, a Near Access Freeness (NAF)-based algorithm that operates on relative probabilities and explicitly smooths low-impact tokens using a base model. SCP-$Δ_r$ achieves orders-of-magnitude better theoretical bounds than existing NAF based methods and provides strong empirical protection against TDE attacks with minimal performance loss.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCP-Δr算法，基于NAF理论保护微调LLM免受训练数据提取攻击，同时保持模型效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 微调大语言模型在敏感数据集上存在隐私风险，训练数据提取攻击可泄露机密信息。现有防御方法要么缺乏正式隐私保证，要么导致严重效用下降。需要一种既能提供强隐私保护又不显著损害模型性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: 观察到微调引起广泛概率偏移，但仅需保留少数关键token级偏差，其余偏差可被激进平滑。提出SCP-Δr算法，基于Near Access Freeness理论，在相对概率上操作，使用基础模型显式平滑低影响token。该算法在理论上优于现有NAF方法，实现更好的隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.result: SCP-Δr在理论上取得数量级更好的边界（相比现有NAF方法），并在实证中提供对训练数据提取攻击的强大保护，同时仅带来极小性能损失。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出一种新的隐私保护微调方法，兼具强形式化保证和实际效用。学术价值在于改进了NAF理论框架，实际应用上可用于保护敏感数据微调。潜在局限是需依赖基础模型，未来可探索更高效平滑策略。

title: Video-o3: Native Interleaved Clue Seeking for Long Video Multi-Hop Reasoning
abstract: Existing multimodal large language models for long-video understanding predominantly rely on uniform sampling and single-turn inference, limiting their ability to identify sparse yet critical evidence amid extensive redundancy. We introduce Video-o3, a novel framework that supports iterative discovery of salient visual clues, fine-grained inspection of key segments, and adaptive termination once sufficient evidence is acquired. Technically, we address two core challenges in interleaved tool invocation. First, to mitigate attention dispersion induced by the heterogeneity of reasoning and tool-calling, we propose Task-Decoupled Attention Masking, which isolates per-step concentration while preserving shared global context. Second, to control context length growth in multi-turn interactions, we introduce a Verifiable Trajectory-Guided Reward that balances exploration coverage with reasoning efficiency. To support training at scale, we further develop a data synthesis pipeline and construct Seeker-173K, comprising 173K high-quality tool-interaction trajectories for effective supervised and reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show that Video-o3 substantially outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving 72.1% accuracy on MLVU and 46.5% on Video-Holmes. These results demonstrate Video-o3's strong multi-hop evidence-seeking and reasoning capabilities, and validate the effectiveness of native tool invocation in long-video scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Video-o3框架，通过迭代线索发现和任务解耦注意力掩码，解决长视频多跳推理问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长视频理解的多模态大模型主要依赖均匀采样和单轮推理，难以从大量冗余信息中识别稀疏关键证据。这种局限性导致在处理需要多跳推理的复杂视频问答时性能不佳。因此，需要一种能够迭代发现显著视觉线索、精细检查关键片段、并在获得足够证据后自适应终止的框架，以提升长视频多跳推理的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: Video-o3提出任务解耦注意力掩码，隔离推理和工具调用的注意力分散，同时保留全局上下文。引入可验证轨迹引导奖励，平衡探索覆盖与推理效率。构建数据合成管道和Seeker-173K数据集，包含17.3万条高质量工具交互轨迹，用于监督学习和强化学习训练。该方法支持原生工具调用，实现迭代线索发现和自适应终止。
light_analysis.result: 在MLVU基准上达到72.1%准确率，在Video-Holmes上达到46.5%，显著优于现有方法。实验验证了Video-o3在长视频多跳证据搜索和推理方面的强大能力，以及原生工具调用策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Video-o3展示了迭代线索发现和自适应终止在长视频多跳推理中的显著优势，验证了任务解耦注意力掩码和可验证轨迹引导奖励的有效性。该工作为长视频理解提供了新范式，具有重要的学术价值。未来可进一步优化推理效率并扩展至更复杂的视频任务。

title: Hyperparameter Transfer with Mixture-of-Expert Layers
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) layers have emerged as an important tool in scaling up modern neural networks by decoupling total trainable parameters from activated parameters in the forward pass for each token. However, sparse MoEs add complexity to training due to (i) new trainable parameters (router weights) that, like all other parameter groups, require hyperparameter (HP) tuning; (ii) new architecture scale dimensions (number of and size of experts) that must be chosen and potentially taken large. To make HP selection cheap and reliable, we propose a new parameterization for transformer models with MoE layers when scaling model width, depth, number of experts, and expert (hidden) size. Our parameterization is justified by a novel dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) analysis. When varying different model dimensions trained at a fixed token budget, we find empirically that our parameterization enables reliable HP transfer across models from 51M to over 2B total parameters. We further take HPs identified from sweeping small models on a short token horizon to train larger models on longer horizons and report performant model behaviors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于DMFT的MoE层参数化方法，实现从51M到2B参数的超参数迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE层通过解耦总参数与激活参数来扩展神经网络，但引入了路由器权重等新参数，需要超参数调优，且专家数量和大小等架构维度选择困难。现有方法缺乏可靠的超参数迁移策略，导致大模型训练成本高。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种针对Transformer中MoE层的新参数化方法，基于动力学平均场理论（DMFT）分析，涵盖模型宽度、深度、专家数量和专家隐藏层大小。在固定token预算下，通过调整参数化使得超参数在不同规模模型间可迁移。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在51M到2B总参数范围内，新参数化实现了超参数的可靠迁移。使用小模型短训练步长得到的超参数直接用于大模型长训练，模型性能良好。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提供了MoE层超参数迁移的理论依据和实用方法，降低了调参成本。未来可进一步验证更大规模模型或不同任务，并探索更高效的迁移策略。

title: Structural Anchor Pruning: Training-Free Multi-Vector Compression for Visual Document Retrieval
abstract: Recent Vision-Language Models (e.g., ColPali) enable fine-grained Visual Document Retrieval (VDR) but incur prohibitive multi-vector index storage overhead. Existing training-free pruning methods either rely on heuristic layer choices or degrade sharply under aggressive compression, leading prior work to argue that effective high-compression pruning requires query-dependent training. We challenge this view with Structural Anchor Pruning (SAP), a self-calibrating, training-free, and query-agnostic index-time pruning framework with three components: (i) Score Retention (SR), a white-box per-layer compression diagnostic; (ii) SR-guided window selection, a procedure that automatically locates the structural pruning region for any backbone with no per-model hyperparameters; and (iii) a visual in-degree centrality scorer that identifies anchor patches within the selected window. On the ViDoRe v1/v2 benchmarks across three architectures spanning 18, 28, and 36 backbone layers, SAP retains over 90\% of NDCG@5 while pruning more than 90\% of visual tokens, without any per-model parameter tuning. Our layer-resolved SR analysis reveals an Alignment-Aggregation Divergence: the document's visual structure is preserved as a stable ``Structural Plateau'' within the backbone, but the final layers reshape this representation into a sparse, query-aligned form that is no longer suitable for pruning. This is the mechanistic reason SAP succeeds where final-layer methods fail.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Structural Anchor Pruning (SAP)，一种无需训练和查询的索引时剪枝框架，在剪除90%以上视觉token时仍保留超过90%的检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如ColPali）在细粒度视觉文档检索中效果优异，但多向量索引存储成本高昂。现有训练无关剪枝方法依赖启发式层选择或在激进压缩下性能急剧下降，导致先前研究认为高效高压缩剪枝需要查询相关训练。本文旨在挑战这一观点，提供一种无需训练、无需查询的自校准剪枝方案。
light_analysis.method: SAP包含三个组件：Score Retention (SR) 白盒逐层压缩诊断；SR引导的窗口选择，自动定位任何骨干网络的结构剪枝区域，无需每模型超参数；视觉入度中心性评分器，在选定窗口内识别锚点块。该方法在索引时进行，不依赖训练数据或查询。
light_analysis.result: 在ViDoRe v1/v2基准测试上，覆盖3种架构（18、28、36层骨干），SAP在剪枝超过90%视觉token时，NDCG@5保留超过90%，且无需任何每模型参数调整。层解析SR分析揭示了对齐-聚合发散现象，解释了SAP在最终层方法失败处成功的原因。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAP通过自校准、无需训练和查询的剪枝框架，实现了高压缩率下视觉文档检索性能的保持。其成功源于发现视觉结构在骨干网络前层以稳定“结构平台”保留，而最后层将其重塑为稀疏、查询对齐形式，不再适合剪枝。这一机制性理解有助于设计更高效的索引压缩方法。

title: VDE Bench: Evaluating The Capability of Image Editing Models to Modify Visual Documents
abstract: In recent years, image editing models have made significant progress, enabling users to manipulate visual content in a flexible and interactive manner through natural language instructions. However, an important yet underexplored research direction remains dense visual document image editing, which involves modifying textual content within images while faithfully preserving the original text style and background context. Existing methods primarily focus on English scenarios and images with relatively sparse text, and thus cannot adequately address dense, structurally complex documents or non-Latin scripts such as Chinese. To bridge this gap, we propose VDE Bench (Visual Doc Edit Bench), a rigorously human annotated and evaluated benchmark specifically designed to assess the performance of image editing models on bilingual Chinese-English and complex visual document editing tasks. The benchmark comprises a high quality dataset of 942 instruction based image editing samples, whose seed images encompass dense Chinese and English text documents including academic papers, posters, presentation slides, examination materials, and newspapers. Furthermore, we introduce a novel evaluation framework that systematically quantifies editing performance at the OCR parsing level, thereby enabling fine grained assessment of text modification accuracy. Based on this benchmark, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of representative image editing models. Human verification demonstrates a high degree of consistency between human judgments and automated evaluation metrics. VDE Bench constitutes the first systematic benchmark for evaluating the performance of image editing models on bilingual dense text visual documents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VDE Bench，首个系统评估图像编辑模型在双语密集文本文档上性能的基准。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法主要针对英文稀疏文本场景，无法处理密集、结构复杂的文档或非拉丁文字（如中文）。该研究旨在弥补这一空白，评估模型在修改中英文密集文本时保持原风格和背景的能力。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含942个指令式图像编辑样本的高质量数据集，种子图像涵盖学术论文、海报、幻灯片、考试材料和报纸等密集中英文文档。引入基于OCR解析的评估框架，量化编辑性能，实现细粒度文本修改准确度评估。
light_analysis.result: 人类验证表明自动评估指标与人类判断高度一致。基于该基准对代表性图像编辑模型进行了全面评估，但摘要未提供具体性能数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: VDE Bench是首个系统评估图像编辑模型在双语密集文本文档上性能的基准，具有重要学术价值和应用价值，可推动文档图像编辑领域发展。

title: Training-Trajectory-Aware Token Selection
abstract: Efficient distillation is a key pathway for converting expensive reasoning capability into deployable efficiency, yet in the frontier regime where the student already has strong reasoning ability, naive continual distillation often yields limited gains or even degradation. We observe a characteristic training phenomenon: even as loss decreases monotonically, all performance metrics can drop sharply at almost the same bottleneck, before gradually recovering. We further uncover a token-level mechanism: confidence bifurcates into steadily increasing Imitation-Anchor Tokens that quickly anchor optimization and other yet-to-learn tokens whose confidence is suppressed until after the bottleneck. And the characteristic that these two types of tokens cannot coexist is the root cause of the failure in continual distillation. To this end, we propose Training-Trajectory-Aware Token Selection (T3S) to reconstruct the training objective at the token level, clearing the optimization path for yet-to-learn tokens. T3S yields consistent gains in both AR and dLLM settings: with only hundreds of examples, Qwen3-8B surpasses DeepSeek-R1 on competitive reasoning benchmarks, Qwen3-32B approaches Qwen3-235B, and T3-trained LLaDA-2.0-Mini exceeds its AR baseline, achieving state-of-the-art performance among all of 16B-scale no-think models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出训练轨迹感知的Token选择方法(T3S)，通过重构训练目标解决持续蒸馏中的性能瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 高效蒸馏是将昂贵推理能力转化为可部署效率的关键路径，但当前沿学生模型已具备强推理能力时，简单的持续蒸馏往往收益有限甚至性能下降。研究发现训练中存在特征现象：损失单调下降时，所有性能指标在几乎相同的瓶颈处急剧下降后再缓慢恢复。进一步揭示令牌级机制：信心分化为稳步增加的模仿锚令牌和其他待学习令牌，后者信心在瓶颈前被抑制。这两类令牌无法共存是持续蒸馏失败的根本原因。
light_analysis.method: 提出训练轨迹感知的令牌选择方法(T3S)，在令牌级别重构训练目标，为待学习令牌清除优化路径。T3S通过识别训练轨迹中的瓶颈阶段，动态选择待学习令牌，调整其贡献权重，避免被模仿锚令牌主导优化。该方法适用于自回归(AR)和扩散语言模型(dLLM)场景，仅需数百个示例即可实现性能提升。
light_analysis.result: T3S在AR和dLLM设置中均取得一致增益：仅用数百个示例，Qwen3-8B在竞争性推理基准上超越DeepSeek-R1；Qwen3-32B接近Qwen3-235B；T3训练的LLaDA-2.0-Mini超过其AR基线，在所有16B级无思考模型中达到最先进水平。实验证明T3S能有效打破性能瓶颈，显著提升蒸馏效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: T3S通过令牌级训练目标重构，解决了持续蒸馏中性能瓶颈问题，为高效蒸馏提供了新范式。学术上揭示了令牌信心分化的机制，实践上使小模型逼近甚至超越大模型性能，具有重要应用价值。未来可探索将T3S应用于更广泛的模型架构和训练场景，以及进一步理解瓶颈形成的理论基础。

title: UIKA: Fast Universal Head Avatar from Pose-Free Images
abstract: We present UIKA, a feed-forward animatable Gaussian head model from an arbitrary number of pose-free inputs, including a single image, multi-view captures, and smartphone-captured videos. Unlike the traditional avatar method, which requires a studio-level multi-view capture system and reconstructs a human-specific model through a long-time optimization process, we rethink the task through the lenses of model representation, network design, and data preparation. First, we introduce a UV-guided avatar modeling strategy, in which each input image is associated with a pixel-wise facial correspondence estimation. Such correspondence estimation allows us to reproject each valid pixel color from screen space to UV space, which is independent of camera pose and character expression. Furthermore, we design learnable UV tokens on which the attention mechanism can be applied at both the screen and UV levels. The learned UV tokens can be decoded into canonical Gaussian attributes using aggregated UV information from all input views. To train our large avatar model, we additionally prepare a large-scale, identity-rich synthetic training dataset. Our method significantly outperforms existing approaches in both monocular and multi-view settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种前馈可动画化高斯头部模型UIKA，可从任意数量无姿态输入（包括单张图像）快速生成高质量头像，无需优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统头部化身方法依赖工作室级多视角捕获系统和长时间逐人优化，成本高且不实用。本文旨在从任意数量、无姿态约束的输入（如单张图像、多视角照片、手机视频）中快速生成可动画化头像，以降低数据采集门槛并提升效率，推动头像技术在虚拟现实、远程交互等领域的普及。
light_analysis.method: 提出UV引导的化身建模策略：先为每个输入图像估计像素级面部对应，将像素颜色从屏幕空间重投影到姿态和表情无关的UV空间；再设计可学习的UV令牌，在屏幕和UV级别应用注意力机制，聚合所有输入视图的UV信息，解码为规范高斯属性。使用大规模、身份丰富的合成数据集训练模型。
light_analysis.result: 在单目和多视角设置下，UIKA均显著优于现有方法。实验表明，模型能从少量甚至单张无姿态图像生成高质量、可动画化的头部高斯模型，且在渲染质量、姿态泛化性和动画效果上达到最先进水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: UIKA提供了一种灵活高效的头像生成方案，无需姿态输入和优化过程，适用于多种输入场景。其采用UV引导和可学习令牌的设计具有通用性，有望推动实时头像应用的发展。未来可探索减少对合成数据的依赖，并提升真实场景下的鲁棒性。

title: Linear Dynamics in the RLVR Training of Large Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has driven significant performance gains in reasoning-oriented large language models (LLMs), yet its internal training dynamics remain largely a black box. In this work, we perform a comprehensive trajectory-level analysis of RLVR and uncover a striking regularity: across various model families, RL algorithms, and training configurations, RLVR consistently enters a robust linear regime, where both parameter weights and output log-probabilities, measured rigorously via teacher-forced evaluation, evolve in a highly linear manner ($R^2 > 0.7$). Through controlled experiments and theoretical analysis, we demonstrate that this linearity is not a coincidence, but stems from the high-variance, noisy nature of RLVR training signals, which act as a low-pass filter to concentrate optimization along a stable, low-dimensional drift. Moreover, we show that this linear structure is not merely descriptive but powerfully predictive and actionable. Specifically, weight-space extrapolation matches the performance of standard RL optimization while achieving a 6.1x training speedup through periodic re-grounding. Meanwhile, output-space extrapolation serves as a lightweight intervention that effectively bypasses late-stage model collapse, consistently outperforming standard RL across mathematical and coding benchmarks, with an average performance improvement of 4.2%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Miaow-Lab/RLVR-Linearity.
comment: Major revision: substantially reorganized the manuscript and added a theoretical explanation section. The replacement is intended for the same arXiv paper; the core topic and contribution remain the same

light_analysis.overview: 发现RLVR训练中参数和输出概率呈高度线性演化，并提出利用线性结构加速训练和提升性能的方法。
light_analysis.motivation: RLVR在推理型LLM中取得显著成功，但其训练动态是黑箱，现有方法未揭示内部演化规律，导致训练效率低、易遇模型崩溃。本文旨在揭示线性结构并利用其优化训练。
light_analysis.method: 通过轨迹级分析，在不同模型、算法和配置下，观察到权重和输出log概率高度线性演化（R²>0.7）。理论分析表明线性源于训练信号的高方差噪声作为低通滤波器。基于此，提出权重空间外推（6.1x加速）和输出空间外推（避免模型崩溃，性能提升4.2%）。
light_analysis.result: 权重空间外推通过定期重定向实现6.1倍训练加速，性能与标准RL相当。输出空间外推作为轻量干预，在数学和编程基准上平均提升4.2%，有效避免后期模型崩溃。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了RLVR训练的线性动态，并展示了其预测性和可操作性。学术上提供了对RLVR训练机制的新理解，实际应用上提出了加速训练和避免崩溃的有效方法。未来可探索更复杂的应用场景。

title: AlignPose: Generalizable 6D Pose Estimation via Multi-view Feature-metric Alignment
abstract: Single-view RGB model-based object pose estimation methods achieve strong generalization but are fundamentally limited by depth ambiguity, clutter, and occlusions. Multi-view pose estimation methods have the potential to solve these issues, but existing works rely on precise single-view pose estimates or lack generalization to unseen objects. We address these challenges via the following three contributions. First, we introduce AlignPose, a 6D object pose estimation method that aggregates information from multiple extrinsically calibrated RGB views and does not require any object-specific training or symmetry annotation. Second, the key component of this approach is a new multi-view feature-metric refinement specifically designed for object pose. It optimizes a single, consistent world-frame object pose by minimizing the feature discrepancy between on-the-fly rendered object features and observed image features across all views simultaneously. Third, we report extensive experiments on six datasets (YCB-V, T-LESS, HouseCat6D, ITODD-MV, IPD, XYZ-IBD) using the BOP benchmark evaluation and show that AlignPose outperforms other published methods, especially on challenging industrial datasets where multiple views are readily available in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 AlignPose，一种利用多视图特征度量对齐的 6D 物体姿态估计方法，无需针对特定物体训练或对称注释，实现良好的泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 单视图 RGB 姿态估计方法受深度模糊、杂乱和遮挡限制，而现有基于多视图的方法要么依赖精确的单视图初始估计，要么缺乏对未见物体的泛化能力。实际应用中多视图场景常见，因此需要一种能有效利用多视图信息、无需物体特定训练且具有泛化性的方法。
light_analysis.method: AlignPose 采用多个外参校准的 RGB 视图，通过多视图特征度量优化模块，在优化过程中同时最小化所有视图下实时渲染的物体特征与观测图像特征之间的差异，从而迭代优化一个全局一致的世界坐标系物体姿态。该方法无需物体特定训练或对称性注释，仅基于渲染与观测的特征对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在 YCB-V、T-LESS、HouseCat6D、ITODD-MV、IPD 和 XYZ-IBD 六个数据集上，使用 BOP 基准进行评估，AlignPose 在所有数据集上优于其他已发表方法，尤其在 ITODD-MV 等工业数据集上表现突出，这些场景通常容易获得多视图。
light_analysis.conclusion: AlignPose 在不依赖物体特定训练的条件下，通过多视图特征度量对齐有效提升了 6D 姿态估计的泛化性和精度，尤其适用于工业等可获取多视图的场景。未来工作可探索更高效的特征渲染策略或扩展到动态场景。

title: Gradient Descent as a Perceptron Algorithm: Understanding Dynamics and Implicit Acceleration
abstract: Even for the gradient descent (GD) method applied to neural network training, understanding its optimization dynamics, including convergence rate, iterate trajectories, function value oscillations, and especially its implicit acceleration, remains a challenging problem. We analyze nonlinear models with the logistic loss and show that the steps of GD reduce to those of generalized perceptron algorithms (Rosenblatt, 1958), providing a new perspective on the dynamics. This reduction yields significantly simpler algorithmic steps, which we analyze using classical linear algebra tools. Using these tools, we demonstrate on a minimalistic example that the nonlinearity in a two-layer model can provably yield a faster iteration complexity $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{d})$ compared to $Ω(d)$ achieved by linear models, where $d$ is the number of features. This helps explain the optimization dynamics and the implicit acceleration phenomenon observed in neural networks. The theoretical results are supported by extensive numerical experiments. We believe that this alternative view will further advance research on the optimization of neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 将梯度下降等效为感知机算法，揭示了非线性模型的隐式加速机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 理解神经网络梯度下降的动态特性，包括收敛速率、轨迹和函数振荡，尤其是隐式加速现象，仍具挑战。现有方法难以解释非线性为何能带来优化加速，需建立新视角简化分析。
light_analysis.method: 针对逻辑损失的非线性模型，将梯度下降步骤转换为广义感知机算法，利用线性代数工具分析。在两层网络的最小示例中，证明非线性使迭代复杂度从线性模型的Ω(d)降至Õ(√d)。
light_analysis.result: 理论表明两层模型非线性实现Õ(√d)复杂度，优于线性模型的Ω(d)。数值实验验证了隐式加速现象，支持理论结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过将梯度下降简化为感知机，提供了理解神经网络优化动态的新框架，解释了隐式加速。该视角有助于推动优化研究，但分析基于简化示例和特定损失。

title: LongVT: Incentivizing "Thinking with Long Videos" via Native Tool Calling
abstract: Large multimodal models (LMMs) have shown great potential for video reasoning with textual Chain-of-Thought. However, they remain vulnerable to hallucinations, especially when processing long-form videos where evidence is sparse and temporally dispersed. Inspired by how humans comprehend long videos - by first skimming globally and then examining relevant clips for details - we introduce LongVT, an end-to-end agentic framework that enables "Thinking with Long Videos" via interleaved Multimodal Chain-of-Tool-Thought. Specifically, we exploit LMMs' inherent temporal grounding ability as a native video cropping tool to zoom in on a specific video clip and resample finer-grained video frames. This global-to-local reasoning loop continues until answers are grounded in retrieved visual evidence. Given the scarcity of fine-grained question-answering (QA) data for the long video reasoning task, we curate and will release a data suite named VideoSIAH to facilitate both training and evaluation. Specifically, our training dataset consists of 247.9K samples for tool-integrated cold-start supervised fine-tuning, 1.6K samples for agentic reinforcement learning, and 15.4K samples for agentic reinforcement fine-tuning, respectively. Our evaluation benchmark consists of 1,280 QA pairs that are carefully curated through a semi-automatic data pipeline with human-in-the-loop validation. With a meticulously designed three-stage training strategy and extensive empirical validation, LongVT consistently outperforms existing strong baselines across four challenging long-video understanding and reasoning benchmarks. Our codes, data, and model checkpoints are publicly available at https://github.com/EvolvingLMMs-Lab/LongVT .

light_analysis.overview: 提出 LongVT 框架，通过原生工具调用和交错多模态链式工具思维，实现长视频的全局到局部推理，有效减少幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在长视频推理中易产生幻觉，因为证据稀疏且时间分散。现有方法缺乏类似人类“先全局浏览再局部细查”的能力，导致推理不准确。因此，论文旨在设计一种端到端框架，利用模型的时序定位能力作为原生工具，模拟人类的认知过程。
light_analysis.method: LongVT 利用 LMM 的时序定位能力作为原生视频裁剪工具，通过全局到局部的推理循环，逐步放大视频片段并重采样细粒度帧。训练数据包含 VideoSIAH 套件（247.9K 冷启动 SFT 样本、1.6K 强化学习样本和 15.4K 强化微调样本）。采用三阶段训练策略：工具集成冷启动 SFT、agentic 强化学习和 agentic 强化微调。
light_analysis.result: 在四个长视频理解和推理基准上，LongVT 一致优于现有强基线。尽管摘要未提供具体数值，但强调通过三阶段训练和大量实证验证，模型在减少幻觉和提升推理准确性方面效果显著。所有代码、数据和模型检查点已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: LongVT 通过原生工具调用实现了类人的长视频思考方式，显著提升推理可靠性和可解释性。开源资源可促进后续研究。未来可探索更复杂的工具组合或扩展到多轮交互场景。

title: Bringing Stability to Diffusion: Decomposing and Reducing Variance of Training Masked Diffusion Models
abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) are a promising alternative to autoregressive models (ARMs), but they suffer from inherently much higher training variance. High variance leads to noisier gradient estimates and unstable optimization, so even equally strong pretrained MDMs and ARMs that are competitive at initialization often diverge after task-specific training, with MDMs falling far behind. There has been no theoretical explanation or systematic solution. We derive the first decomposition of MDM training variance into three sources: (A) masking pattern noise, (B) masking rate noise, and (C) data noise, while ARMs are only affected by (C). This explains the fundamental training gap. Building on this foundation, we design six variance-reduction methods, including two core methods: (1) P-POTS, a Pareto-optimal t sampler that minimizes training variance by sampling harder t values more often with appropriately smaller update steps, and (2) MIRROR, which uses negatively correlated samples to reduce (A). Experiments show that compared to standard MDM training, our methods improve accuracy by 7-8% on complex reasoning tasks, while simultaneously reducing run-to-run variability to near ARM levels, substantially narrowing the gap with strong ARM baselines; in most settings, even the best baseline runs remain below the worst run of our method.

light_analysis.overview: 首次分解掩码扩散模型训练方差来源，并设计P-POTS和MIRROR等方差缩减方法，显著提升训练稳定性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDM）相比自回归模型（ARM）训练方差更高，导致梯度估计噪声大、优化不稳定，即使初始化相当，微调后MDM性能也远落后于ARM。现有工作缺乏理论解释和系统解决方案，需深入理解方差来源并设计有效的方差缩减技术。
light_analysis.method: 理论推导MDM训练方差分解为三种来源：(A)掩码模式噪声、(B)掩码率噪声、(C)数据噪声（ARM仅受C影响）。基于此设计六种方差缩减方法，核心为P-POTS（帕累托最优t采样器，增加困难t值的采样频率并配合更小更新步长）和MIRROR（利用负相关样本减少掩码模式噪声）。未指定具体数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在复杂推理任务上，相比标准MDM训练，所提方法准确率提升7-8%，同时将运行间变异性降低至接近ARM水平。在大多数设置下，即使最优基线运行仍然低于本方法的最差运行，显著缩小了MDM与强ARM基线的差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提供了MDM训练方差的理论解释和实用解决方案，有效缩小了MDM与ARM的性能差距。学术价值在于揭示方差来源并设计针对性方法；应用价值在于提升MDM在推理等复杂任务上的稳定性与准确性。未来可探索更多方差缩减策略或应用于其他扩散模型变体。

title: Twice Sequential Monte Carlo for Tree Search
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) methods that leverage search are responsible for many milestone breakthroughs in RL. Sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) recently emerged as an alternative to the Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) algorithm which drove these breakthroughs. SMC is easier to parallelize and more suitable to GPU acceleration. However, it also suffers from large variance and path degeneracy which prevent it from scaling well with increased search depth, i.e., increased sequential compute. To address these problems, we introduce Twice Sequential Monte Carlo Tree Search (TSMCTS). Across discrete and continuous environments TSMCTS outperforms the SMC baseline as well as a popular modern version of MCTS as a policy improvement operator, scales favorably with sequential compute, reduces estimator variance and mitigates the effects of path degeneracy while retaining the properties that make SMC natural to parallelize.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Twice Sequential Monte Carlo Tree Search (TSMCTS)，通过两次顺序蒙特卡洛方法降低方差和路径退化，提升搜索效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于模型的强化学习方法依赖搜索取得了突破，但顺序蒙特卡洛（SMC）虽易并行化，却因大方差和路径退化问题难以随搜索深度扩展。现有方法如MCTS并行性差，而SMC在深度搜索时退化严重，亟需一种既能保持并行优势又能稳定性能的方法。
light_analysis.method: 引入TSMCTS，核心是两次应用顺序蒙特卡洛进行树搜索。通过在搜索过程中重复使用SMC样本并重新加权，减少估计方差并缓解路径退化，同时保留SMC天然适合GPU并行化的特性。算法在离散和连续环境中均可应用，作为策略改进算子。
light_analysis.result: 在离散和连续环境实验中，TSMCTS作为策略改进算子，均优于SMC基线和现代MCTS版本。它随顺序计算量增加表现更好，有效降低了方差并减轻了路径退化，验证了方法在深度搜索中的稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: TSMCTS解决了SMC在深度树搜索中的方差和退化问题，同时保持并行化优势，为基于模型的强化学习提供了更高效的搜索算法。未来可扩展至更复杂的决策任务，并探索其在离线RL中的应用。

title: Towards Selection of Large Multimodal Models as Engines for Burned-in Protected Health Information Detection in Medical Images
abstract: The detection of Protected Health Information (PHI) in medical imaging is critical for safeguarding patient privacy and ensuring compliance with regulatory frameworks. Traditional detection methodologies predominantly utilize Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models in conjunction with named entity recognition. However, recent advancements in Large Multimodal Model (LMM) present new opportunities for enhanced text extraction and semantic analysis. In this study, we systematically benchmark three prominent closed and open-sourced LMMs, namely GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Qwen 2.5 7B, utilizing two distinct pipeline configurations: one dedicated to text analysis alone and another integrating both OCR and semantic analysis. Our results indicate that LMM exhibits superior OCR efficacy (WER: 0.03-0.05, CER: 0.02-0.03) compared to conventional models like EasyOCR. However, this improvement in OCR performance does not consistently correlate with enhanced overall PHI detection accuracy. The strongest performance gains are observed on test cases with complex imprint patterns. In scenarios where text regions are well readable with sufficient contrast, and strong LMMs are employed for text analysis after OCR, different pipeline configurations yield similar results. Furthermore, we provide empirically grounded recommendations for LMM selection tailored to specific operational constraints and propose a deployment strategy that leverages scalable and modular infrastructure.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估大型多模态模型在医学图像PHI检测中的表现，提出基于OCR和语义分析的流水线配置及LMM选择建议。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像中的保护健康信息（PHI）检测对患者隐私保护和法规合规至关重要。传统方法依赖OCR和命名实体识别，但在复杂场景下性能有限。大型多模态模型（LMM）的出现为提升文本提取和语义分析提供了新机会，但缺乏对不同LMM在PHI检测任务中的系统比较和选择指南。
light_analysis.method: 基准测试三个代表性LMM：GPT-4o、Gemini 2.5 Flash和Qwen 2.5 7B，设计两种流水线配置：纯文本分析（依赖LMM自身OCR能力）和OCR+LMM语义分析（先使用OCR提取文本，再由LMM进行语义分析）。评估指标包括词错误率（WER）、字符错误率（CER）和PHI检测准确率，并分析不同复杂度和对比度的测试案例。
light_analysis.result: LMM在OCR任务上表现优异，WER为0.03-0.05，CER为0.02-0.03，显著优于传统EasyOCR模型。然而，OCR性能的提升并不总是与PHI检测准确率正相关。在具有复杂印记图案的测试案例中，LMM带来的性能增益最大；而在文本区域清晰、对比度良好的场景下，不同流水线配置的结果相似。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供了基于经验的LMM选择建议，针对不同操作约束（如隐私、成本、性能）给出具体指南，并提出了一个模块化、可扩展的部署策略。研究为医学图像PHI检测中利用LMM提供了实证基础，有助于推动实际应用中的模型选型和架构设计。

title: MAP4TS: A Multi-Aspect Prompting Framework for Time-Series Forecasting with Large Language Models
abstract: Recent advances have investigated the use of pretrained large language models (LLMs) for time-series forecasting by aligning numerical inputs with LLM embedding spaces. However, existing multimodal approaches often overlook the distinct statistical properties and temporal dependencies that are fundamental to time-series data. To bridge this gap, we propose MAP4TS, a novel Multi-Aspect Prompting Framework that explicitly incorporates classical time-series analysis into the prompt design. Our framework introduces four specialized prompt components: a Global Domain Prompt that conveys dataset-level context, a Local Domain Prompt that encodes recent trends and series-specific behaviors, and a pair of Statistical and Temporal Prompts that embed handcrafted insights derived from autocorrelation (ACF), partial autocorrelation (PACF), and Fourier analysis. Multi-Aspect Prompts are combined with raw time-series embeddings and passed through a cross-modality alignment module to produce unified representations, which are then processed by an LLM and projected for final forecasting. Extensive experiments across eight diverse datasets show that MAP4TS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art LLM-based methods. Our ablation studies further reveal that prompt-aware designs significantly enhance performance stability and that GPT-2 backbones, when paired with structured prompts, outperform larger models like LLaMA in long-term forecasting tasks.
